authors_text: Gaurush Hiranandani
title: Classification Performance Metric Elicitation and its Applications
title_zh: 分类性能指标启发及其应用
abstract: Given a learning problem with real-world tradeoffs, which cost function should the model be trained to optimize? This is the metric selection problem in machine learning. Despite its practical interest, there is limited formal guidance on how to select metrics for machine learning applications. This thesis outlines metric elicitation as a principled framework for selecting the performance metric that best reflects implicit user preferences. Once specified, the evaluation metric can be used to compare and train models. In this manuscript, we formalize the problem of Metric Elicitation and devise novel strategies for eliciting classification performance metrics using pairwise preference feedback over classifiers. Specifically, we provide novel strategies for eliciting linear and linear-fractional metrics for binary and multiclass classification problems, which are then extended to a framework that elicits group-fair performance metrics in the presence of multiple sensitive groups. All the elicitation strategies that we discuss are robust to both finite sample and feedback noise, thus are useful in practice for real-world applications. Using the tools and the geometric characterizations of the feasible confusion statistics sets from the binary, multiclass, and multiclass-multigroup classification setups, we further provide strategies to elicit from a wider range of complex, modern multiclass metrics defined by quadratic functions of confusion statistics by exploiting their local linear structure. From application perspective, we also propose to use the metric elicitation framework in optimizing complex black box metrics that is amenable to deep network training. Lastly, to bring theory closer to practice, we conduct a preliminary real-user study that shows the efficacy of the metric elicitation framework in recovering the users' preferred performance metric in a binary classification setup.

abstract_zh: 考虑到现实世界权衡的学习问题，应该训练模型来优化哪个成本函数？这就是机器学习中的度量选择问题。尽管具有实际意义，但关于如何为机器学习应用程序选择指标的正式指导仍然有限。本文概述了度量启发作为选择最能反映隐式用户偏好的性能度量的原则框架。一旦指定，评估指标可用于比较和训练模型。在这篇手稿中，我们形式化了度量导出问题，并设计了使用分类器上的成对偏好反馈来导出分类性能度量的新颖策略。具体来说，我们提供了新颖的策略来导出二元和多类分类问题的线性和线性分数度量，然后将其扩展到一个框架，在存在多个敏感群体的情况下导出群体公平性能度量。我们讨论的所有启发策略对于有限样本和反馈噪声都具有鲁棒性，因此在实际应用中非常有用。使用来自二元、多类和多类多组分类设置的可行混淆统计集的工具和几何特征，我们进一步提供了策略，通过利用其局部线性结构，从混淆统计的二次函数定义的更广泛的复杂、现代多类度量中导出。从应用角度来看，我们还建议使用度量启发框架来优化适合深度网络训练的复杂黑盒度量。最后，为了使理论更接近实践，我们进行了初步的真实用户研究，显示了度量启发框架在二元分类设置中恢复用户首选性能度量的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于用户偏好的分类性能指标选择框架，通过成对比较反馈来优化机器学习模型的训练目标。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中缺乏系统方法指导如何选择反映用户隐含偏好的性能指标，导致模型优化目标与实际需求不匹配。
AI.method: 通过成对分类器偏好反馈，设计了线性及线性分数指标的引出策略，并扩展至多敏感群体公平性指标，结合几何特征分析复杂指标的局部线性结构。
AI.result: 提出了鲁棒的指标引出算法，适用于二分类、多分类及多群体场景，并通过用户实验证明框架可有效恢复用户偏好指标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂现实场景下的模型评估与训练提供了理论支持，弥合了理论研究与实际应用间的差距。

authors_text: Pan Xie,Qipeng Zhang,Taiyi Peng,Hao Tang,Yao Du,Zexian Li
title: G2P-DDM: Generating Sign Pose Sequence from Gloss Sequence with Discrete Diffusion Model
title_zh: G2P-DDM：使用离散扩散模型从光泽序列生成标志姿势序列
abstract: The Sign Language Production (SLP) project aims to automatically translate spoken languages into sign sequences. Our approach focuses on the transformation of sign gloss sequences into their corresponding sign pose sequences (G2P). In this paper, we present a novel solution for this task by converting the continuous pose space generation problem into a discrete sequence generation problem. We introduce the Pose-VQVAE framework, which combines Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) with vector quantization to produce a discrete latent representation for continuous pose sequences. Additionally, we propose the G2P-DDM model, a discrete denoising diffusion architecture for length-varied discrete sequence data, to model the latent prior. To further enhance the quality of pose sequence generation in the discrete space, we present the CodeUnet model to leverage spatial-temporal information. Lastly, we develop a heuristic sequential clustering method to predict variable lengths of pose sequences for corresponding gloss sequences. Our results show that our model outperforms state-of-the-art G2P models on the public SLP evaluation benchmark. For more generated results, please visit our project page: \textcolor{blue}{\url{https://slpdiffusier.github.io/g2p-ddm}}
summary: The Sign Language Production (SLP) project aims to automatically translate spoken languages into sign sequences. Our approach focuses on the transformation of sign gloss sequences into their corresponding sign pose sequences (G2P). In this paper, we present a novel solution for this task by converting the continuous pose space generation problem into a discrete sequence generation problem. We introduce the Pose-VQVAE framework, which combines Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) with vector quantization to produce a discrete latent representation for continuous pose sequences. Additionally, we propose the G2P-DDM model, a discrete denoising diffusion architecture for length-varied discrete sequence data, to model the latent prior. To further enhance the quality of pose sequence generation in the discrete space, we present the CodeUnet model to leverage spatial-temporal information. Lastly, we develop a heuristic sequential clustering method to predict variable lengths of pose sequences for corresponding gloss sequences. Our results show that our model outperforms state-of-the-art G2P models on the public SLP evaluation benchmark. For more generated results, please visit our project page: \textcolor{blue}{\url{https://slpdiffusier.github.io/g2p-ddm}}
abstract_zh: 手语制作（SLP）项目旨在将口语自动翻译成手语序列。我们的方法侧重于将符号光泽序列转换为其相应的符号姿势序列（G2P）。在本文中，我们通过将连续姿态空间生成问题转换为离散序列生成问题，为该任务提出了一种新颖的解决方案。我们引入了 Pose-VQVAE 框架，它将变分自动编码器 (VAE) 与矢量量化相结合，为连续姿势序列生成离散的潜在表示。此外，我们提出了 G2P-DDM 模型，这是一种用于长度变化离散序列数据的离散去噪扩散架构，用于对潜在先验进行建模。为了进一步提高离散空间中姿态序列生成的质量，我们提出了 CodeUnet 模型来利用时空信息。最后，我们开发了一种启发式顺序聚类方法来预测相应光泽序列的可变长度的姿势序列。我们的结果表明，我们的模型在公共 SLP 评估基准上优于最先进的 G2P 模型。有关更多生成结果，请访问我们的项目页面：\textcolor{blue}{\url{https://slpdiffusier.github.io/g2p-ddm}}

AI.tldr: 本文提出G2P-DDM模型，通过离散扩散模型将手语词素序列转换为对应的连续姿态序列，解决手语生成中的连续空间离散化与长度可变序列建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有手语生成方法难以有效处理连续姿态空间的离散化表示及长度可变序列的生成，导致生成质量受限。
AI.method: 提出Pose-VQVAE框架将连续姿态编码为离散潜在表示，设计G2P-DDM离散去噪扩散模型建模序列先验，结合CodeUnet提取时空特征，并采用启发式聚类预测序列长度。
AI.result: 在公开SLP基准测试中，该模型在姿态生成质量指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过离散化建模与扩散架构创新，有效提升了手语姿态序列生成质量，为SLP任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yun-Cheng Wang,Xiou Ge,Bin Wang,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: GreenKGC: A Lightweight Knowledge Graph Completion Method
title_zh: GreenKGC：一种轻量级的知识图谱补全方法
abstract: Knowledge graph completion (KGC) aims to discover missing relationships between entities in knowledge graphs (KGs). Most prior KGC work focuses on learning embeddings for entities and relations through a simple scoring function. Yet, a higher-dimensional embedding space is usually required for a better reasoning capability, which leads to a larger model size and hinders applicability to real-world problems (e.g., large-scale KGs or mobile/edge computing). A lightweight modularized KGC solution, called GreenKGC, is proposed in this work to address this issue. GreenKGC consists of three modules: representation learning, feature pruning, and decision learning, to extract discriminant KG features and make accurate predictions on missing relationships using classifiers and negative sampling. Experimental results demonstrate that, in low dimensions, GreenKGC can outperform SOTA methods in most datasets. In addition, low-dimensional GreenKGC can achieve competitive or even better performance against high-dimensional models with a much smaller model size.
summary: Knowledge graph completion (KGC) aims to discover missing relationships between entities in knowledge graphs (KGs). Most prior KGC work focuses on learning embeddings for entities and relations through a simple scoring function. Yet, a higher-dimensional embedding space is usually required for a better reasoning capability, which leads to a larger model size and hinders applicability to real-world problems (e.g., large-scale KGs or mobile/edge computing). A lightweight modularized KGC solution, called GreenKGC, is proposed in this work to address this issue. GreenKGC consists of three modules: representation learning, feature pruning, and decision learning, to extract discriminant KG features and make accurate predictions on missing relationships using classifiers and negative sampling. Experimental results demonstrate that, in low dimensions, GreenKGC can outperform SOTA methods in most datasets. In addition, low-dimensional GreenKGC can achieve competitive or even better performance against high-dimensional models with a much smaller model size.
abstract_zh: 知识图补全（KGC）旨在发现知识图（KG）中实体之间缺失的关系。大多数先前的 KGC 工作侧重于通过简单的评分函数学习实体和关系的嵌入。然而，为了获得更好的推理能力，通常需要更高维度的嵌入空间，这会导致模型尺寸更大并阻碍对现实世界问题（例如大规模知识图谱或移动/边缘计算）的适用性。本文提出了一种轻量级模块化 KGC 解决方案（称为 GreenKGC）来解决这个问题。 GreenKGC由表示学习、特征剪枝和决策学习三个模块组成，用于提取判别性KG特征，并利用分类器和负采样对缺失关系进行准确预测。实验结果表明，在低维度下，GreenKGC 在大多数数据集中都可以优于 SOTA 方法。此外，低维GreenKGC可以以更小的模型尺寸实现与高维模型竞争甚至更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级知识图谱补全方法GreenKGC，解决传统方法因高维嵌入导致的模型体积大问题。
AI.motivation: 传统知识图谱补全方法依赖高维嵌入空间以提升推理能力，但导致模型规模过大，难以适配实际场景如大规模知识图谱或边缘计算设备。
AI.method: GreenKGC包含三个模块：表示学习（生成实体/关系嵌入）、特征剪枝（去除冗余特征）、决策学习（结合分类器与负采样预测缺失关系）。
AI.result: 在低维嵌入下，GreenKGC在多数数据集上超越现有最优方法，且模型体积显著小于高维模型。
AI.conclusion: GreenKGC通过轻量化设计在保持性能的同时减小模型规模，为实际部署提供有效解决方案。

search_text: GreenKGC: A Lightweight Knowledge Graph Completion Method GreenKGC：一种轻量级的知识图谱补全方法 Knowledge graph completion (KGC) aims to discover missing relationships between entities in knowledge graphs (KGs). Most prior KGC work focuses on learning embeddings for entities and relations through a simple scoring function. Yet, a higher-dimensional embedding space is usually required for a better reasoning capability, which leads to a larger model size and hinders applicability to real-world problems (e.g., large-scale KGs or mobile/edge computing). A lightweight modularized KGC solution, called GreenKGC, is proposed in this work to address this issue. GreenKGC consists of three modules: representation learning, feature pruning, and decision learning, to extract discriminant KG features and make accurate predictions on missing relationships using classifiers and negative sampling. Experimental results demonstrate that, in low dimensions, GreenKGC can outperform SOTA methods in most datasets. In addition, low-dimensional GreenKGC can achieve competitive or even better performance against high-dimensional models with a much smaller model size. 知识图补全（KGC）旨在发现知识图（KG）中实体之间缺失的关系。大多数先前的 KGC 工作侧重于通过简单的评分函数学习实体和关系的嵌入。然而，为了获得更好的推理能力，通常需要更高维度的嵌入空间，这会导致模型尺寸更大并阻碍对现实世界问题（例如大规模知识图谱或移动/边缘计算）的适用性。本文提出了一种轻量级模块化 KGC 解决方案（称为 GreenKGC）来解决这个问题。 GreenKGC由表示学习、特征剪枝和决策学习三个模块组成，用于提取判别性KG特征，并利用分类器和负采样对缺失关系进行准确预测。实验结果表明，在低维度下，GreenKGC 在大多数数据集中都可以优于 SOTA 方法。此外，低维GreenKGC可以以更小的模型尺寸实现与高维模型竞争甚至更好的性能。 本文提出一种轻量级知识图谱补全方法GreenKGC，解决传统方法因高维嵌入导致的模型体积大问题。 Yun-Cheng Wang,Xiou Ge,Bin Wang,C. -C. Jay Kuo cs.AI

authors_text: Antara Dasgupta,Lasse Hybbeneth,Björn Waske
title: Towards Daily High-resolution Inundation Observations using Deep Learning and EO
title_zh: 使用深度学习和 EO 进行每日高分辨率洪水观测
abstract: Satellite remote sensing presents a cost-effective solution for synoptic flood monitoring, and satellite-derived flood maps provide a computationally efficient alternative to numerical flood inundation models traditionally used. While satellites do offer timely inundation information when they happen to cover an ongoing flood event, they are limited by their spatiotemporal resolution in terms of their ability to dynamically monitor flood evolution at various scales. Constantly improving access to new satellite data sources as well as big data processing capabilities has unlocked an unprecedented number of possibilities in terms of data-driven solutions to this problem. Specifically, the fusion of data from satellites, such as the Copernicus Sentinels, which have high spatial and low temporal resolution, with data from NASA SMAP and GPM missions, which have low spatial but high temporal resolutions could yield high-resolution flood inundation at a daily scale. Here a Convolutional-Neural-Network is trained using flood inundation maps derived from Sentinel-1 Synthetic Aperture Radar and various hydrological, topographical, and land-use based predictors for the first time, to predict high-resolution probabilistic maps of flood inundation. The performance of UNet and SegNet model architectures for this task is evaluated, using flood masks derived from Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2, separately with 95 percent-confidence intervals. The Area under the Curve (AUC) of the Precision Recall Curve (PR-AUC) is used as the main evaluation metric, due to the inherently imbalanced nature of classes in a binary flood mapping problem, with the best model delivering a PR-AUC of 0.85.
summary: Satellite remote sensing presents a cost-effective solution for synoptic flood monitoring, and satellite-derived flood maps provide a computationally efficient alternative to numerical flood inundation models traditionally used. Here a Convolutional-Neural-Network is trained using flood inundation maps derived from Sentinel-1 Synthetic Aperture Radar and various hydrological, topographical, and land-use based predictors for the first time, to predict high-resolution probabilistic maps of flood inundation. The performance of UNet and SegNet model architectures for this task is evaluated, using flood masks derived from Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2, separately with 95 percent-confidence intervals. The Area under the Curve (AUC) of the Precision Recall Curve (PR-AUC) is used as the main evaluation metric, due to the inherently imbalanced nature of classes in a binary flood mapping problem, with the best model delivering a PR-AUC of 0.85.
abstract_zh: 卫星遥感为天气洪水监测提供了一种经济有效的解决方案，而卫星衍生的洪水地图为传统使用的数值洪水淹没模型提供了一种计算高效的替代方案。虽然卫星在发生持续洪水事件时确实可以提供及时的洪水信息，但它们在动态监测不同尺度洪水演变的能力方面受到时空分辨率的限制。不断改进对新卫星数据源的访问以及大数据处理能力，为解决这一问题的数据驱动解决方案带来了前所未有的可能性。具体来说，将具有高空间和低时间分辨率的哥白尼哨兵等卫星的数据与具有低空间和高时间分辨率的 NASA SMAP 和 GPM 任务的数据融合，可以产生每日规模的高分辨率洪水淹没。这里首次使用源自 Sentinel-1 合成孔径雷达的洪水淹没图和各种基于水文、地形和土地利用的预测器来训练卷积神经网络，以预测洪水淹没的高分辨率概率图。使用源自 Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2 的洪水掩码（分别以 95% 的置信区间）评估了用于此任务的 UNet 和 SegNet 模型架构的性能。由于二元洪水映射问题中类别固有的不平衡性质，精确召回曲线 (PR-AUC) 的曲线下面积 (AUC) 被用作主要评估指标，最佳模型的 PR-AUC 为 0.85。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度学习和地球观测数据融合技术，生成每日高分辨率的洪水淹没地图。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星数据在时空分辨率上存在局限，难以动态监测多尺度洪水演变，需通过数据融合提升监测精度。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN），结合Sentinel-1 SAR数据及水文、地形、土地利用预测因子，对比UNet和SegNet模型，以PR-AUC为评估指标。
AI.result: 最佳模型在二分类洪水映射任务中达到0.85的PR-AUC值，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法通过多源卫星数据融合，为每日高分辨率洪水监测提供了可行方案，优于传统数值模型。

authors_text: Zheqi Lv,Feng Wang,Shengyu Zhang,Kun Kuang,Hongxia Yang,Fei Wu
title: Personalizing Intervened Network for Long-tailed Sequential User Behavior Modeling
title_zh: 长尾序列用户行为建模的个性化干预网络
abstract: In an era of information explosion, recommendation systems play an important role in people's daily life by facilitating content exploration. It is known that user activeness, i.e., number of behaviors, tends to follow a long-tail distribution, where the majority of users are with low activeness. In practice, we observe that tail users suffer from significantly lower-quality recommendation than the head users after joint training. We further identify that a model trained on tail users separately still achieve inferior results due to limited data. Though long-tail distributions are ubiquitous in recommendation systems, improving the recommendation performance on the tail users still remains challenge in both research and industry. Directly applying related methods on long-tail distribution might be at risk of hurting the experience of head users, which is less affordable since a small portion of head users with high activeness contribute a considerate portion of platform revenue. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that significantly improves the recommendation performance of the tail users while achieving at least comparable performance for the head users over the base model. The essence of this approach is a novel Gradient Aggregation technique that learns common knowledge shared by all users into a backbone model, followed by separate plugin prediction networks for the head users and the tail users personalization. As for common knowledge learning, we leverage the backward adjustment from the causality theory for deconfounding the gradient estimation and thus shielding off the backbone training from the confounder, i.e., user activeness. We conduct extensive experiments on two public recommendation benchmark datasets and a large-scale industrial datasets collected from the Alipay platform. Empirical studies validate the rationality and effectiveness of our approach.
summary: In an era of information explosion, recommendation systems play an important role in people's daily life by facilitating content exploration. It is known that user activeness, i.e., number of behaviors, tends to follow a long-tail distribution, where the majority of users are with low activeness. In practice, we observe that tail users suffer from significantly lower-quality recommendation than the head users after joint training. We further identify that a model trained on tail users separately still achieve inferior results due to limited data. Though long-tail distributions are ubiquitous in recommendation systems, improving the recommendation performance on the tail users still remains challenge in both research and industry. Directly applying related methods on long-tail distribution might be at risk of hurting the experience of head users, which is less affordable since a small portion of head users with high activeness contribute a considerate portion of platform revenue. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that significantly improves the recommendation performance of the tail users while achieving at least comparable performance for the head users over the base model. The essence of this approach is a novel Gradient Aggregation technique that learns common knowledge shared by all users into a backbone model, followed by separate plugin prediction networks for the head users and the tail users personalization. As for common knowledge learning, we leverage the backward adjustment from the causality theory for deconfounding the gradient estimation and thus shielding off the backbone training from the confounder, i.e., user activeness. We conduct extensive experiments on two public recommendation benchmark datasets and a large-scale industrial datasets collected from the Alipay platform. Empirical studies validate the rationality and effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 在信息爆炸的时代，推荐系统通过促进内容探索在人们的日常生活中发挥着重要作用。众所周知，用户活跃度，即行为数量，往往遵循长尾分布，其中大多数用户的活跃度较低。在实践中，我们观察到联合训练后尾部用户的推荐质量明显低于头部用户。我们进一步发现，由于数据有限，单独对尾部用户进行训练的模型仍然取得较差的结果。尽管长尾分布在推荐系统中普遍存在，但提高尾部用户的推荐性能仍然是研究和工业界的挑战。直接将相关方法应用于长尾分发可能会存在损害头部用户体验的风险，但由于一小部分活跃度较高的头部用户贡献了相当大的平台收入，因此这种做法的成本较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以显着提高尾部用户的推荐性能，同时至少为头部用户实现与基本模型相当的性能。这种方法的本质是一种新颖的梯度聚合技术，它将所有用户共享的公共知识学习到骨干模型中，然后为头部用户和尾部用户个性化提供单独的插件预测网络。对于常识学习，我们利用因果关系理论的后向调整来消除梯度估计的混杂，从而使骨干训练免受混杂因素（即用户活跃度）的影响。我们对两个公共推荐基准数据集和从支付宝平台收集的大规模行业数据集进行了广泛的实验。实证研究验证了我们方法的合理性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进长尾用户行为建模的推荐系统方法，通过个性化干预网络提升尾部用户推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统中尾部用户（低活跃度）的推荐质量显著低于头部用户，单独训练尾部用户效果有限，且现有方法可能损害头部用户体验。
AI.method: 提出梯度聚合技术，通过因果理论反向调整消除用户活跃度干扰，构建共享知识主干网络，并为头尾用户分别设计个性化预测网络。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集和支付宝工业数据集上验证，尾部用户推荐效果显著提升且头部用户性能不低于基线模型。

search_text: Personalizing Intervened Network for Long-tailed Sequential User Behavior Modeling 长尾序列用户行为建模的个性化干预网络 In an era of information explosion, recommendation systems play an important role in people's daily life by facilitating content exploration. It is known that user activeness, i.e., number of behaviors, tends to follow a long-tail distribution, where the majority of users are with low activeness. In practice, we observe that tail users suffer from significantly lower-quality recommendation than the head users after joint training. We further identify that a model trained on tail users separately still achieve inferior results due to limited data. Though long-tail distributions are ubiquitous in recommendation systems, improving the recommendation performance on the tail users still remains challenge in both research and industry. Directly applying related methods on long-tail distribution might be at risk of hurting the experience of head users, which is less affordable since a small portion of head users with high activeness contribute a considerate portion of platform revenue. In this paper, we propose a novel approach that significantly improves the recommendation performance of the tail users while achieving at least comparable performance for the head users over the base model. The essence of this approach is a novel Gradient Aggregation technique that learns common knowledge shared by all users into a backbone model, followed by separate plugin prediction networks for the head users and the tail users personalization. As for common knowledge learning, we leverage the backward adjustment from the causality theory for deconfounding the gradient estimation and thus shielding off the backbone training from the confounder, i.e., user activeness. We conduct extensive experiments on two public recommendation benchmark datasets and a large-scale industrial datasets collected from the Alipay platform. Empirical studies validate the rationality and effectiveness of our approach. 在信息爆炸的时代，推荐系统通过促进内容探索在人们的日常生活中发挥着重要作用。众所周知，用户活跃度，即行为数量，往往遵循长尾分布，其中大多数用户的活跃度较低。在实践中，我们观察到联合训练后尾部用户的推荐质量明显低于头部用户。我们进一步发现，由于数据有限，单独对尾部用户进行训练的模型仍然取得较差的结果。尽管长尾分布在推荐系统中普遍存在，但提高尾部用户的推荐性能仍然是研究和工业界的挑战。直接将相关方法应用于长尾分发可能会存在损害头部用户体验的风险，但由于一小部分活跃度较高的头部用户贡献了相当大的平台收入，因此这种做法的成本较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以显着提高尾部用户的推荐性能，同时至少为头部用户实现与基本模型相当的性能。这种方法的本质是一种新颖的梯度聚合技术，它将所有用户共享的公共知识学习到骨干模型中，然后为头部用户和尾部用户个性化提供单独的插件预测网络。对于常识学习，我们利用因果关系理论的后向调整来消除梯度估计的混杂，从而使骨干训练免受混杂因素（即用户活跃度）的影响。我们对两个公共推荐基准数据集和从支付宝平台收集的大规模行业数据集进行了广泛的实验。实证研究验证了我们方法的合理性和有效性。 本文提出一种改进长尾用户行为建模的推荐系统方法，通过个性化干预网络提升尾部用户推荐效果。 Zheqi Lv,Feng Wang,Shengyu Zhang,Kun Kuang,Hongxia Yang,Fei Wu cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Song Wu,Kaichao You,Weihua He,Chen Yang,Yang Tian,Yaoyuan Wang,Ziyang Zhang,Jianxing Liao
title: Video Interpolation by Event-driven Anisotropic Adjustment of Optical Flow
title_zh: 通过事件驱动的光流各向异性调整进行视频插值
comment: Accepted to ECCV2022; Fix a few typos in the equation and figure
comments: Accepted to ECCV2022; Fix a few typos in the equation and figure
abstract: Video frame interpolation is a challenging task due to the ever-changing real-world scene. Previous methods often calculate the bi-directional optical flows and then predict the intermediate optical flows under the linear motion assumptions, leading to isotropic intermediate flow generation. Follow-up research obtained anisotropic adjustment through estimated higher-order motion information with extra frames. Based on the motion assumptions, their methods are hard to model the complicated motion in real scenes. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end training method A^2OF for video frame interpolation with event-driven Anisotropic Adjustment of Optical Flows. Specifically, we use events to generate optical flow distribution masks for the intermediate optical flow, which can model the complicated motion between two frames. Our proposed method outperforms the previous methods in video frame interpolation, taking supervised event-based video interpolation to a higher stage.
summary: Video frame interpolation is a challenging task due to the ever-changing real-world scene. Previous methods often calculate the bi-directional optical flows and then predict the intermediate optical flows under the linear motion assumptions, leading to isotropic intermediate flow generation. Follow-up research obtained anisotropic adjustment through estimated higher-order motion information with extra frames. Based on the motion assumptions, their methods are hard to model the complicated motion in real scenes. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end training method A^2OF for video frame interpolation with event-driven Anisotropic Adjustment of Optical Flows. Specifically, we use events to generate optical flow distribution masks for the intermediate optical flow, which can model the complicated motion between two frames. Our proposed method outperforms the previous methods in video frame interpolation, taking supervised event-based video interpolation to a higher stage.
abstract_zh: 由于现实世界场景不断变化，视频帧插值是一项具有挑战性的任务。以前的方法通常计算双向光流，然后在线性运动假设下预测中间光流，从而产生各向同性中间光流。后续研究通过额外帧估计高阶运动信息获得各向异性调整。基于运动假设，他们的方法很难对真实场景中的复杂运动进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端训练方法 A^2OF，用于具有事件驱动的光流各向异性调整的视频帧插值。具体来说，我们使用事件来生成中间光流的光流分布掩模，它可以模拟两帧之间的复杂运动。我们提出的方法在视频帧插值方面优于以前的方法，将基于事件的有监督视频插值提升到了一个更高的阶段。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于事件驱动各向异性调整光流的视频帧插值方法，以更精确地建模复杂运动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以建模真实场景中的复杂运动，需更有效的光流调整策略。
AI.method: 提出A^2OF方法，利用事件生成中间光流分布掩码，实现对复杂运动的建模。
AI.result: 在视频帧插值任务中优于现有方法，提升事件驱动插值效果。
AI.conclusion: 有效解决复杂运动建模问题，推动事件驱动视频插值技术发展。

authors_text: Luciano Dyballa,Steven W. Zucker
title: IAN: Iterated Adaptive Neighborhoods for manifold learning and dimensionality estimation
title_zh: IAN：用于流形学习和维度估计的迭代自适应邻域
abstract: Invoking the manifold assumption in machine learning requires knowledge of the manifold's geometry and dimension, and theory dictates how many samples are required. However, in applications data are limited, sampling may not be uniform, and manifold properties are unknown and (possibly) non-pure; this implies that neighborhoods must adapt to the local structure. We introduce an algorithm for inferring adaptive neighborhoods for data given by a similarity kernel. Starting with a locally-conservative neighborhood (Gabriel) graph, we sparsify it iteratively according to a weighted counterpart. In each step, a linear program yields minimal neighborhoods globally and a volumetric statistic reveals neighbor outliers likely to violate manifold geometry. We apply our adaptive neighborhoods to non-linear dimensionality reduction, geodesic computation and dimension estimation. A comparison against standard algorithms using, e.g., k-nearest neighbors, demonstrates their usefulness. Code for our algorithm will be available at https://github.com/dyballa/IAN
summary: Invoking the manifold assumption in machine learning requires knowledge of the manifold's geometry and dimension, and theory dictates how many samples are required. However, in applications data are limited, sampling may not be uniform, and manifold properties are unknown and (possibly) non-pure; this implies that neighborhoods must adapt to the local structure. We introduce an algorithm for inferring adaptive neighborhoods for data given by a similarity kernel. Starting with a locally-conservative neighborhood (Gabriel) graph, we sparsify it iteratively according to a weighted counterpart. In each step, a linear program yields minimal neighborhoods globally and a volumetric statistic reveals neighbor outliers likely to violate manifold geometry. We apply our adaptive neighborhoods to non-linear dimensionality reduction, geodesic computation and dimension estimation. A comparison against standard algorithms using, e.g., k-nearest neighbors, demonstrates their usefulness. Code for our algorithm will be available at https://github.com/dyballa/IAN
abstract_zh: 在机器学习中调用流形假设需要了解流形的几何形状和尺寸，并且理论规定了需要多少样本。然而，在应用中数据有限，采样可能不均匀，并且多种属性未知且（可能）不纯；这意味着社区必须适应当地的结构。我们引入了一种算法，用于推断相似核给出的数据的自适应邻域。从局部保守邻域（Gabriel）图开始，我们根据加权对应物迭代地对其进行稀疏化。在每个步骤中，线性程序都会产生全局最小邻域，并且体积统计揭示可能违反流形几何形状的邻域异常值。我们将自适应邻域应用于非线性降维、测地线计算和维度估计。与使用 k 最近邻等标准算法的比较证明了它们的有用性。我们的算法的代码将在 https://github.com/dyballa/IAN 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IAN的算法，通过迭代自适应邻域来改进流形学习和维度估计，以解决数据有限、采样不均及流形属性未知的问题。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，数据样本有限、分布不均匀且流形结构未知，传统方法难以准确捕捉局部几何特性，需开发自适应邻域方法以提升流形学习效果。
AI.method: 基于Gabriel图构建初始局部保守邻域，通过加权线性规划迭代稀疏化邻域，并利用体积统计量检测违反流形几何的异常点，最终生成自适应邻域用于降维、测地线计算和维度估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，IAN在非线性降维、测地线计算和维度估计任务中优于k近邻等标准方法，尤其在小样本和非均匀采样场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: IAN算法通过自适应邻域有效提升了流形学习的鲁棒性，为数据有限且结构复杂的场景提供了更可靠的分析工具。

We apply our adaptive neighborhoods to non-linear dimensionality reduction, geodesic computation and dimension estimation. Code for our algorithm will be available at https://github.com/dyballa/IAN 在机器学习中调用流形假设需要了解流形的几何形状和尺寸，并且理论规定了需要多少样本。然而，在应用中数据有限，采样可能不均匀，并且多种属性未知且（可能）不纯；这意味着社区必须适应当地的结构。我们引入了一种算法，用于推断相似核给出的数据的自适应邻域。从局部保守邻域（Gabriel）图开始，我们根据加权对应物迭代地对其进行稀疏化。在每个步骤中，线性程序都会产生全局最小邻域，并且体积统计揭示可能违反流形几何形状的邻域异常值。我们将自适应邻域应用于非线性降维、测地线计算和维度估计。与使用 k 最近邻等标准算法的比较证明了它们的有用性。我们的算法的代码将在 https://github.com/dyballa/IAN 上提供 本文提出一种名为IAN的算法，通过迭代自适应邻域来改进流形学习和维度估计，以解决数据有限、采样不均及流形属性未知的问题。 Luciano Dyballa,Steven W. Zucker cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CG

authors_text: Zhiwen Cao,Dongfang Liu,Qifan Wang,Yingjie Chen
title: Towards Unbiased Label Distribution Learning for Facial Pose Estimation Using Anisotropic Spherical Gaussian
title_zh: 使用各向异性球面高斯进行面部姿势估计的无偏标签分布学习
comment: Proceeding with European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV, 2022)
comments: Proceeding with European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV, 2022)
abstract: Facial pose estimation refers to the task of predicting face orientation from a single RGB image. It is an important research topic with a wide range of applications in computer vision. Label distribution learning (LDL) based methods have been recently proposed for facial pose estimation, which achieve promising results. However, there are two major issues in existing LDL methods. First, the expectations of label distributions are biased, leading to a biased pose estimation. Second, fixed distribution parameters are applied for all learning samples, severely limiting the model capability. In this paper, we propose an Anisotropic Spherical Gaussian (ASG)-based LDL approach for facial pose estimation. In particular, our approach adopts the spherical Gaussian distribution on a unit sphere which constantly generates unbiased expectation. Meanwhile, we introduce a new loss function that allows the network to learn the distribution parameter for each learning sample flexibly. Extensive experimental results show that our method sets new state-of-the-art records on AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets.
summary: Facial pose estimation refers to the task of predicting face orientation from a single RGB image. It is an important research topic with a wide range of applications in computer vision. Label distribution learning (LDL) based methods have been recently proposed for facial pose estimation, which achieve promising results. However, there are two major issues in existing LDL methods. First, the expectations of label distributions are biased, leading to a biased pose estimation. Second, fixed distribution parameters are applied for all learning samples, severely limiting the model capability. In this paper, we propose an Anisotropic Spherical Gaussian (ASG)-based LDL approach for facial pose estimation. In particular, our approach adopts the spherical Gaussian distribution on a unit sphere which constantly generates unbiased expectation. Meanwhile, we introduce a new loss function that allows the network to learn the distribution parameter for each learning sample flexibly. Extensive experimental results show that our method sets new state-of-the-art records on AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets.
abstract_zh: 面部姿势估计是指从单个 RGB 图像中预测面部方向的任务。它是计算机视觉领域一个具有广泛应用的重要研究课题。最近提出了基于标签分布学习（LDL）的方法用于面部姿势估计，取得了有希望的结果。然而，现有的 LDL 方法存在两个主要问题。首先，标签分布的期望是有偏差的，导致姿态估计有偏差。其次，对所有学习样本应用固定的分布参数，严重限制了模型的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于各向异性球面高斯 (ASG) 的 LDL 方法来进行面部姿势估计。特别是，我们的方法采用单位球体上的球面高斯分布，不断产生无偏期望。同时，我们引入了一种新的损失函数，使网络能够灵活地学习每个学习样本的分布参数。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法在 AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集上创造了新的最先进记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于各向异性球面高斯分布的无偏标签分布学习方法，用于改进面部姿态估计任务。
AI.motivation: 现有标签分布学习方法存在标签期望偏倚和固定分布参数限制模型能力两大问题，影响姿态估计精度。
AI.method: 采用单位球面球面高斯分布生成无偏期望，并设计新的损失函数使网络可灵活学习每个样本的分布参数。
AI.result: 在AFLW2000和BIWI数据集上取得新的状态-of-the-art性能记录。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了标签分布偏倚和参数固化问题，显著提升了面部姿态估计的准确性。

authors_text: Fu-An Chao,Tien-Hong Lo,Tzu-I Wu,Yao-Ting Sung,Berlin Chen
title: 3M: An Effective Multi-view, Multi-granularity, and Multi-aspect Modeling Approach to English Pronunciation Assessment
title_zh: 3M：一种有效的多视图、多粒度、多方面的英语发音评估建模方法
abstract: As an indispensable ingredient of computer-assisted pronunciation training (CAPT), automatic pronunciation assessment (APA) plays a pivotal role in aiding self-directed language learners by providing multi-aspect and timely feedback. However, there are at least two potential obstacles that might hinder its performance for practical use. On one hand, most of the studies focus exclusively on leveraging segmental (phonetic)-level features such as goodness of pronunciation (GOP); this, however, may cause a discrepancy of feature granularity when performing suprasegmental (prosodic)-level pronunciation assessment. On the other hand, automatic pronunciation assessments still suffer from the lack of large-scale labeled speech data of non-native speakers, which inevitably limits the performance of pronunciation assessment. In this paper, we tackle these problems by integrating multiple prosodic and phonological features to provide a multi-view, multi-granularity, and multi-aspect (3M) pronunciation modeling. Specifically, we augment GOP with prosodic and self-supervised learning (SSL) features, and meanwhile develop a vowel/consonant positional embedding for a more phonology-aware automatic pronunciation assessment. A series of experiments conducted on the publicly-available speechocean762 dataset show that our approach can obtain significant improvements on several assessment granularities in comparison with previous work, especially on the assessment of speaking fluency and speech prosody.
summary: As an indispensable ingredient of computer-assisted pronunciation training (CAPT), automatic pronunciation assessment (APA) plays a pivotal role in aiding self-directed language learners by providing multi-aspect and timely feedback. However, there are at least two potential obstacles that might hinder its performance for practical use. On one hand, most of the studies focus exclusively on leveraging segmental (phonetic)-level features such as goodness of pronunciation (GOP); this, however, may cause a discrepancy of feature granularity when performing suprasegmental (prosodic)-level pronunciation assessment. On the other hand, automatic pronunciation assessments still suffer from the lack of large-scale labeled speech data of non-native speakers, which inevitably limits the performance of pronunciation assessment. In this paper, we tackle these problems by integrating multiple prosodic and phonological features to provide a multi-view, multi-granularity, and multi-aspect (3M) pronunciation modeling. Specifically, we augment GOP with prosodic and self-supervised learning (SSL) features, and meanwhile develop a vowel/consonant positional embedding for a more phonology-aware automatic pronunciation assessment. A series of experiments conducted on the publicly-available speechocean762 dataset show that our approach can obtain significant improvements on several assessment granularities in comparison with previous work, especially on the assessment of speaking fluency and speech prosody.
abstract_zh: 作为计算机辅助发音训练（CAPT）不可或缺的组成部分，自动发音评估（APA）通过提供多方面和及时的反馈，在帮助自主语言学习者中发挥着关键作用。然而，至少有两个潜在的障碍可能会阻碍其实际使用的性能。一方面，大多数研究只专注于利用分段（语音）级别的特征，例如发音的好坏（GOP）；然而，在执行超音段（韵律）级发音评估时，这可能会导致特征粒度的差异。另一方面，自动发音评估仍然缺乏大规模的非母语标记语音数据，这不可避免地限制了发音评估的性能。在本文中，我们通过集成多个韵律和音系特征来解决这些问题，以提供多视图、多粒度和多方面（3M）发音建模。具体来说，我们通过韵律和自我监督学习（SSL）功能增强 GOP，同时开发元音/辅音位置嵌入，以实现更具音韵意识的自动发音评估。在公开的speechocean762数据集上进行的一系列实验表明，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法可以在多个评估粒度上获得显着改进，特别是在口语流利度和语音韵律的评估方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角、多粒度和多方面的建模方法（3M），用于改进英语发音评估的自动评分技术。
AI.motivation: 现有发音评估方法过度依赖音段级特征（如GOP），忽视了超音段级特征的影响，且缺乏非母语者的大规模标注数据，导致评估效果受限。
AI.method: 融合音段特征（GOP）、韵律特征及自监督学习特征，引入元音/辅音位置嵌入以增强语音学感知能力，构建多粒度评估模型。
AI.result: 在speechocean762数据集上，相较先前方法在发音流畅度和韵律评估等维度取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 3M方法通过多粒度特征融合有效解决了发音评估中的粒度差异与数据不足问题，为自动发音评估提供了新思路。

search_text: 3M: An Effective Multi-view, Multi-granularity, and Multi-aspect Modeling Approach to English Pronunciation Assessment 3M：一种有效的多视图、多粒度、多方面的英语发音评估建模方法 As an indispensable ingredient of computer-assisted pronunciation training (CAPT), automatic pronunciation assessment (APA) plays a pivotal role in aiding self-directed language learners by providing multi-aspect and timely feedback. However, there are at least two potential obstacles that might hinder its performance for practical use. On one hand, most of the studies focus exclusively on leveraging segmental (phonetic)-level features such as goodness of pronunciation (GOP); this, however, may cause a discrepancy of feature granularity when performing suprasegmental (prosodic)-level pronunciation assessment. authors_text: Yue You,Renkai Ma,Xinning Gui
title: User Experience of Symptom Checkers: A Systematic Review
title_zh: 症状检查器的用户体验：系统回顾
abstract: This review reports the user experience of symptom checkers, aiming to characterize users studied in the existing literature, identify the aspects of user experience of symptom checkers that have been studied, and offer design suggestions. Our literature search resulted in 31 publications. We found that (1) most symptom checker users are relatively young; (2) eight relevant aspects of user experience have been explored, including motivation, trust, acceptability, satisfaction, accuracy, usability, safety or security, and functionality; (3) future symptom checkers should improve their accuracy, safety, and usability.
summary: This review reports the user experience of symptom checkers, aiming to characterize users studied in the existing literature, identify the aspects of user experience of symptom checkers that have been studied, and offer design suggestions. Our literature search resulted in 31 publications. We found that (1) most symptom checker users are relatively young; (2) eight relevant aspects of user experience have been explored, including motivation, trust, acceptability, satisfaction, accuracy, usability, safety or security, and functionality; (3) future symptom checkers should improve their accuracy, safety, and usability.
abstract_zh: 本综述报告了症状检查器的用户体验，旨在描述现有文献中研究的用户特征，确定已研究的症状检查器的用户体验方面，并提供设计建议。我们的文献检索得到了 31 篇出版物。我们发现（1）大多数症状检查器用户相对年轻； (2) 探索了用户体验的八个相关方面，包括动机、信任、可接受性、满意度、准确性、可用性、安全性和功能性； (3)未来的症状检查器应提高其准确性、安全性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 这篇论文通过系统综述分析症状检查器的用户体验，总结现有研究并提出设计改进建议。
AI.motivation: 旨在表征症状检查器用户群体，识别用户体验研究的不足，并为未来设计提供优化方向。
AI.method: 通过文献搜索筛选31篇相关研究，分析用户特征及用户体验的八个关键维度。
AI.result: 发现用户以年轻人为主，研究涵盖动机、信任、准确性等八个方面，未来需提升准确性、安全性和可用性。
AI.conclusion: 症状检查器应重点优化准确性、安全性和用户体验设计以满足用户需求。

ai_content.tldr: 这篇论文通过系统综述分析症状检查器的用户体验，总结现有研究并提出设计改进建议。

search_text: User Experience of Symptom Checkers: A Systematic Review 症状检查器的用户体验：系统回顾 This review reports the user experience of symptom checkers, aiming to characterize users studied in the existing literature, identify the aspects of user experience of symptom checkers that have been studied, and offer design suggestions. Our literature search resulted in 31 publications. We found that (1) most symptom checker users are relatively young; (2) eight relevant aspects of user experience have been explored, including motivation, trust, acceptability, satisfaction, accuracy, usability, safety or security, and functionality; (3) future symptom checkers should improve their accuracy, safety, and usability. 本综述报告了症状检查器的用户体验，旨在描述现有文献中研究的用户特征，确定已研究的症状检查器的用户体验方面，并提供设计建议。我们的文献检索得到了 31 篇出版物。我们发现（1）大多数症状检查器用户相对年轻； (2) 探索了用户体验的八个相关方面，包括动机、信任、可接受性、满意度、准确性、可用性、安全性和功能性； (3)未来的症状检查器应提高其准确性、安全性和可用性。 这篇论文通过系统综述分析症状检查器的用户体验，总结现有研究并提出设计改进建议。 Yue You,Renkai Ma,Xinning Gui cs.HC

authors_text: Alison B. Ma,Alexander Lerch
title: Representation Learning for the Automatic Indexing of Sound Effects Libraries
title_zh: 声音效果库自动索引的表示学习
comment: Accepted at the 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2022), 10 pages, 7 figures
comments: Accepted at the 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2022), 10 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Labeling and maintaining a commercial sound effects library is a time-consuming task exacerbated by databases that continually grow in size and undergo taxonomy updates. Moreover, sound search and taxonomy creation are complicated by non-uniform metadata, an unrelenting problem even with the introduction of a new industry standard, the Universal Category System. To address these problems and overcome dataset-dependent limitations that inhibit the successful training of deep learning models, we pursue representation learning to train generalized embeddings that can be used for a wide variety of sound effects libraries and are a taxonomy-agnostic representation of sound. We show that a task-specific but dataset-independent representation can successfully address data issues such as class imbalance, inconsistent class labels, and insufficient dataset size, outperforming established representations such as OpenL3. Detailed experimental results show the impact of metric learning approaches and different cross-dataset training methods on representational effectiveness.
summary: Labeling and maintaining a commercial sound effects library is a time-consuming task exacerbated by databases that continually grow in size and undergo taxonomy updates. Moreover, sound search and taxonomy creation are complicated by non-uniform metadata, an unrelenting problem even with the introduction of a new industry standard, the Universal Category System. To address these problems and overcome dataset-dependent limitations that inhibit the successful training of deep learning models, we pursue representation learning to train generalized embeddings that can be used for a wide variety of sound effects libraries and are a taxonomy-agnostic representation of sound. We show that a task-specific but dataset-independent representation can successfully address data issues such as class imbalance, inconsistent class labels, and insufficient dataset size, outperforming established representations such as OpenL3. Detailed experimental results show the impact of metric learning approaches and different cross-dataset training methods on representational effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 标记和维护商业音效库是一项耗时的任务，而数据库的规模不断增长并进行分类更新，这加剧了这一任务。此外，不统一的元数据使健全的搜索和分类法创建变得复杂，即使引入了新的行业标准——通用类别系统，这也是一个持续存在的问题。为了解决这些问题并克服阻碍深度学习模型成功训练的数据集相关限制，我们采用表示学习来训练广义嵌入，该嵌入可用于各种声音效果库，并且是与分类无关的声音表示。我们证明，特定于任务但与数据集无关的表示可以成功解决数据问题，例如类不平衡、类标签不一致和数据集大小不足，其性能优于 OpenL3 等已建立的表示。详细的实验结果显示了度量学习方法和不同的跨数据集训练方法对表征有效性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于表示学习的方法，用于自动索引音效库，通过训练通用嵌入来解决音效分类和检索中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 商业音效库的标签和维护工作耗时且困难，现有方法受数据依赖性限制，无法应对类别不平衡、标签不一致及数据集规模不足等问题。
AI.method: 采用表示学习训练与数据集无关的通用嵌入，结合度量学习和跨数据集训练方法，优化音效的表征效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在处理类别不平衡、标签不一致及小规模数据集时优于现有方法（如OpenL3），并验证了不同训练策略对表征效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的表示学习方法为音效库的自动索引提供了通用且高效的解决方案，可适应不同分类体系和数据集需求。

authors_text: David Kadish,Arezoo Sarkheyli-Hägele,Jose Font,Diederick C. Niehorster,Thomas Pederson
title: Towards Situation Awareness and Attention Guidance in a Multiplayer Environment using Augmented Reality and Carcassonne
title_zh: 使用增强现实和卡尔卡松在多人游戏环境中实现态势感知和注意力引导
abstract: Augmented reality (AR) games are a rich environment for researching and testing computational systems that provide subtle user guidance and training. In particular computer systems that aim to augment a user's situation awareness benefit from the range of sensors and computing power available in AR headsets. In this work-in-progress paper, we present a new environment for research into situation awareness and attention guidance (SAAG): an augmented reality version of the board game Carcassonne. We also present our initial work in producing a SAAG pipeline, including the creation of game state encodings, the development and training of a gameplay AI, and the design of situation modelling and gaze tracking systems.
summary: Augmented reality (AR) games are a rich environment for researching and testing computational systems that provide subtle user guidance and training. In particular computer systems that aim to augment a user's situation awareness benefit from the range of sensors and computing power available in AR headsets. In this work-in-progress paper, we present a new environment for research into situation awareness and attention guidance (SAAG): an augmented reality version of the board game Carcassonne. We also present our initial work in producing a SAAG pipeline, including the creation of game state encodings, the development and training of a gameplay AI, and the design of situation modelling and gaze tracking systems.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 游戏是研究和测试计算系统的丰富环境，可提供微妙的用户指导和培训。特别是旨在增强用户态势感知的计算机系统受益于 AR 耳机中可用的传感器范围和计算能力。在这篇正在进行的论文中，我们提出了一种用于研究态势感知和注意力引导（SAAG）的新环境：棋盘游戏《卡尔卡松》的增强现实版本。我们还展示了我们在制作 SAAG 管道方面的初步工作，包括游戏状态编码的创建、游戏 AI 的开发和训练以及情境建模和注视跟踪系统的设计。

AI.tldr: 开发AR版卡卡颂游戏环境以研究情境意识与注意力引导，并构建SAAG流程。
AI.motivation: AR游戏为研究情境意识和注意力引导提供了理想环境，利用AR设备的传感器和计算能力，开发新环境以探索相关技术。
AI.method: 构建AR版Carcassonne游戏环境，开发游戏状态编码，训练游戏AI，设计情境建模与眼动追踪系统。
AI.result: 完成AR游戏环境搭建及SAAG流程初步实现，包括AI模型和眼动追踪系统设计。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为AR环境中的情境意识与注意力引导提供了新平台，未来将优化系统并验证其有效性。

authors_text: Mu Cai,Yixuan Li
title: Out-of-distribution Detection via Frequency-regularized Generative Models
title_zh: 通过频率正则化生成模型进行分布外检测
comment: Paper accepted as a spotlight in WACV2023
comments: Paper accepted as a spotlight in WACV2023
abstract: Modern deep generative models can assign high likelihood to inputs drawn from outside the training distribution, posing threats to models in open-world deployments. While much research attention has been placed on defining new test-time measures of OOD uncertainty, these methods do not fundamentally change how deep generative models are regularized and optimized in training. In particular, generative models are shown to overly rely on the background information to estimate the likelihood. To address the issue, we propose a novel frequency-regularized learning FRL framework for OOD detection, which incorporates high-frequency information into training and guides the model to focus on semantically relevant features. FRL effectively improves performance on a wide range of generative architectures, including variational auto-encoder, GLOW, and PixelCNN++. On a new large-scale evaluation task, FRL achieves the state-of-the-art performance, outperforming a strong baseline Likelihood Regret by 10.7% (AUROC) while achieving 147$\times$ faster inference speed. Extensive ablations show that FRL improves the OOD detection performance while preserving the image generation quality. Code is available at https://github.com/mu-cai/FRL.
summary: Modern deep generative models can assign high likelihood to inputs drawn from outside the training distribution, posing threats to models in open-world deployments. While much research attention has been placed on defining new test-time measures of OOD uncertainty, these methods do not fundamentally change how deep generative models are regularized and optimized in training. In particular, generative models are shown to overly rely on the background information to estimate the likelihood. To address the issue, we propose a novel frequency-regularized learning FRL framework for OOD detection, which incorporates high-frequency information into training and guides the model to focus on semantically relevant features. FRL effectively improves performance on a wide range of generative architectures, including variational auto-encoder, GLOW, and PixelCNN++. On a new large-scale evaluation task, FRL achieves the state-of-the-art performance, outperforming a strong baseline Likelihood Regret by 10.7% (AUROC) while achieving 147$\times$ faster inference speed. Extensive ablations show that FRL improves the OOD detection performance while preserving the image generation quality. Code is available at https://github.com/mu-cai/FRL.
abstract_zh: 现代深度生成模型可以为从训练分布之外提取的输入分配很高的可能性，从而对开放世界部署中的模型构成威胁。虽然很多研究注意力都集中在定义 OOD 不确定性的新测试时间度量上，但这些方法并没有从根本上改变深度生成模型在训练中的正则化和优化方式。特别是，生成模型被证明过度依赖背景信息来估计可能性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 OOD 检测的新型频率正则化学习 FRL 框架，它将高频信息纳入训练中，并引导模型关注语义相关的特征。 FRL 有效提高了各种生成架构的性能，包括变分自动编码器、GLOW 和 PixelCNN++。在一项新的大规模评估任务中，FRL 实现了最先进的性能，比强大的基线 Likelihood Regret 提高了 10.7% (AUROC)，同时推理速度提高了 147 倍。广泛的消融表明，FRL 提高了 OOD 检测性能，同时保持了图像生成质量。代码可在 https://github.com/mu-cai/FRL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种频率正则化学习框架FRL，通过引入高频信息改进生成模型的分布外检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型过度依赖背景信息估计似然，导致对分布外数据检测失效，需改进训练阶段的正则化方法。
AI.method: 设计频率正则化框架FRL，在训练中注入高频特征引导模型关注语义相关特征，提升分布外检测性能。
AI.result: FRL在多种生成模型架构上达到SOTA，相较Likelihood Regret方法AUROC提升10.7%，推理速度加快147倍且保持生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 频率正则化有效提升分布外检测性能，适用于多种生成模型，为开放世界部署提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Out-of-distribution Detection via Frequency-regularized Generative Models 通过频率正则化生成模型进行分布外检测 Modern deep generative models can assign high likelihood to inputs drawn from outside the training distribution, posing threats to models in open-world deployments. While much research attention has been placed on defining new test-time measures of OOD uncertainty, these methods do not fundamentally change how deep generative models are regularized and optimized in training. In particular, generative models are shown to overly rely on the background information to estimate the likelihood. To address the issue, we propose a novel frequency-regularized learning FRL framework for OOD detection, which incorporates high-frequency information into training and guides the model to focus on semantically relevant features. FRL effectively improves performance on a wide range of generative architectures, including variational auto-encoder, GLOW, and PixelCNN++. On a new large-scale evaluation task, FRL achieves the state-of-the-art performance, outperforming a strong baseline Likelihood Regret by 10.7% (AUROC) while achieving 147$\times$ faster inference speed. Extensive ablations show that FRL improves the OOD detection performance while preserving the image generation quality. Code is available at https://github.com/mu-cai/FRL. 现代深度生成模型可以为从训练分布之外提取的输入分配很高的可能性，从而对开放世界部署中的模型构成威胁。虽然很多研究注意力都集中在定义 OOD 不确定性的新测试时间度量上，但这些方法并没有从根本上改变深度生成模型在训练中的正则化和优化方式。特别是，生成模型被证明过度依赖背景信息来估计可能性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 OOD 检测的新型频率正则化学习 FRL 框架，它将高频信息纳入训练中，并引导模型关注语义相关的特征。 FRL 有效提高了各种生成架构的性能，包括变分自动编码器、GLOW 和 PixelCNN++。在一项新的大规模评估任务中，FRL 实现了最先进的性能，比强大的基线 Likelihood Regret 提高了 10.7% (AUROC)，同时推理速度提高了 147 倍。广泛的消融表明，FRL 提高了 OOD 检测性能，同时保持了图像生成质量。代码可在 https://github.com/mu-cai/FRL 获取。 本文提出一种频率正则化学习框架FRL，通过引入高频信息改进生成模型的分布外检测能力。 Mu Cai,Yixuan Li cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: M. Rasel Mahmud,Michael Stewart,Alberto Cordova,John Quarles
title: Standing Balance Improvement Using Vibrotactile Feedback in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 在虚拟现实中使用振动触觉反馈改善站立平衡
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.04743
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.04743
abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) users often encounter postural instability, i.e., balance issues, which can be a significant impediment to universal usability and accessibility, particularly for those with balance impairments. Prior research has validated imbalance issues, but little effort has been made to mitigate them. We recruited 39 participants (with balance impairments: 18, without balance impairments: 21) to examine the effect of various vibrotactile feedback techniques on balance in virtual reality, specifically spatial vibrotactile, static vibrotactile, rhythmic vibrotactile, and vibrotactile feedback mapped to the center of pressure (CoP). Participants completed standing visual exploration and standing reach and grasp tasks. According to within-subject results, each vibrotactile feedback enhanced balance in VR significantly (p < .001) for those with and without balance impairments. Spatial and CoP vibrotactile feedback enhanced balance significantly more (p < .001) than other vibrotactile feedback. This study presents strategies that might be used in future virtual environments to enhance standing balance and bring VR closer to universal usage.

Participants completed standing visual exploration and standing reach and grasp tasks. According to within-subject results, each vibrotactile feedback enhanced balance in VR significantly (p < .001) for those with and without balance impairments. Spatial and CoP vibrotactile feedback enhanced balance significantly more (p < .001) than other vibrotactile feedback. abstract_zh: 虚拟现实 (VR) 用户经常遇到姿势不稳定，即平衡问题，这可能是普遍可用性和可访问性的重大障碍，特别是对于那些有平衡障碍的人来说。先前的研究已经验证了不平衡问题，但几乎没有采取任何措施来缓解这些问题。我们招募了 39 名参与者（有平衡障碍：18 人，无平衡障碍：21 人）来研究各种振动触觉反馈技术对虚拟现实中平衡的影响，特别是空间振动触觉、静态振动触觉、节奏振动触觉和映射到压力中心 (CoP) 的振动触觉反馈。参与者完成了站立视觉探索以及站立伸展和抓握任务。根据受试者内部的结果，对于有或没有平衡障碍的人来说，每个振动触觉反馈都显着增强了 VR 中的平衡能力 (p < .001)。空间和 CoP 振动触觉反馈比其他振动触觉反馈更能显着增强平衡 (p < .001)。这项研究提出了可能在未来虚拟环境中使用的策略，以增强站立平衡并使 VR 更接近普遍使用。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了不同触觉反馈技术对虚拟现实（VR）中站立平衡的影响，旨在提升VR的通用性和可访问性。
AI.motivation: VR用户常面临姿势不稳问题，尤其对平衡障碍者构成显著障碍，但现有研究缺乏有效缓解方案。
AI.method: 招募39名参与者（含18名平衡障碍者），通过站立视觉探索和抓取任务，对比空间触觉、静态触觉、节奏触觉及压力中心映射触觉反馈的效果。
AI.result: 所有触觉反馈均显著提升平衡能力（p<0.001），其中空间触觉与压力中心映射反馈效果最佳（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: 触觉反馈策略可有效增强VR中的站立平衡，为未来虚拟环境设计提供参考，推动VR普及应用。

authors_text: Rohan Tan Bhowmik
title: A Multi-Modal Wildfire Prediction and Personalized Early-Warning System Based on a Novel Machine Learning Framework
title_zh: 基于新型机器学习框架的多模态野火预测和个性化预警系统
abstract: Wildfires are increasingly impacting the environment, human health and safety. Among the top 20 California wildfires, those in 2020-2021 burned more acres than the last century combined. California's 2018 wildfire season caused damages of $148.5 billion. Among millions of impacted people, those living with disabilities (around 15% of the world population) are disproportionately impacted due to inadequate means of alerts. In this project, a multi-modal wildfire prediction and personalized early warning system has been developed based on an advanced machine learning architecture. Sensor data from the Environmental Protection Agency and historical wildfire data from 2012 to 2018 have been compiled to establish a comprehensive wildfire database, the largest of its kind. Next, a novel U-Convolutional-LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) neural network was designed with a special architecture for extracting key spatial and temporal features from contiguous environmental parameters indicative of impending wildfires. Environmental and meteorological factors were incorporated into the database and classified as leading indicators and trailing indicators, correlated to risks of wildfire conception and propagation respectively. Additionally, geological data was used to provide better wildfire risk assessment. This novel spatio-temporal neural network achieved >97% accuracy vs. around 76% using traditional convolutional neural networks, successfully predicting 2018's five most devastating wildfires 5-14 days in advance. Finally, a personalized early warning system, tailored to individuals with sensory disabilities or respiratory exacerbation conditions, was proposed. This technique would enable fire departments to anticipate and prevent wildfires before they strike and provide early warnings for at-risk individuals for better preparation, thereby saving lives and reducing economic damages.
summary: Wildfires are increasingly impacting the environment, human health and safety. Among the top 20 California wildfires, those in 2020-2021 burned more acres than the last century combined. California's 2018 wildfire season caused damages of $148.5 billion. Among millions of impacted people, those living with disabilities (around 15% of the world population) are disproportionately impacted due to inadequate means of alerts. In this project, a multi-modal wildfire prediction and personalized early warning system has been developed based on an advanced machine learning architecture. Sensor data from the Environmental Protection Agency and historical wildfire data from 2012 to 2018 have been compiled to establish a comprehensive wildfire database, the largest of its kind. Next, a novel U-Convolutional-LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) neural network was designed with a special architecture for extracting key spatial and temporal features from contiguous environmental parameters indicative of impending wildfires. Environmental and meteorological factors were incorporated into the database and classified as leading indicators and trailing indicators, correlated to risks of wildfire conception and propagation respectively. Additionally, geological data was used to provide better wildfire risk assessment. This novel spatio-temporal neural network achieved >97% accuracy vs. around 76% using traditional convolutional neural networks, successfully predicting 2018's five most devastating wildfires 5-14 days in advance. Finally, a personalized early warning system, tailored to individuals with sensory disabilities or respiratory exacerbation conditions, was proposed. This technique would enable fire departments to anticipate and prevent wildfires before they strike and provide early warnings for at-risk individuals for better preparation, thereby saving lives and reducing economic damages.
abstract_zh: 野火对环境、人类健康和安全的影响越来越大。在加州前 20 名山火中，2020 年至 2021 年发生的火灾烧毁的面积比上个世纪的总和还多。加州 2018 年山火季造成的损失达 1,485 亿美元。在数百万受影响的人群中，残疾人（约占世界人口的 15%）由于警报手段不足而受到不成比例的影响。在该项目中，基于先进的机器学习架构开发了多模式野火预测和个性化预警系统。来自环境保护局的传感器数据和 2012 年至 2018 年的历史野火数据已被汇编，建立了同类最大的综合野火数据库。接下来，设计了一种新颖的 U-Convolutional-LSTM（长短期记忆）神经网络，该网络具有特殊的架构，用于从指示即将发生野火的连续环境参数中提取关键的空间和时间特征。环境和气象因素被纳入数据库，并分为先行指标和尾随指标，分别与野火孕育和蔓延的风险相关。此外，地质数据还用于提供更好的野火风险评估。这种新颖的时空神经网络的准确率超过 97%，而使用传统卷积神经网络的准确率约为 76%，成功提前 5-14 天预测 2018 年五场最具破坏性的野火。最后，提出了一种针对感觉障碍或呼吸系统恶化患者量身定制的个性化早期预警系统。这项技术将使消防部门能够在野火发生之前预测和预防野火，并为高危人群提供早期预警，以便更好地做好准备，从而挽救生命并减少经济损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于新型机器学习框架的多模态野火预测与个性化预警系统，旨在提高野火预测准确性并为高风险人群提供定制化预警。
AI.motivation: 野火对环境和人类健康造成严重威胁，传统预警系统难以满足残障人士等弱势群体的需求，亟需更精准的预测与个性化预警方案。
AI.method: 整合美国环保局传感器数据与2012-2018年历史野火数据构建数据库，设计U-ConvLSTM神经网络提取时空特征，并结合环境、气象及地质数据分类为预警指标，开发面向残障人士的定制化预警模块。
AI.result: 新型模型预测准确率达97%，较传统卷积神经网络提升21%，成功提前5-14天预测2018年五场重大野火，个性化预警系统可有效降低弱势群体风险。

search_text: A Multi-Modal Wildfire Prediction and Personalized Early-Warning System Based on a Novel Machine Learning Framework 基于新型机器学习框架的多模态野火预测和个性化预警系统 Wildfires are increasingly impacting the environment, human health and safety. Among the top 20 California wildfires, those in 2020-2021 burned more acres than the last century combined. California's 2018 wildfire season caused damages of $148.5 billion. Among millions of impacted people, those living with disabilities (around 15% of the world population) are disproportionately impacted due to inadequate means of alerts. In this project, a multi-modal wildfire prediction and personalized early warning system has been developed based on an advanced machine learning architecture. Sensor data from the Environmental Protection Agency and historical wildfire data from 2012 to 2018 have been compiled to establish a comprehensive wildfire database, the largest of its kind. Next, a novel U-Convolutional-LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) neural network was designed with a special architecture for extracting key spatial and temporal features from contiguous environmental parameters indicative of impending wildfires. Environmental and meteorological factors were incorporated into the database and classified as leading indicators and trailing indicators, correlated to risks of wildfire conception and propagation respectively. Additionally, geological data was used to provide better wildfire risk assessment. This novel spatio-temporal neural network achieved >97% accuracy vs. around 76% using traditional convolutional neural networks, successfully predicting 2018's five most devastating wildfires 5-14 days in advance. Finally, a personalized early warning system, tailored to individuals with sensory disabilities or respiratory exacerbation conditions, was proposed. This technique would enable fire departments to anticipate and prevent wildfires before they strike and provide early warnings for at-risk individuals for better preparation, thereby saving lives and reducing economic damages. 野火对环境、人类健康和安全的影响越来越大。在加州前 20 名山火中，2020 年至 2021 年发生的火灾烧毁的面积比上个世纪的总和还多。加州 2018 年山火季造成的损失达 1,485 亿美元。在数百万受影响的人群中，残疾人（约占世界人口的 15%）由于警报手段不足而受到不成比例的影响。在该项目中，基于先进的机器学习架构开发了多模式野火预测和个性化预警系统。来自环境保护局的传感器数据和 2012 年至 2018 年的历史野火数据已被汇编，建立了同类最大的综合野火数据库。接下来，设计了一种新颖的 U-Convolutional-LSTM（长短期记忆）神经网络，该网络具有特殊的架构，用于从指示即将发生野火的连续环境参数中提取关键的空间和时间特征。环境和气象因素被纳入数据库，并分为先行指标和尾随指标，分别与野火孕育和蔓延的风险相关。此外，地质数据还用于提供更好的野火风险评估。这种新颖的时空神经网络的准确率超过 97%，而使用传统卷积神经网络的准确率约为 76%，成功提前 5-14 天预测 2018 年五场最具破坏性的野火。最后，提出了一种针对感觉障碍或呼吸系统恶化患者量身定制的个性化早期预警系统。这项技术将使消防部门能够在野火发生之前预测和预防野火，并为高危人群提供早期预警，以便更好地做好准备，从而挽救生命并减少经济损失。 本文提出了一种基于新型机器学习框架的多模态野火预测与个性化预警系统，旨在提高野火预测准确性并为高风险人群提供定制化预警。 Rohan Tan Bhowmik cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.CY

authors_text: Alessandra Tafuro,Bappaditya Debnath,Andrea M. Zanchettin,Amir Ghalamzan E
title: dPMP-Deep Probabilistic Motion Planning: A use case in Strawberry Picking Robot
title_zh: dPMP-深度概率运动规划：草莓采摘机器人的用例
comment: To appear In IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: To appear In IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: This paper presents a novel probabilistic approach to deep robot learning from demonstrations (LfD). Deep movement primitives (DMPs) are deterministic LfD model that maps visual information directly into a robot trajectory. This paper extends DMPs and presents a deep probabilistic model that maps the visual information into a distribution of effective robot trajectories. The architecture that leads to the highest level of trajectory accuracy is presented and compared with the existing methods. Moreover, this paper introduces a novel training method for learning domain-specific latent features. We show the superiority of the proposed probabilistic approach and novel latent space learning in the lab's real-robot task of strawberry harvesting. The experimental results demonstrate that latent space learning can significantly improve model prediction performances. The proposed approach allows to sample trajectories from distribution and optimises the robot trajectory to meet a secondary objective, e.g. collision avoidance.
summary: This paper presents a novel probabilistic approach to deep robot learning from demonstrations (LfD). Deep movement primitives (DMPs) are deterministic LfD model that maps visual information directly into a robot trajectory. This paper extends DMPs and presents a deep probabilistic model that maps the visual information into a distribution of effective robot trajectories. The architecture that leads to the highest level of trajectory accuracy is presented and compared with the existing methods. Moreover, this paper introduces a novel training method for learning domain-specific latent features. We show the superiority of the proposed probabilistic approach and novel latent space learning in the lab's real-robot task of strawberry harvesting. The experimental results demonstrate that latent space learning can significantly improve model prediction performances. The proposed approach allows to sample trajectories from distribution and optimises the robot trajectory to meet a secondary objective, e.g. collision avoidance.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的概率方法，用于通过演示进行深度机器人学习（LfD）。深度运动基元 (DMP) 是确定性 LfD 模型，可将视觉信息直接映射到机器人轨迹中。本文扩展了 DMP，并提出了一种深度概率模型，将视觉信息映射到有效机器人轨迹的分布中。提出了实现最高水平轨迹精度的架构，并与现有方法进行了比较。此外，本文介绍了一种用于学习特定领域潜在特征的新颖训练方法。我们在实验室的真实机器人草莓采摘任务中展示了所提出的概率方法和新颖的潜在空间学习的优越性。实验结果表明，潜在空间学习可以显着提高模型预测性能。所提出的方法允许从分布中采样轨迹并优化机器人轨迹以满足次要目标，例如避免碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度概率运动规划方法（dPMP），用于草莓采摘机器人，通过概率模型提升轨迹规划的准确性和适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性运动原语（DMP）在复杂环境中难以处理不确定性，而草莓采摘等任务需要机器人具备轨迹分布建模和避障能力。
AI.method: 将深度运动原语扩展为概率模型，通过视觉信息生成轨迹分布；引入领域特定潜在特征学习方法，结合实验对比验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在实验室草莓采摘任务中显著提升了轨迹预测性能，并能通过采样优化实现避障等次级目标。
AI.conclusion: 概率化方法与潜在特征学习结合，有效解决了复杂场景下机器人轨迹规划的准确性与灵活性问题。

authors_text: Niels Mündler,Tobias Nipkow
title: A Verified Implementation of B+-Trees in Isabelle/HOL
title_zh: Isabelle/HOL 中经过验证的 B+ 树实现
abstract: In this paper we present the verification of an imperative implementation of the ubiquitous B+-tree data structure in the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. The implementation supports membership test, insertion and range queries with efficient binary search for intra-node navigation. The imperative implementation is verified in two steps: an abstract set interface is refined to an executable but inefficient purely functional implementation which is further refined to the efficient imperative implementation.
summary: In this paper we present the verification of an imperative implementation of the ubiquitous B+-tree data structure in the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. The implementation supports membership test, insertion and range queries with efficient binary search for intra-node navigation. The imperative implementation is verified in two steps: an abstract set interface is refined to an executable but inefficient purely functional implementation which is further refined to the efficient imperative implementation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们在交互式定理证明器 Isabelle/HOL 中验证了普遍存在的 B+ 树数据结构的命令式实现。该实现支持成员资格测试、插入和范围查询，以及用于节点内导航的高效二分搜索。命令式实现分两步验证：将抽象集接口细化为可执行但低效的纯函数实现，进一步细化为高效的命令式实现。

AI.tldr: 本文在Isabelle/HOL中验证了一个B+树的命令式实现，支持成员测试、插入和范围查询操作。
AI.motivation: B+树作为核心数据结构广泛应用于数据库和文件系统，但其复杂性容易引入实现错误，需通过形式化验证确保正确性。
AI.method: 通过两阶段精炼方法：先将抽象集合接口转化为可执行的纯函数式实现，再进一步优化为高效的命令式实现，并利用二分查找优化节点内操作。
AI.result: 成功验证了B+树命令式实现的正确性，确保其满足抽象规范且具备高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂数据结构的形式化验证提供了可行路径，验证过程兼顾正确性与效率。

conclusion: 该方法为复杂数据结构的形式化验证提供了可行路径，验证过程兼顾正确性与效率。
search_text: A Verified Implementation of B+-Trees in Isabelle/HOL Isabelle/HOL 中经过验证的 B+ 树实现 In this paper we present the verification of an imperative implementation of the ubiquitous B+-tree data structure in the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. The implementation supports membership test, insertion and range queries with efficient binary search for intra-node navigation. The imperative implementation is verified in two steps: an abstract set interface is refined to an executable but inefficient purely functional implementation which is further refined to the efficient imperative implementation. 在本文中，我们在交互式定理证明器 Isabelle/HOL 中验证了普遍存在的 B+ 树数据结构的命令式实现。该实现支持成员资格测试、插入和范围查询，以及用于节点内导航的高效二分搜索。命令式实现分两步验证：将抽象集接口细化为可执行但低效的纯函数实现，进一步细化为高效的命令式实现。 本文在Isabelle/HOL中验证了一个B+树的命令式实现，支持成员测试、插入和范围查询操作。 Niels Mündler,Tobias Nipkow cs.LO,cs.DS

authors_text: Mahault Albarracin,Riddhi J. Pitliya,Maxwell J. D. Ramstead,Jeffrey Yoshimi
title: Mapping Husserlian phenomenology onto active inference
title_zh: 将胡塞尔现象学映射到主动推理
abstract: Phenomenology is the rigorous descriptive study of conscious experience. Recent attempts to formalize Husserlian phenomenology provide us with a mathematical model of perception as a function of prior knowledge and expectation. In this paper, we re-examine elements of Husserlian phenomenology through the lens of active inference. In doing so, we aim to advance the project of computational phenomenology, as recently outlined by proponents of active inference. We propose that key aspects of Husserl's descriptions of consciousness can be mapped onto aspects of the generative models associated with the active inference approach. We first briefly review active inference. We then discuss Husserl's phenomenology, with a focus on time consciousness. Finally, we present our mapping from Husserlian phenomenology to active inference.
summary: Phenomenology is the rigorous descriptive study of conscious experience. Recent attempts to formalize Husserlian phenomenology provide us with a mathematical model of perception as a function of prior knowledge and expectation. In this paper, we re-examine elements of Husserlian phenomenology through the lens of active inference. In doing so, we aim to advance the project of computational phenomenology, as recently outlined by proponents of active inference. We propose that key aspects of Husserl's descriptions of consciousness can be mapped onto aspects of the generative models associated with the active inference approach. We first briefly review active inference. We then discuss Husserl's phenomenology, with a focus on time consciousness. Finally, we present our mapping from Husserlian phenomenology to active inference.
abstract_zh: 现象学是对意识体验的严格描述性研究。最近将胡塞尔现象学形式化的尝试为我们提供了一个作为先验知识和期望的函数的感知数学模型。在本文中，我们通过主动推理的视角重新审视胡塞尔现象学的要素。在此过程中，我们的目标是推进计算现象学项目，正如主动推理的支持者最近概述的那样。我们建议胡塞尔对意识的描述的关键方面可以映射到与主动推理方法相关的生成模型的方面。我们首先简要回顾一下主动推理。然后我们讨论胡塞尔的现象学，重点是时间意识。最后，我们展示了从胡塞尔现象学到主动推理的映射。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将胡塞尔现象学与主动推断框架中的生成模型进行映射，以推进计算现象学的发展。
AI.motivation: 通过将胡塞尔对意识的描述与主动推断的数学模型结合，为现象学提供计算框架，促进对意识机制的理解。
AI.method: 首先回顾主动推断理论，接着分析胡塞尔现象学特别是时间意识理论，最后建立两者之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 提出了胡塞尔现象学核心概念与主动推断生成模型之间的映射关系，为计算现象学提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该映射为现象学研究提供了新的计算视角，有助于整合哲学与神经科学对意识的解释。

authors_text: Xizhe Xue,Dongdong Yu,Lingqiao Liu,Yu Liu,Satoshi Tsutsui,Ying Li,Zehuan Yuan,Ping Song,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Single-Stage Open-world Instance Segmentation with Cross-task Consistency Regularization
title_zh: 具有跨任务一致性正则化的单阶段开放世界实例分割
abstract: Open-World Instance Segmentation (OWIS) is an emerging research topic that aims to segment class-agnostic object instances from images. The mainstream approaches use a two-stage segmentation framework, which first locates the candidate object bounding boxes and then performs instance segmentation. In this work, we instead promote a single-stage framework for OWIS. We argue that the end-to-end training process in the single-stage framework can be more convenient for directly regularizing the localization of class-agnostic object pixels. Based on the single-stage instance segmentation framework, we propose a regularization model to predict foreground pixels and use its relation to instance segmentation to construct a cross-task consistency loss. We show that such a consistency loss could alleviate the problem of incomplete instance annotation -- a common problem in the existing OWIS datasets. We also show that the proposed loss lends itself to an effective solution to semi-supervised OWIS that could be considered an extreme case that all object annotations are absent for some images. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves impressive results in both fully-supervised and semi-supervised settings. Compared to SOTA methods, the proposed method significantly improves the $AP_{100}$ score by 4.75\% in UVO$\rightarrow$UVO setting and 4.05\% in COCO$\rightarrow$UVO setting. In the case of semi-supervised learning, our model learned with only 30\% labeled data, even outperforms its fully-supervised counterpart with 50\% labeled data. The code will be released soon.
summary: Open-World Instance Segmentation (OWIS) is an emerging research topic that aims to segment class-agnostic object instances from images. The mainstream approaches use a two-stage segmentation framework, which first locates the candidate object bounding boxes and then performs instance segmentation. In this work, we instead promote a single-stage framework for OWIS. We argue that the end-to-end training process in the single-stage framework can be more convenient for directly regularizing the localization of class-agnostic object pixels. Based on the single-stage instance segmentation framework, we propose a regularization model to predict foreground pixels and use its relation to instance segmentation to construct a cross-task consistency loss. We show that such a consistency loss could alleviate the problem of incomplete instance annotation -- a common problem in the existing OWIS datasets. We also show that the proposed loss lends itself to an effective solution to semi-supervised OWIS that could be considered an extreme case that all object annotations are absent for some images. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves impressive results in both fully-supervised and semi-supervised settings. Compared to SOTA methods, the proposed method significantly improves the $AP_{100}$ score by 4.75\% in UVO$\rightarrow$UVO setting and 4.05\% in COCO$\rightarrow$UVO setting. In the case of semi-supervised learning, our model learned with only 30\% labeled data, even outperforms its fully-supervised counterpart with 50\% labeled data. The code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 开放世界实例分割（OWIS）是一个新兴的研究主题，旨在从图像中分割与类无关的对象实例。主流方法使用两阶段分割框架，首先定位候选对象边界框，然后执行实例分割。在这项工作中，我们转而推广 OWIS 的单阶段框架。我们认为，单阶段框架中的端到端训练过程可以更方便地直接规范与类无关的对象像素的定位。基于单阶段实例分割框架，我们提出了一种正则化模型来预测前景像素，并利用其与实例分割的关系来构造跨任务一致性损失。我们表明，这种一致性损失可以缓解实例注释不完整的问题——现有 OWIS 数据集中的一个常见问题。我们还表明，所提出的损失有助于半监督 OWIS 的有效解决方案，可以将其视为某些图像缺少所有对象注释的极端情况。我们广泛的实验表明，所提出的方法在全监督和半监督环境中都取得了令人印象深刻的结果。与 SOTA 方法相比，该方法在 UVO$\rightarrow$UVO 设置中显着提高了 $AP_{100}$ 分数 4.75\%，在 COCO$\rightarrow$UVO 设置中显着提高了 4.05\%。在半监督学习的情况下，我们的模型仅使用 30% 标记数据进行学习，甚至优于使用 50% 标记数据的全监督模型。该代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单阶段开放世界实例分割方法，通过跨任务一致性正则化解决标注不完整问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放世界实例分割方法依赖两阶段框架，存在标注不完整和训练效率低的问题。
AI.method: 设计单阶段框架并引入预测前景像素的正则化模型，通过跨任务一致性损失优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在全监督和半监督设置下均取得优异结果，UVO→UVO设置下AP100提升4.75%，半监督下30%标注数据优于50%标注的全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 单阶段框架结合跨任务一致性正则化能有效提升开放世界实例分割性能，尤其适用于标注稀缺场景。

search_text: Single-Stage Open-world Instance Segmentation with Cross-task Consistency Regularization 具有跨任务一致性正则化的单阶段开放世界实例分割 Open-World Instance Segmentation (OWIS) is an emerging research topic that aims to segment class-agnostic object instances from images. The mainstream approaches use a two-stage segmentation framework, which first locates the candidate object bounding boxes and then performs instance segmentation. In this work, we instead promote a single-stage framework for OWIS. We argue that the end-to-end training process in the single-stage framework can be more convenient for directly regularizing the localization of class-agnostic object pixels. Based on the single-stage instance segmentation framework, we propose a regularization model to predict foreground pixels and use its relation to instance segmentation to construct a cross-task consistency loss. We show that such a consistency loss could alleviate the problem of incomplete instance annotation -- a common problem in the existing OWIS datasets. We also show that the proposed loss lends itself to an effective solution to semi-supervised OWIS that could be considered an extreme case that all object annotations are absent for some images. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves impressive results in both fully-supervised and semi-supervised settings. Compared to SOTA methods, the proposed method significantly improves the $AP_{100}$ score by 4.75\% in UVO$\rightarrow$UVO setting and 4.05\% in COCO$\rightarrow$UVO setting. In the case of semi-supervised learning, our model learned with only 30\% labeled data, even outperforms its fully-supervised counterpart with 50\% labeled data. The code will be released soon. 开放世界实例分割（OWIS）是一个新兴的研究主题，旨在从图像中分割与类无关的对象实例。主流方法使用两阶段分割框架，首先定位候选对象边界框，然后执行实例分割。在这项工作中，我们转而推广 OWIS 的单阶段框架。我们认为，单阶段框架中的端到端训练过程可以更方便地直接规范与类无关的对象像素的定位。基于单阶段实例分割框架，我们提出了一种正则化模型来预测前景像素，并利用其与实例分割的关系来构造跨任务一致性损失。我们表明，这种一致性损失可以缓解实例注释不完整的问题——现有 OWIS 数据集中的一个常见问题。我们还表明，所提出的损失有助于半监督 OWIS 的有效解决方案，可以将其视为某些图像缺少所有对象注释的极端情况。我们广泛的实验表明，所提出的方法在全监督和半监督环境中都取得了令人印象深刻的结果。与 SOTA 方法相比，该方法在 UVO$\rightarrow$UVO 设置中显着提高了 $AP_{100}$ 分数 4.75\%，在 COCO$\rightarrow$UVO 设置中显着提高了 4.05\%。在半监督学习的情况下，我们的模型仅使用 30% 标记数据进行学习，甚至优于使用 50% 标记数据的全监督模型。该代码即将发布。 本文提出一种单阶段开放世界实例分割方法，通过跨任务一致性正则化解决标注不完整问题。 Xizhe Xue,Dongdong Yu,Lingqiao Liu,Yu Liu,Satoshi Tsutsui,Ying Li,Zehuan Yuan,Ping Song,Mike Zheng Shou cs.CV

authors_text: Georgios Chochlakis,Tejas Srinivasan,Jesse Thomason,Shrikanth Narayanan
title: VAuLT: Augmenting the Vision-and-Language Transformer for Sentiment Classification on Social Media
title_zh: VAuLT：增强社交媒体情感分类的视觉和语言转换器
abstract: We propose the Vision-and-Augmented-Language Transformer (VAuLT). VAuLT is an extension of the popular Vision-and-Language Transformer (ViLT), and improves performance on vision-and-language (VL) tasks that involve more complex text inputs than image captions while having minimal impact on training and inference efficiency. ViLT, importantly, enables efficient training and inference in VL tasks, achieved by encoding images using a linear projection of patches instead of an object detector. However, it is pretrained on captioning datasets, where the language input is simple, literal, and descriptive, therefore lacking linguistic diversity. So, when working with multimedia data in the wild, such as multimodal social media data, there is a notable shift from captioning language data, as well as diversity of tasks. We indeed find evidence that the language capacity of ViLT is lacking. The key insight and novelty of VAuLT is to propagate the output representations of a large language model (LM) like BERT to the language input of ViLT. We show that joint training of the LM and ViLT can yield relative improvements up to 20% over ViLT and achieve state-of-the-art or comparable performance on VL tasks involving richer language inputs and affective constructs, such as for Target-Oriented Sentiment Classification in TWITTER-2015 and TWITTER-2017, and Sentiment Classification in MVSA-Single and MVSA-Multiple. Our code is available at https://github.com/gchochla/VAuLT.
summary: We propose the Vision-and-Augmented-Language Transformer (VAuLT). VAuLT is an extension of the popular Vision-and-Language Transformer (ViLT), and improves performance on vision-and-language (VL) tasks that involve more complex text inputs than image captions while having minimal impact on training and inference efficiency. ViLT, importantly, enables efficient training and inference in VL tasks, achieved by encoding images using a linear projection of patches instead of an object detector. However, it is pretrained on captioning datasets, where the language input is simple, literal, and descriptive, therefore lacking linguistic diversity. So, when working with multimedia data in the wild, such as multimodal social media data, there is a notable shift from captioning language data, as well as diversity of tasks. We indeed find evidence that the language capacity of ViLT is lacking. The key insight and novelty of VAuLT is to propagate the output representations of a large language model (LM) like BERT to the language input of ViLT. We show that joint training of the LM and ViLT can yield relative improvements up to 20% over ViLT and achieve state-of-the-art or comparable performance on VL tasks involving richer language inputs and affective constructs, such as for Target-Oriented Sentiment Classification in TWITTER-2015 and TWITTER-2017, and Sentiment Classification in MVSA-Single and MVSA-Multiple. Our code is available at https://github.com/gchochla/VAuLT.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了视觉和增强语言转换器（VAuLT）。 VAuLT 是流行的视觉和语言转换器 (ViLT) 的扩展，可提高视觉和语言 (VL) 任务的性能，这些任务涉及比图像标题更复杂的文本输入，同时对训练和推理效率的影响最小。重要的是，ViLT 可以在 VL 任务中实现高效的训练和推理，这是通过使用补丁的线性投影而不是对象检测器对图像进行编码来实现的。然而，它是在字幕数据集上进行预训练的，其中的语言输入是简单的、字面的和描述性的，因此缺乏语言多样性。因此，当在野外处理多媒体数据（例如多模式社交媒体数据）时，字幕语言数据以及任务的多样性会发生显着的转变。我们确实发现了 ViLT 缺乏语言能力的证据。 VAuLT 的关键见解和新颖之处是将 BERT 等大型语言模型 (LM) 的输出表示传播到 ViLT 的语言输入。我们表明，LM 和 ViLT 的联合训练可以比 ViLT 提高高达 20%，并在涉及更丰富的语言输入和情感结构的 VL 任务上实现最先进的或可比的性能，例如 TWITTER-2015 和 TWITTER-2017 中的面向目标的情感分类，以及 MVSA-Single 和 MVSA-Multiple 中的情感分类。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/gchochla/VAuLT 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出VAuLT模型，通过增强视觉-语言转换器（ViLT）的语言处理能力，提升社交媒体上的情感分类效果。
AI.motivation: ViLT在处理复杂文本输入时表现不足，尤其在社交媒体等多样化任务中缺乏语言多样性，需提升其语言建模能力。
AI.method: 将大语言模型（如BERT）的输出表示传播到ViLT的语言输入中，并通过联合训练优化模型。
AI.result: 在TWITTER-2015/2017、MVSA-Single/Multiple等数据集上，情感分类性能提升最高达20%，达到或超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VAuLT通过融合大语言模型增强了ViLT对复杂语言输入的处理能力，有效提升了视觉-语言任务中的情感分类效果。
