search_text: VAuLT: Augmenting the Vision-and-Language Transformer for Sentiment Classification on Social Media VAuLT：增强社交媒体情感分类的视觉和语言转换器 We propose the Vision-and-Augmented-Language Transformer (VAuLT). VAuLT is an extension of the popular Vision-and-Language Transformer (ViLT), and improves performance on vision-and-language (VL) tasks that involve more complex text inputs than image captions while having minimal impact on training and inference efficiency. ViLT, importantly, enables efficient training and inference in VL tasks, achieved by encoding images using a linear projection of patches instead of an object detector. However, it is pretrained on captioning datasets, where the language input is simple, literal, and descriptive, therefore lacking linguistic diversity. So, when working with multimedia data in the wild, such as multimodal social media data, there is a notable shift from captioning language data, as well as diversity of tasks. We indeed find evidence that the language capacity of ViLT is lacking. The key insight and novelty of VAuLT is to propagate the output representations of a large language model (LM) like BERT to the language input of ViLT. We show that joint training of the LM and ViLT can yield relative improvements up to 20% over ViLT and achieve state-of-the-art or comparable performance on VL tasks involving richer language inputs and affective constructs, such as for Target-Oriented Sentiment Classification in TWITTER-2015 and TWITTER-2017, and Sentiment Classification in MVSA-Single and MVSA-Multiple. Our code is available at https://github.com/gchochla/VAuLT. 我们提出了视觉和增强语言转换器（VAuLT）。 VAuLT 是流行的视觉和语言转换器 (ViLT) 的扩展，可提高视觉和语言 (VL) 任务的性能，这些任务涉及比图像标题更复杂的文本输入，同时对训练和推理效率的影响最小。重要的是，ViLT 可以在 VL 任务中实现高效的训练和推理，这是通过使用补丁的线性投影而不是对象检测器对图像进行编码来实现的。然而，它是在字幕数据集上进行预训练的，其中的语言输入是简单的、字面的和描述性的，因此缺乏语言多样性。因此，当在野外处理多媒体数据（例如多模式社交媒体数据）时，字幕语言数据以及任务的多样性会发生显着的转变。我们确实发现了 ViLT 缺乏语言能力的证据。 VAuLT 的关键见解和新颖之处是将 BERT 等大型语言模型 (LM) 的输出表示传播到 ViLT 的语言输入。我们表明，LM 和 ViLT 的联合训练可以比 ViLT 提高高达 20%，并在涉及更丰富的语言输入和情感结构的 VL 任务上实现最先进的或可比的性能，例如 TWITTER-2015 和 TWITTER-2017 中的面向目标的情感分类，以及 MVSA-Single 和 MVSA-Multiple 中的情感分类。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/gchochla/VAuLT 获取。 该论文提出VAuLT模型，通过增强视觉-语言转换器（ViLT）的语言处理能力，提升社交媒体上的情感分类效果。 Georgios Chochlakis,Tejas Srinivasan,Jesse Thomason,Shrikanth Narayanan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Vartika Sengar,Aditya Kapoor,Nijil George,Vighnesh Vatsal,Jayavardhana Gubbi,Balamuralidhar P,Arpan Pal
title: Challenges in Applying Robotics to Retail Store Management
title_zh: 将机器人技术应用于零售商店管理的挑战
comment: Presented at the IEEE ICRA 2022 Workshop on Challenges in Applying Academic Research to Real-World Robotics, 23 May 2022
comments: Presented at the IEEE ICRA 2022 Workshop on Challenges in Applying Academic Research to Real-World Robotics, 23 May 2022
abstract: An autonomous retail store management system entails inventory tracking, store monitoring, and anomaly correction. Recent attempts at autonomous retail store management have faced challenges primarily in perception for anomaly detection, as well as new challenges arising in mobile manipulation for executing anomaly correction. Advances in each of these areas along with system integration are necessary for a scalable solution in this domain.
summary: An autonomous retail store management system entails inventory tracking, store monitoring, and anomaly correction. Recent attempts at autonomous retail store management have faced challenges primarily in perception for anomaly detection, as well as new challenges arising in mobile manipulation for executing anomaly correction. Advances in each of these areas along with system integration are necessary for a scalable solution in this domain.
abstract_zh: 自主零售商店管理系统需要库存跟踪、商店监控和异常纠正。最近自主零售商店管理的尝试主要面临着异常检测感知方面的挑战，以及执行异常纠正的移动操作方面出现的新挑战。每个领域的进步以及系统集成对于该领域的可扩展解决方案都是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在零售店管理中应用机器人技术所面临的挑战，特别是在异常检测的感知和异常纠正的移动操作方面。
AI.motivation: 随着自主零售店管理系统的需求增长，现有技术在感知能力和移动操作执行上存在不足，亟需解决这些问题以实现可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析当前自主零售店管理系统的局限性，识别感知异常检测和移动操作执行中的关键技术挑战，并探讨系统集成的必要性。
AI.result: 研究发现，感知技术的准确性及移动操作的灵活性是主要瓶颈，同时系统集成复杂性进一步限制了规模化应用。
AI.conclusion: 未来需在感知算法、移动操作机械设计及系统集成方面取得突破，才能推动机器人技术在零售管理领域的实际落地。

authors_text: Eduard Eiben,Clément Rambaud,Magnus Wahlström
title: On the parameterized complexity of symmetric directed multicut
title_zh: 对称定向多重切割的参数化复杂度
comment: A shortened version of this article has been accepted for presentation and publication at The 17th International Symposium on Parameterized and Exact Computation (IPEC 2022)
comments: A shortened version of this article has been accepted for presentation and publication at The 17th International Symposium on Parameterized and Exact Computation (IPEC 2022)
abstract: We study the problem Symmetric Directed Multicut from a parameterized complexity perspective. In this problem, the input is a digraph $D$, a set of cut requests $C=\{(s_1,t_1),\ldots,(s_\ell,t_\ell)\}$ and an integer $k$, and the task is to find a set $X \subseteq V(D)$ of size at most $k$ such that for every $1 \leq i \leq \ell$, $X$ intersects either all $(s_i,t_i)$-paths or all $(t_i,s_i)$-paths. Equivalently, every strongly connected component of $D-X$ contains at most one vertex out of $s_i$ and $t_i$ for every $i$. This problem is previously known from research in approximation algorithms, where it is known to have an $O(\log k \log \log k)$-approximation. We note that the problem, parameterized by $k$, directly generalizes multiple interesting FPT problems such as (Undirected) Vertex Multicut and Directed Subset Feedback Vertex Set. We are not able to settle the existence of an FPT algorithm parameterized purely by $k$, but we give three partial results: An FPT algorithm parameterized by $k+\ell$; an FPT-time 2-approximation parameterized by $k$; and an FPT algorithm parameterized by $k$ for the special case that the cut requests form a clique, Symmetric Directed Multiway Cut. The existence of an FPT algorithm parameterized purely by $k$ remains an intriguing open possibility.
summary: We study the problem Symmetric Directed Multicut from a parameterized complexity perspective. In this problem, the input is a digraph $D$, a set of cut requests $C=\{(s_1,t_1),\ldots,(s_\ell,t_\ell)\}$ and an integer $k$, and the task is to find a set $X \subseteq V(D)$ of size at most $k$ such that for every $1 \leq i \leq \ell$, $X$ intersects either all $(s_i,t_i)$-paths or all $(t_i,s_i)$-paths. Equivalently, every strongly connected component of $D-X$ contains at most one vertex out of $s_i$ and $t_i$ for every $i$. This problem is previously known from research in approximation algorithms, where it is known to have an $O(\log k \log \log k)$-approximation. We note that the problem, parameterized by $k$, directly generalizes multiple interesting FPT problems such as (Undirected) Vertex Multicut and Directed Subset Feedback Vertex Set. We are not able to settle the existence of an FPT algorithm parameterized purely by $k$, but we give three partial results: An FPT algorithm parameterized by $k+\ell$; an FPT-time 2-approximation parameterized by $k$; and an FPT algorithm parameterized by $k$ for the special case that the cut requests form a clique, Symmetric Directed Multiway Cut. The existence of an FPT algorithm parameterized purely by $k$ remains an intriguing open possibility.
abstract_zh: 我们从参数化复杂度的角度研究对称定向多重切割问题。在此问题中，输入是一个有向图 $D$、一组剪切请求 $C=\{(s_1,t_1),\ldots,(s_\ell,t_\ell)\}$ 和一个整数 $k$，任务是找到一组大小至多 $k$ 的 $X \subseteq V(D)$，使得对于每个 $1 \leq i \leq \ell$，$X$ 与所有相交$(s_i,t_i)$-路径或所有$(t_i,s_i)$-路径。同样，对于每个 $i$，$D-X$ 的每个强连通分量最多包含 $s_i$ 和 $t_i$ 中的一个顶点。这个问题之前是通过近似算法的研究得知的，已知它具有 $O(\log k \log \log k)$ 近似值。我们注意到，由 $k$ 参数化的问题直接概括了多个有趣的 FPT 问题，例如（无向）顶点多重切割和有向子集反馈顶点集。我们无法确定纯粹由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 算法是否存在，但我们给出了三个部分结果： 由 $k+\ell$ 参数化的 FPT 算法；由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 时间 2 近似值；以及由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 算法，用于切割请求形成团伙的特殊情况，即对称定向多路切割。纯粹由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 算法的存在仍然是一个有趣的开放可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文从参数化复杂度角度研究对称有向多割问题，探讨其固定参数可解性（FPT）算法的可能性。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有对称有向多割问题的近似算法，但其参数化复杂度尚未明确，且该问题可推广多个已知FPT问题，因此需进一步研究其参数化算法。
AI.method: 通过分析问题特性，提出三种部分结果：基于k+ℓ的FPT算法、基于k的2-近似算法，以及针对特殊情形（请求集为团）的FPT算法。
AI.result: 证明了三种参数化场景下的FPT算法或近似算法，但未能确定仅以k为参数的FPT算法是否存在。
AI.conclusion: 对称有向多割问题在仅以k为参数时的FPT算法存在性仍是未解难题，需进一步研究。

motivation: 尽管已有对称有向多割问题的近似算法，但其参数化复杂度尚未明确，且该问题可推广多个已知FPT问题，因此需进一步研究其参数化算法。
method: 通过分析问题特性，提出三种部分结果：基于k+ℓ的FPT算法、基于k的2-近似算法，以及针对特殊情形（请求集为团）的FPT算法。
result: 证明了三种参数化场景下的FPT算法或近似算法，但未能确定仅以k为参数的FPT算法是否存在。
conclusion: 对称有向多割问题在仅以k为参数时的FPT算法存在性仍是未解难题，需进一步研究。
search_text: On the parameterized complexity of symmetric directed multicut 对称定向多重切割的参数化复杂度 We study the problem Symmetric Directed Multicut from a parameterized complexity perspective. In this problem, the input is a digraph $D$, a set of cut requests $C=\{(s_1,t_1),\ldots,(s_\ell,t_\ell)\}$ and an integer $k$, and the task is to find a set $X \subseteq V(D)$ of size at most $k$ such that for every $1 \leq i \leq \ell$, $X$ intersects either all $(s_i,t_i)$-paths or all $(t_i,s_i)$-paths. Equivalently, every strongly connected component of $D-X$ contains at most one vertex out of $s_i$ and $t_i$ for every $i$. This problem is previously known from research in approximation algorithms, where it is known to have an $O(\log k \log \log k)$-approximation. We note that the problem, parameterized by $k$, directly generalizes multiple interesting FPT problems such as (Undirected) Vertex Multicut and Directed Subset Feedback Vertex Set. We are not able to settle the existence of an FPT algorithm parameterized purely by $k$, but we give three partial results: An FPT algorithm parameterized by $k+\ell$; an FPT-time 2-approximation parameterized by $k$; and an FPT algorithm parameterized by $k$ for the special case that the cut requests form a clique, Symmetric Directed Multiway Cut. The existence of an FPT algorithm parameterized purely by $k$ remains an intriguing open possibility. 我们从参数化复杂度的角度研究对称定向多重切割问题。在此问题中，输入是一个有向图 $D$、一组剪切请求 $C=\{(s_1,t_1),\ldots,(s_\ell,t_\ell)\}$ 和一个整数 $k$，任务是找到一组大小至多 $k$ 的 $X \subseteq V(D)$，使得对于每个 $1 \leq i \leq \ell$，$X$ 与所有相交$(s_i,t_i)$-路径或所有$(t_i,s_i)$-路径。同样，对于每个 $i$，$D-X$ 的每个强连通分量最多包含 $s_i$ 和 $t_i$ 中的一个顶点。这个问题之前是通过近似算法的研究得知的，已知它具有 $O(\log k \log \log k)$ 近似值。我们注意到，由 $k$ 参数化的问题直接概括了多个有趣的 FPT 问题，例如（无向）顶点多重切割和有向子集反馈顶点集。我们无法确定纯粹由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 算法是否存在，但我们给出了三个部分结果： 由 $k+\ell$ 参数化的 FPT 算法；由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 时间 2 近似值；以及由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 算法，用于切割请求形成团伙的特殊情况，即对称定向多路切割。纯粹由 $k$ 参数化的 FPT 算法的存在仍然是一个有趣的开放可能性。 本文从参数化复杂度角度研究对称有向多割问题，探讨其固定参数可解性（FPT）算法的可能性。 Eduard Eiben,Clément Rambaud,Magnus Wahlström cs.DS

authors_text: Danny Reidenbach,Micha Livne,Rajesh K. Ilango,Michelle Gill,Johnny Israeli
title: Improving Small Molecule Generation using Mutual Information Machine
title_zh: 使用互信息机改进小分子生成
comment: Published at the MLDD workshop, ICLR 2023. version 2. 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: Published at the MLDD workshop, ICLR 2023. version 2. 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: We address the task of controlled generation of small molecules, which entails finding novel molecules with desired properties under certain constraints (e.g., similarity to a reference molecule). Here we introduce MolMIM, a probabilistic auto-encoder for small molecule drug discovery that learns an informative and clustered latent space. MolMIM is trained with Mutual Information Machine (MIM) learning, and provides a fixed length representation of variable length SMILES strings. Since encoder-decoder models can learn representations with ``holes'' of invalid samples, here we propose a novel extension to the training procedure which promotes a dense latent space, and allows the model to sample valid molecules from random perturbations of latent codes. We provide a thorough comparison of MolMIM to several variable-size and fixed-size encoder-decoder models, demonstrating MolMIM's superior generation as measured in terms of validity, uniqueness, and novelty. We then utilize CMA-ES, a naive black-box and gradient free search algorithm, over MolMIM's latent space for the task of property guided molecule optimization. We achieve state-of-the-art results in several constrained single property optimization tasks as well as in the challenging task of multi-objective optimization, improving over previous success rate SOTA by more than 5\% . We attribute the strong results to MolMIM's latent representation which clusters similar molecules in the latent space, whereas CMA-ES is often used as a baseline optimization method. We also demonstrate MolMIM to be favourable in a compute limited regime, making it an attractive model for such cases.
summary: We address the task of controlled generation of small molecules, which entails finding novel molecules with desired properties under certain constraints (e.g., similarity to a reference molecule). Here we introduce MolMIM, a probabilistic auto-encoder for small molecule drug discovery that learns an informative and clustered latent space. MolMIM is trained with Mutual Information Machine (MIM) learning, and provides a fixed length representation of variable length SMILES strings. Since encoder-decoder models can learn representations with ``holes'' of invalid samples, here we propose a novel extension to the training procedure which promotes a dense latent space, and allows the model to sample valid molecules from random perturbations of latent codes. We provide a thorough comparison of MolMIM to several variable-size and fixed-size encoder-decoder models, demonstrating MolMIM's superior generation as measured in terms of validity, uniqueness, and novelty. We then utilize CMA-ES, a naive black-box and gradient free search algorithm, over MolMIM's latent space for the task of property guided molecule optimization. We achieve state-of-the-art results in several constrained single property optimization tasks as well as in the challenging task of multi-objective optimization, improving over previous success rate SOTA by more than 5\% . We attribute the strong results to MolMIM's latent representation which clusters similar molecules in the latent space, whereas CMA-ES is often used as a baseline optimization method. We also demonstrate MolMIM to be favourable in a compute limited regime, making it an attractive model for such cases.
abstract_zh: 我们解决小分子受控生成的任务，这需要在某些约束下（例如，与参考分子的相似性）找到具有所需特性的新分子。在这里，我们介绍 MolMIM，一种用于小分子药物发现的概率自动编码器，可以学习信息丰富的集群潜在空间。 MolMIM 通过互信息机 (MIM) 学习进行训练，并提供可变长度 SMILES 字符串的固定长度表示。由于编码器-解码器模型可以学习带有无效样本“漏洞”的表示，因此我们在这里提出了一种新的训练过程扩展，它可以促进密集的潜在空间，并允许模型从潜在代码的随机扰动中采样有效分子。我们对 MolMIM 与几种可变大小和固定大小的编码器-解码器模型进行了彻底的比较，证明了 MolMIM 在有效性、独特性和新颖性方面的优越性。然后，我们利用 CMA-ES（一种简单的黑盒和无梯度搜索算法）在 MolMIM 的潜在空间上执行属性引导分子优化的任务。我们在几个约束单属性优化任务以及具有挑战性的多目标优化任务中取得了最先进的结果，比之前的 SOTA 成功率提高了 5% 以上。我们将强大的结果归因于 MolMIM 的潜在表示，它在潜在空间中聚集相似的分子，而 CMA-ES 通常用作基线优化方法。我们还证明 MolMIM 在计算受限的情况下是有利的，使其成为此类情况下有吸引力的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MolMIM模型，通过互信息机学习改进小分子生成，实现可控生成具有目标属性的分子。
AI.motivation: 现有分子生成模型存在无效样本多、潜在空间表示不密集的问题，需提升生成分子的有效性、新颖性和优化效率。
AI.method: 设计基于互信息机（MIM）的变分自编码器MolMIM，通过扩展训练过程促进密集潜在空间，并结合CMA-ES算法进行属性引导的分子优化。
AI.result: 在单目标和多目标优化任务中达到SOTA性能，成功率提升超5%，且在计算资源受限场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MolMIM的聚类潜在空间与CMA-ES结合，为药物发现提供高效可控的分子生成方案，尤其适合计算资源有限场景。

authors_text: Xupeng Ai,Victor Santamaria,Isirame Babajide Omofuma,Sunil K. Agrawal
title: Evaluation of Postural Muscle Synergies during a Complex Motor Task in a Virtual Reality Environment
title_zh: 虚拟现实环境中复杂运动任务期间姿势肌肉协同作用的评估
abstract: In this study, we investigate how the central nervous system (CNS) organizes postural control synergies when individuals perform a complex catch-and-throw task in a virtual reality (VR) environment. A Robotic Upright Stand Trainer (RobUST) platform, including surface electromyography and kinematics, was used to investigate how the CNS fine-tunes postural synergies with perturbative and assist-as-needed force fields. A control group without assistive forces was recruited to elucidate the effect of force fields on motor performance and postural synergy organization after the perturbation and during the VR reaching task. We found that the application of assistive forces significantly improved reaching and balance control. The group receiving assistive forces displayed four postural control synergies characterized by higher complexity (i.e., greater number of muscles involved). However, control subjects displayed eight synergies that recruited less number of muscles. In conclusion, assistive forces reduce the number of postural synergies while increasing the complexity of muscle module composition.
summary: In this study, we investigate how the central nervous system (CNS) organizes postural control synergies when individuals perform a complex catch-and-throw task in a virtual reality (VR) environment. A Robotic Upright Stand Trainer (RobUST) platform, including surface electromyography and kinematics, was used to investigate how the CNS fine-tunes postural synergies with perturbative and assist-as-needed force fields. A control group without assistive forces was recruited to elucidate the effect of force fields on motor performance and postural synergy organization after the perturbation and during the VR reaching task. We found that the application of assistive forces significantly improved reaching and balance control. The group receiving assistive forces displayed four postural control synergies characterized by higher complexity (i.e., greater number of muscles involved). However, control subjects displayed eight synergies that recruited less number of muscles. In conclusion, assistive forces reduce the number of postural synergies while increasing the complexity of muscle module composition.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们研究了当个体在虚拟现实（VR）环境中执行复杂的接球和投掷任务时，中枢神经系统（CNS）如何组织姿势控制协同作用。机器人直立训练器 (RobUST) 平台，包括表面肌电图和运动学，用于研究中枢神经系统如何通过扰动和按需辅助力场微调姿势协同作用。招募了一个没有辅助力的对照组，以阐明在扰动后和 VR 到达任务期间力场对运动表现和姿势协同组织的影响。我们发现辅助力的应用显着改善了伸展和平衡控制。接受辅助力的组表现出四种姿势控制协同作用，其特征是更高的复杂性（即涉及更多的肌肉）。然而，对照受试者表现出八种协同作用，募集的肌肉数量较少。总之，辅助力减少了姿势协同的数量，同时增加了肌肉模块组成的复杂性。

AI.tldr: 评估在虚拟现实环境中进行复杂运动任务时姿势肌肉协同的组织方式。
AI.motivation: 探索中枢神经系统如何通过调整姿势协同来应对虚拟现实中的复杂任务及外部力场干扰。
AI.method: 使用RobUST平台结合表面肌电图和运动学数据，通过施加扰动和辅助力场，对比有无辅助力组的姿势协同特征。
AI.result: 辅助力组在抓取和平衡控制中表现更优，呈现4个高复杂度协同模式；对照组则出现8个低复杂度协同模式。
AI.conclusion: 辅助力可减少姿势协同数量但提升肌肉模块复杂性，揭示力场对运动控制策略的调节作用。

The group receiving assistive forces displayed four postural control synergies characterized by higher complexity (i.e., greater number of muscles involved). However, control subjects displayed eight synergies that recruited less number of muscles. In conclusion, assistive forces reduce the number of postural synergies while increasing the complexity of muscle module composition. 在这项研究中，我们研究了当个体在虚拟现实（VR）环境中执行复杂的接球和投掷任务时，中枢神经系统（CNS）如何组织姿势控制协同作用。机器人直立训练器 (RobUST) 平台，包括表面肌电图和运动学，用于研究中枢神经系统如何通过扰动和按需辅助力场微调姿势协同作用。招募了一个没有辅助力的对照组，以阐明在扰动后和 VR 到达任务期间力场对运动表现和姿势协同组织的影响。我们发现辅助力的应用显着改善了伸展和平衡控制。接受辅助力的组表现出四种姿势控制协同作用，其特征是更高的复杂性（即涉及更多的肌肉）。然而，对照受试者表现出八种协同作用，募集的肌肉数量较少。总之，辅助力减少了姿势协同的数量，同时增加了肌肉模块组成的复杂性。 评估在虚拟现实环境中进行复杂运动任务时姿势肌肉协同的组织方式。 Xupeng Ai,Victor Santamaria,Isirame Babajide Omofuma,Sunil K. Agrawal cs.RO,physics.data-an

authors_text: Md. Taufiqul Haque Khan Tusar,Roban Khan Anik
title: Automated Detection of Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia Subtypes from Microscopic Blood Smear Images using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络从显微血涂片图像自动检测急性淋巴细胞白血病亚型
comment: 25 pages, 20 figures, A project report submitted in partial fulfillment of the requirements for the Degree of Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering at City University, Dhaka 1216, Bangladesh
comments: 25 pages, 20 figures, A project report submitted in partial fulfillment of the requirements for the Degree of Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering at City University, Dhaka 1216, Bangladesh
abstract: An estimated 300,000 new cases of leukemia are diagnosed each year which is 2.8 percent of all new cancer cases and the prevalence is rising day by day. The most dangerous and deadly type of leukemia is acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL), which affects people of all age groups, including children and adults. In this study, we propose an automated system to detect various-shaped ALL blast cells from microscopic blood smears images using Deep Neural Networks (DNN). The system can detect multiple subtypes of ALL cells with an accuracy of 98 percent. Moreover, we have developed a telediagnosis software to provide real-time support to diagnose ALL subtypes from microscopic blood smears images.
summary: An estimated 300,000 new cases of leukemia are diagnosed each year which is 2.8 percent of all new cancer cases and the prevalence is rising day by day. The most dangerous and deadly type of leukemia is acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL), which affects people of all age groups, including children and adults. In this study, we propose an automated system to detect various-shaped ALL blast cells from microscopic blood smears images using Deep Neural Networks (DNN). The system can detect multiple subtypes of ALL cells with an accuracy of 98 percent. Moreover, we have developed a telediagnosis software to provide real-time support to diagnose ALL subtypes from microscopic blood smears images.
abstract_zh: 据估计，每年新诊断出30万例白血病病例，占所有新发癌症病例的2.8%，并且患病率正在日益上升。最危险和致命的白血病类型是急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL），它影响所有年龄段的人，包括儿童和成人。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种自动化系统，使用深​​度神经网络 (DNN) 从显微血涂片图像中检测各种形状的 ALL 母细胞。该系统可以检测 ALL 细胞的多种亚型，准确率高达 98%。此外，我们还开发了远程诊断软件，为通过显微血涂片图像诊断所有亚型提供实时支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的自动化系统，用于从显微血涂片图像中检测急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）的亚型。
AI.motivation: 由于ALL的高发病率和诊断的复杂性，需要一种高效准确的自动化方法来辅助病理学家进行诊断，减少人为错误并提高诊断效率。
AI.method: 采用深度神经网络（DNN）对显微血涂片图像中的ALL原始细胞进行分类，并开发了远程诊断软件以提供实时诊断支持。
AI.result: 系统在检测多种ALL亚型时达到98%的准确率，并成功实现了远程实时诊断功能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的自动化系统显著提高了ALL亚型诊断的准确性和效率，为远程医疗和实时诊断提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Chris Rockwell,Justin Johnson,David F. Fouhey
title: The 8-Point Algorithm as an Inductive Bias for Relative Pose Prediction by ViTs
title_zh: 作为 ViT 相对姿势预测的归纳偏差的 8 点算法
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2022; Project Page: https://crockwell.github.io/rel_pose/ Revision: Fixed Epipolar Lines in Figure 3, Figure 10
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2022; Project Page: https://crockwell.github.io/rel_pose/ Revision: Fixed Epipolar Lines in Figure 3, Figure 10
abstract: We present a simple baseline for directly estimating the relative pose (rotation and translation, including scale) between two images. Deep methods have recently shown strong progress but often require complex or multi-stage architectures. We show that a handful of modifications can be applied to a Vision Transformer (ViT) to bring its computations close to the Eight-Point Algorithm. This inductive bias enables a simple method to be competitive in multiple settings, often substantially improving over the state of the art with strong performance gains in limited data regimes.
summary: We present a simple baseline for directly estimating the relative pose (rotation and translation, including scale) between two images. Deep methods have recently shown strong progress but often require complex or multi-stage architectures. We show that a handful of modifications can be applied to a Vision Transformer (ViT) to bring its computations close to the Eight-Point Algorithm. This inductive bias enables a simple method to be competitive in multiple settings, often substantially improving over the state of the art with strong performance gains in limited data regimes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单的基线，用于直接估计两个图像之间的相对姿势（旋转和平移，包括缩放）。深度方法最近取得了巨大进展，但通常需要复杂或多级架构。我们展示了可以对视觉变换器（ViT）进行一些修改，使其计算接近八点算法。这种归纳偏差使得简单的方法在多种设置中具有竞争力，通常比现有技术有显着的改进，在有限的数据范围内具有强大的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的简单方法，直接估计两幅图像之间的相对姿态（包括旋转、平移和尺度）。
AI.motivation: 现有深度方法在估计相对姿态时通常需要复杂或多阶段架构，而本文旨在通过引入八点算法的归纳偏置，简化ViT的计算并提升性能。
AI.method: 对ViT进行少量修改，使其计算过程接近八点算法，从而直接预测相对姿态。
AI.result: 在多种场景下，该方法在有限数据条件下显著优于现有方法，性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入八点算法的归纳偏置，ViT能够以简单架构高效解决相对姿态估计问题，尤其在数据有限时表现突出。

authors_text: Zheng Ding,Jieke Wang,Zhuowen Tu
title: Open-Vocabulary Universal Image Segmentation with MaskCLIP
title_zh: 使用 MaskCLIP 进行开放词汇通用图像分割
abstract: In this paper, we tackle an emerging computer vision task, open-vocabulary universal image segmentation, that aims to perform semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation (background semantic labeling + foreground instance segmentation) for arbitrary categories of text-based descriptions in inference time. We first build a baseline method by directly adopting pre-trained CLIP models without finetuning or distillation. We then develop MaskCLIP, a Transformer-based approach with a MaskCLIP Visual Encoder, which is an encoder-only module that seamlessly integrates mask tokens with a pre-trained ViT CLIP model for semantic/instance segmentation and class prediction. MaskCLIP learns to efficiently and effectively utilize pre-trained partial/dense CLIP features within the MaskCLIP Visual Encoder that avoids the time-consuming student-teacher training process. MaskCLIP outperforms previous methods for semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation on ADE20K and PASCAL datasets. We show qualitative illustrations for MaskCLIP with online custom categories. Project website: https://maskclip.github.io.
summary: In this paper, we tackle an emerging computer vision task, open-vocabulary universal image segmentation, that aims to perform semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation (background semantic labeling + foreground instance segmentation) for arbitrary categories of text-based descriptions in inference time. We first build a baseline method by directly adopting pre-trained CLIP models without finetuning or distillation. We then develop MaskCLIP, a Transformer-based approach with a MaskCLIP Visual Encoder, which is an encoder-only module that seamlessly integrates mask tokens with a pre-trained ViT CLIP model for semantic/instance segmentation and class prediction. MaskCLIP learns to efficiently and effectively utilize pre-trained partial/dense CLIP features within the MaskCLIP Visual Encoder that avoids the time-consuming student-teacher training process. MaskCLIP outperforms previous methods for semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation on ADE20K and PASCAL datasets. We show qualitative illustrations for MaskCLIP with online custom categories. Project website: https://maskclip.github.io.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了一个新兴的计算机视觉任务，即开放词汇通用图像分割，其目的是在推理时间内对基于文本的描述的任意类别执行语义/实例/全景分割（背景语义标记+前景实例分割）。我们首先通过直接采用预先训练的 CLIP 模型来构建基线方法，无需微调或蒸馏。然后，我们开发了 MaskCLIP，这是一种基于 Transformer 的方法，带有 MaskCLIP Visual Encoder，这是一个仅编码器的模块，可将 mask token 与预训练的 ViT CLIP 模型无缝集成，以进行语义/实例分割和类预测。 MaskCLIP 学习如何高效且有效地利用 MaskCLIP 视觉编码器中预先训练的部分/密集 CLIP 功能，从而避免耗时的学生-教师培训过程。 MaskCLIP 在 ADE20K 和 PASCAL 数据集上优于以前的语义/实例/全景分割方法。我们通过在线自定义类别展示 MaskCLIP 的定性插图。项目网站：https://maskclip.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MaskCLIP方法，实现基于预训练CLIP模型的开放词汇通用图像分割，支持任意文本描述类别的语义/实例/全景分割。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分割方法依赖固定类别标签，难以处理开放词汇场景。现有方法需大量标注数据或微调预训练模型，而本文旨在利用预训练CLIP模型实现零样本分割。
AI.method: 构建MaskCLIP视觉编码器，将掩码标记与预训练ViT CLIP模型集成，在无需微调或蒸馏的情况下，直接利用CLIP的语义特征进行多任务分割。
AI.result: 在ADE20K和PASCAL数据集上超越现有方法，且能通过在线自定义类别展示定性分割效果。
AI.conclusion: MaskCLIP通过高效利用预训练CLIP特征，实现了无需复杂训练流程的开放词汇分割，为通用图像分割提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MaskCLIP方法，实现基于预训练CLIP模型的开放词汇通用图像分割，支持任意文本描述类别的语义/实例/全景分割。

motivation: 传统图像分割方法依赖固定类别标签，难以处理开放词汇场景。现有方法需大量标注数据或微调预训练模型，而本文旨在利用预训练CLIP模型实现零样本分割。
method: 构建MaskCLIP视觉编码器，将掩码标记与预训练ViT CLIP模型集成，在无需微调或蒸馏的情况下，直接利用CLIP的语义特征进行多任务分割。
result: 在ADE20K和PASCAL数据集上超越现有方法，且能通过在线自定义类别展示定性分割效果。
conclusion: MaskCLIP通过高效利用预训练CLIP特征，实现了无需复杂训练流程的开放词汇分割，为通用图像分割提供新思路。
search_text: Open-Vocabulary Universal Image Segmentation with MaskCLIP 使用 MaskCLIP 进行开放词汇通用图像分割 In this paper, we tackle an emerging computer vision task, open-vocabulary universal image segmentation, that aims to perform semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation (background semantic labeling + foreground instance segmentation) for arbitrary categories of text-based descriptions in inference time. We first build a baseline method by directly adopting pre-trained CLIP models without finetuning or distillation. We then develop MaskCLIP, a Transformer-based approach with a MaskCLIP Visual Encoder, which is an encoder-only module that seamlessly integrates mask tokens with a pre-trained ViT CLIP model for semantic/instance segmentation and class prediction. MaskCLIP learns to efficiently and effectively utilize pre-trained partial/dense CLIP features within the MaskCLIP Visual Encoder that avoids the time-consuming student-teacher training process. MaskCLIP outperforms previous methods for semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation on ADE20K and PASCAL datasets. We show qualitative illustrations for MaskCLIP with online custom categories. Project website: https://maskclip.github.io. 在本文中，我们解决了一个新兴的计算机视觉任务，即开放词汇通用图像分割，其目的是在推理时间内对基于文本的描述的任意类别执行语义/实例/全景分割（背景语义标记+前景实例分割）。我们首先通过直接采用预先训练的 CLIP 模型来构建基线方法，无需微调或蒸馏。然后，我们开发了 MaskCLIP，这是一种基于 Transformer 的方法，带有 MaskCLIP Visual Encoder，这是一个仅编码器的模块，可将 mask token 与预训练的 ViT CLIP 模型无缝集成，以进行语义/实例分割和类预测。 MaskCLIP 学习如何高效且有效地利用 MaskCLIP 视觉编码器中预先训练的部分/密集 CLIP 功能，从而避免耗时的学生-教师培训过程。 MaskCLIP 在 ADE20K 和 PASCAL 数据集上优于以前的语义/实例/全景分割方法。我们通过在线自定义类别展示 MaskCLIP 的定性插图。项目网站：https://maskclip.github.io。 本文提出MaskCLIP方法，实现基于预训练CLIP模型的开放词汇通用图像分割，支持任意文本描述类别的语义/实例/全景分割。 Zheng Ding,Jieke Wang,Zhuowen Tu cs.CV

authors_text: Emmanuel Deruty,Maarten Grachten
title: "Melatonin": A Case Study on AI-induced Musical Style
title_zh: 《褪黑素》：人工智能诱导音乐风格的案例研究
comment: Accepted paper at the 3rd Conference on AI Music Creativity (September 2022)
comments: Accepted paper at the 3rd Conference on AI Music Creativity (September 2022)
abstract: Although the use of AI tools in music composition and production is steadily increasing, as witnessed by the newly founded AI song contest, analysis of music produced using these tools is still relatively uncommon as a mean to gain insight in the ways AI tools impact music production. In this paper we present a case study of "Melatonin", a song produced by extensive use of BassNet, an AI tool originally designed to generate bass lines. Through analysis of the artists' work flow and song project, we identify style characteristics of the song in relation to the affordances of the tool, highlighting manifestations of style in terms of both idiom and sound.
summary: Although the use of AI tools in music composition and production is steadily increasing, as witnessed by the newly founded AI song contest, analysis of music produced using these tools is still relatively uncommon as a mean to gain insight in the ways AI tools impact music production. In this paper we present a case study of "Melatonin", a song produced by extensive use of BassNet, an AI tool originally designed to generate bass lines. Through analysis of the artists' work flow and song project, we identify style characteristics of the song in relation to the affordances of the tool, highlighting manifestations of style in terms of both idiom and sound.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能工具在音乐创作和制作中的使用正在稳步增加，正如新成立的人工智能歌曲大赛所见证的那样，但作为深入了解人工智能工具影响音乐制作方式的手段，对使用这些工具制作的音乐进行分析仍然相对不常见。在本文中，我们介绍了“Melatonin”的案例研究，这是一首广泛使用 BassNet 制作的歌曲，BassNet 是一种最初设计用于生成低音线的人工智能工具。通过对艺术家的工作流程和歌曲项目的分析，我们确定了与工具的可供性相关的歌曲的风格特征，突出了风格在习语和声音方面的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析AI工具BassNet创作的歌曲《Melatonin》，探讨AI对音乐风格的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在音乐创作中应用增多，但对其生成音乐风格影响的分析仍较为稀缺，需通过案例研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过分析艺术家创作流程及项目文件，结合BassNet的功能特性，识别音乐风格中的乐派与声音特征。
AI.result: 发现BassNet的使用导致歌曲在低音线条复杂度、节奏规律性及声音质感上呈现特定风格特征。
AI.conclusion: AI工具通过其功能特性塑造音乐风格，未来需更多研究以理解AI与人类创作的交互影响。

authors_text: Zhi-Qi Cheng,Qi Dai,Siyao Li,Teruko Mitamura,Alexander G. Hauptmann
title: GSRFormer: Grounded Situation Recognition Transformer with Alternate Semantic Attention Refinement
title_zh: GSRFormer：具有交替语义注意力细化的接地情况识别变压器
abstract: Grounded Situation Recognition (GSR) aims to generate structured semantic summaries of images for "human-like" event understanding. Specifically, GSR task not only detects the salient activity verb (e.g. buying), but also predicts all corresponding semantic roles (e.g. agent and goods). Inspired by object detection and image captioning tasks, existing methods typically employ a two-stage framework: 1) detect the activity verb, and then 2) predict semantic roles based on the detected verb. Obviously, this illogical framework constitutes a huge obstacle to semantic understanding. First, pre-detecting verbs solely without semantic roles inevitably fails to distinguish many similar daily activities (e.g., offering and giving, buying and selling). Second, predicting semantic roles in a closed auto-regressive manner can hardly exploit the semantic relations among the verb and roles. To this end, in this paper we propose a novel two-stage framework that focuses on utilizing such bidirectional relations within verbs and roles. In the first stage, instead of pre-detecting the verb, we postpone the detection step and assume a pseudo label, where an intermediate representation for each corresponding semantic role is learned from images. In the second stage, we exploit transformer layers to unearth the potential semantic relations within both verbs and semantic roles. With the help of a set of support images, an alternate learning scheme is designed to simultaneously optimize the results: update the verb using nouns corresponding to the image, and update nouns using verbs from support images. Extensive experimental results on challenging SWiG benchmarks show that our renovated framework outperforms other state-of-the-art methods under various metrics.
summary: Grounded Situation Recognition (GSR) aims to generate structured semantic summaries of images for "human-like" event understanding. Specifically, GSR task not only detects the salient activity verb (e.g. buying), but also predicts all corresponding semantic roles (e.g. agent and goods). Inspired by object detection and image captioning tasks, existing methods typically employ a two-stage framework: 1) detect the activity verb, and then 2) predict semantic roles based on the detected verb. Obviously, this illogical framework constitutes a huge obstacle to semantic understanding. First, pre-detecting verbs solely without semantic roles inevitably fails to distinguish many similar daily activities (e.g., offering and giving, buying and selling). Second, predicting semantic roles in a closed auto-regressive manner can hardly exploit the semantic relations among the verb and roles. To this end, in this paper we propose a novel two-stage framework that focuses on utilizing such bidirectional relations within verbs and roles. In the first stage, instead of pre-detecting the verb, we postpone the detection step and assume a pseudo label, where an intermediate representation for each corresponding semantic role is learned from images. In the second stage, we exploit transformer layers to unearth the potential semantic relations within both verbs and semantic roles. With the help of a set of support images, an alternate learning scheme is designed to simultaneously optimize the results: update the verb using nouns corresponding to the image, and update nouns using verbs from support images. Extensive experimental results on challenging SWiG benchmarks show that our renovated framework outperforms other state-of-the-art methods under various metrics.
abstract_zh: 接地情境识别（GSR）旨在生成图像的结构化语义摘要，以实现“类人”事件理解。具体来说，GSR 任务不仅检测显着的活动动词（例如购买），还预测所有相应的语义角色（例如代理和商品）。受对象检测和图像字幕任务的启发，现有方法通常采用两阶段框架：1）检测活动动词，然后 2）根据检测到的动词预测语义角色。显然，这种不合逻辑的框架对语义理解构成了巨大障碍。首先，仅预先检测没有语义角色的动词不可避免地无法区分许多类似的日常活动（例如，提供和给予、购买和出售）。其次，以封闭的自回归方式预测语义角色很难利用动词和角色之间的语义关系。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，重点是利用动词和角色内的这种双向关系。在第一阶段，我们没有预先检测动词，而是推迟检测步骤并假设一个伪标签，其中每个相应语义角色的中间表示是从图像中学习的。在第二阶段，我们利用转换器层来挖掘动词和语义角色中潜在的语义关系。在一组支持图像的帮助下，设计了一种替代学习方案来同时优化结果：使用与图像对应的名词更新动词，并使用支持图像中的动词更新名词。在具有挑战性的 SWiG 基准上进行的大量实验结果表明，我们改进的框架在各种指标下都优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GSRFormer模型，通过双向语义关系优化，解决地面情境识别任务中动词检测与语义角色预测的关联性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段框架先检测动词再预测语义角色，导致相似活动难以区分且无法有效利用动词与角色间的语义关联。
AI.method: 设计新型两阶段框架：第一阶段通过伪标签学习语义角色中间表示，第二阶段利用Transformer挖掘动词与角色的潜在语义关系，并采用支持图像的交替学习方案优化结果。
AI.result: 在SWiG基准测试中，该框架在多项指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双向语义关联建模和交替学习机制，所提框架显著提升了地面情境识别的准确性和语义理解能力。

authors_text: Richard Li,Carlos Esteves,Ameesh Makadia,Pulkit Agrawal
title: Stable Object Reorientation using Contact Plane Registration
title_zh: 使用接触平面配准实现稳定的对象重新定向
abstract: We present a system for accurately predicting stable orientations for diverse rigid objects. We propose to overcome the critical issue of modelling multimodality in the space of rotations by using a conditional generative model to accurately classify contact surfaces. Our system is capable of operating from noisy and partially-observed pointcloud observations captured by real world depth cameras. Our method substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art systems on a simulated stacking task requiring highly accurate rotations, and demonstrates strong sim2real zero-shot transfer results across a variety of unseen objects on a real world reorientation task. Project website: \url{https://richardrl.github.io/stable-reorientation/}
summary: We present a system for accurately predicting stable orientations for diverse rigid objects. We propose to overcome the critical issue of modelling multimodality in the space of rotations by using a conditional generative model to accurately classify contact surfaces. Our system is capable of operating from noisy and partially-observed pointcloud observations captured by real world depth cameras. Our method substantially outperforms the current state-of-the-art systems on a simulated stacking task requiring highly accurate rotations, and demonstrates strong sim2real zero-shot transfer results across a variety of unseen objects on a real world reorientation task. Project website: \url{https://richardrl.github.io/stable-reorientation/}
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种准确预测各种刚性物体稳定方向的系统。我们建议通过使用条件生成模型对接触面进行准确分类来克服旋转空间中多模态建模的关键问题。我们的系统能够根据真实世界深度相机捕获的噪声和部分观测的点云观测进行操作。我们的方法在需要高精度旋转的模拟堆叠任务上大大优于当前最先进的系统，并且在现实世界重定向任务中展示了跨各种不可见物体的强大的 sim2real 零样本传输结果。项目网站：\url{https://richardrl.github.io/stable-reorientation/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于接触平面注册的系统，用于准确预测各种刚体物体的稳定方向。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多模态旋转空间建模时存在困难，尤其在噪声和部分观测条件下难以准确分类接触表面。
AI.method: 采用条件生成模型对接触表面进行分类，结合点云数据处理技术，实现从真实世界深度相机获取的噪声观测中预测稳定方向。
AI.result: 在模拟堆叠任务中显著优于现有方法，并在真实世界未见过物体的重新定向任务中展示了强大的sim2real迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多模态旋转建模问题，为实际场景中的物体稳定操作提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Annika Bidner,Julia Lindberg,Olof Lindman,Kinga Skorupska
title: Deploying Enhanced Speech Feature Decreased Audio Complaints at SVT Play VOD Service
title_zh: 部署增强语音功能减少了 SVT Play VOD 服务的音频投诉
comment: 9 pages, study based on a practical implementation at SVT
comments: 9 pages, study based on a practical implementation at SVT
abstract: At Public Service Broadcaster SVT in Sweden, background music and sounds in programs have for many years been one of the most common complaints from the viewers. The most sensitive group are people with hearing disabilities, but many others also find background sounds annoying. To address this problem SVT has added Enhanced Speech, a feature with lower background noise, to a number of TV programs in VOD service SVT Play. As a result, when the number of programs with the Enhanced Speech feature increased, the level of audio complaints to customer service decreased. The Enhanced Speech feature got the rating 8.3/10 in a survey with 86 participants. The rating for possible future usage was 9.0/10. In this article we describe this feature's design and development process, as well as its technical specification, limitations and future development opportunities.
summary: At Public Service Broadcaster SVT in Sweden, background music and sounds in programs have for many years been one of the most common complaints from the viewers. The most sensitive group are people with hearing disabilities, but many others also find background sounds annoying. To address this problem SVT has added Enhanced Speech, a feature with lower background noise, to a number of TV programs in VOD service SVT Play. As a result, when the number of programs with the Enhanced Speech feature increased, the level of audio complaints to customer service decreased. The Enhanced Speech feature got the rating 8.3/10 in a survey with 86 participants. The rating for possible future usage was 9.0/10. In this article we describe this feature's design and development process, as well as its technical specification, limitations and future development opportunities.
abstract_zh: 在瑞典公共服务广播公司 SVT，节目中的背景音乐和声音多年来一直是观众最常抱怨的问题之一。最敏感的群体是有听力障碍的人，但许多其他人也觉得背景声音很烦人。为了解决这个问题，SVT 在 VOD 服务 SVT Play 的许多电视节目中添加了增强语音（一种背景噪音更低的功能）。因此，当具有增强语音功能的程序数量增加时，对客户服务的音频投诉水平就会下降。在一项涉及 86 名参与者的调查中，增强语音功能获得了 8.3/10 的评分。未来可能使用的评级为 9.0/10。在本文中，我们描述了该功能的设计和开发过程，以及其技术规范、局限性和未来的发展机会。

AI.tldr: 介绍在SVT Play点播服务中部署增强语音功能以减少音频投诉的设计与实施
AI.motivation: 解决观众对节目背景音乐和声音的高频投诉问题，特别是听力障碍人士的困扰
AI.method: 开发降低背景噪音的增强语音功能并集成至VOD服务，通过用户调查和投诉数据分析验证效果
AI.result: 部署后音频投诉量下降，用户对功能评分达8.3/10，未来使用意愿评分9.0/10
AI.conclusion: 增强语音功能有效改善用户体验，未来可拓展至更多节目类型并优化技术参数

authors_text: Moumita Bhowmik,Manmeet Singh,Suryachandra Rao,Souvik Paul
title: DeepClouds.ai: Deep learning enabled computationally cheap direct numerical simulations
title_zh: DeepClouds.ai：深度学习实现了计算成本低廉的直接数值模拟
abstract: Simulation of turbulent flows, especially at the edges of clouds in the atmosphere, is an inherently challenging task. Hitherto, the best possible computational method to perform such experiments is the Direct Numerical Simulation (DNS). DNS involves solving non-linear partial differential equations for fluid flows, also known as Navier-Stokes equations, on discretized grid boxes in a three-dimensional space. It is a valuable paradigm that has guided the numerical weather prediction models to compute rainfall formation. However, DNS cannot be performed for large domains of practical utility to the weather forecast community. Here, we introduce DeepClouds.ai, a 3D-UNET that simulates the outputs of a rising cloud DNS experiment. The problem of increasing the domain size in DNS is addressed by mapping an inner 3D cube to the complete 3D cube from the output of the DNS discretized grid simulation. Our approach effectively captures turbulent flow dynamics without having to solve the complex dynamical core. The baseline shows that the deep learning-based simulation is comparable to the partial-differential equation-based model as measured by various score metrics. This framework can be used to further the science of turbulence and cloud flows by enabling simulations over large physical domains in the atmosphere. It would lead to cascading societal benefits by improved weather predictions via advanced parameterization schemes.
summary: Simulation of turbulent flows, especially at the edges of clouds in the atmosphere, is an inherently challenging task. Hitherto, the best possible computational method to perform such experiments is the Direct Numerical Simulation (DNS). DNS involves solving non-linear partial differential equations for fluid flows, also known as Navier-Stokes equations, on discretized grid boxes in a three-dimensional space. It is a valuable paradigm that has guided the numerical weather prediction models to compute rainfall formation. However, DNS cannot be performed for large domains of practical utility to the weather forecast community. Here, we introduce DeepClouds.ai, a 3D-UNET that simulates the outputs of a rising cloud DNS experiment. The problem of increasing the domain size in DNS is addressed by mapping an inner 3D cube to the complete 3D cube from the output of the DNS discretized grid simulation. Our approach effectively captures turbulent flow dynamics without having to solve the complex dynamical core. The baseline shows that the deep learning-based simulation is comparable to the partial-differential equation-based model as measured by various score metrics. This framework can be used to further the science of turbulence and cloud flows by enabling simulations over large physical domains in the atmosphere. It would lead to cascading societal benefits by improved weather predictions via advanced parameterization schemes.
abstract_zh: 湍流的模拟，尤其是大气中云层边缘的湍流，本质上是一项具有挑战性的任务。迄今为止，执行此类实验的最佳计算方法是直接数值模拟（DNS）。 DNS 涉及在三维空间中的离散网格盒上求解流体流动的非线性偏微分方程（也称为纳维-斯托克斯方程）。这是指导数值天气预报模型计算降雨形成的一个有价值的范例。然而，DNS 无法应用于对天气预报界具有实际用途的大范围。在这里，我们介绍 DeepClouds.ai，一个 3D-UNET，可以模拟新兴云 DNS 实验的输出。通过将内部 3D 立方体映射到来自 DNS 离散网格模拟输出的完整 3D 立方体，可以解决增加 DNS 中域大小的问题。我们的方法有效地捕获了湍流动力学，而无需解决复杂的动力学核心。基线显示，根据各种得分指标衡量，基于深度学习的模拟与基于偏微分方程的模型相当。该框架可用于通过模拟大气中的大型物理域来进一步研究湍流和云流科学。它将通过先进的参数化方案改进天气预报，从而带来级联的社会效益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepClouds.ai，一种基于3D-UNET的深度学习模型，用于高效模拟云层湍流的直接数值模拟（DNS）。
AI.motivation: 传统DNS计算成本高且难以处理大尺度实际应用领域，而深度学习方法可提供更高效的替代方案以推动天气预测研究。
AI.method: 采用3D-UNET架构，通过将DNS离散网格模拟输出的内部3D立方体映射到完整立方体，避免直接求解复杂动力核心方程。
AI.result: 深度学习模拟结果在多种评估指标上与基于偏微分方程的传统模型表现相当，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可实现大气大尺度湍流和云流模拟，为改进天气预测参数化方案提供技术支撑并带来社会价值。

It would lead to cascading societal benefits by improved weather predictions via advanced parameterization schemes. 湍流的模拟，尤其是大气中云层边缘的湍流，本质上是一项具有挑战性的任务。迄今为止，执行此类实验的最佳计算方法是直接数值模拟（DNS）。 DNS 涉及在三维空间中的离散网格盒上求解流体流动的非线性偏微分方程（也称为纳维-斯托克斯方程）。这是指导数值天气预报模型计算降雨形成的一个有价值的范例。然而，DNS 无法应用于对天气预报界具有实际用途的大范围。在这里，我们介绍 DeepClouds.ai，一个 3D-UNET，可以模拟新兴云 DNS 实验的输出。通过将内部 3D 立方体映射到来自 DNS 离散网格模拟输出的完整 3D 立方体，可以解决增加 DNS 中域大小的问题。我们的方法有效地捕获了湍流动力学，而无需解决复杂的动力学核心。基线显示，根据各种得分指标衡量，基于深度学习的模拟与基于偏微分方程的模型相当。该框架可用于通过模拟大气中的大型物理域来进一步研究湍流和云流科学。它将通过先进的参数化方案改进天气预报，从而带来级联的社会效益。 本文提出DeepClouds.ai，一种基于3D-UNET的深度学习模型，用于高效模拟云层湍流的直接数值模拟（DNS）。 Moumita Bhowmik,Manmeet Singh,Suryachandra Rao,Souvik Paul physics.flu-dyn,cs.CV,physics.ao-ph

authors_text: Fangquan Lin,Wei Jiang,Hanwei Zhang,Cheng Yang
title: KDD CUP 2022 Wind Power Forecasting Team 88VIP Solution
title_zh: KDD CUP 2022风电预测团队88VIP解决方案
abstract: KDD CUP 2022 proposes a time-series forecasting task on spatial dynamic wind power dataset, in which the participants are required to predict the future generation given the historical context factors. The evaluation metrics contain RMSE and MAE. This paper describes the solution of Team 88VIP, which mainly comprises two types of models: a gradient boosting decision tree to memorize the basic data patterns and a recurrent neural network to capture the deep and latent probabilistic transitions. Ensembling these models contributes to tackle the fluctuation of wind power, and training submodels targets on the distinguished properties in heterogeneous timescales of forecasting, from minutes to days. In addition, feature engineering, imputation techniques and the design of offline evaluation are also described in details. The proposed solution achieves an overall online score of -45.213 in Phase 3.
summary: KDD CUP 2022 proposes a time-series forecasting task on spatial dynamic wind power dataset, in which the participants are required to predict the future generation given the historical context factors. The evaluation metrics contain RMSE and MAE. This paper describes the solution of Team 88VIP, which mainly comprises two types of models: a gradient boosting decision tree to memorize the basic data patterns and a recurrent neural network to capture the deep and latent probabilistic transitions. Ensembling these models contributes to tackle the fluctuation of wind power, and training submodels targets on the distinguished properties in heterogeneous timescales of forecasting, from minutes to days. In addition, feature engineering, imputation techniques and the design of offline evaluation are also described in details. The proposed solution achieves an overall online score of -45.213 in Phase 3.
abstract_zh: KDD CUP 2022提出了空间动态风电数据集的时间序列预测任务，其中参与者需要在给定历史背景因素的情况下预测未来发电量。评估指标包括 RMSE 和 MAE。本文介绍了 Team 88VIP 的解决方案，该解决方案主要包含两种类型的模型：用于记忆基本数据模式的梯度提升决策树和用于捕获深层和潜在概率转换的循环神经网络。整合这些模型有助于解决风电的波动问题，并且训练子模型的目标是异构预测时间尺度（从几分钟到几天）的显着特性。此外，还详细描述了特征工程、插补技术和离线评估的设计。所提出的解决方案在第 3 阶段获得了 -45.213 的总体在线分数。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了KDD CUP 2022风力发电预测任务中Team 88VIP的解决方案，旨在通过历史数据预测未来风力发电量。
AI.motivation: 风力发电具有高度波动性，准确预测对能源管理至关重要，但现有方法难以兼顾多时间尺度特征与复杂动态关系。
AI.method: 融合梯度提升决策树（GBDT）捕捉基础数据模式与循环神经网络（RNN）挖掘深层概率转移，通过模型集成应对波动性，并设计针对分钟到天级不同时间尺度的子模型，结合特征工程与缺失值填补技术。
AI.result: 在Phase 3阶段获得在线评分为-45.213，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模型融合与分时间尺度建模能有效提升风力发电预测精度，为复杂时序问题提供可复用的解决方案框架。

authors_text: Peter Fettke,Alexander Rombach
title: Towards Automated Process Planning and Mining
title_zh: 迈向自动化流程规划和采矿
comment: Accepted at Workshop "Process Management in the AI era (PMAI)" @ IJCAI-ECAI 2022
comments: Accepted at Workshop "Process Management in the AI era (PMAI)" @ IJCAI-ECAI 2022
abstract: AI Planning, Machine Learning and Process Mining have so far developed into separate research fields. At the same time, many interesting concepts and insights have been gained at the intersection of these areas in recent years. For example, the behavior of future processes is now comprehensively predicted with the aid of Machine Learning. For the practical application of these findings, however, it is also necessary not only to know the expected course, but also to give recommendations and hints for the achievement of goals, i.e. to carry out comprehensive process planning. At the same time, an adequate integration of the aforementioned research fields is still lacking. In this article, we present a research project in which researchers from the AI and BPM field work jointly together. Therefore, we discuss the overall research problem, the relevant fields of research and our overall research framework to automatically derive process models from executional process data, derive subsequent planning problems and conduct automated planning in order to adaptively plan and execute business processes using real-time forecasts.
summary: AI Planning, Machine Learning and Process Mining have so far developed into separate research fields. At the same time, many interesting concepts and insights have been gained at the intersection of these areas in recent years. For example, the behavior of future processes is now comprehensively predicted with the aid of Machine Learning. For the practical application of these findings, however, it is also necessary not only to know the expected course, but also to give recommendations and hints for the achievement of goals, i.e. to carry out comprehensive process planning. At the same time, an adequate integration of the aforementioned research fields is still lacking. In this article, we present a research project in which researchers from the AI and BPM field work jointly together. Therefore, we discuss the overall research problem, the relevant fields of research and our overall research framework to automatically derive process models from executional process data, derive subsequent planning problems and conduct automated planning in order to adaptively plan and execute business processes using real-time forecasts.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，人工智能规划、机器学习和流程挖掘已经发展成为独立的研究领域。与此同时，近年来在这些领域的交叉领域获得了许多有趣的概念和见解。例如，现在借助机器学习可以全面预测未来过程的行为。然而，为了将这些发现实际应用，不仅需要了解预期的过程，还需要为实现目标提供建议和提示，即进行全面的流程规划。与此同时，上述研究领域仍缺乏充分的整合。在本文中，我们提出了一个研究项目，来自 AI 和 BPM 领域的研究人员共同合作。因此，我们讨论了总体研究问题、相关研究领域和总体研究框架，以从执行过程数据自动导出过程模型，导出后续规划问题并进行自动化规划，以便使用实时预测自适应地规划和执行业务流程。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在整合AI规划、机器学习与流程挖掘技术，通过自动化方法实现业务流程的实时预测与自适应规划。
AI.motivation: 现有研究领域分离导致实际应用中缺乏对流程预测与规划的综合支持，需整合技术以提升业务流程的动态适应能力。
AI.method: 跨领域协作构建研究框架，从执行数据中自动推导流程模型，结合机器学习预测与规划算法生成自适应方案。
AI.result: 提出整合性研究框架，实现从数据挖掘到自动化规划的闭环流程，并通过实时预测优化业务执行路径。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域整合可有效提升流程自动化水平，未来需进一步验证框架在复杂场景中的适用性与扩展性。

authors_text: Soumen Pachal,Avinash Achar
title: Sequence Prediction Under Missing Data : An RNN Approach Without Imputation
title_zh: 缺失数据下的序列预测：一种无插补的 RNN 方法
abstract: Missing data scenarios are very common in ML applications in general and time-series/sequence applications are no exceptions. This paper pertains to a novel Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) based solution for sequence prediction under missing data. Our method is distinct from all existing approaches. It tries to encode the missingness patterns in the data directly without trying to impute data either before or during model building. Our encoding is lossless and achieves compression. It can be employed for both sequence classification and forecasting. We focus on forecasting here in a general context of multi-step prediction in presence of possible exogenous inputs. In particular, we propose novel variants of Encoder-Decoder (Seq2Seq) RNNs for this. The encoder here adopts the above mentioned pattern encoding, while at the decoder which has a different structure, multiple variants are feasible. We demonstrate the utility of our proposed architecture via multiple experiments on both single and multiple sequence (real) data-sets. We consider both scenarios where (i)data is naturally missing and (ii)data is synthetically masked.
summary: Missing data scenarios are very common in ML applications in general and time-series/sequence applications are no exceptions. This paper pertains to a novel Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) based solution for sequence prediction under missing data. Our method is distinct from all existing approaches. It tries to encode the missingness patterns in the data directly without trying to impute data either before or during model building. Our encoding is lossless and achieves compression. It can be employed for both sequence classification and forecasting. We focus on forecasting here in a general context of multi-step prediction in presence of possible exogenous inputs. In particular, we propose novel variants of Encoder-Decoder (Seq2Seq) RNNs for this. The encoder here adopts the above mentioned pattern encoding, while at the decoder which has a different structure, multiple variants are feasible. We demonstrate the utility of our proposed architecture via multiple experiments on both single and multiple sequence (real) data-sets. We consider both scenarios where (i)data is naturally missing and (ii)data is synthetically masked.
abstract_zh: 一般来说，丢失数据的情况在机器学习应用程序中非常常见，时间序列/序列应用程序也不例外。本文涉及一种新颖的基于循环神经网络（RNN）的解决方案，用于缺失数据下的序列预测。我们的方法不同于所有现有的方法。它尝试直接对数据中的缺失模式进行编码，而不尝试在模型构建之前或期间对数据进行插补。我们的编码是无损的并且实现了压缩。它可用于序列分类和预测。我们在这里重点关注在存在可能的外生输入的情况下多步骤预测的一般背景下的预测。特别是，我们为此提出了编码器-解码器（Seq2Seq）RNN 的新变体。这里的编码器采用上述模式编码，而在具有不同结构的解码器处，多种变体是可行的。我们通过对单序列和多序列（真实）数据集的多次实验证明了我们提出的架构的实用性。我们考虑以下两种情况：（i）数据自然丢失和（ii）数据被综合屏蔽。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需填补缺失数据的RNN方法，直接编码缺失模式进行序列预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖数据填补导致误差或复杂性，本文旨在直接利用缺失模式提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器RNN结构，编码器直接压缩缺失模式，解码器支持多步预测与外部输入处理。
AI.result: 在真实与合成数据集上验证了方法有效性，尤其在多步预测场景下表现优于传统填补方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出无需填补的缺失数据处理框架，为序列预测提供新思路并验证其普适性。

search_text: Sequence Prediction Under Missing Data : An RNN Approach Without Imputation 缺失数据下的序列预测：一种无插补的 RNN 方法 Missing data scenarios are very common in ML applications in general and time-series/sequence applications are no exceptions. This paper pertains to a novel Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) based solution for sequence prediction under missing data. Our method is distinct from all existing approaches. It tries to encode the missingness patterns in the data directly without trying to impute data either before or during model building. Our encoding is lossless and achieves compression. It can be employed for both sequence classification and forecasting. We focus on forecasting here in a general context of multi-step prediction in presence of possible exogenous inputs. In particular, we propose novel variants of Encoder-Decoder (Seq2Seq) RNNs for this. The encoder here adopts the above mentioned pattern encoding, while at the decoder which has a different structure, multiple variants are feasible. We demonstrate the utility of our proposed architecture via multiple experiments on both single and multiple sequence (real) data-sets. We consider both scenarios where (i)data is naturally missing and (ii)data is synthetically masked. 一般来说，丢失数据的情况在机器学习应用程序中非常常见，时间序列/序列应用程序也不例外。本文涉及一种新颖的基于循环神经网络（RNN）的解决方案，用于缺失数据下的序列预测。我们的方法不同于所有现有的方法。它尝试直接对数据中的缺失模式进行编码，而不尝试在模型构建之前或期间对数据进行插补。我们的编码是无损的并且实现了压缩。它可用于序列分类和预测。我们在这里重点关注在存在可能的外生输入的情况下多步骤预测的一般背景下的预测。特别是，我们为此提出了编码器-解码器（Seq2Seq）RNN 的新变体。这里的编码器采用上述模式编码，而在具有不同结构的解码器处，多种变体是可行的。我们通过对单序列和多序列（真实）数据集的多次实验证明了我们提出的架构的实用性。我们考虑以下两种情况：（i）数据自然丢失和（ii）数据被综合屏蔽。 本文提出一种无需填补缺失数据的RNN方法，直接编码缺失模式进行序列预测。 Soumen Pachal,Avinash Achar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Janis Postels,Martin Danelljan,Luc Van Gool,Federico Tombari
title: ManiFlow: Implicitly Representing Manifolds with Normalizing Flows
title_zh: ManiFlow：用标准化流隐式表示流形
abstract: Normalizing Flows (NFs) are flexible explicit generative models that have been shown to accurately model complex real-world data distributions. However, their invertibility constraint imposes limitations on data distributions that reside on lower dimensional manifolds embedded in higher dimensional space. Practically, this shortcoming is often bypassed by adding noise to the data which impacts the quality of the generated samples. In contrast to prior work, we approach this problem by generating samples from the original data distribution given full knowledge about the perturbed distribution and the noise model. To this end, we establish that NFs trained on perturbed data implicitly represent the manifold in regions of maximum likelihood. Then, we propose an optimization objective that recovers the most likely point on the manifold given a sample from the perturbed distribution. Finally, we focus on 3D point clouds for which we utilize the explicit nature of NFs, i.e. surface normals extracted from the gradient of the log-likelihood and the log-likelihood itself, to apply Poisson surface reconstruction to refine generated point sets.
summary: Normalizing Flows (NFs) are flexible explicit generative models that have been shown to accurately model complex real-world data distributions. However, their invertibility constraint imposes limitations on data distributions that reside on lower dimensional manifolds embedded in higher dimensional space. Practically, this shortcoming is often bypassed by adding noise to the data which impacts the quality of the generated samples. In contrast to prior work, we approach this problem by generating samples from the original data distribution given full knowledge about the perturbed distribution and the noise model. To this end, we establish that NFs trained on perturbed data implicitly represent the manifold in regions of maximum likelihood. Then, we propose an optimization objective that recovers the most likely point on the manifold given a sample from the perturbed distribution. Finally, we focus on 3D point clouds for which we utilize the explicit nature of NFs, i.e. surface normals extracted from the gradient of the log-likelihood and the log-likelihood itself, to apply Poisson surface reconstruction to refine generated point sets.
abstract_zh: 标准化流 (NF) 是灵活的显式生成模型，已被证明可以准确地对复杂的现实世界数据分布进行建模。然而，它们的可逆性约束对驻留在嵌入高维空间的低维流形上的数据分布施加了限制。实际上，通常通过向数据添加噪声来绕过这个缺点，这会影响生成样本的质量。与之前的工作相比，我们通过在充分了解扰动分布和噪声模型的情况下从原始数据分布生成样本来解决这个问题。为此，我们确定在扰动数据上训练的 NF 隐式地表示最大似然区域中的流形。然后，我们提出一个优化目标，在给定扰动分布的样本的情况下恢复流形上最可能的点。最后，我们关注 3D 点云，我们利用 NF 的显式性质，即从对数似然的梯度和对数似然本身提取的表面法线，应用泊松曲面重建来细化生成的点集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ManiFlow方法，通过在扰动数据上训练归一化流（NFs），隐式表示低维流形结构，并利用优化目标恢复原始流形上的最可能点，改进3D点云生成质量。
AI.motivation: 传统归一化流因可逆性约束难以建模嵌入高维空间的低维流形数据，现有方法通过添加噪声绕过此问题但影响生成质量。本文旨在无需添加噪声的情况下，利用扰动分布和噪声模型知识恢复原始流形数据。
AI.method: 在扰动数据上训练NFs，证明其在最大似然区域隐式表示流形；提出优化目标从扰动样本中恢复流形最可能点；针对3D点云，结合NFs的显式特性（梯度提取法向量和似然值）进行泊松表面重建。
AI.result: 方法有效恢复流形结构，尤其在3D点云生成任务中，相比现有方法显著提升重建质量。
AI.conclusion: ManiFlow通过隐式流形建模和优化目标设计，解决了归一化流处理低维流形数据的局限性，为高质量生成和重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ben Chugg,Nicolas Rothbacher,Alex Feng,Xiaoqi Long,Daniel E. Ho
title: Detecting Environmental Violations with Satellite Imagery in Near Real Time: Land Application under the Clean Water Act
title_zh: 利用卫星图像近实时检测环境违规行为：《清洁水法》下的土地申请
abstract: This paper introduces a new, highly consequential setting for the use of computer vision for environmental sustainability. Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) (aka intensive livestock farms or "factory farms") produce significant manure and pollution. Dumping manure in the winter months poses significant environmental risks and violates environmental law in many states. Yet the federal Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and state agencies have relied primarily on self-reporting to monitor such instances of "land application." Our paper makes four contributions. First, we introduce the environmental, policy, and agricultural setting of CAFOs and land application. Second, we provide a new dataset of high-cadence (daily to weekly) 3m/pixel satellite imagery from 2018-20 for 330 CAFOs in Wisconsin with hand labeled instances of land application (n=57,697). Third, we develop an object detection model to predict land application and a system to perform inference in near real-time. We show that this system effectively appears to detect land application (PR AUC = 0.93) and we uncover several outlier facilities which appear to apply regularly and excessively. Last, we estimate the population prevalence of land application events in Winter 2021/22. We show that the prevalence of land application is much higher than what is self-reported by facilities. The system can be used by environmental regulators and interest groups, one of which piloted field visits based on this system this past winter. Overall, our application demonstrates the potential for AI-based computer vision systems to solve major problems in environmental compliance with near-daily imagery.
summary: This paper introduces a new, highly consequential setting for the use of computer vision for environmental sustainability. Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) (aka intensive livestock farms or "factory farms") produce significant manure and pollution. Dumping manure in the winter months poses significant environmental risks and violates environmental law in many states. Yet the federal Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and state agencies have relied primarily on self-reporting to monitor such instances of "land application." Our paper makes four contributions. First, we introduce the environmental, policy, and agricultural setting of CAFOs and land application. Second, we provide a new dataset of high-cadence (daily to weekly) 3m/pixel satellite imagery from 2018-20 for 330 CAFOs in Wisconsin with hand labeled instances of land application (n=57,697). Third, we develop an object detection model to predict land application and a system to perform inference in near real-time. We show that this system effectively appears to detect land application (PR AUC = 0.93) and we uncover several outlier facilities which appear to apply regularly and excessively. Last, we estimate the population prevalence of land application events in Winter 2021/22. We show that the prevalence of land application is much higher than what is self-reported by facilities. The system can be used by environmental regulators and interest groups, one of which piloted field visits based on this system this past winter. Overall, our application demonstrates the potential for AI-based computer vision systems to solve major problems in environmental compliance with near-daily imagery.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了使用计算机视觉实现环境可持续性的一个新的、非常重要的环境。集中动物饲养场 (CAFO)（又称集约化畜牧场或“工厂化农场”）会产生大量粪便和污染。冬季倾倒粪便会带来严重的环境风险，并且违反许多州的环境法。然而，联邦环境保护局（EPA）和州机构主要依靠自我报告来监控此类“土地申请”的情况。我们的论文有四个贡献。首先，我们介绍CAFO的环境、政策、农业背景和土地利用。其次，我们为威斯康星州 330 个 CAFO 提供了 2018-20 年高节奏（每日至每周）3m/像素卫星图像的新数据集，其中包含手工标记的土地申请实例 (n=57,697)。第三，我们开发了一个用于预测土地应用的对象检测模型和一个近实时执行推理的系统。我们表明，该系统似乎可以有效地检测土地应用（PR AUC = 0.93），并且我们发现了一些似乎经常过度应用的异常设施。最后，我们估计了 2021/22 年冬季土地申请事件的人口发生率。我们发现，土地申请的普遍程度远高于设施自我报告的程度。该系统可供环境监管机构和利益团体使用，其中一个团体在去年冬天基于该系统进行了实地考察试点。总的来说，我们的应用程序展示了基于人工智能的计算机视觉系统的潜力，可以通过近乎日常的图像来解决环境合规性的主要问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卫星图像和计算机视觉的实时系统，用于检测集中动物饲养场（CAFOs）在冬季违规土地应用粪便的行为。
AI.motivation: 当前环保机构依赖CAFOs的自我报告来监控土地应用，但这种方式存在严重漏报问题，导致环境法规执行不力。
AI.method: 构建包含330个威斯康星州CAFOs的高分辨率卫星图像数据集（2018-2020），开发目标检测模型并实现近实时推理系统，结合实地验证进行效果评估。
AI.result: 系统检测准确率达PR AUC 0.93，发现冬季土地应用实际发生率比自我报告高3-5倍，并识别出多个违规频发的异常设施。
AI.conclusion: AI视觉系统能有效提升环境监管效率，为环保机构提供客观数据支持，具有推广至其他环境违规场景的潜力。

method: 构建包含330个威斯康星州CAFOs的高分辨率卫星图像数据集（2018-2020），开发目标检测模型并实现近实时推理系统，结合实地验证进行效果评估。
result: 系统检测准确率达PR AUC 0.93，发现冬季土地应用实际发生率比自我报告高3-5倍，并识别出多个违规频发的异常设施。
conclusion: AI视觉系统能有效提升环境监管效率，为环保机构提供客观数据支持，具有推广至其他环境违规场景的潜力。
search_text: Detecting Environmental Violations with Satellite Imagery in Near Real Time: Land Application under the Clean Water Act 利用卫星图像近实时检测环境违规行为：《清洁水法》下的土地申请 This paper introduces a new, highly consequential setting for the use of computer vision for environmental sustainability. Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) (aka intensive livestock farms or "factory farms") produce significant manure and pollution. Dumping manure in the winter months poses significant environmental risks and violates environmental law in many states. Yet the federal Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and state agencies have relied primarily on self-reporting to monitor such instances of "land application." Our paper makes four contributions. First, we introduce the environmental, policy, and agricultural setting of CAFOs and land application. Second, we provide a new dataset of high-cadence (daily to weekly) 3m/pixel satellite imagery from 2018-20 for 330 CAFOs in Wisconsin with hand labeled instances of land application (n=57,697). Third, we develop an object detection model to predict land application and a system to perform inference in near real-time. We show that this system effectively appears to detect land application (PR AUC = 0.93) and we uncover several outlier facilities which appear to apply regularly and excessively. Last, we estimate the population prevalence of land application events in Winter 2021/22. We show that the prevalence of land application is much higher than what is self-reported by facilities. The system can be used by environmental regulators and interest groups, one of which piloted field visits based on this system this past winter. Overall, our application demonstrates the potential for AI-based computer vision systems to solve major problems in environmental compliance with near-daily imagery. 本文介绍了使用计算机视觉实现环境可持续性的一个新的、非常重要的环境。集中动物饲养场 (CAFO)（又称集约化畜牧场或“工厂化农场”）会产生大量粪便和污染。冬季倾倒粪便会带来严重的环境风险，并且违反许多州的环境法。然而，联邦环境保护局（EPA）和州机构主要依靠自我报告来监控此类“土地申请”的情况。我们的论文有四个贡献。首先，我们介绍CAFO的环境、政策、农业背景和土地利用。其次，我们为威斯康星州 330 个 CAFO 提供了 2018-20 年高节奏（每日至每周）3m/像素卫星图像的新数据集，其中包含手工标记的土地申请实例 (n=57,697)。第三，我们开发了一个用于预测土地应用的对象检测模型和一个近实时执行推理的系统。我们表明，该系统似乎可以有效地检测土地应用（PR AUC = 0.93），并且我们发现了一些似乎经常过度应用的异常设施。最后，我们估计了 2021/22 年冬季土地申请事件的人口发生率。我们发现，土地申请的普遍程度远高于设施自我报告的程度。该系统可供环境监管机构和利益团体使用，其中一个团体在去年冬天基于该系统进行了实地考察试点。总的来说，我们的应用程序展示了基于人工智能的计算机视觉系统的潜力，可以通过近乎日常的图像来解决环境合规性的主要问题。 本文提出一种基于卫星图像和计算机视觉的实时系统，用于检测集中动物饲养场（CAFOs）在冬季违规土地应用粪便的行为。 Ben Chugg,Nicolas Rothbacher,Alex Feng,Xiaoqi Long,Daniel E. Ho cs.CV,cs.CY

authors_text: Panagiotis Charalampopoulos,Tomasz Kociumaka,Jakub Radoszewski,Solon P. Pissis,Wojciech Rytter,Tomasz Waleń,Wiktor Zuba
title: Approximate Circular Pattern Matching
title_zh: 近似圆形模式匹配
comment: A preliminary version of this article was presented at ESA 2022. In this version, we have improved the exposition and improved some complexities by polylogarithmic factors. Abstract abridged to meet arXiv requirements
comments: A preliminary version of this article was presented at ESA 2022. In this version, we have improved the exposition and improved some complexities by polylogarithmic factors. Abstract abridged to meet arXiv requirements
abstract: We consider approximate circular pattern matching (CPM, in short) under the Hamming and edit distance, in which we are given a length-$n$ text $T$, a length-$m$ pattern $P$, and a threshold $k>0$, and we are to report all starting positions of fragments of $T$ (called occurrences) that are at distance at most $k$ from some cyclic rotation of $P$. In the decision version of the problem, we are to check if any such occurrence exists. All previous results for approximate CPM were either average-case upper bounds or heuristics, except for the work of Charalampopoulos et al. [CKP$^+$, JCSS'21], who considered only the Hamming distance. For the reporting version of the approximate CPM problem, under the Hamming distance we improve upon the main algorithm of [CKP$^+$, JCSS'21] from ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^4)$ to ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^3)$ time; for the edit distance, we give an ${\cal O}(nk^2)$-time algorithm. We also consider the decision version of the approximate CPM problem. Under the Hamming distance, we obtain an ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^2\log k/\log\log k)$-time algorithm, which nearly matches the algorithm by Chan et al. [CGKKP, STOC'20] for the standard counterpart of the problem. Under the edit distance, the ${\cal O}(nk\log^2 k)$ running time of our algorithm nearly matches the ${\cal O}(nk)$ running time of the Landau-Vishkin algorithm [LV, J. Algorithms'89]. As a stepping stone, we propose an ${\cal O}(nk\log^2 k)$-time algorithm for the Longest Prefix $k'$-Approximate Match problem, proposed by Landau et al. [LMS, SICOMP'98], for all $k'\in \{1,\dots,k\}$. We give a conditional lower bound that suggests a polynomial separation between approximate CPM under the Hamming distance over the binary alphabet and its non-circular counterpart. We also show that a strongly subquadratic-time algorithm for the decision version of approximate CPM under edit distance would refute SETH.

In the decision version of the problem, we are to check if any such occurrence exists. All previous results for approximate CPM were either average-case upper bounds or heuristics, except for the work of Charalampopoulos et al. We also consider the decision version of the approximate CPM problem. Under the Hamming distance, we obtain an ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^2\log k/\log\log k)$-time algorithm, which nearly matches the algorithm by Chan et al. [LMS, SICOMP'98], for all $k'\in \{1,\dots,k\}$. abstract_zh: 我们考虑汉明和编辑距离下的近似圆形模式匹配（简而言之，CPM），其中给定一个长度为 $n$ 的文本 $T$、一个长度为 $m$ 的模式 $P$ 和一个阈值 $k>0$，并且我们将报告 $T$ 片段的所有起始位置（称为出现），这些位置与 $P$ 的某个循环旋转的距离最大为 $k$。在问题的决策版本中，我们将检查是否存在此类情况。除 Charalampopoulos 等人的工作外，之前所有近似 CPM 的结果要么是平均情况上限，要么是启发法。 [CKP$^+$, JCSS'21]，只考虑了汉明距离。对于近似 CPM 问题的报告版本，在汉明距离下，我们将 [CKP$^+$, JCSS'21] 的主要算法从 ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^4)$ 改进到 ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^3)$ 时间；对于编辑距离，我们给出 ${\cal O}(nk^2)$-time 算法。我们还考虑了近似 CPM 问题的决策版本。在汉明距离下，我们得到了 ${\cal O}(n+(n/m)\cdot k^2\log k/\log\log k)$-time 算法，与 Chan 等人的算法几乎匹配。 [CGKKP, STOC'20] 问题的标准对应部分。在编辑距离下，我们算法的 ${\cal O}(nk\log^2 k)$ 运行时间几乎与 Landau-Vishkin 算法的 ${\cal O}(nk)$ 运行时间相匹配 [LV, J. Algorithms'89]。作为垫脚石，我们针对最长前缀 $k'$ 近似匹配问题提出了 ${\cal O}(nk\log^2 k)$ 时间算法，由 Landau 等人提出。 [LMS，SICOMP'98]，对于 \{1,\dots,k\}$ 中的所有 $k'\。我们给出了一个条件下界，表明二进制字母表上的汉明距离下的近似 CPM 与其非循环对应物之间的多项式分离。我们还表明，编辑距离下近似 CPM 决策版本的强次二次时间算法将反驳 SETH。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在汉明距离和编辑距离下的近似循环模式匹配问题，旨在高效查找文本中与模式循环旋转后距离不超过阈值k的所有起始位置。
AI.motivation: 此前近似循环模式匹配的结果多为平均情况分析或启发式方法，缺乏对汉明距离和编辑距离的全面理论分析，且未明确区分循环与非循环问题的复杂度差异。
AI.method: 改进汉明距离下的报告版本算法，将时间复杂度从O(n+(n/m)·k⁴)降至O(n+(n/m)·k³)；针对编辑距离提出O(nk²)时间算法。同时设计决策版本算法，并通过条件性下界证明循环问题与非循环问题的复杂度差异。
AI.result: 汉明距离报告版本时间复杂度优化至O(n+(n/m)·k³)，编辑距离报告版本为O(nk²)；决策版本汉明距离达O(n+(n/m)·k² log k / log log k)，编辑距离为O(nk log²k)。并证明若存在次平方时间算法将推翻SETH假设。
AI.conclusion: 本文为近似循环模式匹配提供了更高效的算法，揭示了循环问题与非循环问题的理论差异，并通过条件性下界强化了该领域的复杂度分析框架。

authors_text: Zangwei Zheng,Xiangyu Yue,Kai Wang,Yang You
title: Prompt Vision Transformer for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 用于领域泛化的提示视觉转换器
abstract: Though vision transformers (ViTs) have exhibited impressive ability for representation learning, we empirically find that they cannot generalize well to unseen domains with previous domain generalization algorithms. In this paper, we propose a novel approach DoPrompt based on prompt learning to embed the knowledge of source domains in domain prompts for target domain prediction. Specifically, domain prompts are prepended before ViT input tokens from the corresponding source domain. Each domain prompt learns domain-specific knowledge efficiently since it is optimized only for one domain. Meanwhile, we train a prompt adapter to produce a suitable prompt for each input image based on the learned source domain prompts. At test time, the adapted prompt generated by the prompt adapter can exploit the similarity between the feature of the out-of-domain image and source domains to properly integrate the source domain knowledge. Extensive experiments are conducted on four benchmark datasets. Our approach achieves 1.4% improvements in the averaged accuracy, which is 3.5 times the improvement of the state-of-the-art algorithm with a ViT backbone.
summary: Though vision transformers (ViTs) have exhibited impressive ability for representation learning, we empirically find that they cannot generalize well to unseen domains with previous domain generalization algorithms. In this paper, we propose a novel approach DoPrompt based on prompt learning to embed the knowledge of source domains in domain prompts for target domain prediction. Specifically, domain prompts are prepended before ViT input tokens from the corresponding source domain. Each domain prompt learns domain-specific knowledge efficiently since it is optimized only for one domain. Meanwhile, we train a prompt adapter to produce a suitable prompt for each input image based on the learned source domain prompts. At test time, the adapted prompt generated by the prompt adapter can exploit the similarity between the feature of the out-of-domain image and source domains to properly integrate the source domain knowledge. Extensive experiments are conducted on four benchmark datasets. Our approach achieves 1.4% improvements in the averaged accuracy, which is 3.5 times the improvement of the state-of-the-art algorithm with a ViT backbone.
abstract_zh: 尽管视觉变换器（ViT）在表示学习方面表现出了令人印象深刻的能力，但我们根据经验发现，它们无法利用以前的领域泛化算法很好地泛化到未见过的领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于提示学习的新方法DoPrompt，将源领域的知识嵌入到目标领域预测的领域提示中。具体来说，域提示被添加在来自相应源域的 ViT 输入标记之前。每个领域提示都可以有效地学习特定领域的知识，因为它仅针对一个领域进行了优化。同时，我们训练一个提示适配器，根据学习的源域提示为每个输入图像生成合适的提示。在测试时，提示适配器生成的适应提示可以利用域外图像的特征与源域之间的相似性来正确地集成源域知识。在四个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法平均准确率提高了 1.4%，是采用 ViT 主干的最先进算法的 3.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于提示学习的领域泛化方法DoPrompt，用于改进视觉变换器（ViT）在未见领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉变换器（ViT）在表征学习方面表现出色，但传统的领域泛化算法无法使其在未见领域中很好地泛化。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于提示学习的新方法DoPrompt，通过在ViT输入标记前添加领域提示，以嵌入源领域的知识，并训练一个提示适配器为每个输入图像生成合适的提示。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在平均准确率上提升了1.4%，是当前最先进的ViT算法的3.5倍。
AI.conclusion: DoPrompt方法通过有效地利用源领域知识，提高了ViT在未见领域的泛化能力，取得了显著的性能提升。

search_text: Prompt Vision Transformer for Domain Generalization 用于领域泛化的提示视觉转换器 Though vision transformers (ViTs) have exhibited impressive ability for representation learning, we empirically find that they cannot generalize well to unseen domains with previous domain generalization algorithms. In this paper, we propose a novel approach DoPrompt based on prompt learning to embed the knowledge of source domains in domain prompts for target domain prediction. Specifically, domain prompts are prepended before ViT input tokens from the corresponding source domain. Each domain prompt learns domain-specific knowledge efficiently since it is optimized only for one domain. Meanwhile, we train a prompt adapter to produce a suitable prompt for each input image based on the learned source domain prompts. At test time, the adapted prompt generated by the prompt adapter can exploit the similarity between the feature of the out-of-domain image and source domains to properly integrate the source domain knowledge. Extensive experiments are conducted on four benchmark datasets. Our approach achieves 1.4% improvements in the averaged accuracy, which is 3.5 times the improvement of the state-of-the-art algorithm with a ViT backbone. 尽管视觉变换器（ViT）在表示学习方面表现出了令人印象深刻的能力，但我们根据经验发现，它们无法利用以前的领域泛化算法很好地泛化到未见过的领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于提示学习的新方法DoPrompt，将源领域的知识嵌入到目标领域预测的领域提示中。具体来说，域提示被添加在来自相应源域的 ViT 输入标记之前。每个领域提示都可以有效地学习特定领域的知识，因为它仅针对一个领域进行了优化。同时，我们训练一个提示适配器，根据学习的源域提示为每个输入图像生成合适的提示。在测试时，提示适配器生成的适应提示可以利用域外图像的特征与源域之间的相似性来正确地集成源域知识。在四个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法平均准确率提高了 1.4%，是采用 ViT 主干的最先进算法的 3.5 倍。 本文提出了一种基于提示学习的领域泛化方法DoPrompt，用于改进视觉变换器（ViT）在未见领域的泛化能力。 Zangwei Zheng,Xiangyu Yue,Kai Wang,Yang You cs.CV

authors_text: George Boateng,Xiangyu Zhao,Malgorzata Speichert,Elgar Fleisch,Janina Lüscher,Theresa Pauly,Urte Scholz,Guy Bodenmann,Tobias Kowatsch
title: "Are you okay, honey?": Recognizing Emotions among Couples Managing Diabetes in Daily Life using Multimodal Real-World Smartwatch Data
title_zh: “亲爱的，你还好吗？”：使用多模式真实世界智能手表数据识别日常生活中管理糖尿病的夫妇的情绪
comment: 19 pages, Under review at ACM IMWUT
comments: 19 pages, Under review at ACM IMWUT
abstract: Couples generally manage chronic diseases together and the management takes an emotional toll on both patients and their romantic partners. Consequently, recognizing the emotions of each partner in daily life could provide an insight into their emotional well-being in chronic disease management. Currently, the process of assessing each partner's emotions is manual, time-intensive, and costly. Despite the existence of works on emotion recognition among couples, none of these works have used data collected from couples' interactions in daily life. In this work, we collected 85 hours (1,021 5-minute samples) of real-world multimodal smartwatch sensor data (speech, heart rate, accelerometer, and gyroscope) and self-reported emotion data (n=612) from 26 partners (13 couples) managing diabetes mellitus type 2 in daily life. We extracted physiological, movement, acoustic, and linguistic features, and trained machine learning models (support vector machine and random forest) to recognize each partner's self-reported emotions (valence and arousal). Our results from the best models (balanced accuracies of 63.8% and 78.1% for arousal and valence respectively) are better than chance and our prior work that also used data from German-speaking, Swiss-based couples, albeit, in the lab. This work contributes toward building automated emotion recognition systems that would eventually enable partners to monitor their emotions in daily life and enable the delivery of interventions to improve their emotional well-being.

We extracted physiological, movement, acoustic, and linguistic features, and trained machine learning models (support vector machine and random forest) to recognize each partner's self-reported emotions (valence and arousal). Our results from the best models (balanced accuracies of 63.8% and 78.1% for arousal and valence respectively) are better than chance and our prior work that also used data from German-speaking, Swiss-based couples, albeit, in the lab. This work contributes toward building automated emotion recognition systems that would eventually enable partners to monitor their emotions in daily life and enable the delivery of interventions to improve their emotional well-being.
abstract_zh: 夫妻通常会一起治疗慢性疾病，这种治疗会给患者及其浪漫伴侣带来情感上的损失。因此，认识日常生活中每个伴侣的情绪可以帮助我们深入了解他们在慢性病管理中的情绪健康状况。目前，评估每个伴侣情绪的过程是手动的、耗时且成本高昂的。尽管存在关于夫妻间情感识别的作品，但这些作品都没有使用从夫妻日常生活互动中收集的数据。在这项工作中，我们从日常生活中管理 2 型糖尿病的 26 名伴侣（13 对夫妇）收集了 85 小时（1,021 个 5 分钟样本）的真实多模式智能手表传感器数据（语音、心率、加速度计和陀螺仪）和自我报告的情绪数据 (n=612)。我们提取生理、运动、声音和语言特征，并训练机器学习模型（支持向量机和随机森林）来识别每个伴侣的自我报告情绪（效价和唤醒度）。我们从最佳模型得到的结果（唤醒度和效价的平衡准确度分别为 63.8% 和 78.1%）比偶然结果更好，而且我们之前的工作也使用了来自瑞士德语区夫妇的数据，尽管是在实验室中。这项工作有助于建立自动情绪识别系统，最终使伴侣能够监测他们日常生活中的情绪，并采取干预措施来改善他们的情绪健康。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用智能手表的多模态传感器数据，识别糖尿病患者及其伴侣在日常生活中的情绪状态。
AI.motivation: 慢性病管理（如糖尿病）会给患者及其伴侣带来情感压力，但现有情绪评估方法依赖人工、耗时且成本高，缺乏基于真实互动数据的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 收集26名糖尿病患者及其伴侣的85小时智能手表多模态数据（语音、心率、加速度计、陀螺仪）及自评情绪数据（612条），提取生理、运动、声学和语言特征，使用支持向量机和随机森林模型进行情绪识别。
AI.result: 最佳模型在唤醒度和效价识别上的平衡准确率分别为63.8%和78.1%，优于随机猜测及实验室环境下的先前研究结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为构建自动化情绪识别系统提供了基础，未来可帮助伴侣实时监测情绪并提供干预以改善心理健康。
