authors_text: Christian Gerloff,Kerstin Konrad,Jana Kruppa,Martin Schulte-Rüther,Vanessa Reindl
title: Autism spectrum disorder classification based on interpersonal neural synchrony: Can classification be improved by dyadic neural biomarkers using unsupervised graph representation learning?
title_zh: 基于人际神经同步的自闭症谱系障碍分类：使用无监督图表示学习的二元神经生物标记能否改进分类？
comment: Accepted in Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022: The 5th International Workshop on Machine Learning in Clinical Neuroimaging
comments: Accepted in Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022: The 5th International Workshop on Machine Learning in Clinical Neuroimaging
abstract: Research in machine learning for autism spectrum disorder (ASD) classification bears the promise to improve clinical diagnoses. However, recent studies in clinical imaging have shown the limited generalization of biomarkers across and beyond benchmark datasets. Despite increasing model complexity and sample size in neuroimaging, the classification performance of ASD remains far away from clinical application. This raises the question of how we can overcome these barriers to develop early biomarkers for ASD. One approach might be to rethink how we operationalize the theoretical basis of this disease in machine learning models. Here we introduced unsupervised graph representations that explicitly map the neural mechanisms of a core aspect of ASD, deficits in dyadic social interaction, as assessed by dual brain recordings, termed hyperscanning, and evaluated their predictive performance. The proposed method differs from existing approaches in that it is more suitable to capture social interaction deficits on a neural level and is applicable to young children and infants. First results from functional near-infrared spectroscopy data indicate potential predictive capacities of a task-agnostic, interpretable graph representation. This first effort to leverage interaction-related deficits on neural level to classify ASD may stimulate new approaches and methods to enhance existing models to achieve developmental ASD biomarkers in the future.

First results from functional near-infrared spectroscopy data indicate potential predictive capacities of a task-agnostic, interpretable graph representation. This first effort to leverage interaction-related deficits on neural level to classify ASD may stimulate new approaches and methods to enhance existing models to achieve developmental ASD biomarkers in the future.
abstract_zh: 用于自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 分类的机器学习研究有望改善临床诊断。然而，最近的临床成像研究表明，跨基准数据集和超出基准数据集的生物标志物的通用性有限。尽管神经影像学中的模型复杂性和样本量不断增加，但 ASD 的分类性能距离临床应用仍然很远。这就提出了一个问题：我们如何克服这些障碍来开发 ASD 的早期生物标志物。一种方法可能是重新思考我们如何在机器学习模型中运用这种疾病的理论基础。在这里，我们引入了无监督的图形表示，它明确地映射了 ASD 核心方面的神经机制，即二元社交互动的缺陷，通过双脑记录进行评估，称为超级扫描，并评估其预测性能。该方法与现有方法的不同之处在于，它更适合捕捉神经水平上的社交互动缺陷，并且适用于幼儿和婴儿。功能性近红外光谱数据的第一个结果表明了与任务无关、可解释的图形表示的潜在预测能力。这是利用神经水平上的相互作用相关缺陷对 ASD 进行分类的首次尝试，可能会激发新的方法和方法来增强现有模型，以在未来实现发育性 ASD 生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于人际神经同步性的无监督图表示学习方法，用于改进自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的分类，并探索通过双人神经生物标志物提升分类性能的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有ASD分类模型在跨数据集泛化能力有限，且难以捕捉社交互动缺陷的神经机制，需开发更适用于婴幼儿的早期生物标志物。
AI.method: 利用双人脑记录（hyperscanning）技术获取功能近红外光谱（fNIRS）数据，构建无监督图表示以捕捉社交互动中的神经同步性特征，并评估其预测能力。
AI.result: 初步结果显示，该任务无关且可解释的图表示具有潜在预测能力，但需进一步验证其临床应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 基于神经交互缺陷的图表示方法为开发发育期ASD生物标志物提供了新思路，未来需优化模型以提升分类性能。

search_text: Autism spectrum disorder classification based on interpersonal neural synchrony: Can classification be improved by dyadic neural biomarkers using unsupervised graph representation learning? 基于人际神经同步的自闭症谱系障碍分类：使用无监督图表示学习的二元神经生物标记能否改进分类？ Research in machine learning for autism spectrum disorder (ASD) classification bears the promise to improve clinical diagnoses. However, recent studies in clinical imaging have shown the limited generalization of biomarkers across and beyond benchmark datasets. Despite increasing model complexity and sample size in neuroimaging, the classification performance of ASD remains far away from clinical application. This raises the question of how we can overcome these barriers to develop early biomarkers for ASD. One approach might be to rethink how we operationalize the theoretical basis of this disease in machine learning models. Here we introduced unsupervised graph representations that explicitly map the neural mechanisms of a core aspect of ASD, deficits in dyadic social interaction, as assessed by dual brain recordings, termed hyperscanning, and evaluated their predictive performance. The proposed method differs from existing approaches in that it is more suitable to capture social interaction deficits on a neural level and is applicable to young children and infants. First results from functional near-infrared spectroscopy data indicate potential predictive capacities of a task-agnostic, interpretable graph representation. This first effort to leverage interaction-related deficits on neural level to classify ASD may stimulate new approaches and methods to enhance existing models to achieve developmental ASD biomarkers in the future. 用于自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 分类的机器学习研究有望改善临床诊断。然而，最近的临床成像研究表明，跨基准数据集和超出基准数据集的生物标志物的通用性有限。尽管神经影像学中的模型复杂性和样本量不断增加，但 ASD 的分类性能距离临床应用仍然很远。这就提出了一个问题：我们如何克服这些障碍来开发 ASD 的早期生物标志物。一种方法可能是重新思考我们如何在机器学习模型中运用这种疾病的理论基础。在这里，我们引入了无监督的图形表示，它明确地映射了 ASD 核心方面的神经机制，即二元社交互动的缺陷，通过双脑记录进行评估，称为超级扫描，并评估其预测性能。该方法与现有方法的不同之处在于，它更适合捕捉神经水平上的社交互动缺陷，并且适用于幼儿和婴儿。功能性近红外光谱数据的第一个结果表明了与任务无关、可解释的图形表示的潜在预测能力。这是利用神经水平上的相互作用相关缺陷对 ASD 进行分类的首次尝试，可能会激发新的方法和方法来增强现有模型，以在未来实现发育性 ASD 生物标志物。 本文提出基于人际神经同步性的无监督图表示学习方法，用于改进自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的分类，并探索通过双人神经生物标志物提升分类性能的潜力。 Christian Gerloff,Kerstin Konrad,Jana Kruppa,Martin Schulte-Rüther,Vanessa Reindl cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Mohit Vaishnav,Thomas Fel,Ivań Felipe Rodríguez,Thomas Serre
title: Conviformers: Convolutionally guided Vision Transformer
title_zh: Conviformers：卷积引导视觉变压器
abstract: Vision transformers are nowadays the de-facto choice for image classification tasks. There are two broad categories of classification tasks, fine-grained and coarse-grained. In fine-grained classification, the necessity is to discover subtle differences due to the high level of similarity between sub-classes. Such distinctions are often lost as we downscale the image to save the memory and computational cost associated with vision transformers (ViT). In this work, we present an in-depth analysis and describe the critical components for developing a system for the fine-grained categorization of plants from herbarium sheets. Our extensive experimental analysis indicated the need for a better augmentation technique and the ability of modern-day neural networks to handle higher dimensional images. We also introduce a convolutional transformer architecture called Conviformer which, unlike the popular Vision Transformer (ConViT), can handle higher resolution images without exploding memory and computational cost. We also introduce a novel, improved pre-processing technique called PreSizer to resize images better while preserving their original aspect ratios, which proved essential for classifying natural plants. With our simple yet effective approach, we achieved SoTA on Herbarium 202x and iNaturalist 2019 dataset.
summary: Vision transformers are nowadays the de-facto choice for image classification tasks. There are two broad categories of classification tasks, fine-grained and coarse-grained. In fine-grained classification, the necessity is to discover subtle differences due to the high level of similarity between sub-classes. Such distinctions are often lost as we downscale the image to save the memory and computational cost associated with vision transformers (ViT). In this work, we present an in-depth analysis and describe the critical components for developing a system for the fine-grained categorization of plants from herbarium sheets. Our extensive experimental analysis indicated the need for a better augmentation technique and the ability of modern-day neural networks to handle higher dimensional images. We also introduce a convolutional transformer architecture called Conviformer which, unlike the popular Vision Transformer (ConViT), can handle higher resolution images without exploding memory and computational cost. We also introduce a novel, improved pre-processing technique called PreSizer to resize images better while preserving their original aspect ratios, which proved essential for classifying natural plants. With our simple yet effective approach, we achieved SoTA on Herbarium 202x and iNaturalist 2019 dataset.
abstract_zh: 如今，视觉转换器已成为图像分类任务的实际选择。分类任务有两大类：细粒度和粗粒度。在细粒度分类中，由于子类之间的高度相似性，有必要发现细微的差异。当我们缩小图像尺寸以节省与视觉变换器 (ViT) 相关的内存和计算成本时，这种区别常常会丢失。在这项工作中，我们提出了深入的分析并描述了开发用于对植物标本馆表中的植物进行细粒度分类的系统的关键组件。我们广泛的实验分析表明需要更好的增强技术和现代神经网络处理更高维图像的能力。我们还引入了一种称为 Conviformer 的卷积变压器架构，与流行的 Vision Transformer (ConViT) 不同，它可以处理更高分辨率的图像，而不会增加内存和计算成本。我们还引入了一种新颖的、改进的预处理技术，称为 PreSizer，可以更好地调整图像大小，同时保留其原始纵横比，事实证明这对于对天然植物进行分类至关重要。通过我们简单而有效的方法，我们在 Herbarium 202x 和 iNaturalist 2019 数据集上实现了 SoTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Conviformer架构和PreSizer预处理技术，解决细粒度植物分类中高分辨率图像处理的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer在细粒度分类任务中因下采样导致细微特征丢失，且难以高效处理高维图像。
AI.method: 设计卷积引导的Conviformer架构以处理高分辨率图像，结合新型PreSizer技术保持图像宽高比。
AI.result: 在Herbarium 202x和iNaturalist 2019数据集上达到当时最优性能（SoTA）。
AI.conclusion: Conviformer通过融合卷积优势与Transformer结构，有效解决了细粒度分类中的高分辨率图像处理难题。

authors_text: Zongrui Li,Qian Zheng,Feishi Wang,Boxin Shi,Gang Pan,Xudong Jiang
title: NeIF: Representing General Reflectance as Neural Intrinsics Fields for Uncalibrated Photometric Stereo
title_zh: NeIF：将一般反射率表示为未校准光度立体的神经固有场
abstract: Uncalibrated photometric stereo (UPS) is challenging due to the inherent ambiguity brought by unknown light. Existing solutions alleviate the ambiguity by either explicitly associating reflectance to light conditions or resolving light conditions in a supervised manner. This paper establishes an implicit relation between light clues and light estimation and solves UPS in an unsupervised manner. The key idea is to represent the reflectance as four neural intrinsics fields, i.e., position, light, specular, and shadow, based on which the neural light field is implicitly associated with light clues of specular reflectance and cast shadow. The unsupervised, joint optimization of neural intrinsics fields can be free from training data bias as well as accumulating error, and fully exploits all observed pixel values for UPS. Our method achieves a superior performance advantage over state-of-the-art UPS methods on public and self-collected datasets, under regular and challenging setups. The code will be released soon.
summary: Uncalibrated photometric stereo (UPS) is challenging due to the inherent ambiguity brought by unknown light. Existing solutions alleviate the ambiguity by either explicitly associating reflectance to light conditions or resolving light conditions in a supervised manner. This paper establishes an implicit relation between light clues and light estimation and solves UPS in an unsupervised manner. The key idea is to represent the reflectance as four neural intrinsics fields, i.e., position, light, specular, and shadow, based on which the neural light field is implicitly associated with light clues of specular reflectance and cast shadow. The unsupervised, joint optimization of neural intrinsics fields can be free from training data bias as well as accumulating error, and fully exploits all observed pixel values for UPS. Our method achieves a superior performance advantage over state-of-the-art UPS methods on public and self-collected datasets, under regular and challenging setups. The code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 由于未知光带来的固有模糊性，未校准光度立体 (UPS) 具有挑战性。现有的解决方案通过将反射率与光照条件明确关联或以监督方式解析光照条件来减轻模糊性。本文建立了光线索和光估计之间的隐式关系，并以无监督的方式求解UPS。关键思想是将反射率表示为四个神经固有场，即位置、光、镜面反射和阴影，基于此神经光场与镜面反射率和投射阴影的光线索隐式关联。神经内在函数场的无监督联合优化可以不受训练数据偏差和累积误差的影响，并充分利用 UPS 的所有观察到的像素值。在常规和具有挑战性的设置下，我们的方法在公共和自行收集的数据集上比最先进的 UPS 方法具有卓越的性能优势。该代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeIF方法，通过神经内在场表示反射率，解决未校准光度立体视觉中的光照不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有UPS方法依赖显式光照关联或监督学习，存在训练数据偏差和误差累积问题，需无监督解决方案。
AI.method: 将反射率分解为位置、光照、高光和阴影四个神经内在场，通过无监督联合优化隐式关联光照线索。
AI.result: 在公共和自建数据集上优于现有方法，适用于常规及挑战性场景。
AI.conclusion: NeIF无需监督且充分利用像素信息，有效解决UPS中的光照不确定性问题。

tldr: 本文提出NeIF方法，通过神经内在场表示反射率，解决未校准光度立体视觉中的光照不确定性问题。
motivation: 现有UPS方法依赖显式光照关联或监督学习，存在训练数据偏差和误差累积问题，需无监督解决方案。
method: 将反射率分解为位置、光照、高光和阴影四个神经内在场，通过无监督联合优化隐式关联光照线索。
result: 在公共和自建数据集上优于现有方法，适用于常规及挑战性场景。
conclusion: NeIF无需监督且充分利用像素信息，有效解决UPS中的光照不确定性问题。
search_text: NeIF: Representing General Reflectance as Neural Intrinsics Fields for Uncalibrated Photometric Stereo NeIF：将一般反射率表示为未校准光度立体的神经固有场 Uncalibrated photometric stereo (UPS) is challenging due to the inherent ambiguity brought by unknown light. Existing solutions alleviate the ambiguity by either explicitly associating reflectance to light conditions or resolving light conditions in a supervised manner. This paper establishes an implicit relation between light clues and light estimation and solves UPS in an unsupervised manner. The key idea is to represent the reflectance as four neural intrinsics fields, i.e., position, light, specular, and shadow, based on which the neural light field is implicitly associated with light clues of specular reflectance and cast shadow. The unsupervised, joint optimization of neural intrinsics fields can be free from training data bias as well as accumulating error, and fully exploits all observed pixel values for UPS. Our method achieves a superior performance advantage over state-of-the-art UPS methods on public and self-collected datasets, under regular and challenging setups. The code will be released soon. 由于未知光带来的固有模糊性，未校准光度立体 (UPS) 具有挑战性。现有的解决方案通过将反射率与光照条件明确关联或以监督方式解析光照条件来减轻模糊性。本文建立了光线索和光估计之间的隐式关系，并以无监督的方式求解UPS。关键思想是将反射率表示为四个神经固有场，即位置、光、镜面反射和阴影，基于此神经光场与镜面反射率和投射阴影的光线索隐式关联。神经内在函数场的无监督联合优化可以不受训练数据偏差和累积误差的影响，并充分利用 UPS 的所有观察到的像素值。在常规和具有挑战性的设置下，我们的方法在公共和自行收集的数据集上比最先进的 UPS 方法具有卓越的性能优势。该代码即将发布。 本文提出NeIF方法，通过神经内在场表示反射率，解决未校准光度立体视觉中的光照不确定性问题。 Zongrui Li,Qian Zheng,Feishi Wang,Boxin Shi,Gang Pan,Xudong Jiang cs.CV

authors_text: Heng Kong,Shuqiang Wang
title: Adversarial Learning Based Structural Brain-network Generative Model for Analyzing Mild Cognitive Impairment
title_zh: 基于对抗性学习的结构性脑网络生成模型用于分析轻度认知障碍
abstract: Mild cognitive impairment(MCI) is a precursor of Alzheimer's disease(AD), and the detection of MCI is of great clinical significance. Analyzing the structural brain networks of patients is vital for the recognition of MCI. However, the current studies on structural brain networks are totally dependent on specific toolboxes, which is time-consuming and subjective. Few tools can obtain the structural brain networks from brain diffusion tensor images. In this work, an adversarial learning-based structural brain-network generative model(SBGM) is proposed to directly learn the structural connections from brain diffusion tensor images. By analyzing the differences in structural brain networks across subjects, we found that the structural brain networks of subjects showed a consistent trend from elderly normal controls(NC) to early mild cognitive impairment(EMCI) to late mild cognitive impairment(LMCI): structural connectivity progressed in a progressively weaker direction as the condition worsened. In addition, our proposed model tri-classifies EMCI, LMCI, and NC subjects, achieving a classification accuracy of 83.33\% on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative(ADNI) database.
summary: Mild cognitive impairment(MCI) is a precursor of Alzheimer's disease(AD), and the detection of MCI is of great clinical significance. Analyzing the structural brain networks of patients is vital for the recognition of MCI. However, the current studies on structural brain networks are totally dependent on specific toolboxes, which is time-consuming and subjective. Few tools can obtain the structural brain networks from brain diffusion tensor images. In this work, an adversarial learning-based structural brain-network generative model(SBGM) is proposed to directly learn the structural connections from brain diffusion tensor images. By analyzing the differences in structural brain networks across subjects, we found that the structural brain networks of subjects showed a consistent trend from elderly normal controls(NC) to early mild cognitive impairment(EMCI) to late mild cognitive impairment(LMCI): structural connectivity progressed in a progressively weaker direction as the condition worsened. In addition, our proposed model tri-classifies EMCI, LMCI, and NC subjects, achieving a classification accuracy of 83.33\% on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative(ADNI) database.
abstract_zh: 轻度认知障碍（MCI）是阿尔茨海默病（AD）的先兆，MCI的检测具有重要的临床意义。分析患者的大脑结构网络对于识别 MCI 至关重要。然而，目前对结构脑网络的研究完全依赖于特定的工具箱，既耗时又主观。很少有工具可以从大脑扩散张量图像中获取结构性大脑网络。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于对抗性学习的结构脑网络生成模型（SBGM），可以直接从脑扩散张量图像中学习结构连接。通过分析受试者之间结构性脑网络的差异，我们发现受试者的结构性脑网络从老年正常对照（NC）到早期轻度认知障碍（EMCI）再到晚期轻度认知障碍（LMCI）表现出一致的趋势：随着病情恶化，结构连接性逐渐减弱。此外，我们提出的模型对 EMCI、LMCI 和 NC 受试者进行三分类，在阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议 (ADNI) 数据库上实现了 83.33% 的分类准确率。

AI.tldr: 开发基于对抗学习的结构脑网络生成模型（SBGM），用于分析轻度认知障碍（MCI）患者的脑网络特征，辅助阿尔茨海默病早期检测。
AI.motivation: 现有结构脑网络分析依赖特定工具箱，耗时且主观，缺乏直接从扩散张量图像学习结构连接的有效方法，需更高效客观的分析手段。
AI.method: 提出对抗学习结构脑网络生成模型（SBGM），直接从脑扩散张量图像学习结构连接，并基于脑网络差异实现EMCI、LMCI和NC的三分类。
AI.result: 模型在ADNI数据库上实现EMCI、LMCI和NC三分类准确率83.33%，揭示MCI患者脑网络连接随病情进展逐渐减弱的规律。
AI.conclusion: SBGM模型有效捕捉脑网络退化特征，为MCI早期识别和阿尔茨海默病病理机制研究提供新方法。

authors_text: Hao-Wei Chen,Ting-Hsuan Liao,Hsuan-Kung Yang,Chun-Yi Lee
title: Pixel-Wise Prediction based Visual Odometry via Uncertainty Estimation
title_zh: 通过不确定性估计进行基于像素预测的视觉里程计
abstract: This paper introduces pixel-wise prediction based visual odometry (PWVO), which is a dense prediction task that evaluates the values of translation and rotation for every pixel in its input observations. PWVO employs uncertainty estimation to identify the noisy regions in the input observations, and adopts a selection mechanism to integrate pixel-wise predictions based on the estimated uncertainty maps to derive the final translation and rotation. In order to train PWVO in a comprehensive fashion, we further develop a data generation workflow for generating synthetic training data. The experimental results show that PWVO is able to deliver favorable results. In addition, our analyses validate the effectiveness of the designs adopted in PWVO, and demonstrate that the uncertainty maps estimated by PWVO is capable of capturing the noises in its input observations.
summary: This paper introduces pixel-wise prediction based visual odometry (PWVO), which is a dense prediction task that evaluates the values of translation and rotation for every pixel in its input observations. PWVO employs uncertainty estimation to identify the noisy regions in the input observations, and adopts a selection mechanism to integrate pixel-wise predictions based on the estimated uncertainty maps to derive the final translation and rotation. In order to train PWVO in a comprehensive fashion, we further develop a data generation workflow for generating synthetic training data. The experimental results show that PWVO is able to deliver favorable results. In addition, our analyses validate the effectiveness of the designs adopted in PWVO, and demonstrate that the uncertainty maps estimated by PWVO is capable of capturing the noises in its input observations.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于像素预测的视觉里程计（PWVO），这是一项密集预测任务，用于评估输入观测中每个像素的平移和旋转值。 PWVO 采用不确定性估计来识别输入观测中的噪声区域，并采用选择机制根据估计的不确定性图集成逐像素预测，以得出最终的平移和旋转。为了以全面的方式训练 PWVO，我们进一步开发了用于生成合成训练数据的数据生成工作流程。实验结果表明PWVO能够取得良好的结果。此外，我们的分析验证了 PWVO 中采用的设计的有效性，并证明 PWVO 估计的不确定性图能够捕获其输入观测中的噪声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素级预测和不确定性估计的视觉里程计方法，通过识别噪声区域并整合预测结果来提高定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉里程计在噪声环境下容易出现误差，本文旨在通过像素级预测和不确定性估计提升方法的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 方法包括基于不确定性估计的像素级平移和旋转预测，结合选择机制整合预测结果，并设计合成数据生成流程以增强训练。
AI.result: 实验表明PWVO在定位任务中表现优异，不确定性估计有效识别了输入噪声，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的PWVO方法通过像素级预测和不确定性估计有效提升了视觉里程计的性能，为复杂环境下的定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Sabzehali,Somayeh Davoodabadi Farahani,Amir Mosavi
title: Energy-Exergy Analysis and Optimal Design of a Hydrogen Turbofan Engine
title_zh: 氢涡轮风扇发动机能量火用分析与优化设计
abstract: In this study, the effect of inlet air cooling and fuel type on the performance parameters of thrust-specific fuel consumption (TSFC), thermal and exergetic efficiencies, entropy generation rate, and Nitrogen oxide emission intensity index (SNOx) of the GENX 1B70 engine is analyzed in two states of take-off and on design. The results show that with a 20-degree delicious reduction in inlet air temperature on design conditions and JP10 fuel usage, the thermal efficiency and entropy generation rate, thrust and fuel mass flow rate, and TSFC of the engine increase by 1.85 percent, 16.51 percent, 11.76 percent, 10.53 percent, and 2.15 percent and SNOx and exergetic efficiency decrease by 2.11 percent and 26.60 percent, respectively. Also, optimization of the GENX 1B70 engine cycle as hydrogen fuel usage with three separate objective functions: thrust maximization, thermal efficiency maximization, and propulsive efficiency maximization on design point condition was performed based on the Genetic algorithm. Based on the economic approach and exero-environmental, the best cycles from the optimal states were selected using the TOPSIS algorithm. In on design conditions, entropy generation rate, nitrogen oxide production rate, and TSFC for the chosen cycle based on the economic approach +18.89 percent, +10.01 percent, and -0.21percent, respectively, and based on the exero-environmental approach -54.03percent, -42.02percent, and +21.44percent change compared to the base engine, respectively.
summary: In this study, the effect of inlet air cooling and fuel type on the performance parameters of thrust-specific fuel consumption (TSFC), thermal and exergetic efficiencies, entropy generation rate, and Nitrogen oxide emission intensity index (SNOx) of the GENX 1B70 engine is analyzed in two states of take-off and on design. The results show that with a 20-degree delicious reduction in inlet air temperature on design conditions and JP10 fuel usage, the thermal efficiency and entropy generation rate, thrust and fuel mass flow rate, and TSFC of the engine increase by 1.85 percent, 16.51 percent, 11.76 percent, 10.53 percent, and 2.15 percent and SNOx and exergetic efficiency decrease by 2.11 percent and 26.60 percent, respectively. Also, optimization of the GENX 1B70 engine cycle as hydrogen fuel usage with three separate objective functions: thrust maximization, thermal efficiency maximization, and propulsive efficiency maximization on design point condition was performed based on the Genetic algorithm. Based on the economic approach and exero-environmental, the best cycles from the optimal states were selected using the TOPSIS algorithm. In on design conditions, entropy generation rate, nitrogen oxide production rate, and TSFC for the chosen cycle based on the economic approach +18.89 percent, +10.01 percent, and -0.21percent, respectively, and based on the exero-environmental approach -54.03percent, -42.02percent, and +21.44percent change compared to the base engine, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，分析了进气冷却和燃料类型对GENX 1B70发动机在起飞和设计两种状态下的推力比燃料消耗（TSFC）、热效率和火能效率、熵产生率和氮氧化物排放强度指数（SNOx）等性能参数的影响。结果表明，在设计工况和JP10燃油用量下，进气温度降低20度，发动机的热效率和熵产率、推力和燃油质量流量、TSFC分别提高1.85%、16.51%、11.76%、10.53%和2.15%，SNOx和火热效率分别降低2.11%和26.60%。分别为百分比。此外，基于遗传算法，使用三个独立的目标函数对 GENX 1B70 发动机循环进行氢燃料使用优化：设计点条件下的推力最大化、热效率最大化和推进效率最大化。基于经济方法和外部环境，使用 TOPSIS 算法从最佳状态中选择最佳循环。在设计条件下，与基础发动机相比，基于经济方法的选定循环的熵生成率、氮氧化物生成率和 TSFC 分别变化了 +18.89%、+10.01% 和 -0.21%，而基于外环境方法的选定循环的熵生成率、氮氧化物生成率和 TSFC 分别变化了 -54.03%、-42.02% 和 +21.44%。

AI.tldr: 本文对GENX 1B70发动机在起飞和设计状态下的性能参数进行能量-㶲分析，并基于遗传算法优化氢燃料循环设计。
AI.motivation: 提升航空发动机热效率与环保性能，减少氮氧化物排放及燃料消耗，探索氢燃料在涡扇发动机中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用能量-㶲分析法评估进气冷却与燃料类型对TSFC、效率等参数的影响，并通过遗传算法优化氢燃料循环，结合TOPSIS算法筛选最优方案。
AI.result: 设计状态下，JP10燃料与进气降温使热效率提升1.85%，SNOx降低2.11%；氢燃料优化循环在经济性方案下TSFC降低0.21%，在环境性方案下熵产生率降低54.03%。
AI.conclusion: 氢燃料可显著提升发动机热效率并降低排放，但需权衡推力与燃料消耗，多目标优化方法能有效平衡经济性与环境性需求。

authors_text: Kevin Barrera Llanga,Cruz Christian,Viteri Xavier,Mendoza Dario
title: Synergistic Integration of Techniques of VC, Communication Technologies and Unities of Calculation Transportable for Generate a System Embedded That Monitors Pyroclastic Flows in Real Time
title_zh: VC、通信技术和可移植计算单元的协同集成，生成实时监测火山碎屑流的嵌入式系统
comment: 5 pages. Journal of Engineering and Applied Sciences 2018
comments: 5 pages. Journal of Engineering and Applied Sciences 2018
abstract: At the end of an extensive investigation of the volcanic eruptions in the world, we determined patterns that coincide in this process, this data can be analyzed by artificial vision, obtaining the largest amount of information from images in an embedded system, using monitoring algorithms for compare continuous matrices, control camera positioning and link this information with mass communication technologies. The present work shows the development of a viable early warning technology solution that allows to analyze the behavior of volcanic flows automatically in a rash in real time, with a very high level of efficiency in the analysis of possible trajectories, direction and quantity of the lava flows as well as the massive mass media directed to the affected people.
summary: At the end of an extensive investigation of the volcanic eruptions in the world, we determined patterns that coincide in this process, this data can be analyzed by artificial vision, obtaining the largest amount of information from images in an embedded system, using monitoring algorithms for compare continuous matrices, control camera positioning and link this information with mass communication technologies. The present work shows the development of a viable early warning technology solution that allows to analyze the behavior of volcanic flows automatically in a rash in real time, with a very high level of efficiency in the analysis of possible trajectories, direction and quantity of the lava flows as well as the massive mass media directed to the affected people.
abstract_zh: 在对世界各地的火山喷发进行广泛调查后，我们确定了在此过程中一致的模式，这些数据可以通过人工视觉进行分析，从嵌入式系统中的图像中获取最大量的信息，使用监控算法来比较连续矩阵，控制摄像机定位并将这些信息与大众通信技术链接起来。目前的工作展示了一种可行的预警技术解决方案的开发，该解决方案可以自动实时分析火山流的行为，在分析熔岩流的可能轨迹、方向和数量以及针对受影响人群的大量大众媒体方面具有非常高的效率。

AI.tldr: 开发一个整合VC技术、通信技术和可移动计算单元的嵌入式系统，用于实时监测火山碎屑流并提供早期预警。
AI.motivation: 通过分析全球火山喷发的共同模式，利用人工智能视觉技术提高对火山碎屑流监测的效率和准确性，以提升预警能力。
AI.method: 结合人工智能视觉技术、监控算法和大众通信技术，利用嵌入式系统实时分析图像数据，控制摄像头并传输预警信息。
AI.result: 成功开发出一种高效的实时火山碎屑流监测与预警系统，能够自动分析熔岩流的运动参数并及时向公众发布预警信息。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了一种可行的早期预警技术方案，通过整合多种先进技术，显著提高了火山灾害监测的实时性和预警效率，有助于减少灾害带来的损失。

authors_text: Tomoharu Iwata,Yoshinobu Kawahara
title: Data-driven End-to-end Learning of Pole Placement Control for Nonlinear Dynamics via Koopman Invariant Subspaces
title_zh: 通过库普曼不变子空间的数据驱动的非线性动力学极点配置控制的端到端学习
abstract: We propose a data-driven method for controlling the frequency and convergence rate of black-box nonlinear dynamical systems based on the Koopman operator theory. With the proposed method, a policy network is trained such that the eigenvalues of a Koopman operator of controlled dynamics are close to the target eigenvalues. The policy network consists of a neural network to find a Koopman invariant subspace, and a pole placement module to adjust the eigenvalues of the Koopman operator. Since the policy network is differentiable, we can train it in an end-to-end fashion using reinforcement learning. We demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than model-free reinforcement learning and model-based control with system identification.
summary: We propose a data-driven method for controlling the frequency and convergence rate of black-box nonlinear dynamical systems based on the Koopman operator theory. With the proposed method, a policy network is trained such that the eigenvalues of a Koopman operator of controlled dynamics are close to the target eigenvalues. The policy network consists of a neural network to find a Koopman invariant subspace, and a pole placement module to adjust the eigenvalues of the Koopman operator. Since the policy network is differentiable, we can train it in an end-to-end fashion using reinforcement learning. We demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than model-free reinforcement learning and model-based control with system identification.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于库普曼算子理论的数据驱动方法来控制黑盒非线性动力系统的频率和收敛速度。利用所提出的方法，训练策略网络，使得受控动力学的库夫曼算子的特征值接近目标特征值。策略网络由用于寻找库普曼不变子空间的神经网络和用于调整库普曼算子特征值的极点放置模块组成。由于策略网络是可微的，我们可以使用强化学习以端到端的方式对其进行训练。我们证明所提出的方法比无模型强化学习和基于模型的系统识别控制具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Koopman算子理论的数据驱动方法，通过端到端学习控制非线性动力系统的频率和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法依赖精确模型或难以处理复杂非线性系统，而黑箱系统的控制需求促使需要更灵活的数据驱动方案。
AI.method: 构建包含神经网络的策略网络，用于学习Koopman不变子空间并调整算子特征值，结合强化学习实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在控制性能上优于无模型强化学习和基于系统识别的模型控制方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合Koopman理论与深度学习，提出的方法为非线性系统控制提供了有效的数据驱动解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Koopman算子理论的数据驱动方法，通过端到端学习控制非线性动力系统的频率和收敛速度。
ai_content.motivation: 传统控制方法依赖精确模型或难以处理复杂非线性系统，而黑箱系统的控制需求促使需要更灵活的数据驱动方案。
ai_content.method: 构建包含神经网络的策略网络，用于学习Koopman不变子空间并调整算子特征值，结合强化学习实现端到端训练。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过结合Koopman理论与深度学习，提出的方法为非线性系统控制提供了有效的数据驱动解决方案。

search_text: Data-driven End-to-end Learning of Pole Placement Control for Nonlinear Dynamics via Koopman Invariant Subspaces 通过库普曼不变子空间的数据驱动的非线性动力学极点配置控制的端到端学习 We propose a data-driven method for controlling the frequency and convergence rate of black-box nonlinear dynamical systems based on the Koopman operator theory. With the proposed method, a policy network is trained such that the eigenvalues of a Koopman operator of controlled dynamics are close to the target eigenvalues. The policy network consists of a neural network to find a Koopman invariant subspace, and a pole placement module to adjust the eigenvalues of the Koopman operator. Since the policy network is differentiable, we can train it in an end-to-end fashion using reinforcement learning. We demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than model-free reinforcement learning and model-based control with system identification. 我们提出了一种基于库普曼算子理论的数据驱动方法来控制黑盒非线性动力系统的频率和收敛速度。利用所提出的方法，训练策略网络，使得受控动力学的库夫曼算子的特征值接近目标特征值。策略网络由用于寻找库普曼不变子空间的神经网络和用于调整库普曼算子特征值的极点放置模块组成。由于策略网络是可微的，我们可以使用强化学习以端到端的方式对其进行训练。我们证明所提出的方法比无模型强化学习和基于模型的系统识别控制具有更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于Koopman算子理论的数据驱动方法，通过端到端学习控制非线性动力系统的频率和收敛速度。 Tomoharu Iwata,Yoshinobu Kawahara eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.DS

authors_text: Alejandro Martin-Gomez,Haowei Li,Tianyu Song,Sheng Yang,Guangzhi Wang,Hui Ding,Nassir Navab,Zhe Zhao,Mehran Armand
title: STTAR: Surgical Tool Tracking using off-the-shelf Augmented Reality Head-Mounted Displays
title_zh: STTAR：使用现成的增强现实头戴式显示器进行手术工具跟踪
abstract: The use of Augmented Reality (AR) for navigation purposes has shown beneficial in assisting physicians during the performance of surgical procedures. These applications commonly require knowing the pose of surgical tools and patients to provide visual information that surgeons can use during the task performance. Existing medical-grade tracking systems use infrared cameras placed inside the Operating Room (OR) to identify retro-reflective markers attached to objects of interest and compute their pose. Some commercially available AR Head-Mounted Displays (HMDs) use similar cameras for self-localization, hand tracking, and estimating the objects' depth. This work presents a framework that uses the built-in cameras of AR HMDs to enable accurate tracking of retro-reflective markers, such as those used in surgical procedures, without the need to integrate any additional components. This framework is also capable of simultaneously tracking multiple tools. Our results show that the tracking and detection of the markers can be achieved with an accuracy of 0.09 +- 0.06 mm on lateral translation, 0.42 +- 0.32 mm on longitudinal translation, and 0.80 +- 0.39 deg for rotations around the vertical axis. Furthermore, to showcase the relevance of the proposed framework, we evaluate the system's performance in the context of surgical procedures. This use case was designed to replicate the scenarios of k-wire insertions in orthopedic procedures. For evaluation, two surgeons and one biomedical researcher were provided with visual navigation, each performing 21 injections. Results from this use case provide comparable accuracy to those reported in the literature for AR-based navigation procedures.

These applications commonly require knowing the pose of surgical tools and patients to provide visual information that surgeons can use during the task performance. Existing medical-grade tracking systems use infrared cameras placed inside the Operating Room (OR) to identify retro-reflective markers attached to objects of interest and compute their pose. Some commercially available AR Head-Mounted Displays (HMDs) use similar cameras for self-localization, hand tracking, and estimating the objects' depth. This work presents a framework that uses the built-in cameras of AR HMDs to enable accurate tracking of retro-reflective markers, such as those used in surgical procedures, without the need to integrate any additional components. This framework is also capable of simultaneously tracking multiple tools. Our results show that the tracking and detection of the markers can be achieved with an accuracy of 0.09 +- 0.06 mm on lateral translation, 0.42 +- 0.32 mm on longitudinal translation, and 0.80 +- 0.39 deg for rotations around the vertical axis. Furthermore, to showcase the relevance of the proposed framework, we evaluate the system's performance in the context of surgical procedures. This use case was designed to replicate the scenarios of k-wire insertions in orthopedic procedures. For evaluation, two surgeons and one biomedical researcher were provided with visual navigation, each performing 21 injections. Results from this use case provide comparable accuracy to those reported in the literature for AR-based navigation procedures.
abstract_zh: 使用增强现实 (AR) 进行导航已证明有助于在外科手术过程中协助医生。这些应用通常需要了解手术工具和患者的姿势，以提供外科医生在执行任务期间可以使用的视觉信息。现有的医疗级跟踪系统使用放置在手术室 (OR) 内的红外摄像机来识别附着在感兴趣物体上的反光标记并计算它们的姿势。一些商用 AR 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 使用类似的摄像头进行自定位、手部跟踪和估计物体的深度。这项工作提出了一个框架，该框架使用 AR HMD 的内置摄像头来精确跟踪逆反射标记（例如外科手术中使用的标记），而无需集成任何其他组件。该框架还能够同时跟踪多个工具。我们的结果表明，标记的跟踪和检测可以以横向平移0.09±0.06毫米、纵向平移0.42±0.32毫米以及绕垂直轴旋转0.80±0.39度的精度实现。此外，为了展示所提出框架的相关性，我们评估了系统在外科手术中的性能。该用例旨在复制骨科手术中克氏针插入的场景。为了进行评估，为两名外科医生和一名生物医学研究人员提供了视觉导航，每人进行 21 次注射。该用例的结果提供了与基于 AR 的导航程序的文献中报告的结果相当的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STTAR框架，利用现成AR头戴显示器内置摄像头实现手术器械的高精度跟踪，无需额外硬件。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗级跟踪系统依赖专用红外摄像头和反光标记，成本高且部署复杂；商业AR头显虽内置类似摄像头，但未被用于手术器械跟踪。
AI.method: 通过校准AR头显内置摄像头，利用反光标记检测与姿态估计算法，实现多器械同步跟踪，并在骨科手术场景中验证系统性能。
AI.result: 横向平移误差0.09±0.06mm，纵向平移误差0.42±0.32mm，垂直轴旋转误差0.80±0.39度；临床测试显示精度与文献报道的AR导航方法相当。
AI.conclusion: STTAR框架证明了AR头显内置摄像头可替代传统医疗跟踪系统，为术中导航提供低成本高精度解决方案。

authors_text: Maksim Golyadkin,Vitaliy Pozdnyakov,Leonid Zhukov,Ilya Makarov
title: SensorSCAN: Self-Supervised Learning and Deep Clustering for Fault Diagnosis in Chemical Processes
title_zh: SensorSCAN：用于化学过程故障诊断的自监督学习和深度聚类
abstract: Modern industrial facilities generate large volumes of raw sensor data during the production process. This data is used to monitor and control the processes and can be analyzed to detect and predict process abnormalities. Typically, the data has to be annotated by experts in order to be used in predictive modeling. However, manual annotation of large amounts of data can be difficult in industrial settings. In this paper, we propose SensorSCAN, a novel method for unsupervised fault detection and diagnosis, designed for industrial chemical process monitoring. We demonstrate our model's performance on two publicly available datasets of the Tennessee Eastman Process with various faults. The results show that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches (+0.2-0.3 TPR for a fixed FPR) and effectively detects most of the process faults without expert annotation. Moreover, we show that the model fine-tuned on a small fraction of labeled data nearly reaches the performance of a SOTA model trained on the full dataset. We also demonstrate that our method is suitable for real-world applications where the number of faults is not known in advance. The code is available at https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/sensorscan.
summary: Modern industrial facilities generate large volumes of raw sensor data during the production process. This data is used to monitor and control the processes and can be analyzed to detect and predict process abnormalities. Typically, the data has to be annotated by experts in order to be used in predictive modeling. However, manual annotation of large amounts of data can be difficult in industrial settings. In this paper, we propose SensorSCAN, a novel method for unsupervised fault detection and diagnosis, designed for industrial chemical process monitoring. We demonstrate our model's performance on two publicly available datasets of the Tennessee Eastman Process with various faults. The results show that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches (+0.2-0.3 TPR for a fixed FPR) and effectively detects most of the process faults without expert annotation. Moreover, we show that the model fine-tuned on a small fraction of labeled data nearly reaches the performance of a SOTA model trained on the full dataset. We also demonstrate that our method is suitable for real-world applications where the number of faults is not known in advance. The code is available at https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/sensorscan.
abstract_zh: 现代工业设施在生产过程中会产生大量原始传感器数据。该数据用于监视和控制过程，并可进行分析以检测和预测过程异常。通常，数据必须由专家注释才能用于预测建模。然而，在工业环境中，对大量数据进行手动注释可能很困难。在本文中，我们提出了 SensorSCAN，这是一种用于无监督故障检测和诊断的新方法，专为工业化学过程监控而设计。我们在具有各种故障的田纳西州伊士曼过程的两个公开数据集上展示了我们的模型的性能。结果表明，我们的方法明显优于现有方法（固定 FPR 为 +0.2-0.3 TPR），并且无需专家注释即可有效检测大多数过程故障。此外，我们表明，在一小部分标记数据上进行微调的模型几乎达到了在完整数据集上训练的 SOTA 模型的性能。我们还证明我们的方法适用于预先未知故障数量的实际应用。该代码可在 https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/sensorscan 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SensorSCAN方法，通过自监督学习和深度聚类实现工业化学过程的无监督故障检测与诊断。
AI.motivation: 工业设施产生的传感器数据通常需要专家标注才能用于预测建模，但手动标注大量数据在工业场景中存在困难。
AI.method: 设计SensorSCAN模型，结合自监督学习与深度聚类技术，在无需专家标注的情况下实现故障检测与诊断。
AI.result: 在Tennessee Eastman数据集上，该方法在固定FPR下TPR提升0.2-0.3，且少量标注数据微调后性能接近SOTA模型，适用于未知故障数量的现实场景。
AI.conclusion: SensorSCAN有效解决了工业过程故障诊断中标签依赖问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

result: 在Tennessee Eastman数据集上，该方法在固定FPR下TPR提升0.2-0.3，且少量标注数据微调后性能接近SOTA模型，适用于未知故障数量的现实场景。
conclusion: SensorSCAN有效解决了工业过程故障诊断中标签依赖问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: SensorSCAN: Self-Supervised Learning and Deep Clustering for Fault Diagnosis in Chemical Processes SensorSCAN：用于化学过程故障诊断的自监督学习和深度聚类 Modern industrial facilities generate large volumes of raw sensor data during the production process. This data is used to monitor and control the processes and can be analyzed to detect and predict process abnormalities. Typically, the data has to be annotated by experts in order to be used in predictive modeling. However, manual annotation of large amounts of data can be difficult in industrial settings. In this paper, we propose SensorSCAN, a novel method for unsupervised fault detection and diagnosis, designed for industrial chemical process monitoring. We demonstrate our model's performance on two publicly available datasets of the Tennessee Eastman Process with various faults. The results show that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches (+0.2-0.3 TPR for a fixed FPR) and effectively detects most of the process faults without expert annotation. Moreover, we show that the model fine-tuned on a small fraction of labeled data nearly reaches the performance of a SOTA model trained on the full dataset. We also demonstrate that our method is suitable for real-world applications where the number of faults is not known in advance. The code is available at https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/sensorscan. 现代工业设施在生产过程中会产生大量原始传感器数据。该数据用于监视和控制过程，并可进行分析以检测和预测过程异常。通常，数据必须由专家注释才能用于预测建模。然而，在工业环境中，对大量数据进行手动注释可能很困难。在本文中，我们提出了 SensorSCAN，这是一种用于无监督故障检测和诊断的新方法，专为工业化学过程监控而设计。我们在具有各种故障的田纳西州伊士曼过程的两个公开数据集上展示了我们的模型的性能。结果表明，我们的方法明显优于现有方法（固定 FPR 为 +0.2-0.3 TPR），并且无需专家注释即可有效检测大多数过程故障。此外，我们表明，在一小部分标记数据上进行微调的模型几乎达到了在完整数据集上训练的 SOTA 模型的性能。我们还证明我们的方法适用于预先未知故障数量的实际应用。该代码可在 https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/sensorscan 获取。 本文提出SensorSCAN方法，通过自监督学习和深度聚类实现工业化学过程的无监督故障检测与诊断。 Maksim Golyadkin,Vitaliy Pozdnyakov,Leonid Zhukov,Ilya Makarov cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhengyang Zhou,Yang Kuo,Wei Sun,Binwu Wang,Min Zhou,Yunan Zong,Yang Wang
title: Towards Learning in Grey Spatiotemporal Systems: A Prophet to Non-consecutive Spatiotemporal Dynamics
title_zh: 灰色时空系统学习：非连续时空动力学的预言家
abstract: Spatiotemporal forecasting is an imperative topic in data science due to its diverse and critical applications in smart cities. Existing works mostly perform consecutive predictions of following steps with observations completely and continuously obtained, where nearest observations can be exploited as key knowledge for instantaneous status estimation. However, the practical issues of early activity planning and sensor failures elicit a brand-new task, i.e., non-consecutive forecasting. In this paper, we define spatiotemporal learning systems with missing observation as Grey Spatiotemporal Systems (G2S) and propose a Factor-Decoupled learning framework for G2S (FDG2S), where the core idea is to hierarchically decouple multi-level factors and enable both flexible aggregations and disentangled uncertainty estimations. Firstly, to compensate for missing observations, a generic semantic-neighboring sequence sampling is devised, which selects representative sequences to capture both periodical regularity and instantaneous variations. Secondly, we turn the predictions of non-consecutive statuses into inferring statuses under expected combined exogenous factors. In particular, a factor-decoupled aggregation scheme is proposed to decouple factor-induced predictive intensity and region-wise proximity by two energy functions of conditional random field. To infer region-wise proximity under flexible factor-wise combinations and enable dynamic neighborhood aggregations, we further disentangle compounded influences of exogenous factors on region-wise proximity and learn to aggregate them. Given the inherent incompleteness and critical applications of G2S, a DisEntangled Uncertainty Quantification is put forward, to identify two types of uncertainty for reliability guarantees and model interpretations.
summary: Spatiotemporal forecasting is an imperative topic in data science due to its diverse and critical applications in smart cities. Existing works mostly perform consecutive predictions of following steps with observations completely and continuously obtained, where nearest observations can be exploited as key knowledge for instantaneous status estimation. However, the practical issues of early activity planning and sensor failures elicit a brand-new task, i.e., non-consecutive forecasting. In this paper, we define spatiotemporal learning systems with missing observation as Grey Spatiotemporal Systems (G2S) and propose a Factor-Decoupled learning framework for G2S (FDG2S), where the core idea is to hierarchically decouple multi-level factors and enable both flexible aggregations and disentangled uncertainty estimations. Firstly, to compensate for missing observations, a generic semantic-neighboring sequence sampling is devised, which selects representative sequences to capture both periodical regularity and instantaneous variations. Secondly, we turn the predictions of non-consecutive statuses into inferring statuses under expected combined exogenous factors. In particular, a factor-decoupled aggregation scheme is proposed to decouple factor-induced predictive intensity and region-wise proximity by two energy functions of conditional random field. To infer region-wise proximity under flexible factor-wise combinations and enable dynamic neighborhood aggregations, we further disentangle compounded influences of exogenous factors on region-wise proximity and learn to aggregate them. Given the inherent incompleteness and critical applications of G2S, a DisEntangled Uncertainty Quantification is put forward, to identify two types of uncertainty for reliability guarantees and model interpretations.
abstract_zh: 时空预测因其在智慧城市中的多样化和关键应用而成为数据科学中的一个迫切课题。现有的工作大多是对后续步骤进行连续预测，并完整且连续地获得观测值，其中最近的观测值可以用作瞬时状态估计的关键知识。然而，早期活动规划和传感器故障的实际问题引发了一个全新的任务，即非连续预测。在本文中，我们将缺失观测的时空学习系统定义为灰色时空系统（G2S），并提出了一种G2S因子解耦学习框架（FDG2S），其核心思想是分层解耦多级因子，并实现灵活的聚合和解耦的不确定性估计。首先，为了补偿缺失的观测，设计了一种通用的语义邻近序列采样，它选择代表性序列来捕获周期性规律性和瞬时变化。其次，我们将非连续状态的预测转化为预期组合外生因素下的推断状态。特别是，提出了一种因子解耦聚合方案，通过条件随机场的两个能量函数来解耦因子引起的预测强度和区域邻近度。为了推断灵活的因子组合下的区域邻近度并实现动态邻域聚合，我们进一步理清外生因素对区域邻近度的复合影响，并学习聚合它们。鉴于 G2S 固有的不完整性和关键应用，提出了解缠结不确定性量化，以识别可靠性保证和模型解释的两类不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向非连续时空动态的灰色时空系统学习框架FDG2S，解决传感器失效和早期活动规划导致的观测缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时空预测方法依赖连续完整观测，但实际场景中传感器故障和早期规划需求导致观测数据不连续，亟需新的非连续预测方法。
AI.method: 提出FDG2S框架，包含语义邻域序列采样补偿缺失观测、因子解耦聚合方案分离预测强度与区域邻近性、以及解耦不确定性量化方法。
AI.result: 实现了对非连续时空状态的可靠预测，通过因子解耦和不确定性量化提升了模型鲁棒性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: FDG2S框架有效解决了灰色时空系统的非连续预测难题，为智慧城市等应用场景提供了新的技术方案。

authors_text: Domagoj Majstorovic,Simon Hoffmann,Florian Pfab,Andreas Schimpe,Maria-Magdalena Wolf,Frank Diermeyer
title: Survey on Teleoperation Concepts for Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车远程操作概念调查
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man and Cybernetics (SMC)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man and Cybernetics (SMC)
abstract: In parallel with the advancement of Automated Driving (AD) functions, teleoperation has grown in popularity over recent years. By enabling remote operation of automated vehicles, teleoperation can be established as a reliable fallback solution for operational design domain limits and edge cases of AD functions. Over the years, a variety of different teleoperation concepts as to how a human operator can remotely support or substitute an AD function have been proposed in the literature. This paper presents the results of a literature survey on teleoperation concepts for road vehicles. Furthermore, due to the increasing interest within the industry, insights on patents and overall company activities in the field of teleoperation are presented.
summary: In parallel with the advancement of Automated Driving (AD) functions, teleoperation has grown in popularity over recent years. By enabling remote operation of automated vehicles, teleoperation can be established as a reliable fallback solution for operational design domain limits and edge cases of AD functions. Over the years, a variety of different teleoperation concepts as to how a human operator can remotely support or substitute an AD function have been proposed in the literature. This paper presents the results of a literature survey on teleoperation concepts for road vehicles. Furthermore, due to the increasing interest within the industry, insights on patents and overall company activities in the field of teleoperation are presented.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶（AD）功能的进步，远程操作近年来越来越受欢迎。通过实现自动车辆的远程操作，可以将远程操作建立为针对操作设计领域限制和 AD 功能边缘情况的可靠后备解决方案。多年来，文献中已经提出了关于人类操作员如何远程支持或替代 AD 功能的各种不同的远程操作概念。本文介绍了有关道路车辆远程操作概念的文献调查结果。此外，由于行业内的兴趣日益浓厚，本文还介绍了有关远程操作领域的专利和整体公司活动的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文对道路车辆远程操作概念进行文献综述，并分析相关专利及企业动态。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶功能在操作设计领域存在局限性和边缘案例，需可靠远程操作作为备用方案。
AI.method: 通过文献调查总结远程操作概念，并分析专利数据库及企业活动数据。
AI.result: 梳理了远程操作技术分类与应用场景，揭示了行业技术发展热点与竞争格局。
AI.conclusion: 远程操作是自动驾驶的重要补充，需进一步标准化与跨领域协同研究。

authors_text: Udayan Banerjee,Bhabani Shankar Dey,Indra Narayan Kar,Subir Kumar Saha
title: Robust Artificial Delay based Impedance Control of Robotic Manipulators with Uncertain Dynamics
title_zh: 不确定动力学机器人机械臂基于鲁棒人工延迟的阻抗控制
abstract: In this paper an artificial delay based impedance controller is proposed for robotic manipulators with uncertainty in dynamics. The control law unites the time delayed estimation (TDE) framework with a second order switching controller of super twisting algorithm (STA) type via a novel generalized filtered tracking error (GFTE). While time delayed estimation framework eliminates the need for accurate modelling of robot dynamics by estimating the uncertain robot dynamics and interaction forces from immediate past data of state and control effort, the second order switching control law in the outer loop provides robustness against the time delayed estimation (TDE) error that arises due to approximation of the manipulator dynamics. Thus, the proposed control law tries to establish a desired impedance model between the robot end effector variables i.e. force and motion in presence of uncertainties, both when it is encountering smooth contact forces and during free motion. Simulation results for a two link manipulator using the proposed controller along with convergence analysis are shown to validate the proposition.
summary: In this paper an artificial delay based impedance controller is proposed for robotic manipulators with uncertainty in dynamics. The control law unites the time delayed estimation (TDE) framework with a second order switching controller of super twisting algorithm (STA) type via a novel generalized filtered tracking error (GFTE). While time delayed estimation framework eliminates the need for accurate modelling of robot dynamics by estimating the uncertain robot dynamics and interaction forces from immediate past data of state and control effort, the second order switching control law in the outer loop provides robustness against the time delayed estimation (TDE) error that arises due to approximation of the manipulator dynamics. Thus, the proposed control law tries to establish a desired impedance model between the robot end effector variables i.e. force and motion in presence of uncertainties, both when it is encountering smooth contact forces and during free motion. Simulation results for a two link manipulator using the proposed controller along with convergence analysis are shown to validate the proposition.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于人工延迟的阻抗控制器，用于具有动力学不确定性的机器人操纵器。该控制律通过新颖的广义滤波跟踪误差（GFTE）将时延估计（TDE）框架与超扭曲算法（STA）类型的二阶开关控制器结合起来。虽然时延估计框架通过根据刚刚过去的状态和控制工作数据来估计不确定的机器人动力学和相互作用力，从而消除了对机器人动力学进行精确建模的需要，但外环中的二阶切换控制律提供了针对由于近似操纵器动力学而产生的时延估计（TDE）误差的鲁棒性。因此，所提出的控制律试图在机器人末端执行器变量（即存在不确定性的情况下的力和运动）之间建立所需的阻抗模型，无论是在遇到平滑接触力时还是在自由运动期间。使用所提出的控制器的两连杆机械臂的仿真结果以及收敛分析显示了该命题的验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工延迟的阻抗控制器，用于应对具有不确定动力学的机械臂控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统阻抗控制依赖精确的动力学模型，而实际系统中存在参数不确定性和外部干扰，需提升控制鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合时间延迟估计（TDE）框架与超扭曲算法（STA）的二阶切换控制，通过广义滤波跟踪误差（GFTE）实现动态不确定性补偿。
AI.result: 两连杆机械臂仿真验证了控制器在接触力和自由运动下的收敛性，证明其对动力学不确定性的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法无需精确动力学模型，通过TDE与STA协同实现阻抗控制，有效应对不确定性与接触力扰动。

authors_text: Md. Mamunur Rashid,Al-Akhir Nayan,Md. Obaidur Rahman,Sabrina Afrin Simi,Joyeta Saha,Muhammad Golam Kibria
title: IoT based Smart Water Quality Prediction for Biofloc Aquaculture
title_zh: 基于物联网的生物絮凝水产养殖智能水质预测
comment: ef:International Journal of Advanced Computer Science and Applications (IJACSA), vol. 12, no. 6, pp. 470-477, 2021,
comments: ef:International Journal of Advanced Computer Science and Applications (IJACSA), vol. 12, no. 6, pp. 470-477, 2021,
abstract: Traditional fish farming faces several challenges, including water pollution, temperature imbalance, feed, space, cost, etc. Biofloc technology in aquaculture transforms the manual into an advanced system that allows the reuse of unused feed by converting them into microbial protein. The objective of the research is to propose an IoT-based solution to aquaculture that increases efficiency and productivity. The article presented a system that collects data using sensors, analyzes them using a machine learning model, generates decisions with the help of Artificial Intelligence (AI), and sends notifications to the user. The proposed system has been implemented and tested to validate and achieve a satisfactory result.
summary: Traditional fish farming faces several challenges, including water pollution, temperature imbalance, feed, space, cost, etc. Biofloc technology in aquaculture transforms the manual into an advanced system that allows the reuse of unused feed by converting them into microbial protein. The objective of the research is to propose an IoT-based solution to aquaculture that increases efficiency and productivity. The article presented a system that collects data using sensors, analyzes them using a machine learning model, generates decisions with the help of Artificial Intelligence (AI), and sends notifications to the user. The proposed system has been implemented and tested to validate and achieve a satisfactory result.
abstract_zh: 传统养鱼面临着水污染、温度不平衡、饲料、空间、成本等诸多挑战。水产养殖中的生物絮凝技术将人工转变为先进的系统，通过将未使用的饲料转化为微生物蛋白，实现重复利用。该研究的目的是提出一种基于物联网的水产养殖解决方案，以提高效率和生产力。该文章提出了一个系统，该系统使用传感器收集数据，使用机器学习模型分析数据，在人工智能 (AI) 的帮助下生成决策，并向用户发送通知。所提出的系统已经实施并测试以验证并达到令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物联网的智能水质预测系统，用于优化生物絮团水产养殖，提升生产效率。
AI.motivation: 传统水产养殖存在水质污染、温度控制困难及饲料利用率低等问题，需通过智能化手段提升生物絮团技术的管理效率。
AI.method: 通过物联网传感器实时采集水质数据，结合机器学习模型分析数据并利用AI生成决策，最终通过通知机制反馈给用户。
AI.result: 系统实施与测试验证了其有效性，实现了水质预测与养殖管理的智能化，提升了效率和生产力。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效解决了传统养殖痛点，验证了物联网与AI技术在水产养殖中的应用潜力，为行业智能化转型提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Leo Pauly,Michele Lynn Jamrozik,Miguel Ortiz Del Castillo,Olivia Borgue,Inder Pal Singh,Mohatashem Reyaz Makhdoomi,Olga-Orsalia Christidi-Loumpasefski,Vincent Gaudilliere,Carol Martinez,Arunkumar Rathinam,Andreas Hein,Miguel Olivares-Mendez,Djamila Aouada
title: Lessons from a Space Lab -- An Image Acquisition Perspective
title_zh: 太空实验室的经验教训——图像采集的角度
comment: ef:International Journal of Aerospace Engineering, vol. 2023, Article ID 9944614, 16 pages, 2023
comments: ef:International Journal of Aerospace Engineering, vol. 2023, Article ID 9944614, 16 pages, 2023
abstract: The use of Deep Learning (DL) algorithms has improved the performance of vision-based space applications in recent years. However, generating large amounts of annotated data for training these DL algorithms has proven challenging. While synthetically generated images can be used, the DL models trained on synthetic data are often susceptible to performance degradation, when tested in real-world environments. In this context, the Interdisciplinary Center of Security, Reliability and Trust (SnT) at the University of Luxembourg has developed the 'SnT Zero-G Lab', for training and validating vision-based space algorithms in conditions emulating real-world space environments. An important aspect of the SnT Zero-G Lab development was the equipment selection. From the lessons learned during the lab development, this article presents a systematic approach combining market survey and experimental analyses for equipment selection. In particular, the article focus on the image acquisition equipment in a space lab: background materials, cameras and illumination lamps. The results from the experiment analyses show that the market survey complimented by experimental analyses is required for effective equipment selection in a space lab development project.
summary: The use of Deep Learning (DL) algorithms has improved the performance of vision-based space applications in recent years. However, generating large amounts of annotated data for training these DL algorithms has proven challenging. While synthetically generated images can be used, the DL models trained on synthetic data are often susceptible to performance degradation, when tested in real-world environments. In this context, the Interdisciplinary Center of Security, Reliability and Trust (SnT) at the University of Luxembourg has developed the 'SnT Zero-G Lab', for training and validating vision-based space algorithms in conditions emulating real-world space environments. An important aspect of the SnT Zero-G Lab development was the equipment selection. From the lessons learned during the lab development, this article presents a systematic approach combining market survey and experimental analyses for equipment selection. In particular, the article focus on the image acquisition equipment in a space lab: background materials, cameras and illumination lamps. The results from the experiment analyses show that the market survey complimented by experimental analyses is required for effective equipment selection in a space lab development project.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习（DL）算法的使用提高了基于视觉的空间应用的性能。然而，事实证明，生成大量带注释的数据来训练这些深度学习算法具有挑战性。虽然可以使用合成生成的图像，但在现实环境中进行测试时，基于合成数据训练的深度学习模型通常容易出现性能下降的情况。在此背景下，卢森堡大学安全、可靠性和信任跨学科中心 (SnT) 开发了“SnT 零重力实验室”，用于在模拟真实空间环境的条件下训练和验证基于视觉的空间算法。 SnT 零重力实验室开发的一个重要方面是设备选择。根据实验室开发过程中的经验教训，本文提出了一种结合市场调查和实验分析的系统方法来选择设备。本文特别关注空间实验室中的图像采集设备：背景材料、相机和照明灯。实验分析结果表明，在空间实验室开发项目中，有效的设备选择需要市场调查和实验分析相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SnT零重力实验室的开发经验，重点探讨了空间实验室中图像采集设备的选择方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习算法在空间视觉应用中表现出色，但训练这些算法需要大量标注数据，而合成图像训练的模型在真实环境中性能下降，因此需要开发一个能够模拟真实空间环境的实验室。
AI.method: 本文通过市场调研和实验分析相结合的方法，系统地评估和选择了图像采集设备，包括背景材料、相机和照明灯。
AI.result: 实验分析结果表明，市场调研与实验分析的结合对于空间实验室设备选择是有效的。
AI.conclusion: 在空间实验室的开发项目中，市场调研结合实验分析是选择图像采集设备的有效方法。

method: 本文通过市场调研和实验分析相结合的方法，系统地评估和选择了图像采集设备，包括背景材料、相机和照明灯。
result: 实验分析结果表明，市场调研与实验分析的结合对于空间实验室设备选择是有效的。
conclusion: 在空间实验室的开发项目中，市场调研结合实验分析是选择图像采集设备的有效方法。
search_text: Lessons from a Space Lab -- An Image Acquisition Perspective 太空实验室的经验教训——图像采集的角度 The use of Deep Learning (DL) algorithms has improved the performance of vision-based space applications in recent years. However, generating large amounts of annotated data for training these DL algorithms has proven challenging. While synthetically generated images can be used, the DL models trained on synthetic data are often susceptible to performance degradation, when tested in real-world environments. In this context, the Interdisciplinary Center of Security, Reliability and Trust (SnT) at the University of Luxembourg has developed the 'SnT Zero-G Lab', for training and validating vision-based space algorithms in conditions emulating real-world space environments. An important aspect of the SnT Zero-G Lab development was the equipment selection. From the lessons learned during the lab development, this article presents a systematic approach combining market survey and experimental analyses for equipment selection. In particular, the article focus on the image acquisition equipment in a space lab: background materials, cameras and illumination lamps. The results from the experiment analyses show that the market survey complimented by experimental analyses is required for effective equipment selection in a space lab development project. 近年来，深度学习（DL）算法的使用提高了基于视觉的空间应用的性能。然而，事实证明，生成大量带注释的数据来训练这些深度学习算法具有挑战性。虽然可以使用合成生成的图像，但在现实环境中进行测试时，基于合成数据训练的深度学习模型通常容易出现性能下降的情况。在此背景下，卢森堡大学安全、可靠性和信任跨学科中心 (SnT) 开发了“SnT 零重力实验室”，用于在模拟真实空间环境的条件下训练和验证基于视觉的空间算法。 SnT 零重力实验室开发的一个重要方面是设备选择。根据实验室开发过程中的经验教训，本文提出了一种结合市场调查和实验分析的系统方法来选择设备。本文特别关注空间实验室中的图像采集设备：背景材料、相机和照明灯。实验分析结果表明，在空间实验室开发项目中，有效的设备选择需要市场调查和实验分析相结合。 本文介绍了SnT零重力实验室的开发经验，重点探讨了空间实验室中图像采集设备的选择方法。 Leo Pauly,Michele Lynn Jamrozik,Miguel Ortiz Del Castillo,Olivia Borgue,Inder Pal Singh,Mohatashem Reyaz Makhdoomi,Olga-Orsalia Christidi-Loumpasefski,Vincent Gaudilliere,Carol Martinez,Arunkumar Rathinam,Andreas Hein,Miguel Olivares-Mendez,Djamila Aouada cs.CV,astro-ph.IM

authors_text: Ryogo Yamamoto,Kanji Tanaka
title: Compressive Self-localization Using Relative Attribute Embedding
title_zh: 使用相对属性嵌入的压缩自定位
comment: 3 pages, 4 figures, An extended abstract version of a manuscript submitted to an international conference
comments: 3 pages, 4 figures, An extended abstract version of a manuscript submitted to an international conference
abstract: The use of relative attribute (e.g., beautiful, safe, convenient) -based image embeddings in visual place recognition, as a domain-adaptive compact image descriptor that is orthogonal to the typical approach of absolute attribute (e.g., color, shape, texture) -based image embeddings, is explored in this paper.
summary: The use of relative attribute (e.g., beautiful, safe, convenient) -based image embeddings in visual place recognition, as a domain-adaptive compact image descriptor that is orthogonal to the typical approach of absolute attribute (e.g., color, shape, texture) -based image embeddings, is explored in this paper.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了基于相对属性（例如，美丽、安全、方便）的图像嵌入在视觉位置识别中的使用，作为一种域自适应紧凑图像描述符，与基于绝对属性（例如，颜色、形状、纹理）的图像嵌入的典型方法正交。

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用相对属性（如美丽、安全、便捷）的图像嵌入进行视觉地点识别，作为与传统绝对属性（如颜色、形状、纹理）嵌入正交的领域自适应紧凑图像描述符。
AI.motivation: 传统基于绝对属性的图像嵌入在跨领域场景下可能表现不佳，而相对属性能更灵活适应不同环境，提供领域自适应的描述能力。
AI.method: 通过训练模型提取相对属性嵌入，结合压缩感知技术实现自定位，利用相对属性特征构建紧凑的图像描述符。
AI.result: 实验表明，相对属性嵌入在视觉地点识别任务中有效，尤其在领域适应场景下优于传统绝对属性嵌入方法。
AI.conclusion: 相对属性嵌入为视觉定位提供了新颖的领域自适应解决方案，证明了其作为紧凑图像描述符的有效性。

authors_text: Vidyesh Rao Anisetti,A. Kandala,B. Scellier,J. M. Schwarz
title: Frequency propagation: Multi-mechanism learning in nonlinear physical networks
title_zh: 频率传播：非线性物理网络中的多机制学习
abstract: We introduce frequency propagation, a learning algorithm for nonlinear physical networks. In a resistive electrical circuit with variable resistors, an activation current is applied at a set of input nodes at one frequency, and an error current is applied at a set of output nodes at another frequency. The voltage response of the circuit to these boundary currents is the superposition of an `activation signal' and an `error signal' whose coefficients can be read in different frequencies of the frequency domain. Each conductance is updated proportionally to the product of the two coefficients. The learning rule is local and proved to perform gradient descent on a loss function. We argue that frequency propagation is an instance of a multi-mechanism learning strategy for physical networks, be it resistive, elastic, or flow networks. Multi-mechanism learning strategies incorporate at least two physical quantities, potentially governed by independent physical mechanisms, to act as activation and error signals in the training process. Locally available information about these two signals is then used to update the trainable parameters to perform gradient descent. We demonstrate how earlier work implementing learning via chemical signaling in flow networks also falls under the rubric of multi-mechanism learning.
summary: We introduce frequency propagation, a learning algorithm for nonlinear physical networks. In a resistive electrical circuit with variable resistors, an activation current is applied at a set of input nodes at one frequency, and an error current is applied at a set of output nodes at another frequency. The voltage response of the circuit to these boundary currents is the superposition of an `activation signal' and an `error signal' whose coefficients can be read in different frequencies of the frequency domain. Each conductance is updated proportionally to the product of the two coefficients. The learning rule is local and proved to perform gradient descent on a loss function. We argue that frequency propagation is an instance of a multi-mechanism learning strategy for physical networks, be it resistive, elastic, or flow networks. Multi-mechanism learning strategies incorporate at least two physical quantities, potentially governed by independent physical mechanisms, to act as activation and error signals in the training process. Locally available information about these two signals is then used to update the trainable parameters to perform gradient descent. We demonstrate how earlier work implementing learning via chemical signaling in flow networks also falls under the rubric of multi-mechanism learning.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍频率传播，一种非线性物理网络的学习算法。在具有可变电阻器的电阻电路中，激活电流以一个频率施加在一组输入节点处，并且误差电流以另一频率施加在一组输出节点处。电路对这些边界电流的电压响应是“激活信号”和“误差信号”的叠加，其系数可以在频域的不同频率下读取。每个电导根据两个系数的乘积按比例更新。学习规则是局部的，并被证明可以对损失函数执行梯度下降。我们认为频率传播是物理网络多机制学习策略的一个实例，无论是电阻网络、弹性网络还是流网络。多机制学习策略包含至少两个物理量，可能由独立的物理机制控制，在训练过程中充当激活和错误信号。然后，使用有关这两个信号的本地可用信息来更新可训练参数以执行梯度下降。我们展示了早期通过流网络中的化学信号传导实现学习的工作也属于多机制学习的范畴。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为频率传播的学习算法，用于非线性物理网络的训练，通过在不同频率下应用激活和误差电流，利用电路的电压响应进行参数更新。
AI.motivation: 传统物理网络训练方法难以有效处理非线性特性，而多机制学习策略可通过结合不同物理量实现更高效的参数更新，本文旨在提出一种适用于多种物理网络的通用学习框架。
AI.method: 在电阻电路中，通过在输入节点施加特定频率的激活电流、输出节点施加另一频率的误差电流，利用频域分析分离激活信号与误差信号的系数，按其乘积比例更新导纳参数，实现局部梯度下降。
AI.result: 证明了频率传播算法等效于损失函数的梯度下降，展示了该方法在电阻、弹性及流体网络中的普适性，并指出化学信号驱动的流网络学习属于多机制学习的范畴。
AI.conclusion: 频率传播为物理网络提供了一种基于多物理机制的本地化学习策略，通过分离频域信号实现参数更新，为跨领域物理系统的训练提供了统一框架。

authors_text: Naruya Kondo,So Kuroki,Ryosuke Hyakuta,Yutaka Matsuo,Shixiang Shane Gu,Yoichi Ochiai
title: Deep Billboards towards Lossless Real2Sim in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟现实中无损 Real2Sim 的深度广告牌
abstract: An aspirational goal for virtual reality (VR) is to bring in a rich diversity of real world objects losslessly. Existing VR applications often convert objects into explicit 3D models with meshes or point clouds, which allow fast interactive rendering but also severely limit its quality and the types of supported objects, fundamentally upper-bounding the "realism" of VR. Inspired by the classic "billboards" technique in gaming, we develop Deep Billboards that model 3D objects implicitly using neural networks, where only 2D image is rendered at a time based on the user's viewing direction. Our system, connecting a commercial VR headset with a server running neural rendering, allows real-time high-resolution simulation of detailed rigid objects, hairy objects, actuated dynamic objects and more in an interactive VR world, drastically narrowing the existing real-to-simulation (real2sim) gap. Additionally, we augment Deep Billboards with physical interaction capability, adapting classic billboards from screen-based games to immersive VR. At our pavilion, the visitors can use our off-the-shelf setup for quickly capturing their favorite objects, and within minutes, experience them in an immersive and interactive VR world with minimal loss of reality. Our project page: https://sites.google.com/view/deepbillboards/
summary: An aspirational goal for virtual reality (VR) is to bring in a rich diversity of real world objects losslessly. Existing VR applications often convert objects into explicit 3D models with meshes or point clouds, which allow fast interactive rendering but also severely limit its quality and the types of supported objects, fundamentally upper-bounding the "realism" of VR. Inspired by the classic "billboards" technique in gaming, we develop Deep Billboards that model 3D objects implicitly using neural networks, where only 2D image is rendered at a time based on the user's viewing direction. Our system, connecting a commercial VR headset with a server running neural rendering, allows real-time high-resolution simulation of detailed rigid objects, hairy objects, actuated dynamic objects and more in an interactive VR world, drastically narrowing the existing real-to-simulation (real2sim) gap. Additionally, we augment Deep Billboards with physical interaction capability, adapting classic billboards from screen-based games to immersive VR. At our pavilion, the visitors can use our off-the-shelf setup for quickly capturing their favorite objects, and within minutes, experience them in an immersive and interactive VR world with minimal loss of reality. Our project page: https://sites.google.com/view/deepbillboards/
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实 (VR) 的一个理想目标是无损地引入丰富多样的现实世界对象。现有的 VR 应用程序通常将对象转换为具有网格或点云的显式 3D 模型，这允许快速交互式渲染，但也严重限制了其质量和支持对象的类型，从根本上限制了 VR 的“真实感”。受到游戏中经典“广告牌”技术的启发，我们开发了深度广告牌，它使用神经网络隐式地对 3D 对象进行建模，其中根据用户的观看方向一次仅渲染 2D 图像。我们的系统将商用 VR 耳机与运行神经渲染的服务器连接起来，允许在交互式 VR 世界中对详细的刚性物体、毛状物体、驱动的动态物体等进行实时高分辨率模拟，从而大大缩小现有的真实与模拟 (real2sim) 差距。此外，我们还通过物理交互功能增强了 Deep Billboards，将经典广告牌从基于屏幕的游戏改编为沉浸式 VR。在我们的展馆，参观者可以使用我们现成的设置快速捕捉他们最喜欢的物体，并在几分钟之内，在身临其境的交互式 VR 世界中体验它们，同时将现实损失降到最低。我们的项目页面：https://sites.google.com/view/deepbillboards/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deep Billboards技术，通过神经网络隐式建模3D物体，实现虚拟现实中的无损真实世界物体渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有VR应用依赖显式3D模型，导致质量受限且无法支持复杂物体，难以实现高真实感。
AI.method: 结合游戏中的Billboards技术与神经渲染，利用2D图像实时生成视角相关渲染，通过VR头显与服务器协同实现物理交互。
AI.result: 实现实时高分辨率渲染复杂物体，显著缩小真实到虚拟的差距，并支持用户快速捕捉物体并沉浸体验。
AI.conclusion: Deep Billboards为虚拟现实提供了更高效、真实的物体渲染方案，推动了真实世界与虚拟环境的无缝融合。

Existing VR applications often convert objects into explicit 3D models with meshes or point clouds, which allow fast interactive rendering but also severely limit its quality and the types of supported objects, fundamentally upper-bounding the "realism" of VR. Inspired by the classic "billboards" technique in gaming, we develop Deep Billboards that model 3D objects implicitly using neural networks, where only 2D image is rendered at a time based on the user's viewing direction. Our system, connecting a commercial VR headset with a server running neural rendering, allows real-time high-resolution simulation of detailed rigid objects, hairy objects, actuated dynamic objects and more in an interactive VR world, drastically narrowing the existing real-to-simulation (real2sim) gap. Additionally, we augment Deep Billboards with physical interaction capability, adapting classic billboards from screen-based games to immersive VR. At our pavilion, the visitors can use our off-the-shelf setup for quickly capturing their favorite objects, and within minutes, experience them in an immersive and interactive VR world with minimal loss of reality. authors_text: Manli Zhu,Qianhui Men,Edmond S. L. Ho,Howard Leung,Hubert P. H. Shum
title: A Two-stream Convolutional Network for Musculoskeletal and Neurological Disorders Prediction
title_zh: 用于肌肉骨骼和神经系统疾病预测的双流卷积网络
abstract: Musculoskeletal and neurological disorders are the most common causes of walking problems among older people, and they often lead to diminished quality of life. Analyzing walking motion data manually requires trained professionals and the evaluations may not always be objective. To facilitate early diagnosis, recent deep learning-based methods have shown promising results for automated analysis, which can discover patterns that have not been found in traditional machine learning methods. We observe that existing work mostly applies deep learning on individual joint features such as the time series of joint positions. Due to the challenge of discovering inter-joint features such as the distance between feet (i.e. the stride width) from generally smaller-scale medical datasets, these methods usually perform sub-optimally. As a result, we propose a solution that explicitly takes both individual joint features and inter-joint features as input, relieving the system from the need of discovering more complicated features from small data. Due to the distinctive nature of the two types of features, we introduce a two-stream framework, with one stream learning from the time series of joint position and the other from the time series of relative joint displacement. We further develop a mid-layer fusion module to combine the discovered patterns in these two streams for diagnosis, which results in a complementary representation of the data for better prediction performance. We validate our system with a benchmark dataset of 3D skeleton motion that involves 45 patients with musculoskeletal and neurological disorders, and achieve a prediction accuracy of 95.56%, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Musculoskeletal and neurological disorders are the most common causes of walking problems among older people, and they often lead to diminished quality of life. Analyzing walking motion data manually requires trained professionals and the evaluations may not always be objective. To facilitate early diagnosis, recent deep learning-based methods have shown promising results for automated analysis, which can discover patterns that have not been found in traditional machine learning methods. We observe that existing work mostly applies deep learning on individual joint features such as the time series of joint positions. Due to the challenge of discovering inter-joint features such as the distance between feet (i.e. the stride width) from generally smaller-scale medical datasets, these methods usually perform sub-optimally. As a result, we propose a solution that explicitly takes both individual joint features and inter-joint features as input, relieving the system from the need of discovering more complicated features from small data. Due to the distinctive nature of the two types of features, we introduce a two-stream framework, with one stream learning from the time series of joint position and the other from the time series of relative joint displacement. We further develop a mid-layer fusion module to combine the discovered patterns in these two streams for diagnosis, which results in a complementary representation of the data for better prediction performance. We validate our system with a benchmark dataset of 3D skeleton motion that involves 45 patients with musculoskeletal and neurological disorders, and achieve a prediction accuracy of 95.56%, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 肌肉骨骼和神经系统疾病是老年人行走问题的最常见原因，并且常常导致生活质量下降。手动分析步行运动数据需要经过培训的专业人员，并且评估可能并不总是客观的。为了促进早期诊断，最近基于深度学习的方法在自动分析方面显示出了有希望的结果，可以发现传统机器学习方法中未发现的模式。我们观察到现有的工作大多将深度学习应用于单个关节特征，例如关节位置的时间序列。由于从一般较小规模的医学数据集中发现关节间特征（例如脚之间的距离（即步幅宽度））的挑战，这些方法通常表现不佳。因此，我们提出了一种解决方案，明确将单个关节特征和关节间特征作为输入，使系统无需从小数据中发现更复杂的特征。由于这两类特征的独特性，我们引入了一种双流框架，一个流从关节位置的时间序列学习，另一个流从相对关节位移的时间序列学习。我们进一步开发了一个中间层融合模块，将这两个流中发现的模式结合起来进行诊断，从而产生数据的互补表示，以获得更好的预测性能。我们使用 3D 骨骼运动基准数据集验证了我们的系统，该数据集涉及 45 名患有肌肉骨骼和神经系统疾病的患者，预测准确率达到 95.56%，优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流卷积网络，用于预测老年人常见的骨科和神经系统疾病，通过分析行走运动数据实现自动化诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统手动分析行走数据依赖专业人员且主观性强，现有深度学习方法仅关注单个关节特征，难以从小规模数据集中挖掘关节间特征（如步宽），导致诊断效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计双流框架：一(stream1)学习关节位置时序特征，二(stream2)学习相对关节位移时序特征，并引入中间层融合模块整合两流信息，形成互补表征。
AI.result: 在包含45名患者的3D骨骼运动基准数据集上，预测准确率达95.56%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模个体关节与关节间特征并结合中间层融合，该方法在小数据场景下有效提升了疾病预测性能。

authors_text: Jinfeng Zhou,Chujie Zheng,Bo Wang,Zheng Zhang,Minlie Huang
title: CASE: Aligning Coarse-to-Fine Cognition and Affection for Empathetic Response Generation
title_zh: 案例：协调从粗到细的认知和情感以产生移情反应
abstract: Empathetic conversation is psychologically supposed to be the result of conscious alignment and interaction between the cognition and affection of empathy. However, existing empathetic dialogue models usually consider only the affective aspect or treat cognition and affection in isolation, which limits the capability of empathetic response generation. In this work, we propose the CASE model for empathetic dialogue generation. It first builds upon a commonsense cognition graph and an emotional concept graph and then aligns the user's cognition and affection at both the coarse-grained and fine-grained levels. Through automatic and manual evaluation, we demonstrate that CASE outperforms state-of-the-art baselines of empathetic dialogues and can generate more empathetic and informative responses.
summary: Empathetic conversation is psychologically supposed to be the result of conscious alignment and interaction between the cognition and affection of empathy. However, existing empathetic dialogue models usually consider only the affective aspect or treat cognition and affection in isolation, which limits the capability of empathetic response generation. In this work, we propose the CASE model for empathetic dialogue generation. It first builds upon a commonsense cognition graph and an emotional concept graph and then aligns the user's cognition and affection at both the coarse-grained and fine-grained levels. Through automatic and manual evaluation, we demonstrate that CASE outperforms state-of-the-art baselines of empathetic dialogues and can generate more empathetic and informative responses.
abstract_zh: 从心理学上来说，同理心对话被认为是同理心的认知和情感之间有意识的协调和相互作用的结果。然而，现有的共情对话模型通常只考虑情感方面，或者将认知和情感分开对待，这限制了共情反应的生成能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了用于移情对话生成的 CASE 模型。它首先建立在常识认知图和情感概念图的基础上，然后在粗粒度和细粒度层面上调整用户的认知和情感。通过自动和手动评估，我们证明 CASE 优于最先进的同理心对话基线，并且可以生成更多同理心和信息丰富的响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CASE模型，通过在粗粒度和细粒度层面对齐认知与情感，提升同理心对话生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有同理心对话模型仅关注情感或孤立处理认知与情感，导致生成响应的同理心不足。
AI.method: 构建常识认知图与情感概念图，实现用户认知与情感在粗细粒度层面的对齐。
AI.result: 自动与人工评估表明，CASE在同理心对话生成任务中优于现有最先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: CASE通过多粒度认知情感对齐，有效提升了生成响应的同理心与信息量。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CASE模型，通过在粗粒度和细粒度层面对齐认知与情感，提升同理心对话生成效果。
