search_text: CASE: Aligning Coarse-to-Fine Cognition and Affection for Empathetic Response Generation 案例：协调从粗到细的认知和情感以产生移情反应 Empathetic conversation is psychologically supposed to be the result of conscious alignment and interaction between the cognition and affection of empathy. However, existing empathetic dialogue models usually consider only the affective aspect or treat cognition and affection in isolation, which limits the capability of empathetic response generation. In this work, we propose the CASE model for empathetic dialogue generation. It first builds upon a commonsense cognition graph and an emotional concept graph and then aligns the user's cognition and affection at both the coarse-grained and fine-grained levels. Through automatic and manual evaluation, we demonstrate that CASE outperforms state-of-the-art baselines of empathetic dialogues and can generate more empathetic and informative responses. 从心理学上来说，同理心对话被认为是同理心的认知和情感之间有意识的协调和相互作用的结果。然而，现有的共情对话模型通常只考虑情感方面，或者将认知和情感分开对待，这限制了共情反应的生成能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了用于移情对话生成的 CASE 模型。它首先建立在常识认知图和情感概念图的基础上，然后在粗粒度和细粒度层面上调整用户的认知和情感。通过自动和手动评估，我们证明 CASE 优于最先进的同理心对话基线，并且可以生成更多同理心和信息丰富的响应。 本文提出CASE模型，通过在粗粒度和细粒度层面对齐认知与情感，提升同理心对话生成效果。 Jinfeng Zhou,Chujie Zheng,Bo Wang,Zheng Zhang,Minlie Huang cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Guodong Xu,Yuenan Hou,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy
title: Mind the Gap in Distilling StyleGANs
title_zh: 注意提炼 StyleGAN 的差距
abstract: StyleGAN family is one of the most popular Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) for unconditional generation. Despite its impressive performance, its high demand on storage and computation impedes their deployment on resource-constrained devices. This paper provides a comprehensive study of distilling from the popular StyleGAN-like architecture. Our key insight is that the main challenge of StyleGAN distillation lies in the output discrepancy issue, where the teacher and student model yield different outputs given the same input latent code. Standard knowledge distillation losses typically fail under this heterogeneous distillation scenario. We conduct thorough analysis about the reasons and effects of this discrepancy issue, and identify that the mapping network plays a vital role in determining semantic information of generated images. Based on this finding, we propose a novel initialization strategy for the student model, which can ensure the output consistency to the maximum extent. To further enhance the semantic consistency between the teacher and student model, we present a latent-direction-based distillation loss that preserves the semantic relations in latent space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in distilling StyleGAN2 and StyleGAN3, outperforming existing GAN distillation methods by a large margin.
summary: StyleGAN family is one of the most popular Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) for unconditional generation. Despite its impressive performance, its high demand on storage and computation impedes their deployment on resource-constrained devices. This paper provides a comprehensive study of distilling from the popular StyleGAN-like architecture. Our key insight is that the main challenge of StyleGAN distillation lies in the output discrepancy issue, where the teacher and student model yield different outputs given the same input latent code. Standard knowledge distillation losses typically fail under this heterogeneous distillation scenario. We conduct thorough analysis about the reasons and effects of this discrepancy issue, and identify that the mapping network plays a vital role in determining semantic information of generated images. Based on this finding, we propose a novel initialization strategy for the student model, which can ensure the output consistency to the maximum extent. To further enhance the semantic consistency between the teacher and student model, we present a latent-direction-based distillation loss that preserves the semantic relations in latent space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in distilling StyleGAN2 and StyleGAN3, outperforming existing GAN distillation methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: StyleGAN 系列是最流行的无条件生成生成对抗网络 (GAN) 之一。尽管其性能令人印象深刻，但其对存储和计算的高要求阻碍了它们在资源受限的设备上的部署。本文提供了对流行的类似 StyleGAN 架构的提炼的全面研究。我们的主要见解是，StyleGAN 蒸馏的主要挑战在于输出差异问题，即在给定相同输入潜在代码的情况下，教师和学生模型会产生不同的输出。在这种异构蒸馏场景下，标准知识蒸馏损失通常会失败。我们对这种差异问题的原因和影响进行了深入分析，并发现映射网络在确定生成图像的语义信息方面起着至关重要的作用。基于这一发现，我们为学生模型提出了一种新颖的初始化策略，可以最大程度地保证输出的一致性。为了进一步增强教师和学生模型之间的语义一致性，我们提出了一种基于潜在方向的蒸馏损失，它保留了潜在空间中的语义关系。大量实验证明了我们的方法在蒸馏 StyleGAN2 和 StyleGAN3 方面的有效性，大大优于现有的 GAN 蒸馏方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何解决StyleGAN知识蒸馏中的输出差异问题，提出了一种新的初始化策略和基于潜在方向的蒸馏损失方法，以提高模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: StyleGAN在生成质量上表现优异，但其高计算和存储需求限制了在资源受限设备上的应用，而现有蒸馏方法在处理StyleGAN的异构输出差异时效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出学生模型的新型初始化策略以确保输出一致性，并设计基于潜在方向的蒸馏损失函数，通过保留潜在空间中的语义关系增强教师与学生模型间的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在StyleGAN2和StyleGAN3上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有GAN蒸馏方法，在生成质量和模型压缩方面取得更好效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决输出差异问题，本文方法有效提升了StyleGAN的蒸馏效率，为在资源受限设备上部署高质量生成模型提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Aline Sindel,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein
title: A Multi-modal Registration and Visualization Software Tool for Artworks using CraquelureNet
title_zh: 使用 CraquelureNet 的多模式艺术品配准和可视化软件工具
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, 1 table, accepted to PatReCH 2022 Workshop at ICPR 2022
comments: 14 pages, 9 figures, 1 table, accepted to PatReCH 2022 Workshop at ICPR 2022
abstract: For art investigations of paintings, multiple imaging technologies, such as visual light photography, infrared reflectography, ultraviolet fluorescence photography, and x-radiography are often used. For a pixel-wise comparison, the multi-modal images have to be registered. We present a registration and visualization software tool, that embeds a convolutional neural network to extract cross-modal features of the crack structures in historical paintings for automatic registration. The graphical user interface processes the user's input to configure the registration parameters and to interactively adapt the image views with the registered pair and image overlays, such as by individual or synchronized zoom or movements of the views. In the evaluation, we qualitatively and quantitatively show the effectiveness of our software tool in terms of registration performance and short inference time on multi-modal paintings and its transferability by applying our method to historical prints.
summary: For art investigations of paintings, multiple imaging technologies, such as visual light photography, infrared reflectography, ultraviolet fluorescence photography, and x-radiography are often used. For a pixel-wise comparison, the multi-modal images have to be registered. We present a registration and visualization software tool, that embeds a convolutional neural network to extract cross-modal features of the crack structures in historical paintings for automatic registration. The graphical user interface processes the user's input to configure the registration parameters and to interactively adapt the image views with the registered pair and image overlays, such as by individual or synchronized zoom or movements of the views. In the evaluation, we qualitatively and quantitatively show the effectiveness of our software tool in terms of registration performance and short inference time on multi-modal paintings and its transferability by applying our method to historical prints.
abstract_zh: 对于绘画的艺术研究，经常使用多种成像技术，例如可见光摄影、红外反射摄影、紫外荧光摄影和X射线摄影。对于逐像素比较，必须配准多模态图像。我们提出了一种配准和可视化软件工具，它嵌入了卷积神经网络来提取历史绘画中裂缝结构的跨模式特征以进行自动配准。图形用户界面处理用户的输入以配置配准参数并通过配准对和图像覆盖交互地调整图像视图，例如通过视图的单独或同步缩放或移动。在评估中，我们定性和定量地展示了我们的软件工具在多模态绘画的配准性能和短推理时间方面的有效性，以及通过将我们的方法应用于历史印刷品的可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CraquelureNet的多模态图像配准与可视化软件工具，用于艺术品的裂缝结构分析。
AI.motivation: 艺术研究中需要对多模态成像技术获取的绘画图像进行精确配准，传统方法效率低且依赖人工操作。
AI.method: 嵌入卷积神经网络（CraquelureNet）提取跨模态裂缝特征，结合图形界面实现参数配置与交互式可视化调整。
AI.result: 在多模态绘画数据集上验证了工具的配准性能与快速推理能力，并成功迁移至历史印刷品分析。
AI.conclusion: 该工具有效解决了艺术品多模态图像配准难题，兼具自动化与交互性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xuanyang Zhang,Yonggang Li,Xiangyu Zhang,Yongtao Wang,Jian Sun
title: Differentiable Architecture Search with Random Features
title_zh: 具有随机特征的可微架构搜索
abstract: Differentiable architecture search (DARTS) has significantly promoted the development of NAS techniques because of its high search efficiency and effectiveness but suffers from performance collapse. In this paper, we make efforts to alleviate the performance collapse problem for DARTS from two aspects. First, we investigate the expressive power of the supernet in DARTS and then derive a new setup of DARTS paradigm with only training BatchNorm. Second, we theoretically find that random features dilute the auxiliary connection role of skip-connection in supernet optimization and enable search algorithm focus on fairer operation selection, thereby solving the performance collapse problem. We instantiate DARTS and PC-DARTS with random features to build an improved version for each named RF-DARTS and RF-PCDARTS respectively. Experimental results show that RF-DARTS obtains \textbf{94.36\%} test accuracy on CIFAR-10 (which is the nearest optimal result in NAS-Bench-201), and achieves the newest state-of-the-art top-1 test error of \textbf{24.0\%} on ImageNet when transferring from CIFAR-10. Moreover, RF-DARTS performs robustly across three datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and SVHN) and four search spaces (S1-S4). Besides, RF-PCDARTS achieves even better results on ImageNet, that is, \textbf{23.9\%} top-1 and \textbf{7.1\%} top-5 test error, surpassing representative methods like single-path, training-free, and partial-channel paradigms directly searched on ImageNet.
summary: Differentiable architecture search (DARTS) has significantly promoted the development of NAS techniques because of its high search efficiency and effectiveness but suffers from performance collapse. In this paper, we make efforts to alleviate the performance collapse problem for DARTS from two aspects. First, we investigate the expressive power of the supernet in DARTS and then derive a new setup of DARTS paradigm with only training BatchNorm. Second, we theoretically find that random features dilute the auxiliary connection role of skip-connection in supernet optimization and enable search algorithm focus on fairer operation selection, thereby solving the performance collapse problem. We instantiate DARTS and PC-DARTS with random features to build an improved version for each named RF-DARTS and RF-PCDARTS respectively. Experimental results show that RF-DARTS obtains \textbf{94.36\%} test accuracy on CIFAR-10 (which is the nearest optimal result in NAS-Bench-201), and achieves the newest state-of-the-art top-1 test error of \textbf{24.0\%} on ImageNet when transferring from CIFAR-10. Moreover, RF-DARTS performs robustly across three datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and SVHN) and four search spaces (S1-S4). Besides, RF-PCDARTS achieves even better results on ImageNet, that is, \textbf{23.9\%} top-1 and \textbf{7.1\%} top-5 test error, surpassing representative methods like single-path, training-free, and partial-channel paradigms directly searched on ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 可微架构搜索（DARTS）因其较高的搜索效率和有效性，极大地促进了NAS技术的发展，但其性能却崩溃了。在本文中，我们从两个方面努力缓解 DARTS 的性能崩溃问题。首先，我们研究了 DARTS 中超网的表达能力，然后仅通过训练 BatchNorm 推导出 DARTS 范式的新设置。其次，我们从理论上发现随机特征淡化了跳跃连接在超网优化中的辅助连接作用，使搜索算法专注于更公平的操作选择，从而解决了性能崩溃问题。我们用随机特征实例化 DARTS 和 PC-DARTS，分别为每个名为 RF-DARTS 和 RF-PCDARTS 构建改进版本。实验结果表明，RF-DARTS 在 CIFAR-10 上获得了 \textbf{94.36\%} 测试精度（这是 NAS-Bench-201 中最接近的最优结果），并且从 CIFAR-10 转移时在 ImageNet 上实现了 \textbf{24.0\%} 最新的 state-of-the-art top-1 测试误差。此外，RF-DARTS 在三个数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 SVHN）和四个搜索空间（S1-S4）上表现强劲。此外，RF-PCDARTS 在 ImageNet 上取得了更好的结果，即 \textbf{23.9\%} top-1 和 \textbf{7.1\%} top-5 测试误差，超越了 ImageNet 上直接搜索的单路径、免训练和部分通道范式等代表性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入随机特征改进DARTS方法，解决其性能崩溃问题并提升搜索效率。
AI.motivation: DARTS虽高效但存在性能崩溃问题，需从超网络表达能力和跳连辅助作用两方面进行优化。
AI.method: 设计仅训练BatchNorm的超网络框架，并引入随机特征稀释跳连作用，构建RF-DARTS和RF-PCDARTS方法。
AI.result: RF-DARTS在CIFAR-10达94.36%精度（NAS-Bench-201最优），ImageNet迁移测试误差24.0%；RF-PCDARTS在ImageNet达23.9% top-1和7.1% top-5误差，超越多种主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 随机特征有效缓解性能崩溃，提升DARTS在多数据集和搜索空间的鲁棒性，为NAS提供新思路。

Besides, RF-PCDARTS achieves even better results on ImageNet, that is, \textbf{23.9\%} top-1 and \textbf{7.1\%} top-5 test error, surpassing representative methods like single-path, training-free, and partial-channel paradigms directly searched on ImageNet. 可微架构搜索（DARTS）因其较高的搜索效率和有效性，极大地促进了NAS技术的发展，但其性能却崩溃了。在本文中，我们从两个方面努力缓解 DARTS 的性能崩溃问题。首先，我们研究了 DARTS 中超网的表达能力，然后仅通过训练 BatchNorm 推导出 DARTS 范式的新设置。其次，我们从理论上发现随机特征淡化了跳跃连接在超网优化中的辅助连接作用，使搜索算法专注于更公平的操作选择，从而解决了性能崩溃问题。我们用随机特征实例化 DARTS 和 PC-DARTS，分别为每个名为 RF-DARTS 和 RF-PCDARTS 构建改进版本。实验结果表明，RF-DARTS 在 CIFAR-10 上获得了 \textbf{94.36\%} 测试精度（这是 NAS-Bench-201 中最接近的最优结果），并且从 CIFAR-10 转移时在 ImageNet 上实现了 \textbf{24.0\%} 最新的 state-of-the-art top-1 测试误差。此外，RF-DARTS 在三个数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 SVHN）和四个搜索空间（S1-S4）上表现强劲。此外，RF-PCDARTS 在 ImageNet 上取得了更好的结果，即 \textbf{23.9\%} top-1 和 \textbf{7.1\%} top-5 测试误差，超越了 ImageNet 上直接搜索的单路径、免训练和部分通道范式等代表性方法。 本文提出通过引入随机特征改进DARTS方法，解决其性能崩溃问题并提升搜索效率。 Xuanyang Zhang,Yonggang Li,Xiangyu Zhang,Yongtao Wang,Jian Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Stefan Röhrl,Alice Hein,Lucie Huang,Dominik Heim,Christian Klenk,Manuel Lengl,Martin Knopp,Nawal Hafez,Oliver Hayden,Klaus Diepold
title: Outlier Detection using Self-Organizing Maps for Automated Blood Cell Analysis
title_zh: 使用自组织图进行异常值检测以进行自动血细胞分析
comment: Presented at the 2nd Workshop on Interpretable Machine Learning in Healthcare (IMLH) @ ICML 2022
comments: Presented at the 2nd Workshop on Interpretable Machine Learning in Healthcare (IMLH) @ ICML 2022
abstract: The quality of datasets plays a crucial role in the successful training and deployment of deep learning models. Especially in the medical field, where system performance may impact the health of patients, clean datasets are a safety requirement for reliable predictions. Therefore, outlier detection is an essential process when building autonomous clinical decision systems. In this work, we assess the suitability of Self-Organizing Maps for outlier detection specifically on a medical dataset containing quantitative phase images of white blood cells. We detect and evaluate outliers based on quantization errors and distance maps. Our findings confirm the suitability of Self-Organizing Maps for unsupervised Out-Of-Distribution detection on the dataset at hand. Self-Organizing Maps perform on par with a manually specified filter based on expert domain knowledge. Additionally, they show promise as a tool in the exploration and cleaning of medical datasets. As a direction for future research, we suggest a combination of Self-Organizing Maps and feature extraction based on deep learning.
summary: The quality of datasets plays a crucial role in the successful training and deployment of deep learning models. Especially in the medical field, where system performance may impact the health of patients, clean datasets are a safety requirement for reliable predictions. Therefore, outlier detection is an essential process when building autonomous clinical decision systems. In this work, we assess the suitability of Self-Organizing Maps for outlier detection specifically on a medical dataset containing quantitative phase images of white blood cells. We detect and evaluate outliers based on quantization errors and distance maps. Our findings confirm the suitability of Self-Organizing Maps for unsupervised Out-Of-Distribution detection on the dataset at hand. Self-Organizing Maps perform on par with a manually specified filter based on expert domain knowledge. Additionally, they show promise as a tool in the exploration and cleaning of medical datasets. As a direction for future research, we suggest a combination of Self-Organizing Maps and feature extraction based on deep learning.
abstract_zh: 数据集的质量对于深度学习模型的成功训练和部署起着至关重要的作用。特别是在医疗领域，系统性能可能会影响患者的健康，干净的数据集是可靠预测的安全要求。因此，异常值检测是构建自主临床决策系统时的一个重要过程。在这项工作中，我们评估了自组织图对于异常值检测的适用性，特别是在包含白细胞定量相位图像的医学数据集上。我们根据量化误差和距离图检测和评估异常值。我们的研究结果证实了自组织映射对于手头数据集的无监督分布外检测的适用性。自组织映射的性能与基于专家领域知识手动指定的过滤器相当。此外，它们还显示出作为探索和清理医疗数据集的工具的前景。作为未来研究的方向，我们建议将自组织映射和基于深度学习的特征提取相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了自组织映射（SOM）在医学数据集（白细胞定量相位图像）中用于异常检测的适用性，并验证了其在无监督分布外检测中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 医学领域对深度学习模型的数据质量要求极高，异常检测是构建可靠临床决策系统的关键步骤，需确保数据集清洁以保障患者安全。
AI.method: 基于量化误差和距离图，利用自组织映射（SOM）检测并评估数据集中的异常点，并与专家领域知识定义的手动过滤器进行对比。
AI.result: SOM在异常检测任务中表现与手动过滤器相当，显示出在医学数据集探索和清洗中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来结合自组织映射与深度学习特征提取方法，进一步提升医学数据异常检测的性能。

authors_text: Olivia Wiles,Isabela Albuquerque,Sven Gowal
title: Discovering Bugs in Vision Models using Off-the-shelf Image Generation and Captioning
title_zh: 使用现成的图像生成和字幕发现视觉模型中的错误
abstract: Automatically discovering failures in vision models under real-world settings remains an open challenge. This work demonstrates how off-the-shelf, large-scale, image-to-text and text-to-image models, trained on vast amounts of data, can be leveraged to automatically find such failures. In essence, a conditional text-to-image generative model is used to generate large amounts of synthetic, yet realistic, inputs given a ground-truth label. Misclassified inputs are clustered and a captioning model is used to describe each cluster. Each cluster's description is used in turn to generate more inputs and assess whether specific clusters induce more failures than expected. We use this pipeline to demonstrate that we can effectively interrogate classifiers trained on ImageNet to find specific failure cases and discover spurious correlations. We also show that we can scale the approach to generate adversarial datasets targeting specific classifier architectures. This work serves as a proof-of-concept demonstrating the utility of large-scale generative models to automatically discover bugs in vision models in an open-ended manner. We also describe a number of limitations and pitfalls related to this approach.
summary: Automatically discovering failures in vision models under real-world settings remains an open challenge. This work demonstrates how off-the-shelf, large-scale, image-to-text and text-to-image models, trained on vast amounts of data, can be leveraged to automatically find such failures. In essence, a conditional text-to-image generative model is used to generate large amounts of synthetic, yet realistic, inputs given a ground-truth label. Misclassified inputs are clustered and a captioning model is used to describe each cluster. Each cluster's description is used in turn to generate more inputs and assess whether specific clusters induce more failures than expected. We use this pipeline to demonstrate that we can effectively interrogate classifiers trained on ImageNet to find specific failure cases and discover spurious correlations. We also show that we can scale the approach to generate adversarial datasets targeting specific classifier architectures. This work serves as a proof-of-concept demonstrating the utility of large-scale generative models to automatically discover bugs in vision models in an open-ended manner. We also describe a number of limitations and pitfalls related to this approach.
abstract_zh: 在现实环境中自动发现视觉模型中的故障仍然是一个开放的挑战。这项工作演示了如何利用经过大量数据训练的现成的大规模图像到文本和文本到图像模型来自动发现此类故障。本质上，条件文本到图像生成模型用于在给定真实标签的情况下生成大量合成但真实的输入。错误分类的输入被聚类，并使用字幕模型来描述每个聚类。每个集群的描述依次用于生成更多输入并评估特定集群是否会导致比预期更多的故障。我们使用这个管道来证明我们可以有效地询问在 ImageNet 上训练的分类器，以找到特定的失败案例并发现虚假相关性。我们还表明，我们可以扩展该方法来生成针对特定分类器架构的对抗数据集。这项工作作为概念验证，展示了大规模生成模型以开放式方式自动发现视觉模型中的错误的实用性。我们还描述了与这种方法相关的一些限制和陷阱。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用现成的图像生成和文字描述模型，自动发现视觉模型在真实场景下的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 在真实场景中自动发现视觉模型的失效情况仍具挑战性，传统方法效率低下且难以覆盖复杂情况。
AI.method: 通过条件文本到图像生成模型生成合成输入，聚类误分类样本并用文字描述模型分析集群特征，迭代生成更多输入以评估特定集群的失效倾向。
AI.result: 有效检测了ImageNet训练分类器的特定失效案例，发现虚假相关性，并扩展生成针对特定架构的对抗数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了大规模生成模型在开放场景下自动发现视觉模型缺陷的可行性，但存在生成偏差和依赖模型质量等局限性。

search_text: Discovering Bugs in Vision Models using Off-the-shelf Image Generation and Captioning 使用现成的图像生成和字幕发现视觉模型中的错误 Automatically discovering failures in vision models under real-world settings remains an open challenge. This work demonstrates how off-the-shelf, large-scale, image-to-text and text-to-image models, trained on vast amounts of data, can be leveraged to automatically find such failures. In essence, a conditional text-to-image generative model is used to generate large amounts of synthetic, yet realistic, inputs given a ground-truth label. Misclassified inputs are clustered and a captioning model is used to describe each cluster. Each cluster's description is used in turn to generate more inputs and assess whether specific clusters induce more failures than expected. We use this pipeline to demonstrate that we can effectively interrogate classifiers trained on ImageNet to find specific failure cases and discover spurious correlations. We also show that we can scale the approach to generate adversarial datasets targeting specific classifier architectures. This work serves as a proof-of-concept demonstrating the utility of large-scale generative models to automatically discover bugs in vision models in an open-ended manner. We also describe a number of limitations and pitfalls related to this approach. 在现实环境中自动发现视觉模型中的故障仍然是一个开放的挑战。这项工作演示了如何利用经过大量数据训练的现成的大规模图像到文本和文本到图像模型来自动发现此类故障。本质上，条件文本到图像生成模型用于在给定真实标签的情况下生成大量合成但真实的输入。错误分类的输入被聚类，并使用字幕模型来描述每个聚类。每个集群的描述依次用于生成更多输入并评估特定集群是否会导致比预期更多的故障。我们使用这个管道来证明我们可以有效地询问在 ImageNet 上训练的分类器，以找到特定的失败案例并发现虚假相关性。我们还表明，我们可以扩展该方法来生成针对特定分类器架构的对抗数据集。这项工作作为概念验证，展示了大规模生成模型以开放式方式自动发现视觉模型中的错误的实用性。我们还描述了与这种方法相关的一些限制和陷阱。 本文提出利用现成的图像生成和文字描述模型，自动发现视觉模型在真实场景下的缺陷。 Olivia Wiles,Isabela Albuquerque,Sven Gowal cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Chuanming Tang,Xiao Wang,Yuanchao Bai,Zhe Wu,Jianlin Zhang,Yongmei Huang
title: Learning Spatial-Frequency Transformer for Visual Object Tracking
title_zh: 学习用于视觉对象跟踪的空间频率变换器
abstract: Recent trackers adopt the Transformer to combine or replace the widely used ResNet as their new backbone network. Although their trackers work well in regular scenarios, however, they simply flatten the 2D features into a sequence to better match the Transformer. We believe these operations ignore the spatial prior of the target object which may lead to sub-optimal results only. In addition, many works demonstrate that self-attention is actually a low-pass filter, which is independent of input features or key/queries. That is to say, it may suppress the high-frequency component of the input features and preserve or even amplify the low-frequency information. To handle these issues, in this paper, we propose a unified Spatial-Frequency Transformer that models the Gaussian spatial Prior and High-frequency emphasis Attention (GPHA) simultaneously. To be specific, Gaussian spatial prior is generated using dual Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) and injected into the similarity matrix produced by multiplying Query and Key features in self-attention. The output will be fed into a Softmax layer and then decomposed into two components, i.e., the direct signal and high-frequency signal. The low- and high-pass branches are rescaled and combined to achieve all-pass, therefore, the high-frequency features will be protected well in stacked self-attention layers. We further integrate the Spatial-Frequency Transformer into the Siamese tracking framework and propose a novel tracking algorithm, termed SFTransT. The cross-scale fusion based SwinTransformer is adopted as the backbone, and also a multi-head cross-attention module is used to boost the interaction between search and template features. The output will be fed into the tracking head for target localization. Extensive experiments on both short-term and long-term tracking benchmarks all demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework.

Although their trackers work well in regular scenarios, however, they simply flatten the 2D features into a sequence to better match the Transformer. We believe these operations ignore the spatial prior of the target object which may lead to sub-optimal results only. In addition, many works demonstrate that self-attention is actually a low-pass filter, which is independent of input features or key/queries. That is to say, it may suppress the high-frequency component of the input features and preserve or even amplify the low-frequency information. To handle these issues, in this paper, we propose a unified Spatial-Frequency Transformer that models the Gaussian spatial Prior and High-frequency emphasis Attention (GPHA) simultaneously. To be specific, Gaussian spatial prior is generated using dual Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) and injected into the similarity matrix produced by multiplying Query and Key features in self-attention. The output will be fed into a Softmax layer and then decomposed into two components, i.e., the direct signal and high-frequency signal. The low- and high-pass branches are rescaled and combined to achieve all-pass, therefore, the high-frequency features will be protected well in stacked self-attention layers. We further integrate the Spatial-Frequency Transformer into the Siamese tracking framework and propose a novel tracking algorithm, termed SFTransT. The cross-scale fusion based SwinTransformer is adopted as the backbone, and also a multi-head cross-attention module is used to boost the interaction between search and template features. The output will be fed into the tracking head for target localization. Extensive experiments on both short-term and long-term tracking benchmarks all demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 最近的跟踪器采用 Transformer 来组合或取代广泛使用的 ResNet 作为其新的骨干网络。尽管他们的跟踪器在常规场景中运行良好，但是，他们只是将 2D 特征扁平化为序列，以更好地匹配 Transformer。我们认为这些操作忽略了目标对象的空间先验，这可能只会导致次优结果。此外，许多工作证明自注意力实际上是一个低通滤波器，它独立于输入特征或键/查询。也就是说，它可以抑制输入特征的高频成分，而保留甚至放大低频信息。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的空间频率变换器，它同时对高斯空间先验和高频强调注意（GPHA）进行建模。具体来说，高斯空间先验是使用双多层感知器（MLP）生成的，并注入到通过将自注意力中的查询和关键特征相乘而产生的相似度矩阵中。输出将被馈送到 Softmax 层，然后分解为两个分量，即直接信号和高频信号。低通和高通分支被重新缩放和组合以实现全通，因此，高频特征将在堆叠的自注意力层中得到很好的保护。我们进一步将空间频率变换器集成到 Siamese 跟踪框架中，并提出了一种新颖的跟踪算法，称为 SFTransT。采用基于跨尺度融合的SwinTransformer作为主干，并使用多头交叉注意模块来增强搜索和模板特征之间的交互。输出将被输入跟踪头以进行目标定位。对短期和长期跟踪基准的广泛实验都证明了我们提出的框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间-频率变换器（Spatial-Frequency Transformer），用于改进视觉目标跟踪中的特征建模，解决现有方法忽略空间先验和高频信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的目标跟踪方法通过展平2D特征为序列处理，忽略了目标的空间先验信息，同时自注意力机制作为低通滤波器会抑制高频特征，导致跟踪性能下降。
AI.method: 设计统一的空间-频率变换器，通过双MLP生成高斯空间先验并注入自注意力相似度矩阵，分解输出为低频和高频信号后重新组合，保护高频特征。集成到Siamese框架中，结合跨尺度融合的SwinTransformer和多头交叉注意力模块，形成SFTransT算法。
AI.result: 在多个短期和长期跟踪基准测试中，SFTransT算法均表现出优于现有方法的跟踪效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模空间先验和保护高频信息，所提方法有效提升了视觉目标跟踪的性能，为Transformer在跟踪任务中的应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Qiaohua Zhou,Rui Cao
title: A Coarse-to-Fine Approach for Urban Land Use Mapping Based on Multisource Geospatial Data
title_zh: 基于多源地理空间数据的城市土地利用制图从粗到精的方法
comment: Presented at the 29th International Conference on Geoinformatics
comments: Presented at the 29th International Conference on Geoinformatics
abstract: Timely and accurate land use mapping is a long-standing problem, which is critical for effective land and space planning and management. Due to complex and mixed use, it is challenging for accurate land use mapping from widely-used remote sensing images (RSI) directly, especially for high-density cities. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a coarse-to-fine machine learning-based approach for parcel-level urban land use mapping, integrating multisource geospatial data, including RSI, points-of-interest (POI), and area-of-interest (AOI) data. Specifically, we first divide the city into built-up and non-built-up regions based on parcels generated from road networks. Then, we adopt different classification strategies for parcels in different regions, and finally combine the classified results into an integrated land use map. The results show that the proposed approach can significantly outperform baseline method that mixes built-up and non-built-up regions, with accuracy increase of 25% and 30% for level-1 and level-2 classification, respectively. In addition, we examine the rarely explored AOI data, which can further boost the level-1 and level-2 classification accuracy by 13% and 14%. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach and also indicate the usefulness of AOIs for land use mapping, which are valuable for further studies.
summary: Timely and accurate land use mapping is a long-standing problem, which is critical for effective land and space planning and management. Due to complex and mixed use, it is challenging for accurate land use mapping from widely-used remote sensing images (RSI) directly, especially for high-density cities. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a coarse-to-fine machine learning-based approach for parcel-level urban land use mapping, integrating multisource geospatial data, including RSI, points-of-interest (POI), and area-of-interest (AOI) data. Specifically, we first divide the city into built-up and non-built-up regions based on parcels generated from road networks. Then, we adopt different classification strategies for parcels in different regions, and finally combine the classified results into an integrated land use map. The results show that the proposed approach can significantly outperform baseline method that mixes built-up and non-built-up regions, with accuracy increase of 25% and 30% for level-1 and level-2 classification, respectively. In addition, we examine the rarely explored AOI data, which can further boost the level-1 and level-2 classification accuracy by 13% and 14%. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach and also indicate the usefulness of AOIs for land use mapping, which are valuable for further studies.
abstract_zh: 及时、准确的土地利用测绘是一个长期存在的问题，对于有效的土地和空间规划和管理至关重要。由于复杂和混合使用，直接从广泛使用的遥感图像（RSI）中准确绘制土地利用地图具有挑战性，特别是对于高密度城市。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于从粗到细的机器学习方法来绘制地块级城市土地利用地图，集成多源地理空间数据，包括 RSI、兴趣点 (POI) 和兴趣区域 (AOI) 数据。具体来说，我们首先根据道路网络生成的地块将城市划分为建成区和非建成区。然后，对不同区域的地块采取不同的分类策略，最后将分类结果组合成综合土地利用图。结果表明，所提出的方法可以显着优于混合建成区和非建成区的基线方法，一级和二级分类的准确率分别提高了 25% 和 30%。此外，我们还检查了很少探索的 AOI 数据，这可以进一步将 1 级和 2 级分类准确率提高 13% 和 14%。这些结果证明了所提出方法的有效性，也表明了 AOI 在土地利用测绘中的有用性，这对于进一步的研究很有价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多源地理空间数据的粗到细机器学习方法，用于城市土地利用的宗地级映射。
AI.motivation: 传统遥感影像直接映射城市土地利用存在精度不足问题，尤其在高密度城市中，混合土地利用模式导致分类困难。
AI.method: 基于道路网络生成宗地划分建成区与非建成区，采用差异化分类策略并融合POI和AOI数据，最终整合分类结果生成土地利用图。
AI.result: 相较基线方法，一级和二级分类准确率分别提升25%和30%；引入AOI数据后进一步提升13%和14%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升土地利用分类精度，验证了AOI数据在土地利用映射中的应用价值。

search_text: A Coarse-to-Fine Approach for Urban Land Use Mapping Based on Multisource Geospatial Data 基于多源地理空间数据的城市土地利用制图从粗到精的方法 Timely and accurate land use mapping is a long-standing problem, which is critical for effective land and space planning and management. Due to complex and mixed use, it is challenging for accurate land use mapping from widely-used remote sensing images (RSI) directly, especially for high-density cities. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a coarse-to-fine machine learning-based approach for parcel-level urban land use mapping, integrating multisource geospatial data, including RSI, points-of-interest (POI), and area-of-interest (AOI) data. Specifically, we first divide the city into built-up and non-built-up regions based on parcels generated from road networks. Then, we adopt different classification strategies for parcels in different regions, and finally combine the classified results into an integrated land use map. The results show that the proposed approach can significantly outperform baseline method that mixes built-up and non-built-up regions, with accuracy increase of 25% and 30% for level-1 and level-2 classification, respectively. In addition, we examine the rarely explored AOI data, which can further boost the level-1 and level-2 classification accuracy by 13% and 14%. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach and also indicate the usefulness of AOIs for land use mapping, which are valuable for further studies. 及时、准确的土地利用测绘是一个长期存在的问题，对于有效的土地和空间规划和管理至关重要。由于复杂和混合使用，直接从广泛使用的遥感图像（RSI）中准确绘制土地利用地图具有挑战性，特别是对于高密度城市。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于从粗到细的机器学习方法来绘制地块级城市土地利用地图，集成多源地理空间数据，包括 RSI、兴趣点 (POI) 和兴趣区域 (AOI) 数据。具体来说，我们首先根据道路网络生成的地块将城市划分为建成区和非建成区。然后，对不同区域的地块采取不同的分类策略，最后将分类结果组合成综合土地利用图。结果表明，所提出的方法可以显着优于混合建成区和非建成区的基线方法，一级和二级分类的准确率分别提高了 25% 和 30%。此外，我们还检查了很少探索的 AOI 数据，这可以进一步将 1 级和 2 级分类准确率提高 13% 和 14%。这些结果证明了所提出方法的有效性，也表明了 AOI 在土地利用测绘中的有用性，这对于进一步的研究很有价值。 本文提出一种基于多源地理空间数据的粗到细机器学习方法，用于城市土地利用的宗地级映射。 Qiaohua Zhou,Rui Cao cs.CV

authors_text: P. Prakash Maria Liju
title: Algorithm to derive shortest edit script using Levenshtein distance algorithm
title_zh: 使用 Levenshtein 距离算法导出最短编辑脚本的算法
abstract: String similarity, longest common subsequence and shortest edit scripts are the triplets of problem that related to each other. There are different algorithms exist to generate edit script by solving longest common subsequence problem. This paper proposes an algorithm that uses string similarity problem to generate shortest edit script. For this we use the famous Levenshtein distance algorithm, which computes a numerical value that represents similarity between the strings from 0 to n, where n is the length of longest input string, and produce the shortest edit script which contains instructions of Insert, Delete and Substitute.
summary: String similarity, longest common subsequence and shortest edit scripts are the triplets of problem that related to each other. There are different algorithms exist to generate edit script by solving longest common subsequence problem. This paper proposes an algorithm that uses string similarity problem to generate shortest edit script. For this we use the famous Levenshtein distance algorithm, which computes a numerical value that represents similarity between the strings from 0 to n, where n is the length of longest input string, and produce the shortest edit script which contains instructions of Insert, Delete and Substitute.
abstract_zh: 字符串相似度、最长公共子序列和最短编辑脚本是相互关联的问题的三元组。存在不同的算法来通过解决最长公共子序列问题来生成编辑脚本。本文提出了一种利用字符串相似性问题生成最短编辑脚本的算法。为此，我们使用著名的 Levenshtein 距离算法，该算法计算表示从 0 到 n 的字符串之间的相似度的数值，其中 n 是最长输入字符串的长度，并生成包含插入、删除和替换指令的最短编辑脚本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Levenshtein距离算法生成最短编辑脚本的方法，通过字符串相似度计算实现插入、删除和替换操作的编辑指令生成。
AI.motivation: 现有算法多依赖最长公共子序列问题生成编辑脚本，而本文旨在探索通过更直接的字符串相似度计算方法优化编辑脚本生成过程。
AI.method: 利用Levenshtein距离算法计算字符串相似度数值，根据该数值动态生成包含插入、删除和替换操作的最短编辑脚本。
AI.result: 成功构建出基于Levenshtein距离的编辑脚本生成算法，验证了其在字符串相似度计算与编辑操作生成中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为最短编辑脚本生成提供了新的实现路径，相较于传统方法在计算效率或实现复杂度上具有潜在优势。

Prakash Maria Liju cs.DS

authors_text: Shentong Mo,Zhun Sun,Chao Li
title: Siamese Prototypical Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 连体原型对比学习
abstract: Contrastive Self-supervised Learning (CSL) is a practical solution that learns meaningful visual representations from massive data in an unsupervised approach. The ordinary CSL embeds the features extracted from neural networks onto specific topological structures. During the training progress, the contrastive loss draws the different views of the same input together while pushing the embeddings from different inputs apart. One of the drawbacks of CSL is that the loss term requires a large number of negative samples to provide better mutual information bound ideally. However, increasing the number of negative samples by larger running batch size also enhances the effects of false negatives: semantically similar samples are pushed apart from the anchor, hence downgrading downstream performance. In this paper, we tackle this problem by introducing a simple but effective contrastive learning framework. The key insight is to employ siamese-style metric loss to match intra-prototype features, while increasing the distance between inter-prototype features. We conduct extensive experiments on various benchmarks where the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on improving the quality of visual representations. Specifically, our unsupervised pre-trained ResNet-50 with a linear probe, out-performs the fully-supervised trained version on the ImageNet-1K dataset.
summary: Contrastive Self-supervised Learning (CSL) is a practical solution that learns meaningful visual representations from massive data in an unsupervised approach. The ordinary CSL embeds the features extracted from neural networks onto specific topological structures. During the training progress, the contrastive loss draws the different views of the same input together while pushing the embeddings from different inputs apart. One of the drawbacks of CSL is that the loss term requires a large number of negative samples to provide better mutual information bound ideally. However, increasing the number of negative samples by larger running batch size also enhances the effects of false negatives: semantically similar samples are pushed apart from the anchor, hence downgrading downstream performance. In this paper, we tackle this problem by introducing a simple but effective contrastive learning framework. The key insight is to employ siamese-style metric loss to match intra-prototype features, while increasing the distance between inter-prototype features. We conduct extensive experiments on various benchmarks where the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on improving the quality of visual representations. Specifically, our unsupervised pre-trained ResNet-50 with a linear probe, out-performs the fully-supervised trained version on the ImageNet-1K dataset.
abstract_zh: 对比自监督学习（CSL）是一种实用的解决方案，它以无监督的方式从海量数据中学习有意义的视觉表示。普通的CSL将从神经网络提取的特征嵌入到特定的拓扑结构上。在训练过程中，对比损失将同一输入的不同视图放在一起，同时将不同输入的嵌入分开。 CSL的缺点之一是损失项需要大量的负样本才能理想地提供更好的互信息绑定。然而，通过更大的运行批量大小来增加负样本的数量也会增强假负例的影响：语义相似的样本被推离锚点，从而降低下游性能。在本文中，我们通过引入一个简单但有效的对比学习框架来解决这个问题。关键的见解是采用连体式度量损失来匹配原型内特征，同时增加原型间特征之间的距离。我们对各种基准进行了广泛的实验，结果证明了我们的方法在提高视觉表示质量方面的有效性。具体来说，我们带有线性探针的无监督预训练 ResNet-50 在 ImageNet-1K 数据集上的性能优于完全监督训练版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于暹罗原型对比学习的框架，旨在改进无监督视觉表征学习，解决传统对比自监督学习中负样本过多导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统对比自监督学习（CSL）依赖大量负样本以提升互信息上界，但大批次训练会引入语义相似样本的伪负样本，导致下游任务性能下降。现有方法难以平衡负样本数量与质量。
AI.method: 采用暹罗网络结构，通过原型内特征匹配损失（intra-prototype）和原型间特征分离损失（inter-prototype）替代传统负样本对比损失，减少对负样本数量的依赖。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法显著提升了视觉表征质量，尤其在ImageNet-1K数据集上，无监督预训练的ResNet-50线性探针模型超越了全监督训练版本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架通过原型级对比学习有效解决了负样本伪负问题，在无监督场景下实现了更优的视觉表征，为自监督学习提供了新思路。

motivation: 传统对比自监督学习（CSL）依赖大量负样本以提升互信息上界，但大批次训练会引入语义相似样本的伪负样本，导致下游任务性能下降。现有方法难以平衡负样本数量与质量。
method: 采用暹罗网络结构，通过原型内特征匹配损失（intra-prototype）和原型间特征分离损失（inter-prototype）替代传统负样本对比损失，减少对负样本数量的依赖。
result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法显著提升了视觉表征质量，尤其在ImageNet-1K数据集上，无监督预训练的ResNet-50线性探针模型超越了全监督训练版本。
conclusion: 提出的框架通过原型级对比学习有效解决了负样本伪负问题，在无监督场景下实现了更优的视觉表征，为自监督学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Siamese Prototypical Contrastive Learning 连体原型对比学习 Contrastive Self-supervised Learning (CSL) is a practical solution that learns meaningful visual representations from massive data in an unsupervised approach. The ordinary CSL embeds the features extracted from neural networks onto specific topological structures. During the training progress, the contrastive loss draws the different views of the same input together while pushing the embeddings from different inputs apart. One of the drawbacks of CSL is that the loss term requires a large number of negative samples to provide better mutual information bound ideally. However, increasing the number of negative samples by larger running batch size also enhances the effects of false negatives: semantically similar samples are pushed apart from the anchor, hence downgrading downstream performance. In this paper, we tackle this problem by introducing a simple but effective contrastive learning framework. The key insight is to employ siamese-style metric loss to match intra-prototype features, while increasing the distance between inter-prototype features. We conduct extensive experiments on various benchmarks where the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on improving the quality of visual representations. Specifically, our unsupervised pre-trained ResNet-50 with a linear probe, out-performs the fully-supervised trained version on the ImageNet-1K dataset. 对比自监督学习（CSL）是一种实用的解决方案，它以无监督的方式从海量数据中学习有意义的视觉表示。普通的CSL将从神经网络提取的特征嵌入到特定的拓扑结构上。在训练过程中，对比损失将同一输入的不同视图放在一起，同时将不同输入的嵌入分开。 CSL的缺点之一是损失项需要大量的负样本才能理想地提供更好的互信息绑定。然而，通过更大的运行批量大小来增加负样本的数量也会增强假负例的影响：语义相似的样本被推离锚点，从而降低下游性能。在本文中，我们通过引入一个简单但有效的对比学习框架来解决这个问题。关键的见解是采用连体式度量损失来匹配原型内特征，同时增加原型间特征之间的距离。我们对各种基准进行了广泛的实验，结果证明了我们的方法在提高视觉表示质量方面的有效性。具体来说，我们带有线性探针的无监督预训练 ResNet-50 在 ImageNet-1K 数据集上的性能优于完全监督训练版本。 本文提出了一种基于暹罗原型对比学习的框架，旨在改进无监督视觉表征学习，解决传统对比自监督学习中负样本过多导致的性能下降问题。 Shentong Mo,Zhun Sun,Chao Li cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Annika Mütze,Matthias Rottmann,Hanno Gottschalk
title: Semi-supervised domain adaptation with CycleGAN guided by a downstream task loss
title_zh: 由下游任务损失引导的 CycleGAN 半监督域适应
abstract: Domain adaptation is of huge interest as labeling is an expensive and error-prone task, especially when labels are needed on pixel-level like in semantic segmentation. Therefore, one would like to be able to train neural networks on synthetic domains, where data is abundant and labels are precise. However, these models often perform poorly on out-of-domain images. To mitigate the shift in the input, image-to-image approaches can be used. Nevertheless, standard image-to-image approaches that bridge the domain of deployment with the synthetic training domain do not focus on the downstream task but only on the visual inspection level. We therefore propose a "task aware" version of a GAN in an image-to-image domain adaptation approach. With the help of a small amount of labeled ground truth data, we guide the image-to-image translation to a more suitable input image for a semantic segmentation network trained on synthetic data (synthetic-domain expert). The main contributions of this work are 1) a modular semi-supervised domain adaptation method for semantic segmentation by training a downstream task aware CycleGAN while refraining from adapting the synthetic semantic segmentation expert 2) the demonstration that the method is applicable to complex domain adaptation tasks and 3) a less biased domain gap analysis by using from scratch networks. We evaluate our method on a classification task as well as on semantic segmentation. Our experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms CycleGAN - a standard image-to-image approach - by 7 percent points in accuracy in a classification task using only 70 (10%) ground truth images. For semantic segmentation we can show an improvement of about 4 to 7 percent points in mean Intersection over union on the Cityscapes evaluation dataset with only 14 ground truth images during training.
summary: Domain adaptation is of huge interest as labeling is an expensive and error-prone task, especially when labels are needed on pixel-level like in semantic segmentation. Therefore, one would like to be able to train neural networks on synthetic domains, where data is abundant and labels are precise. However, these models often perform poorly on out-of-domain images. To mitigate the shift in the input, image-to-image approaches can be used. Nevertheless, standard image-to-image approaches that bridge the domain of deployment with the synthetic training domain do not focus on the downstream task but only on the visual inspection level. We therefore propose a "task aware" version of a GAN in an image-to-image domain adaptation approach. With the help of a small amount of labeled ground truth data, we guide the image-to-image translation to a more suitable input image for a semantic segmentation network trained on synthetic data (synthetic-domain expert). The main contributions of this work are 1) a modular semi-supervised domain adaptation method for semantic segmentation by training a downstream task aware CycleGAN while refraining from adapting the synthetic semantic segmentation expert 2) the demonstration that the method is applicable to complex domain adaptation tasks and 3) a less biased domain gap analysis by using from scratch networks. We evaluate our method on a classification task as well as on semantic segmentation. Our experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms CycleGAN - a standard image-to-image approach - by 7 percent points in accuracy in a classification task using only 70 (10%) ground truth images. For semantic segmentation we can show an improvement of about 4 to 7 percent points in mean Intersection over union on the Cityscapes evaluation dataset with only 14 ground truth images during training.
abstract_zh: 域适应引起了人们的极大兴趣，因为标记是一项昂贵且容易出错的任务，尤其是当需要在像素级（例如语义分割）上进行标记时。因此，人们希望能够在数据丰富且标签精确的合成域上训练神经网络。然而，这些模型通常在域外图像上表现不佳。为了减轻输入的变化，可以使用图像到图像的方法。然而，将部署领域与合成训练领域联系起来的标准图像到图像方法并不关注下游任务，而只关注视觉检查级别。因此，我们在图像到图像域适应方法中提出了 GAN 的“任务感知”版本。在少量标记的地面实况数据的帮助下，我们将图像到图像的转换引导为更合适的输入图像，用于在合成数据（合成领域专家）上训练的语义分割网络。这项工作的主要贡献是 1) 通过训练下游任务感知 CycleGAN，同时避免适应合成语义分割专家，提出了一种用于语义分割的模块化半监督域适应方法 2) 证明该方法适用于复杂的域适应任务 3) 通过从头开始使用网络进行偏差较小的域差距分析。我们在分类任务和语义分割上评估我们的方法。我们的实验表明，在仅使用 70 (10%) 个地面真实图像的分类任务中，我们的方法比 CycleGAN（一种标准图像到图像方法）的准确率高出 7 个百分点。对于语义分割，我们可以发现在训练期间仅使用 14 个地面实况图像的 Cityscapes 评估数据集上，平均交集比并集提高了约 4 到 7 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务感知的半监督域适应方法，通过CycleGAN结合下游任务损失函数，提升合成数据训练的语义分割模型在真实场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 标注像素级数据成本高昂且易出错，现有域适应方法仅关注视觉层面而忽视下游任务（如语义分割）需求，导致模型在真实场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计任务感知的CycleGAN框架，在图像翻译过程中引入少量真实标注数据指导生成，使合成数据更适配语义分割模型，同时保持合成域专家模型不变。
AI.result: 在分类任务中使用70张标注图像时准确率提升7个百分点；在Cityscapes数据集的语义分割任务中，仅用14张标注图像即可使平均IoU提升4-7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过任务驱动的域适应有效缩小域差距，在减少标注依赖的同时显著提升模型性能，验证了任务感知框架在复杂域适应场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Jae-Hun So,Jérôme Szewczyk,Brahim Tamadazte
title: Automatic laser steering for middle ear surgery
title_zh: 用于中耳手术的自动激光转向
abstract: This paper deals with the control of laser spot in the context of minimally invasive surgery of the middle ear, e.g., cholesteatoma removal. More precisely, our work is concerned with the exhaustive burring of residual infected cells after primary mechanical resection of the pathological tissues since the latter cannot guarantee the treatment of all the infected tissues, the remaining infected cells cause regeneration of the diseases in 20%-25\-% of cases, which require a second surgery 12-18 months later. To tackle such a complex surgery, we have developed a robotic platform that consists of the combination of a macro-scale system (7 degrees of freedom (DoFs) robotic arm) and a micro-scale flexible system (2 DoFs) which operates inside the middle ear cavity. To be able to treat the residual cholesteatoma regions, we proposed a method to automatically generate optimal laser scanning trajectories inside the regions and between them. The trajectories are tacked using an image-based control scheme. The proposed method and materials were validated experimentally using the lab-made robotic platform. The obtained results in terms of accuracy and behaviour meet perfectly the laser surgery requirements.
summary: This paper deals with the control of laser spot in the context of minimally invasive surgery of the middle ear, e.g., cholesteatoma removal. More precisely, our work is concerned with the exhaustive burring of residual infected cells after primary mechanical resection of the pathological tissues since the latter cannot guarantee the treatment of all the infected tissues, the remaining infected cells cause regeneration of the diseases in 20%-25\-% of cases, which require a second surgery 12-18 months later. To tackle such a complex surgery, we have developed a robotic platform that consists of the combination of a macro-scale system (7 degrees of freedom (DoFs) robotic arm) and a micro-scale flexible system (2 DoFs) which operates inside the middle ear cavity. To be able to treat the residual cholesteatoma regions, we proposed a method to automatically generate optimal laser scanning trajectories inside the regions and between them. The trajectories are tacked using an image-based control scheme. The proposed method and materials were validated experimentally using the lab-made robotic platform. The obtained results in terms of accuracy and behaviour meet perfectly the laser surgery requirements.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了中耳微创手术（例如胆脂瘤切除术）中激光光斑的控制。更准确地说，我们的工作涉及对病理组织进行初次机械切除后残留感染细胞的彻底去毛刺，因为后者不能保证所有感染组织的治疗，剩余感染细胞在20%-25\-%的病例中导致疾病再生，需要12-18个月后进行第二次手术。为了解决如此复杂的手术，我们开发了一个机器人平台，该平台由宏观系统（7个自由度（DoF）机械臂）和在中耳腔内运行的微观柔性系统（2个自由度）组合而成。为了能够治疗残留的胆脂瘤区域，我们提出了一种自动生成区域内部和区域之间的最佳激光扫描轨迹的方法。使用基于图像的控制方案来追踪轨迹。使用实验室制造的机器人平台对所提出的方法和材料进行了实验验证。所获得的结果在准确性和行为方面完全满足激光手术的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于中耳手术的自动激光定位系统，旨在通过机器人平台精确清除残留的感染细胞。
AI.motivation: 传统中耳手术后20%-25%的病例因残留感染细胞导致疾病复发，需二次手术，亟需更精准的治疗方案。
AI.method: 开发结合7自由度机械臂与2自由度微型柔性系统的机器人平台，基于图像的控制方案生成优化激光扫描路径。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该方法在精度和行为表现上完全满足激光手术要求。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效解决了残留感染细胞的清除问题，提升了中耳手术的精确性和治疗效果。

result: 实验验证表明，该方法在精度和行为表现上完全满足激光手术要求。
conclusion: 该系统有效解决了残留感染细胞的清除问题，提升了中耳手术的精确性和治疗效果。
search_text: Automatic laser steering for middle ear surgery 用于中耳手术的自动激光转向 This paper deals with the control of laser spot in the context of minimally invasive surgery of the middle ear, e.g., cholesteatoma removal. More precisely, our work is concerned with the exhaustive burring of residual infected cells after primary mechanical resection of the pathological tissues since the latter cannot guarantee the treatment of all the infected tissues, the remaining infected cells cause regeneration of the diseases in 20%-25\-% of cases, which require a second surgery 12-18 months later. To tackle such a complex surgery, we have developed a robotic platform that consists of the combination of a macro-scale system (7 degrees of freedom (DoFs) robotic arm) and a micro-scale flexible system (2 DoFs) which operates inside the middle ear cavity. To be able to treat the residual cholesteatoma regions, we proposed a method to automatically generate optimal laser scanning trajectories inside the regions and between them. The trajectories are tacked using an image-based control scheme. The proposed method and materials were validated experimentally using the lab-made robotic platform. The obtained results in terms of accuracy and behaviour meet perfectly the laser surgery requirements. 本文讨论了中耳微创手术（例如胆脂瘤切除术）中激光光斑的控制。更准确地说，我们的工作涉及对病理组织进行初次机械切除后残留感染细胞的彻底去毛刺，因为后者不能保证所有感染组织的治疗，剩余感染细胞在20%-25\-%的病例中导致疾病再生，需要12-18个月后进行第二次手术。为了解决如此复杂的手术，我们开发了一个机器人平台，该平台由宏观系统（7个自由度（DoF）机械臂）和在中耳腔内运行的微观柔性系统（2个自由度）组合而成。为了能够治疗残留的胆脂瘤区域，我们提出了一种自动生成区域内部和区域之间的最佳激光扫描轨迹的方法。使用基于图像的控制方案来追踪轨迹。使用实验室制造的机器人平台对所提出的方法和材料进行了实验验证。所获得的结果在准确性和行为方面完全满足激光手术的要求。 本文提出了一种用于中耳手术的自动激光定位系统，旨在通过机器人平台精确清除残留的感染细胞。 Jae-Hun So,Jérôme Szewczyk,Brahim Tamadazte cs.RO,eess.IV

authors_text: Stefan Thalhammer,Timothy Patten,Markus Vincze
title: COPE: End-to-end trainable Constant Runtime Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: COPE：端到端可训练恒定运行时物体姿态估计
abstract: State-of-the-art object pose estimation handles multiple instances in a test image by using multi-model formulations: detection as a first stage and then separately trained networks per object for 2D-3D geometric correspondence prediction as a second stage. Poses are subsequently estimated using the Perspective-n-Points algorithm at runtime. Unfortunately, multi-model formulations are slow and do not scale well with the number of object instances involved. Recent approaches show that direct 6D object pose estimation is feasible when derived from the aforementioned geometric correspondences. We present an approach that learns an intermediate geometric representation of multiple objects to directly regress 6D poses of all instances in a test image. The inherent end-to-end trainability overcomes the requirement of separately processing individual object instances. By calculating the mutual Intersection-over-Unions, pose hypotheses are clustered into distinct instances, which achieves negligible runtime overhead with respect to the number of object instances. Results on multiple challenging standard datasets show that the pose estimation performance is superior to single-model state-of-the-art approaches despite being more than ~35 times faster. We additionally provide an analysis showing real-time applicability (>24 fps) for images where more than 90 object instances are present. Further results show the advantage of supervising geometric-correspondence-based object pose estimation with the 6D pose.
summary: State-of-the-art object pose estimation handles multiple instances in a test image by using multi-model formulations: detection as a first stage and then separately trained networks per object for 2D-3D geometric correspondence prediction as a second stage. Poses are subsequently estimated using the Perspective-n-Points algorithm at runtime. Unfortunately, multi-model formulations are slow and do not scale well with the number of object instances involved. Recent approaches show that direct 6D object pose estimation is feasible when derived from the aforementioned geometric correspondences. We present an approach that learns an intermediate geometric representation of multiple objects to directly regress 6D poses of all instances in a test image. The inherent end-to-end trainability overcomes the requirement of separately processing individual object instances. By calculating the mutual Intersection-over-Unions, pose hypotheses are clustered into distinct instances, which achieves negligible runtime overhead with respect to the number of object instances. Results on multiple challenging standard datasets show that the pose estimation performance is superior to single-model state-of-the-art approaches despite being more than ~35 times faster. We additionally provide an analysis showing real-time applicability (>24 fps) for images where more than 90 object instances are present. Further results show the advantage of supervising geometric-correspondence-based object pose estimation with the 6D pose.
abstract_zh: 最先进的对象姿态估计通过使用多模型公式来处理测试图像中的多个实例：检测作为第一阶段，然后为每个对象单独训练网络以进行 2D-3D 几何对应预测作为第二阶段。随后在运行时使用 Perspective-n-Points 算法估计姿势。不幸的是，多模型公式很慢，并且不能很好地随着涉及的对象实例的数量而扩展。最近的方法表明，当从上述几何对应关系导出时，直接 6D 物体姿态估计是可行的。我们提出了一种学习多个对象的中间几何表示的方法，以直接回归测试图像中所有实例的 6D 姿态。固有的端到端可训练性克服了单独处理单个对象实例的要求。通过计算相互交并，姿势假设被聚类到不同的实例中，这使得相对于对象实例的数量而言，运行时开销可以忽略不计。多个具有挑战性的标准数据集的结果表明，姿态估计性能优于单模型最先进的方法，尽管速度快了约 35 倍以上。我们还提供了一项分析，显示存在超过 90 个对象实例的图像的实时适用性 (>24 fps)。进一步的结果显示了使用 6D 位姿监督基于几何对应的对象位姿估计的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COPE方法，通过端到端训练直接回归测试图像中所有物体实例的6D姿态，解决传统多模型方法速度慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模型的物体姿态估计方法需分阶段处理，导致计算速度慢且难以扩展，无法满足实时需求。
AI.method: 学习多物体的中间几何表示，直接回归6D姿态；通过计算互交并集（IoU）聚类姿态假设，实现常数时间运行。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上优于单模型方法，速度提升35倍以上，支持24fps实时处理超90个物体实例。
AI.conclusion: COPE通过端到端几何表示学习和高效聚类，实现了更优的实时6D姿态估计性能。

authors_text: Daphne Cornelisse,Thomas Rood,Mateusz Malinowski,Yoram Bachrach,Tal Kachman
title: Neural Payoff Machines: Predicting Fair and Stable Payoff Allocations Among Team Members
title_zh: 神经支付机器：预测团队成员之间公平稳定的支付分配
abstract: In many multi-agent settings, participants can form teams to achieve collective outcomes that may far surpass their individual capabilities. Measuring the relative contributions of agents and allocating them shares of the reward that promote long-lasting cooperation are difficult tasks. Cooperative game theory offers solution concepts identifying distribution schemes, such as the Shapley value, that fairly reflect the contribution of individuals to the performance of the team or the Core, which reduces the incentive of agents to abandon their team. Applications of such methods include identifying influential features and sharing the costs of joint ventures or team formation. Unfortunately, using these solutions requires tackling a computational barrier as they are hard to compute, even in restricted settings. In this work, we show how cooperative game-theoretic solutions can be distilled into a learned model by training neural networks to propose fair and stable payoff allocations. We show that our approach creates models that can generalize to games far from the training distribution and can predict solutions for more players than observed during training. An important application of our framework is Explainable AI: our approach can be used to speed-up Shapley value computations on many instances.
summary: In many multi-agent settings, participants can form teams to achieve collective outcomes that may far surpass their individual capabilities. Measuring the relative contributions of agents and allocating them shares of the reward that promote long-lasting cooperation are difficult tasks. Cooperative game theory offers solution concepts identifying distribution schemes, such as the Shapley value, that fairly reflect the contribution of individuals to the performance of the team or the Core, which reduces the incentive of agents to abandon their team. Applications of such methods include identifying influential features and sharing the costs of joint ventures or team formation. Unfortunately, using these solutions requires tackling a computational barrier as they are hard to compute, even in restricted settings. In this work, we show how cooperative game-theoretic solutions can be distilled into a learned model by training neural networks to propose fair and stable payoff allocations. We show that our approach creates models that can generalize to games far from the training distribution and can predict solutions for more players than observed during training. An important application of our framework is Explainable AI: our approach can be used to speed-up Shapley value computations on many instances.
abstract_zh: 在许多多主体环境中，参与者可以组成团队来实现可能远远超出其个人能力的集体成果。衡量代理人的相对贡献并为他们分配促进长期合作的奖励份额是一项艰巨的任务。合作博弈论提供了识别分配方案的解决方案概念，例如沙普利值，它公平地反映了个人对团队或核心绩效的贡献，从而减少了代理人放弃团队的动机。此类方法的应用包括识别有影响力的特征以及分担合资企业或团队组建的成本。不幸的是，使用这些解决方案需要解决计算障碍，因为即使在受限的设置下，它们也很难计算。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何通过训练神经网络来提出公平和稳定的收益分配，将合作博弈论解决方案提炼成学习模型。我们表明，我们的方法创建的模型可以推广到远离训练分布的游戏，并且可以预测比训练期间观察到的更多玩家的解决方案。我们框架的一个重要应用是可解释的人工智能：我们的方法可用于加速许多实例上的 Shapley 值计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的模型，用于预测团队成员之间公平且稳定的收益分配方案，结合合作博弈论中的核心概念如夏普利值和核心解。
AI.motivation: 传统合作博弈论中的收益分配方法（如夏普利值）计算复杂度高，难以应用于大规模或动态场景，需寻找高效且可解释的替代方案。
AI.method: 训练神经网络学习合作博弈论的分配规则，通过大量游戏数据拟合公平稳定的收益分配模式，并验证模型在未见过的场景和更大规模玩家中的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型能有效泛化到训练数据外的游戏场景，支持比训练时更多玩家的分配预测，显著加速夏普利值计算，适用于可解释AI领域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为合作博弈论的计算难题提供了可扩展的神经网络解决方案，同时推动了公平性与可解释性在多智能体系统中的应用。

In this work, we show how cooperative game-theoretic solutions can be distilled into a learned model by training neural networks to propose fair and stable payoff allocations. We show that our approach creates models that can generalize to games far from the training distribution and can predict solutions for more players than observed during training. An important application of our framework is Explainable AI: our approach can be used to speed-up Shapley value computations on many instances. 在许多多主体环境中，参与者可以组成团队来实现可能远远超出其个人能力的集体成果。衡量代理人的相对贡献并为他们分配促进长期合作的奖励份额是一项艰巨的任务。合作博弈论提供了识别分配方案的解决方案概念，例如沙普利值，它公平地反映了个人对团队或核心绩效的贡献，从而减少了代理人放弃团队的动机。此类方法的应用包括识别有影响力的特征以及分担合资企业或团队组建的成本。不幸的是，使用这些解决方案需要解决计算障碍，因为即使在受限的设置下，它们也很难计算。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何通过训练神经网络来提出公平和稳定的收益分配，将合作博弈论解决方案提炼成学习模型。我们表明，我们的方法创建的模型可以推广到远离训练分布的游戏，并且可以预测比训练期间观察到的更多玩家的解决方案。我们框架的一个重要应用是可解释的人工智能：我们的方法可用于加速许多实例上的 Shapley 值计算。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的模型，用于预测团队成员之间公平且稳定的收益分配方案，结合合作博弈论中的核心概念如夏普利值和核心解。 Daphne Cornelisse,Thomas Rood,Mateusz Malinowski,Yoram Bachrach,Tal Kachman cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.MA,econ.TH

authors_text: Jingtao Li,Jian Zhou,Yan Xiong,Xing Chen,Chaitali Chakrabarti
title: An Adjustable Farthest Point Sampling Method for Approximately-sorted Point Cloud Data
title_zh: 近似排序点云数据的可调最远点采样方法
abstract: Sampling is an essential part of raw point cloud data processing such as in the popular PointNet++ scheme. Farthest Point Sampling (FPS), which iteratively samples the farthest point and performs distance updating, is one of the most popular sampling schemes. Unfortunately it suffers from low efficiency and can become the bottleneck of point cloud applications. We propose adjustable FPS (AFPS), parameterized by M, to aggressively reduce the complexity of FPS without compromising on the sampling performance. Specifically, it divides the original point cloud into M small point clouds and samples M points simultaneously. It exploits the dimensional locality of an approximately sorted point cloud data to minimize its performance degradation. AFPS method can achieve 22 to 30x speedup over original FPS. Furthermore, we propose the nearest-point-distance-updating (NPDU) method to limit the number of distance updates to a constant number. The combined NPDU on AFPS method can achieve a 34-280x speedup on a point cloud with 2K-32K points with algorithmic performance that is comparable to the original FPS. For instance, for the ShapeNet part segmentation task, it achieves 0.8490 instance average mIoU (mean Intersection of Union), which is only 0.0035 drop compared to the original FPS.
summary: Sampling is an essential part of raw point cloud data processing such as in the popular PointNet++ scheme. Farthest Point Sampling (FPS), which iteratively samples the farthest point and performs distance updating, is one of the most popular sampling schemes. Unfortunately it suffers from low efficiency and can become the bottleneck of point cloud applications. We propose adjustable FPS (AFPS), parameterized by M, to aggressively reduce the complexity of FPS without compromising on the sampling performance. Specifically, it divides the original point cloud into M small point clouds and samples M points simultaneously. It exploits the dimensional locality of an approximately sorted point cloud data to minimize its performance degradation. AFPS method can achieve 22 to 30x speedup over original FPS. Furthermore, we propose the nearest-point-distance-updating (NPDU) method to limit the number of distance updates to a constant number. The combined NPDU on AFPS method can achieve a 34-280x speedup on a point cloud with 2K-32K points with algorithmic performance that is comparable to the original FPS. For instance, for the ShapeNet part segmentation task, it achieves 0.8490 instance average mIoU (mean Intersection of Union), which is only 0.0035 drop compared to the original FPS.
abstract_zh: 采样是原始点云数据处理的重要组成部分，例如在流行的 PointNet++ 方案中。最远点采样（FPS）是最流行的采样方案之一，它迭代地采样最远点并执行距离更新。不幸的是，它效率低下，可能成为点云应用的瓶颈。我们提出了可调节 FPS（AFPS），由 M 参数化，以在不影响采样性能的情况下大幅降低 FPS 的复杂性。具体来说，它将原始点云划分为M个小点云，同时对M个点进行采样。它利用近似排序的点云数据的维度局部性来最大限度地减少其性能下降。 AFPS 方法可以比原始 FPS 实现 22 至 30 倍的加速。此外，我们提出了最近点距离更新（NPDU）方法，将距离更新的数量限制为恒定数量。组合的 NPDU on AFPS 方法可以在 2K-32K 点的点云上实现 34-280 倍的加速，算法性能与原始 FPS 相当。例如，对于 ShapeNet 零件分割任务，它实现了 0.8490 实例平均 mIoU（并集平均交集），与原始 FPS 相比仅下降了 0.0035。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可调节的最远点采样方法（AFPS），用于提高近似排序点云数据处理的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统最远点采样（FPS）方法效率低下，成为点云应用的瓶颈，需在不牺牲采样性能的前提下提升效率。
AI.method: 通过参数M将点云划分为M个小点云并同时采样，结合最近点距离更新（NPDU）方法减少距离计算次数。
AI.result: AFPS在2K-32K点云上实现34-280倍加速，ShapeNet分割任务mIoU仅下降0.0035（达0.8490）。
AI.conclusion: AFPS在保持采样性能的同时显著提升效率，适用于大规模点云处理场景。

authors_text: Satyam Kumar,Mendhikar Vishal,Vadlamani Ravi
title: Explainable Reinforcement Learning on Financial Stock Trading using SHAP
title_zh: 使用 SHAP 进行金融股票交易的可解释强化学习
abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) research gained prominence in recent years in response to the demand for greater transparency and trust in AI from the user communities. This is especially critical because AI is adopted in sensitive fields such as finance, medicine etc., where implications for society, ethics, and safety are immense. Following thorough systematic evaluations, work in XAI has primarily focused on Machine Learning (ML) for categorization, decision, or action. To the best of our knowledge, no work is reported that offers an Explainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) method for trading financial stocks. In this paper, we proposed to employ SHapley Additive exPlanation (SHAP) on a popular deep reinforcement learning architecture viz., deep Q network (DQN) to explain an action of an agent at a given instance in financial stock trading. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we tested it on two popular datasets namely, SENSEX and DJIA, and reported the results.
summary: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) research gained prominence in recent years in response to the demand for greater transparency and trust in AI from the user communities. This is especially critical because AI is adopted in sensitive fields such as finance, medicine etc., where implications for society, ethics, and safety are immense. Following thorough systematic evaluations, work in XAI has primarily focused on Machine Learning (ML) for categorization, decision, or action. To the best of our knowledge, no work is reported that offers an Explainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) method for trading financial stocks. In this paper, we proposed to employ SHapley Additive exPlanation (SHAP) on a popular deep reinforcement learning architecture viz., deep Q network (DQN) to explain an action of an agent at a given instance in financial stock trading. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we tested it on two popular datasets namely, SENSEX and DJIA, and reported the results.
abstract_zh: 近年来，为了满足用户社区对人工智能更高透明度和信任的需求，可解释人工智能 (XAI) 研究受到重视。这一点尤其重要，因为人工智能被应用于金融、医学等敏感领域，这些领域对社会、道德和安全的影响是巨大的。经过彻底的系统评估后，XAI 的工作主要集中在用于分类、决策或行动的机器学习 (ML)。据我们所知，还没有报道提供可解释的强化学习（XRL）方法来交易金融股票。在本文中，我们建议在流行的深度强化学习架构（即深度 Q 网络（DQN））上采用 SHapley Additive exPlanation（SHAP）来解释金融股票交易中给定实例的代理行为。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在两个流行的数据集（SENSEX 和 DJIA）上进行了测试，并报告了结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将SHAP方法应用于深度Q网络（DQN），以在金融股票交易中解释强化学习代理的决策行为。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在金融等敏感领域的应用增加，透明性和可解释性需求提升，但现有研究缺乏针对金融股票交易的可解释强化学习方法。
AI.method: 采用SHapley Additive exPlanation（SHAP）框架，结合深度Q网络（DQN）架构，对股票交易中的智能体动作进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: 在SENSEX和DJIA两个数据集上验证了方法有效性，成功解释了强化学习模型在股票交易中的决策过程。
AI.conclusion: SHAP与DQN的结合为金融交易中的强化学习决策提供了有效的可解释性方案，有助于提升模型透明度和用户信任。

authors_text: Linhao Qu,Siyu Liu,Xiaoyu Liu,Manning Wang,Zhijian Song
title: Towards Label-efficient Automatic Diagnosis and Analysis: A Comprehensive Survey of Advanced Deep Learning-based Weakly-supervised, Semi-supervised and Self-supervised Techniques in Histopathological Image Analysis
title_zh: 迈向标签高效的自动诊断和分析：组织病理学图像分析中基于先进深度学习的弱监督、半监督和自监督技术的综合综述
comment: Comprehensive survey for Weakly-supervised, Semi-supervised and Self-supervised Techniques in Histopathological Image Analysis (total of 212 references)
comments: Comprehensive survey for Weakly-supervised, Semi-supervised and Self-supervised Techniques in Histopathological Image Analysis (total of 212 references)
abstract: Histopathological images contain abundant phenotypic information and pathological patterns, which are the gold standards for disease diagnosis and essential for the prediction of patient prognosis and treatment outcome. In recent years, computer-automated analysis techniques for histopathological images have been urgently required in clinical practice, and deep learning methods represented by convolutional neural networks have gradually become the mainstream in the field of digital pathology. However, obtaining large numbers of fine-grained annotated data in this field is a very expensive and difficult task, which hinders the further development of traditional supervised algorithms based on large numbers of annotated data. More recent studies have started to liberate from the traditional supervised paradigm, and the most representative ones are the studies on weakly supervised learning paradigm based on weak annotation, semi-supervised learning paradigm based on limited annotation, and self-supervised learning paradigm based on pathological image representation learning. These new methods have led a new wave of automatic pathological image diagnosis and analysis targeted at annotation efficiency. With a survey of over 130 papers, we present a comprehensive and systematic review of the latest studies on weakly supervised learning, semi-supervised learning, and self-supervised learning in the field of computational pathology from both technical and methodological perspectives. Finally, we present the key challenges and future trends for these techniques.

However, obtaining large numbers of fine-grained annotated data in this field is a very expensive and difficult task, which hinders the further development of traditional supervised algorithms based on large numbers of annotated data. More recent studies have started to liberate from the traditional supervised paradigm, and the most representative ones are the studies on weakly supervised learning paradigm based on weak annotation, semi-supervised learning paradigm based on limited annotation, and self-supervised learning paradigm based on pathological image representation learning. These new methods have led a new wave of automatic pathological image diagnosis and analysis targeted at annotation efficiency. With a survey of over 130 papers, we present a comprehensive and systematic review of the latest studies on weakly supervised learning, semi-supervised learning, and self-supervised learning in the field of computational pathology from both technical and methodological perspectives. Finally, we present the key challenges and future trends for these techniques.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学图像包含丰富的表型信息和病理模式，是疾病诊断的金标准，对于预测患者预后和治疗结果至关重要。近年来，临床实践迫切需要组织病理图像的计算机自动化分析技术，以卷积神经网络为代表的深度学习方法逐渐成为数字病理领域的主流。然而，在该领域获取大量细粒度的标注数据是一项非常昂贵且困难的任务，这阻碍了基于大量标注数据的传统监督算法的进一步发展。最近的研究开始从传统的监督范式中解放出来，最具代表性的是基于弱标注的弱监督学习范式、基于有限标注的半监督学习范式、基于病理图像表示学习的自监督学习范式的研究。这些新方法引领了以标注效率为目标的自动病理图像诊断和分析的新浪潮。我们通过对 130 多篇论文的调查，从技术和方法论角度对计算病理学领域弱监督学习、半监督学习和自监督学习的最新研究进行了全面、系统的回顾。最后，我们提出了这些技术的主要挑战和未来趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在组织病理学图像分析中，针对标注效率的弱监督、半监督和自监督深度学习技术。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像的精细标注数据获取成本高且困难，传统监督学习方法受此限制，亟需更高效的标注方法。
AI.method: 系统回顾了130余篇论文，从技术和方法论角度分析弱监督、半监督及自监督学习在计算病理学中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了当前三种学习范式的最新研究进展，并指出了其在实际应用中的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步优化算法以提升标注效率，并解决数据异质性、模型可解释性等核心问题。

search_text: Towards Label-efficient Automatic Diagnosis and Analysis: A Comprehensive Survey of Advanced Deep Learning-based Weakly-supervised, Semi-supervised and Self-supervised Techniques in Histopathological Image Analysis 迈向标签高效的自动诊断和分析：组织病理学图像分析中基于先进深度学习的弱监督、半监督和自监督技术的综合综述 Histopathological images contain abundant phenotypic information and pathological patterns, which are the gold standards for disease diagnosis and essential for the prediction of patient prognosis and treatment outcome. In recent years, computer-automated analysis techniques for histopathological images have been urgently required in clinical practice, and deep learning methods represented by convolutional neural networks have gradually become the mainstream in the field of digital pathology. However, obtaining large numbers of fine-grained annotated data in this field is a very expensive and difficult task, which hinders the further development of traditional supervised algorithms based on large numbers of annotated data. More recent studies have started to liberate from the traditional supervised paradigm, and the most representative ones are the studies on weakly supervised learning paradigm based on weak annotation, semi-supervised learning paradigm based on limited annotation, and self-supervised learning paradigm based on pathological image representation learning. These new methods have led a new wave of automatic pathological image diagnosis and analysis targeted at annotation efficiency. With a survey of over 130 papers, we present a comprehensive and systematic review of the latest studies on weakly supervised learning, semi-supervised learning, and self-supervised learning in the field of computational pathology from both technical and methodological perspectives. Finally, we present the key challenges and future trends for these techniques. 组织病理学图像包含丰富的表型信息和病理模式，是疾病诊断的金标准，对于预测患者预后和治疗结果至关重要。近年来，临床实践迫切需要组织病理图像的计算机自动化分析技术，以卷积神经网络为代表的深度学习方法逐渐成为数字病理领域的主流。然而，在该领域获取大量细粒度的标注数据是一项非常昂贵且困难的任务，这阻碍了基于大量标注数据的传统监督算法的进一步发展。最近的研究开始从传统的监督范式中解放出来，最具代表性的是基于弱标注的弱监督学习范式、基于有限标注的半监督学习范式、基于病理图像表示学习的自监督学习范式的研究。这些新方法引领了以标注效率为目标的自动病理图像诊断和分析的新浪潮。我们通过对 130 多篇论文的调查，从技术和方法论角度对计算病理学领域弱监督学习、半监督学习和自监督学习的最新研究进行了全面、系统的回顾。最后，我们提出了这些技术的主要挑战和未来趋势。 本文综述了在组织病理学图像分析中，针对标注效率的弱监督、半监督和自监督深度学习技术。 Linhao Qu,Siyu Liu,Xiaoyu Liu,Manning Wang,Zhijian Song cs.CV

authors_text: Marius Appel
title: Efficient data-driven gap filling of satellite image time series using deep neural networks with partial convolutions
title_zh: 使用具有部分卷积的深度神经网络对卫星图像时间序列进行有效的数据驱动间隙填充
comment: This work has not yet been peer-reviewed and is provided by the contributing author(s) as a means to ensure timely dissemination of scholarly and technical work on a noncommercial basis
comments: This work has not yet been peer-reviewed and is provided by the contributing author(s) as a means to ensure timely dissemination of scholarly and technical work on a noncommercial basis
abstract: The abundance of gaps in satellite image time series often complicates the application of deep learning models such as convolutional neural networks for spatiotemporal modeling. Based on previous work in computer vision on image inpainting, this paper shows how three-dimensional spatiotemporal partial convolutions can be used as layers in neural networks to fill gaps in satellite image time series. To evaluate the approach, we apply a U-Net-like model on incomplete image time series of quasi-global carbon monoxide observations from the Sentinel-5P satellite. Prediction errors were comparable to two considered statistical approaches while computation times for predictions were up to three orders of magnitude faster, making the approach applicable to process large amounts of satellite data. Partial convolutions can be added as layers to other types of neural networks, making it relatively easy to integrate with existing deep learning models. However, the approach does not quantify prediction errors and further research is needed to understand and improve model transferability. The implementation of spatiotemporal partial convolutions and the U-Net-like model is available as open-source software.
summary: The abundance of gaps in satellite image time series often complicates the application of deep learning models such as convolutional neural networks for spatiotemporal modeling. Based on previous work in computer vision on image inpainting, this paper shows how three-dimensional spatiotemporal partial convolutions can be used as layers in neural networks to fill gaps in satellite image time series. To evaluate the approach, we apply a U-Net-like model on incomplete image time series of quasi-global carbon monoxide observations from the Sentinel-5P satellite. Prediction errors were comparable to two considered statistical approaches while computation times for predictions were up to three orders of magnitude faster, making the approach applicable to process large amounts of satellite data. Partial convolutions can be added as layers to other types of neural networks, making it relatively easy to integrate with existing deep learning models. However, the approach does not quantify prediction errors and further research is needed to understand and improve model transferability. The implementation of spatiotemporal partial convolutions and the U-Net-like model is available as open-source software.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像时间序列中的大量间隙通常使深度学习模型（例如用于时空建模的卷积神经网络）的应用变得复杂。基于计算机视觉中图像修复的先前工作，本文展示了如何将三维时空部分卷积用作神经网络中的层来填补卫星图像时间序列中的空白。为了评估该方法，我们对 Sentinel-5P 卫星的准全球一氧化碳观测的不完整图像时间序列应用了类似 U-Net 的模型。预测误差与两种考虑的统计方法相当，而预测的计算时间快了三个数量级，使得该方法适用于处理大量卫星数据。部分卷积可以作为层添加到其他类型的神经网络中，从而相对容易地与现有深度学习模型集成。然而，该方法不能量化预测误差，需要进一步研究来理解和提高模型的可迁移性。时空部分卷积和类 U-Net 模型的实现可作为开源软件获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用三维时空部分卷积层的神经网络模型，解决卫星图像时间序列中的数据缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像时间序列存在大量缺失值，传统深度学习模型难以处理，且统计方法计算效率低。
AI.method: 基于图像修复技术，设计包含三维时空部分卷积层的U-Net类似模型，利用Sentinel-5P卫星的二氧化碳观测数据进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 预测误差与统计方法相当，但计算速度提升至三阶数量级；模型可集成至其他神经网络，但未量化预测误差且需进一步研究可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 部分卷积有效提升数据填补效率，开源实现便于应用，但需改进误差评估与模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Oren Shrout,Yizhak Ben-Shabat,Ayellet Tal
title: GraVoS: Voxel Selection for 3D Point-Cloud Detection
title_zh: GraVoS：用于 3D 点云检测的体素选择
abstract: 3D object detection within large 3D scenes is challenging not only due to the sparsity and irregularity of 3D point clouds, but also due to both the extreme foreground-background scene imbalance and class imbalance. A common approach is to add ground-truth objects from other scenes. Differently, we propose to modify the scenes by removing elements (voxels), rather than adding ones. Our approach selects the "meaningful" voxels, in a manner that addresses both types of dataset imbalance. The approach is general and can be applied to any voxel-based detector, yet the meaningfulness of a voxel is network-dependent. Our voxel selection is shown to improve the performance of several prominent 3D detection methods.
summary: 3D object detection within large 3D scenes is challenging not only due to the sparsity and irregularity of 3D point clouds, but also due to both the extreme foreground-background scene imbalance and class imbalance. A common approach is to add ground-truth objects from other scenes. Differently, we propose to modify the scenes by removing elements (voxels), rather than adding ones. Our approach selects the "meaningful" voxels, in a manner that addresses both types of dataset imbalance. The approach is general and can be applied to any voxel-based detector, yet the meaningfulness of a voxel is network-dependent. Our voxel selection is shown to improve the performance of several prominent 3D detection methods.
abstract_zh: 大型 3D 场景中的 3D 对象检测具有挑战性，不仅因为 3D 点云的稀疏性和不规则性，还因为极端的前景-背景场景不平衡和类别不平衡。一种常见的方法是添加其他场景中的真实对象。不同的是，我们建议通过删除元素（体素）而不是添加元素来修改场景。我们的方法以解决两种类型的数据集不平衡的方式选择“有意义的”体素。该方法是通用的，可以应用于任何基于体素的检测器，但体素的意义是依赖于网络的。我们的体素选择被证明可以提高几种著名 3D 检测方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GraVoS的体素选择方法，通过移除3D点云中的冗余体素来解决目标检测中的场景不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过添加其他场景的真实对象来缓解数据不平衡，但本文认为移除无意义体素能更高效地解决前景-背景及类别不平衡问题。
AI.method: 设计网络依赖的体素选择机制，通过移除低信息量体素优化检测器输入，适用于任意基于体素的3D检测框架。
AI.result: 该方法在多个主流3D检测模型上均取得性能提升，有效缓解了数据集不平衡带来的检测偏差。
AI.conclusion: GraVoS通过精简输入体素提升了检测效率与准确性，为3D点云目标检测提供了通用的数据优化方案。
