conclusion: GraVoS通过精简输入体素提升了检测效率与准确性，为3D点云目标检测提供了通用的数据优化方案。
search_text: GraVoS: Voxel Selection for 3D Point-Cloud Detection GraVoS：用于 3D 点云检测的体素选择 3D object detection within large 3D scenes is challenging not only due to the sparsity and irregularity of 3D point clouds, but also due to both the extreme foreground-background scene imbalance and class imbalance. A common approach is to add ground-truth objects from other scenes. Differently, we propose to modify the scenes by removing elements (voxels), rather than adding ones. Our approach selects the "meaningful" voxels, in a manner that addresses both types of dataset imbalance. The approach is general and can be applied to any voxel-based detector, yet the meaningfulness of a voxel is network-dependent. Our voxel selection is shown to improve the performance of several prominent 3D detection methods. 大型 3D 场景中的 3D 对象检测具有挑战性，不仅因为 3D 点云的稀疏性和不规则性，还因为极端的前景-背景场景不平衡和类别不平衡。一种常见的方法是添加其他场景中的真实对象。不同的是，我们建议通过删除元素（体素）而不是添加元素来修改场景。我们的方法以解决两种类型的数据集不平衡的方式选择“有意义的”体素。该方法是通用的，可以应用于任何基于体素的检测器，但体素的意义是依赖于网络的。我们的体素选择被证明可以提高几种著名 3D 检测方法的性能。 本文提出一种名为GraVoS的体素选择方法，通过移除3D点云中的冗余体素来解决目标检测中的场景不平衡问题。 Oren Shrout,Yizhak Ben-Shabat,Ayellet Tal cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmet Serdar Karadeniz,Sk Aziz Ali,Anis Kacem,Elona Dupont,Djamila Aouada
title: TSCom-Net: Coarse-to-Fine 3D Textured Shape Completion Network
title_zh: TSCom-Net：从粗到细的 3D 纹理形状完成网络
comment: Accepted in European Conference on Computer Vision Workshop (ECCVW) 2022
comments: Accepted in European Conference on Computer Vision Workshop (ECCVW) 2022
abstract: Reconstructing 3D human body shapes from 3D partial textured scans remains a fundamental task for many computer vision and graphics applications -- e.g., body animation, and virtual dressing. We propose a new neural network architecture for 3D body shape and high-resolution texture completion -- BCom-Net -- that can reconstruct the full geometry from mid-level to high-level partial input scans. We decompose the overall reconstruction task into two stages - first, a joint implicit learning network (SCom-Net and TCom-Net) that takes a voxelized scan and its occupancy grid as input to reconstruct the full body shape and predict vertex textures. Second, a high-resolution texture completion network, that utilizes the predicted coarse vertex textures to inpaint the missing parts of the partial 'texture atlas'. A thorough experimental evaluation on 3DBodyTex.V2 dataset shows that our method achieves competitive results with respect to the state-of-the-art while generalizing to different types and levels of partial shapes. The proposed method has also ranked second in the track1 of SHApe Recovery from Partial textured 3D scans (SHARP [38,1]) 2022 challenge1.
summary: Reconstructing 3D human body shapes from 3D partial textured scans remains a fundamental task for many computer vision and graphics applications -- e.g., body animation, and virtual dressing. We propose a new neural network architecture for 3D body shape and high-resolution texture completion -- BCom-Net -- that can reconstruct the full geometry from mid-level to high-level partial input scans. We decompose the overall reconstruction task into two stages - first, a joint implicit learning network (SCom-Net and TCom-Net) that takes a voxelized scan and its occupancy grid as input to reconstruct the full body shape and predict vertex textures. Second, a high-resolution texture completion network, that utilizes the predicted coarse vertex textures to inpaint the missing parts of the partial 'texture atlas'. A thorough experimental evaluation on 3DBodyTex.V2 dataset shows that our method achieves competitive results with respect to the state-of-the-art while generalizing to different types and levels of partial shapes. The proposed method has also ranked second in the track1 of SHApe Recovery from Partial textured 3D scans (SHARP [38,1]) 2022 challenge1.
abstract_zh: 从 3D 部分纹理扫描重建 3D 人体形状仍然是许多计算机视觉和图形应用程序（例如身体动画和虚拟着装）的基本任务。我们提出了一种用于 3D 身体形状和高分辨率纹理完成的新神经网络架构 - BCom-Net - 可以重建从中级到高级部分输入扫描的完整几何结构。我们将整个重建任务分解为两个阶段 - 首先，联合隐式学习网络（SCom-Net 和 TCom-Net），以体素化扫描及其占用网格作为输入来重建全身形状并预测顶点纹理。其次，高分辨率纹理完成网络，利用预测的粗糙顶点纹理来修复部分“纹理图集”的缺失部分。对 3DBodyTex.V2 数据集的彻底实验评估表明，我们的方法在推广到不同类型和级别的部分形状的同时，取得了与最先进技术相比具有竞争力的结果。所提出的方法还在部分纹理 3D 扫描的 SHApe 恢复 (SHARP [38,1]) 2022 挑战 1 的 track1 中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BCom-Net的神经网络架构，用于从部分3D纹理扫描中重建完整的人体3D形状和高分辨率纹理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理不同类型和程度的缺失3D部分形状时泛化能力不足，需更鲁棒的重建方案以满足虚拟试衣等应用需求。
AI.method: 分两阶段完成：第一阶段通过联合隐式学习网络（SCom-Net和TCom-Net）输入体素化扫描及占用网格，重建完整形状并预测顶点纹理；第二阶段利用粗纹理结果对纹理图缺失区域进行修复。
AI.result: 在3DBodyTex.V2数据集上达到SOTA水平，且在SHARP 2022挑战赛Track1中排名第二，验证了方法对不同缺失程度的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BCom-Net通过粗到细的分阶段策略有效解决了部分3D纹理重建问题，为虚拟人像生成等应用提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Tommie Kerssies,Mert Kılıçkaya,Joaquin Vanschoren
title: Evaluating Continual Test-Time Adaptation for Contextual and Semantic Domain Shifts
title_zh: 评估上下文和语义域转换的持续测试时间适应
abstract: In this paper, our goal is to adapt a pre-trained convolutional neural network to domain shifts at test time. We do so continually with the incoming stream of test batches, without labels. The existing literature mostly operates on artificial shifts obtained via adversarial perturbations of a test image. Motivated by this, we evaluate the state of the art on two realistic and challenging sources of domain shifts, namely contextual and semantic shifts. Contextual shifts correspond to the environment types, for example, a model pre-trained on indoor context has to adapt to the outdoor context on CORe-50. Semantic shifts correspond to the capture types, for example a model pre-trained on natural images has to adapt to cliparts, sketches, and paintings on DomainNet. We include in our analysis recent techniques such as Prediction-Time Batch Normalization (BN), Test Entropy Minimization (TENT) and Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CoTTA). Our findings are three-fold: i) Test-time adaptation methods perform better and forget less on contextual shifts compared to semantic shifts, ii) TENT outperforms other methods on short-term adaptation, whereas CoTTA outpeforms other methods on long-term adaptation, iii) BN is most reliable and robust. Our code is available at https://github.com/tommiekerssies/Evaluating-Continual-Test-Time-Adaptation-for-Contextual-and-Semantic-Domain-Shifts.
summary: In this paper, our goal is to adapt a pre-trained convolutional neural network to domain shifts at test time. We do so continually with the incoming stream of test batches, without labels. The existing literature mostly operates on artificial shifts obtained via adversarial perturbations of a test image. Motivated by this, we evaluate the state of the art on two realistic and challenging sources of domain shifts, namely contextual and semantic shifts. Contextual shifts correspond to the environment types, for example, a model pre-trained on indoor context has to adapt to the outdoor context on CORe-50. Semantic shifts correspond to the capture types, for example a model pre-trained on natural images has to adapt to cliparts, sketches, and paintings on DomainNet. We include in our analysis recent techniques such as Prediction-Time Batch Normalization (BN), Test Entropy Minimization (TENT) and Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CoTTA). Our findings are three-fold: i) Test-time adaptation methods perform better and forget less on contextual shifts compared to semantic shifts, ii) TENT outperforms other methods on short-term adaptation, whereas CoTTA outpeforms other methods on long-term adaptation, iii) BN is most reliable and robust. Our code is available at https://github.com/tommiekerssies/Evaluating-Continual-Test-Time-Adaptation-for-Contextual-and-Semantic-Domain-Shifts.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们的目标是使预训练的卷积神经网络适应测试时的域转移。我们不断地对传入的测试批次流进行此操作，不带标签。现有文献主要针对通过测试图像的对抗性扰动获得的人为变化进行操作。受此启发，我们评估了两个现实且具有挑战性的领域转换来源的最新技术，即上下文和语义转换。上下文变化与环境类型相对应，例如，在室内环境中预训练的模型必须适应 CORe-50 上的室外环境。语义转变对应于捕获类型，例如，在自然图像上预训练的模型必须适应 DomainNet 上的剪贴画、草图和绘画。我们的分析中包括了最新的技术，例如预测时间批量归一化 (BN)、测试熵最小化 (TENT) 和持续测试时间适应 (CoTTA)。我们的发现有三个方面：i) 与语义转换相比，测试时适应方法在上下文转换方面表现更好，遗忘更少，ii) TENT 在短期适应方面优于其他方法，而 CoTTA 在长期适应方面优于其他方法，iii) BN 最可靠和稳健。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/tommiekerssies/Evaluating-Continual-Test-Time-Adaptation-for-Contextual-and-Semantic-Domain-Shifts。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过测试时持续适应方法，将预训练卷积神经网络适应于上下文和语义领域的分布偏移，且无需标签。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖对抗性扰动生成的人工领域偏移，而本文关注更现实的上下文（如室内外环境）和语义偏移（如图像类型从自然图像到剪影、绘画等）。
AI.method: 评估了三种最新方法：预测时批量归一化（BN）、测试熵最小化（TENT）和持续测试时适应（CoTTA），在CORe-50和DomainNet数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 测试时适应方法在上下文偏移中表现优于语义偏移；TENT适合短期适应，CoTTA适合长期适应；BN方法最可靠且鲁棒性最强。
AI.conclusion: 不同领域偏移对适应方法表现有显著影响，BN、TENT和CoTTA各有优劣，需根据任务需求选择合适方法。

We include in our analysis recent techniques such as Prediction-Time Batch Normalization (BN), Test Entropy Minimization (TENT) and Continual Test-Time Adaptation (CoTTA). Our findings are three-fold: i) Test-time adaptation methods perform better and forget less on contextual shifts compared to semantic shifts, ii) TENT outperforms other methods on short-term adaptation, whereas CoTTA outpeforms other methods on long-term adaptation, iii) BN is most reliable and robust. Our code is available at https://github.com/tommiekerssies/Evaluating-Continual-Test-Time-Adaptation-for-Contextual-and-Semantic-Domain-Shifts. 在本文中，我们的目标是使预训练的卷积神经网络适应测试时的域转移。我们不断地对传入的测试批次流进行此操作，不带标签。现有文献主要针对通过测试图像的对抗性扰动获得的人为变化进行操作。受此启发，我们评估了两个现实且具有挑战性的领域转换来源的最新技术，即上下文和语义转换。上下文变化与环境类型相对应，例如，在室内环境中预训练的模型必须适应 CORe-50 上的室外环境。语义转变对应于捕获类型，例如，在自然图像上预训练的模型必须适应 DomainNet 上的剪贴画、草图和绘画。我们的分析中包括了最新的技术，例如预测时间批量归一化 (BN)、测试熵最小化 (TENT) 和持续测试时间适应 (CoTTA)。我们的发现有三个方面：i) 与语义转换相比，测试时适应方法在上下文转换方面表现更好，遗忘更少，ii) TENT 在短期适应方面优于其他方法，而 CoTTA 在长期适应方面优于其他方法，iii) BN 最可靠和稳健。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/tommiekerssies/Evaluating-Continual-Test-Time-Adaptation-for-Contextual-and-Semantic-Domain-Shifts。 本文旨在通过测试时持续适应方法，将预训练卷积神经网络适应于上下文和语义领域的分布偏移，且无需标签。 Tommie Kerssies,Mert Kılıçkaya,Joaquin Vanschoren cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Benjamin Doerr,Zhongdi Qu
title: Runtime Analysis for the NSGA-II: Provable Speed-Ups From Crossover
title_zh: NSGA-II 的运行时分析：可证明的交叉加速
comment: Extended version of a paper that appears in the proceedings of AAAI 2023
comments: Extended version of a paper that appears in the proceedings of AAAI 2023
abstract: Very recently, the first mathematical runtime analyses for the NSGA-II, the most common multi-objective evolutionary algorithm, have been conducted. Continuing this research direction, we prove that the NSGA-II optimizes the OneJumpZeroJump benchmark asymptotically faster when crossover is employed. Together with a parallel independent work by Dang, Opris, Salehi, and Sudholt, this is the first time such an advantage of crossover is proven for the NSGA-II. Our arguments can be transferred to single-objective optimization. They then prove that crossover can speed up the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm in a different way and more pronounced than known before. Our experiments confirm the added value of crossover and show that the observed advantages are even larger than what our proofs can guarantee.
summary: Very recently, the first mathematical runtime analyses for the NSGA-II, the most common multi-objective evolutionary algorithm, have been conducted. Continuing this research direction, we prove that the NSGA-II optimizes the OneJumpZeroJump benchmark asymptotically faster when crossover is employed. Together with a parallel independent work by Dang, Opris, Salehi, and Sudholt, this is the first time such an advantage of crossover is proven for the NSGA-II. Our arguments can be transferred to single-objective optimization. They then prove that crossover can speed up the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm in a different way and more pronounced than known before. Our experiments confirm the added value of crossover and show that the observed advantages are even larger than what our proofs can guarantee.
abstract_zh: 最近，对最常见的多目标进化算法 NSGA-II 进行了首次数学运行时分析。继续这个研究方向，我们证明当采用交叉时，NSGA-II 可以渐近更快地优化 OneJumpZeroJump 基准。加上 Dang、Opris、Salehi 和 Sudholt 的并行独立工作，这是 NSGA-II 首次证明这种交叉优势。我们的论点可以转移到单目标优化。然后他们证明交叉可以以不同的方式加速 $(μ+1)$ 遗传算法，并且比以前已知的更加明显。我们的实验证实了交叉的附加价值，并表明观察到的优势甚至比我们的证明所能保证的还要大。

AI.tldr: 本文对NSGA-II算法进行运行时分析，证明交叉操作在优化多目标基准测试中的渐近加速效果，并扩展到单目标优化场景。
AI.motivation: NSGA-II作为主流多目标进化算法，此前缺乏数学运行时分析；交叉操作的实际优势尚未被理论证明，需通过严谨分析填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过数学理论分析与实验验证结合，证明交叉在NSGA-II及单目标（μ+1）遗传算法中的加速效果，并与独立研究结果相互佐证。
AI.result: 理论证明NSGA-II在OneJumpZeroJump基准上交叉加速优势，实验显示实际加速效果超出理论下界；交叉对单目标算法的加速效果更显著。
AI.conclusion: 交叉操作在多目标与单目标进化算法中均能带来可证明的效率提升，未来需进一步探索其在更广泛场景中的理论与应用价值。

authors_text: SiCheng Yang,Methawee Tantrawenith,Haolin Zhuang,Zhiyong Wu,Aolan Sun,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Huaizhen Tang,Xintao Zhao,Jie Wang,Helen Meng
title: Speech Representation Disentanglement with Adversarial Mutual Information Learning for One-shot Voice Conversion
title_zh: 语音表示解开与对抗性互信息学习的一次性语音转换
abstract: One-shot voice conversion (VC) with only a single target speaker's speech for reference has become a hot research topic. Existing works generally disentangle timbre, while information about pitch, rhythm and content is still mixed together. To perform one-shot VC effectively with further disentangling these speech components, we employ random resampling for pitch and content encoder and use the variational contrastive log-ratio upper bound of mutual information and gradient reversal layer based adversarial mutual information learning to ensure the different parts of the latent space containing only the desired disentangled representation during training. Experiments on the VCTK dataset show the model achieves state-of-the-art performance for one-shot VC in terms of naturalness and intellgibility. In addition, we can transfer characteristics of one-shot VC on timbre, pitch and rhythm separately by speech representation disentanglement. Our code, pre-trained models and demo are available at https://im1eon.github.io/IS2022-SRDVC/.
summary: One-shot voice conversion (VC) with only a single target speaker's speech for reference has become a hot research topic. Existing works generally disentangle timbre, while information about pitch, rhythm and content is still mixed together. To perform one-shot VC effectively with further disentangling these speech components, we employ random resampling for pitch and content encoder and use the variational contrastive log-ratio upper bound of mutual information and gradient reversal layer based adversarial mutual information learning to ensure the different parts of the latent space containing only the desired disentangled representation during training. Experiments on the VCTK dataset show the model achieves state-of-the-art performance for one-shot VC in terms of naturalness and intellgibility. In addition, we can transfer characteristics of one-shot VC on timbre, pitch and rhythm separately by speech representation disentanglement. Our code, pre-trained models and demo are available at https://im1eon.github.io/IS2022-SRDVC/.
abstract_zh: 仅以单个目标说话人的语音作为参考的一次性语音转换（VC）已成为一个热门研究课题。现有的作品一般都解开了音色，而音高、节奏和内容的信息仍然混合在一起。为了有效地执行一次性 VC 并进一步解开这些语音成分，我们对音调和内容编码器采用随机重采样，并使用互信息的变分对比对数比上限和基于梯度反转层的对抗性互信息学习，以确保潜在空间的不同部分在训练期间仅包含所需的解开表示。在 VCTK 数据集上的实验表明，该模型在自然度和可理解性方面实现了一次性 VC 的最先进性能。此外，我们还可以通过语音表示解耦来分别传递一次性 VC 在音色、音高和节奏上的特征。我们的代码、预训练模型和演示可在 https://im1eon.github.io/IS2022-SRDVC/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗性互信息学习的语音表示解耦方法，用于实现更高效的单次语音转换。
AI.motivation: 现有单次语音转换方法未能有效分离音色、音高和节奏等语音成分，导致转换效果受限。
AI.method: 采用随机重采样处理音高与内容编码器，结合变分对比对数比率上界和梯度反转层的对抗性互信息学习，实现潜在空间的解耦表示。
AI.result: 在VCTK数据集上达到单次语音转换最先进水平，自然度和可懂度显著提升，并可独立控制音色、音高和节奏特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语音表示解耦有效提升了单次语音转换性能，为多维度语音特征迁移提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nuo Chen,Chenyu You
title: Exploring and Exploiting Multi-Granularity Representations for Machine Reading Comprehension
title_zh: 探索和利用机器阅读理解的多粒度表示
comment: 13 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.10877; text overlap with arXiv:1804.09541 by other authors
comments: 13 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.10877; text overlap with arXiv:1804.09541 by other authors
abstract: Recently, the attention-enhanced multi-layer encoder, such as Transformer, has been extensively studied in Machine Reading Comprehension (MRC). To predict the answer, it is common practice to employ a predictor to draw information only from the final encoder layer which generates the coarse-grained representations of the source sequences, i.e., passage and question. The analysis shows that the representation of source sequence becomes more coarse-grained from finegrained as the encoding layer increases. It is generally believed that with the growing number of layers in deep neural networks, the encoding process will gather relevant information for each location increasingly, resulting in more coarse-grained representations, which adds the likelihood of similarity to other locations (referring to homogeneity). Such phenomenon will mislead the model to make wrong judgement and degrade the performance. In this paper, we argue that it would be better if the predictor could exploit representations of different granularity from the encoder, providing different views of the source sequences, such that the expressive power of the model could be fully utilized. To this end, we propose a novel approach called Adaptive Bidirectional Attention-Capsule Network (ABA-Net), which adaptively exploits the source representations of different levels to the predictor. Furthermore, due to the better representations are at the core for boosting MRC performance, the capsule network and self-attention module are carefully designed as the building blocks of our encoders, which provides the capability to explore the local and global representations, respectively. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets, i.e., SQuAD 1.0, SQuAD 2.0 and COQA, demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. In particular, we set the new state-of-the-art performance on the SQuAD 1.0 dataset

Experimental results on three benchmark datasets, i.e., SQuAD 1.0, SQuAD 2.0 and COQA, demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. In particular, we set the new state-of-the-art performance on the SQuAD 1.0 dataset
abstract_zh: 最近，注意力增强的多层编码器，例如 Transformer，在机器阅读理解（MRC）领域得到了广泛的研究。为了预测答案，通常的做法是采用预测器仅从最终编码器层提取信息，该编码器层生成源序列（即段落和问题）的粗粒度表示。分析表明，随着编码层数的增加，源序列的表示由细粒度变为粗粒度。人们普遍认为，随着深度神经网络层数的不断增加，编码过程将越来越多地收集每个位置的相关信息，从而产生更粗粒度的表示，这增加了与其他位置相似的可能性（指同质性）。这种现象会误导模型做出错误的判断并降低性能。在本文中，我们认为，如果预测器能够利用编码器不同粒度的表示，提供源序列的不同视图，从而充分利用模型的表达能力，那就更好了。为此，我们提出了一种称为自适应双向注意胶囊网络（ABA-Net）的新方法，它自适应地利用不同级别的源表示来预测。此外，由于更好的表示是提升 MRC 性能的核心，因此胶囊网络和自注意力模块经过精心设计，作为编码器的构建块，分别提供了探索局部和全局表示的能力。三个基准数据集（即 SQuAD 1.0、SQuAD 2.0 和 COQA）上的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。特别是，我们在 SQuAD 1.0 数据集上设置了新的最先进性能

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多粒度表示利用方法ABA-Net，通过结合不同层次的编码表示提升机器阅读理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅使用编码器最后一层的粗粒度表示进行预测，导致信息丢失和同质性问题，影响模型判断准确性。
AI.method: 设计自适应双向注意力-胶囊网络(ABA-Net)，结合胶囊网络提取局部特征和自注意力模块捕捉全局依赖，自适应融合多粒度表示。
AI.result: 在SQuAD 1.0、SQuAD 2.0和COQA三个数据集上取得新SOTA结果，尤其在SQuAD 1.0上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度表示融合能有效提升模型表现，证明了细粒度与粗粒度信息结合的重要性，为MRC研究提供新方向。

search_text: Exploring and Exploiting Multi-Granularity Representations for Machine Reading Comprehension 探索和利用机器阅读理解的多粒度表示 Recently, the attention-enhanced multi-layer encoder, such as Transformer, has been extensively studied in Machine Reading Comprehension (MRC). To predict the answer, it is common practice to employ a predictor to draw information only from the final encoder layer which generates the coarse-grained representations of the source sequences, i.e., passage and question. The analysis shows that the representation of source sequence becomes more coarse-grained from finegrained as the encoding layer increases. It is generally believed that with the growing number of layers in deep neural networks, the encoding process will gather relevant information for each location increasingly, resulting in more coarse-grained representations, which adds the likelihood of similarity to other locations (referring to homogeneity). Such phenomenon will mislead the model to make wrong judgement and degrade the performance. In this paper, we argue that it would be better if the predictor could exploit representations of different granularity from the encoder, providing different views of the source sequences, such that the expressive power of the model could be fully utilized. To this end, we propose a novel approach called Adaptive Bidirectional Attention-Capsule Network (ABA-Net), which adaptively exploits the source representations of different levels to the predictor. Furthermore, due to the better representations are at the core for boosting MRC performance, the capsule network and self-attention module are carefully designed as the building blocks of our encoders, which provides the capability to explore the local and global representations, respectively. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets, i.e., SQuAD 1.0, SQuAD 2.0 and COQA, demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. In particular, we set the new state-of-the-art performance on the SQuAD 1.0 dataset 最近，注意力增强的多层编码器，例如 Transformer，在机器阅读理解（MRC）领域得到了广泛的研究。为了预测答案，通常的做法是采用预测器仅从最终编码器层提取信息，该编码器层生成源序列（即段落和问题）的粗粒度表示。分析表明，随着编码层数的增加，源序列的表示由细粒度变为粗粒度。人们普遍认为，随着深度神经网络层数的不断增加，编码过程将越来越多地收集每个位置的相关信息，从而产生更粗粒度的表示，这增加了与其他位置相似的可能性（指同质性）。这种现象会误导模型做出错误的判断并降低性能。在本文中，我们认为，如果预测器能够利用编码器不同粒度的表示，提供源序列的不同视图，从而充分利用模型的表达能力，那就更好了。为此，我们提出了一种称为自适应双向注意胶囊网络（ABA-Net）的新方法，它自适应地利用不同级别的源表示来预测。此外，由于更好的表示是提升 MRC 性能的核心，因此胶囊网络和自注意力模块经过精心设计，作为编码器的构建块，分别提供了探索局部和全局表示的能力。三个基准数据集（即 SQuAD 1.0、SQuAD 2.0 和 COQA）上的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。特别是，我们在 SQuAD 1.0 数据集上设置了新的最先进性能 本文提出一种新型多粒度表示利用方法ABA-Net，通过结合不同层次的编码表示提升机器阅读理解性能。 Nuo Chen,Chenyu You cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xia Zeng,Arkaitz Zubiaga
title: Active PETs: Active Data Annotation Prioritisation for Few-Shot Claim Verification with Pattern Exploiting Training
title_zh: 主动 PET：通过模式利用训练进行少样本声明验证的主动数据注释优先级
abstract: To mitigate the impact of the scarcity of labelled data on fact-checking systems, we focus on few-shot claim verification. Despite recent work on few-shot classification by proposing advanced language models, there is a dearth of research in data annotation prioritisation that improves the selection of the few shots to be labelled for optimal model performance. We propose Active PETs, a novel weighted approach that utilises an ensemble of Pattern Exploiting Training (PET) models based on various language models, to actively select unlabelled data as candidates for annotation. Using Active PETs for few-shot data selection shows consistent improvement over the baseline methods, on two technical fact-checking datasets and using six different pretrained language models. We show further improvement with Active PETs-o, which further integrates an oversampling strategy. Our approach enables effective selection of instances to be labelled where unlabelled data is abundant but resources for labelling are limited, leading to consistently improved few-shot claim verification performance. Our code is available.
summary: To mitigate the impact of the scarcity of labelled data on fact-checking systems, we focus on few-shot claim verification. Despite recent work on few-shot classification by proposing advanced language models, there is a dearth of research in data annotation prioritisation that improves the selection of the few shots to be labelled for optimal model performance. We propose Active PETs, a novel weighted approach that utilises an ensemble of Pattern Exploiting Training (PET) models based on various language models, to actively select unlabelled data as candidates for annotation. Using Active PETs for few-shot data selection shows consistent improvement over the baseline methods, on two technical fact-checking datasets and using six different pretrained language models. We show further improvement with Active PETs-o, which further integrates an oversampling strategy. Our approach enables effective selection of instances to be labelled where unlabelled data is abundant but resources for labelling are limited, leading to consistently improved few-shot claim verification performance. Our code is available.
abstract_zh: 为了减轻标记数据稀缺对事实检查系统的影响，我们专注于小样本声明验证。尽管最近通过提出高级语言模型来进行少镜头分类方面的工作，但在数据注释优先级方面仍缺乏研究，以改进对要标记的少数镜头的选择以实现最佳模型性能。我们提出了 Active PET，这是一种新颖的加权方法，它利用基于各种语言模型的模式利用训练（PET）模型的集合来主动选择未标记的数据作为注释的候选数据。使用 Active PET 进行少量数据选择，在两个技术事实检查数据集和使用六种不同的预训练语言模型上，与基线方法相比显示出一致的改进。我们展示了 Active PETs-o 的进一步改进，它进一步集成了过采样策略。我们的方法可以在未标记数据丰富但标记资源有限的情况下有效选择要标记的实例，从而持续改进少数样本声明验证性能。我们的代码可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Active PETs方法，通过主动选择未标注数据进行标注，以提升少样本声明验证的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分类方法在标注数据稀缺时效率低下，缺乏有效的标注优先级策略导致资源浪费。
AI.method: 构建基于多种预训练语言模型的PET模型集成，通过加权策略主动筛选高价值未标注样本进行标注，并引入过采样优化策略（Active PETs-o）。
AI.result: 在两个技术事实核查数据集和六种预训练模型上，Active PETs相较基线方法均取得性能提升，Active PETs-o进一步优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在标注资源受限场景下能有效提升少样本声明验证效果，为事实核查系统提供高效标注解决方案。

authors_text: Daolang Huang,Louis Filstroff,Petrus Mikkola,Runkai Zheng,Samuel Kaski
title: Bayesian Optimization Augmented with Actively Elicited Expert Knowledge
title_zh: 积极引出的专家知识增强了贝叶斯优化
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a well-established method to optimize black-box functions whose direct evaluations are costly. In this paper, we tackle the problem of incorporating expert knowledge into BO, with the goal of further accelerating the optimization, which has received very little attention so far. We design a multi-task learning architecture for this task, with the goal of jointly eliciting the expert knowledge and minimizing the objective function. In particular, this allows for the expert knowledge to be transferred into the BO task. We introduce a specific architecture based on Siamese neural networks to handle the knowledge elicitation from pairwise queries. Experiments on various benchmark functions with both simulated and actual human experts show that the proposed method significantly speeds up BO even when the expert knowledge is biased compared to the objective function.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a well-established method to optimize black-box functions whose direct evaluations are costly. In this paper, we tackle the problem of incorporating expert knowledge into BO, with the goal of further accelerating the optimization, which has received very little attention so far. We design a multi-task learning architecture for this task, with the goal of jointly eliciting the expert knowledge and minimizing the objective function. In particular, this allows for the expert knowledge to be transferred into the BO task. We introduce a specific architecture based on Siamese neural networks to handle the knowledge elicitation from pairwise queries. Experiments on various benchmark functions with both simulated and actual human experts show that the proposed method significantly speeds up BO even when the expert knowledge is biased compared to the objective function.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）是一种行之有效的优化黑盒函数的方法，其直接评估的成本很高。在本文中，我们解决了将专家知识融入BO的问题，目的是进一步加速优化，但迄今为止这一问题还很少受到关注。我们为此任务设计了一个多任务学习架构，其目标是共同获取专家知识并最小化目标函数。特别是，这允许将专业知识转移到 BO 任务中。我们引入了一种基于暹罗神经网络的特定架构来处理成对查询的知识获取。对模拟和实际人类专家的各种基准函数进行的实验表明，即使专家知识与目标函数相比存在偏差，所提出的方法也能显着加快 BO 速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合主动获取专家知识的贝叶斯优化方法，通过多任务学习架构加速黑盒函数优化。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化未充分整合专家知识，而有效利用专家知识可显著提升优化效率，但相关研究较少。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架联合获取专家知识与优化目标，采用Siamese神经网络处理成对查询实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在多个基准函数实验中，即使专家知识存在偏差，该方法仍能显著加速贝叶斯优化过程。
AI.conclusion: 主动整合专家知识可有效提升贝叶斯优化效率，未来可探索更复杂的知识迁移机制与应用场景。

method: 设计多任务学习框架联合获取专家知识与优化目标，采用Siamese神经网络处理成对查询实现知识迁移。
result: 在多个基准函数实验中，即使专家知识存在偏差，该方法仍能显著加速贝叶斯优化过程。
conclusion: 主动整合专家知识可有效提升贝叶斯优化效率，未来可探索更复杂的知识迁移机制与应用场景。
search_text: Bayesian Optimization Augmented with Actively Elicited Expert Knowledge 积极引出的专家知识增强了贝叶斯优化 Bayesian optimization (BO) is a well-established method to optimize black-box functions whose direct evaluations are costly. In this paper, we tackle the problem of incorporating expert knowledge into BO, with the goal of further accelerating the optimization, which has received very little attention so far. We design a multi-task learning architecture for this task, with the goal of jointly eliciting the expert knowledge and minimizing the objective function. In particular, this allows for the expert knowledge to be transferred into the BO task. We introduce a specific architecture based on Siamese neural networks to handle the knowledge elicitation from pairwise queries. Experiments on various benchmark functions with both simulated and actual human experts show that the proposed method significantly speeds up BO even when the expert knowledge is biased compared to the objective function. 贝叶斯优化（BO）是一种行之有效的优化黑盒函数的方法，其直接评估的成本很高。在本文中，我们解决了将专家知识融入BO的问题，目的是进一步加速优化，但迄今为止这一问题还很少受到关注。我们为此任务设计了一个多任务学习架构，其目标是共同获取专家知识并最小化目标函数。特别是，这允许将专业知识转移到 BO 任务中。我们引入了一种基于暹罗神经网络的特定架构来处理成对查询的知识获取。对模拟和实际人类专家的各种基准函数进行的实验表明，即使专家知识与目标函数相比存在偏差，所提出的方法也能显着加快 BO 速度。 本文提出一种结合主动获取专家知识的贝叶斯优化方法，通过多任务学习架构加速黑盒函数优化。 Daolang Huang,Louis Filstroff,Petrus Mikkola,Runkai Zheng,Samuel Kaski cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Quanshi Zhang,Xu Cheng,Yilan Chen,Zhefan Rao
title: Quantifying the Knowledge in a DNN to Explain Knowledge Distillation for Classification
title_zh: 量化 DNN 中的知识以解释分类的知识蒸馏
abstract: Compared to traditional learning from scratch, knowledge distillation sometimes makes the DNN achieve superior performance. This paper provides a new perspective to explain the success of knowledge distillation, i.e., quantifying knowledge points encoded in intermediate layers of a DNN for classification, based on the information theory. To this end, we consider the signal processing in a DNN as the layer-wise information discarding. A knowledge point is referred to as an input unit, whose information is much less discarded than other input units. Thus, we propose three hypotheses for knowledge distillation based on the quantification of knowledge points. 1. The DNN learning from knowledge distillation encodes more knowledge points than the DNN learning from scratch. 2. Knowledge distillation makes the DNN more likely to learn different knowledge points simultaneously. In comparison, the DNN learning from scratch tends to encode various knowledge points sequentially. 3. The DNN learning from knowledge distillation is often optimized more stably than the DNN learning from scratch. In order to verify the above hypotheses, we design three types of metrics with annotations of foreground objects to analyze feature representations of the DNN, \textit{i.e.} the quantity and the quality of knowledge points, the learning speed of different knowledge points, and the stability of optimization directions. In experiments, we diagnosed various DNNs for different classification tasks, i.e., image classification, 3D point cloud classification, binary sentiment classification, and question answering, which verified above hypotheses.
summary: Compared to traditional learning from scratch, knowledge distillation sometimes makes the DNN achieve superior performance. This paper provides a new perspective to explain the success of knowledge distillation, i.e., quantifying knowledge points encoded in intermediate layers of a DNN for classification, based on the information theory. To this end, we consider the signal processing in a DNN as the layer-wise information discarding. A knowledge point is referred to as an input unit, whose information is much less discarded than other input units. Thus, we propose three hypotheses for knowledge distillation based on the quantification of knowledge points. 1. The DNN learning from knowledge distillation encodes more knowledge points than the DNN learning from scratch. 2. Knowledge distillation makes the DNN more likely to learn different knowledge points simultaneously. In comparison, the DNN learning from scratch tends to encode various knowledge points sequentially. 3. The DNN learning from knowledge distillation is often optimized more stably than the DNN learning from scratch. In order to verify the above hypotheses, we design three types of metrics with annotations of foreground objects to analyze feature representations of the DNN, \textit{i.e.} the quantity and the quality of knowledge points, the learning speed of different knowledge points, and the stability of optimization directions. In experiments, we diagnosed various DNNs for different classification tasks, i.e., image classification, 3D point cloud classification, binary sentiment classification, and question answering, which verified above hypotheses.
abstract_zh: 与传统的从头开始学习相比，知识蒸馏有时会使 DNN 取得更优越的性能。本文提供了一个新的视角来解释知识蒸馏的成功，即基于信息论量化 DNN 中间层中编码的知识点以进行分类。为此，我们将 DNN 中的信号处理视为逐层信息丢弃。知识点被称为输入单元，其信息比其他输入单元丢弃的要少得多。因此，我们提出了基于知识点量化的知识蒸馏的三个假设。 1.通过知识蒸馏学习的DNN比从头开始学习的DNN编码了更多的知识点。 2.知识蒸馏使得DNN更有可能同时学习不同的知识点。相比之下，从头开始学习的 DNN 倾向于顺序编码各个知识点。 3.通过知识蒸馏学习的DNN往往比从头开始学习的DNN优化得更稳定。为了验证上述假设，我们设计了三种带有前景物体标注的度量来分析DNN的特征表示、知识点的数量和质量、不同知识点的学习速度以及优化方向的稳定性。在实验中，我们针对不同的分类任务（即图像分类、3D 点云分类、二元情感分类和问答）诊断了各种 DNN，验证了上述假设。

AI.tldr: 本文通过量化深度神经网络（DNN）中的知识点，从信息论角度解释知识蒸馏在分类任务中的成功机制。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏相比传统从头训练能提升DNN性能，但其成功原理缺乏理论解释，需建立量化分析框架阐明知识传递机制。
AI.method: 基于信息论将DNN视为逐层信息过滤系统，定义知识点为信息保留度高的输入单元，提出三个假设并设计三类指标（知识量、学习速度、优化稳定性）进行验证。
AI.result: 实验在图像分类、3D点云分类等任务中验证了知识蒸馏能编码更多知识点、并行学习不同知识点且优化更稳定三个假设。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏通过高效知识编码和稳定优化提升模型性能，为模型压缩与训练方法研究提供理论依据。

authors_text: Weina Jin,Jianyu Fan,Diane Gromala,Philippe Pasquier,Xiaoxiao Li,Ghassan Hamarneh
title: Transcending XAI Algorithm Boundaries through End-User-Inspired Design
title_zh: 通过最终用户启发的设计超越 XAI 算法边界
abstract: The boundaries of existing explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) algorithms are confined to problems grounded in technical users' demand for explainability. This research paradigm disproportionately ignores the larger group of non-technical end users, who have a much higher demand for AI explanations in diverse explanation goals, such as making safer and better decisions and improving users' predicted outcomes. Lacking explainability-focused functional support for end users may hinder the safe and accountable use of AI in high-stakes domains, such as healthcare, criminal justice, finance, and autonomous driving systems. Built upon prior human factor analysis on end users' requirements for XAI, we identify and model four novel XAI technical problems covering the full spectrum from design to the evaluation of XAI algorithms, including edge-case-based reasoning, customizable counterfactual explanation, collapsible decision tree, and the verifiability metric to evaluate XAI utility. Based on these newly-identified research problems, we also discuss open problems in the technical development of user-centered XAI to inspire future research. Our work bridges human-centered XAI with the technical XAI community, and calls for a new research paradigm on the technical development of user-centered XAI for the responsible use of AI in critical tasks.
summary: The boundaries of existing explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) algorithms are confined to problems grounded in technical users' demand for explainability. This research paradigm disproportionately ignores the larger group of non-technical end users, who have a much higher demand for AI explanations in diverse explanation goals, such as making safer and better decisions and improving users' predicted outcomes. Lacking explainability-focused functional support for end users may hinder the safe and accountable use of AI in high-stakes domains, such as healthcare, criminal justice, finance, and autonomous driving systems. Built upon prior human factor analysis on end users' requirements for XAI, we identify and model four novel XAI technical problems covering the full spectrum from design to the evaluation of XAI algorithms, including edge-case-based reasoning, customizable counterfactual explanation, collapsible decision tree, and the verifiability metric to evaluate XAI utility. Based on these newly-identified research problems, we also discuss open problems in the technical development of user-centered XAI to inspire future research. Our work bridges human-centered XAI with the technical XAI community, and calls for a new research paradigm on the technical development of user-centered XAI for the responsible use of AI in critical tasks.
abstract_zh: 现有可解释人工智能（XAI）算法的边界仅限于技术用户对可解释性需求的问题。这种研究范式不成比例地忽略了更大的非技术最终用户群体，他们在不同的解释目标中对人工智能解释有更高的需求，例如做出更安全、更好的决策以及改善用户的预测结果。缺乏对最终用户以可解释性为中心的功能支持可能会阻碍人工智能在医疗保健、刑事司法、金融和自动驾驶系统等高风险领域的安全和负责任的使用。基于之前对最终用户对 XAI 需求的人为因素分析，我们识别并建模了四个新颖的​​ XAI 技术问题，涵盖从设计到 XAI 算法评估的整个范围，包括基于边缘情况的推理、可定制的反事实解释、可折叠决策树以及评估 XAI 实用性的可验证性指标。基于这些新发现的研究问题，我们还讨论了以用户为中心的XAI技术开发中的开放问题，以启发未来的研究。我们的工作将以人为中心的 XAI 与技术 XAI 社区联系起来，并呼吁建立以用户为中心的 XAI 技术开发的新研究范式，以便在关键任务中负责任地使用 AI。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过考虑非技术终端用户的解释需求，突破现有可解释人工智能（XAI）算法的局限性，并提出新的技术问题和解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI算法主要满足技术用户的需求，忽视了非技术用户对AI解释的更高需求，这可能阻碍AI在医疗、司法等高风险领域的安全应用。
AI.method: 基于对终端用户需求的人因分析，识别并建模四个新型XAI技术问题，包括边缘案例推理、可定制反事实解释、可折叠决策树及可验证性指标，并探讨用户为中心的XAI技术开发挑战。
AI.result: 提出了覆盖XAI设计到评估的四个技术问题，建立了用户需求与技术实现的桥梁，并为未来研究指明了方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文呼吁建立以用户为中心的XAI技术研究新范式，以确保AI在关键任务中的负责任使用。

Our work bridges human-centered XAI with the technical XAI community, and calls for a new research paradigm on the technical development of user-centered XAI for the responsible use of AI in critical tasks. 现有可解释人工智能（XAI）算法的边界仅限于技术用户对可解释性需求的问题。这种研究范式不成比例地忽略了更大的非技术最终用户群体，他们在不同的解释目标中对人工智能解释有更高的需求，例如做出更安全、更好的决策以及改善用户的预测结果。缺乏对最终用户以可解释性为中心的功能支持可能会阻碍人工智能在医疗保健、刑事司法、金融和自动驾驶系统等高风险领域的安全和负责任的使用。基于之前对最终用户对 XAI 需求的人为因素分析，我们识别并建模了四个新颖的​​ XAI 技术问题，涵盖从设计到 XAI 算法评估的整个范围，包括基于边缘情况的推理、可定制的反事实解释、可折叠决策树以及评估 XAI 实用性的可验证性指标。基于这些新发现的研究问题，我们还讨论了以用户为中心的XAI技术开发中的开放问题，以启发未来的研究。我们的工作将以人为中心的 XAI 与技术 XAI 社区联系起来，并呼吁建立以用户为中心的 XAI 技术开发的新研究范式，以便在关键任务中负责任地使用 AI。 本文旨在通过考虑非技术终端用户的解释需求，突破现有可解释人工智能（XAI）算法的局限性，并提出新的技术问题和解决方案。 Weina Jin,Jianyu Fan,Diane Gromala,Philippe Pasquier,Xiaoxiao Li,Ghassan Hamarneh cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Chang Xu,Jinwang Wang,Wen Yang,Huai Yu,Lei Yu,Gui-Song Xia
title: RFLA: Gaussian Receptive Field based Label Assignment for Tiny Object Detection
title_zh: RFLA：用于微小物体检测的基于高斯感受野的标签分配
abstract: Detecting tiny objects is one of the main obstacles hindering the development of object detection. The performance of generic object detectors tends to drastically deteriorate on tiny object detection tasks. In this paper, we point out that either box prior in the anchor-based detector or point prior in the anchor-free detector is sub-optimal for tiny objects. Our key observation is that the current anchor-based or anchor-free label assignment paradigms will incur many outlier tiny-sized ground truth samples, leading to detectors imposing less focus on the tiny objects. To this end, we propose a Gaussian Receptive Field based Label Assignment (RFLA) strategy for tiny object detection. Specifically, RFLA first utilizes the prior information that the feature receptive field follows Gaussian distribution. Then, instead of assigning samples with IoU or center sampling strategy, a new Receptive Field Distance (RFD) is proposed to directly measure the similarity between the Gaussian receptive field and ground truth. Considering that the IoU-threshold based and center sampling strategy are skewed to large objects, we further design a Hierarchical Label Assignment (HLA) module based on RFD to achieve balanced learning for tiny objects. Extensive experiments on four datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods. Especially, our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art competitors with 4.0 AP points on the AI-TOD dataset. Codes are available at https://github.com/Chasel-Tsui/mmdet-rfla
summary: Detecting tiny objects is one of the main obstacles hindering the development of object detection. The performance of generic object detectors tends to drastically deteriorate on tiny object detection tasks. In this paper, we point out that either box prior in the anchor-based detector or point prior in the anchor-free detector is sub-optimal for tiny objects. Our key observation is that the current anchor-based or anchor-free label assignment paradigms will incur many outlier tiny-sized ground truth samples, leading to detectors imposing less focus on the tiny objects. To this end, we propose a Gaussian Receptive Field based Label Assignment (RFLA) strategy for tiny object detection. Specifically, RFLA first utilizes the prior information that the feature receptive field follows Gaussian distribution. Then, instead of assigning samples with IoU or center sampling strategy, a new Receptive Field Distance (RFD) is proposed to directly measure the similarity between the Gaussian receptive field and ground truth. Considering that the IoU-threshold based and center sampling strategy are skewed to large objects, we further design a Hierarchical Label Assignment (HLA) module based on RFD to achieve balanced learning for tiny objects. Extensive experiments on four datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods. Especially, our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art competitors with 4.0 AP points on the AI-TOD dataset. Codes are available at https://github.com/Chasel-Tsui/mmdet-rfla
abstract_zh: 检测微小物体是阻碍物体检测发展的主要障碍之一。通用物体检测器的性能在微小物体检测任务上往往会急剧恶化。在本文中，我们指出，基于锚点的检测器中的框先验或无锚点检测器中的点先验对于微小物体来说都是次优的。我们的主要观察结果是，当前基于锚点或无锚点的标签分配范例将产生许多离群的微小尺寸的地面真实样本，导致检测器对微小物体的关注较少。为此，我们提出了一种用于微小物体检测的基于高斯感受野的标签分配（RFLA）策略。具体来说，RFLA首先利用特征感受野服从高斯分布的先验信息。然后，提出一种新的感受野距离（RFD）来直接测量高斯感受野与地面实况之间的相似度，而不是使用IoU或中心采样策略分配样本。考虑到基于 IoU 阈值和中心采样策略偏向于大物体，我们进一步设计了基于 RFD 的分层标签分配（HLA）模块，以实现微小物体的平衡学习。对四个数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。特别是，我们的方法在 AI-TOD 数据集上以 4.0 AP 点超越了最先进的竞争对手。代码可在 https://github.com/Chasel-Tsui/mmdet-rfla 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯感受野的标签分配方法（RFLA），用于改进微型目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于锚点或无锚点的目标检测方法在微型目标检测任务中表现不佳，因为它们无法有效处理微型目标的异常样本，导致检测器对微型目标的关注度不足。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于高斯感受野的标签分配策略（RFLA），通过引入高斯分布的特征感受野信息，定义了新的感受野距离（RFD）来衡量高斯感受野与真实目标之间的相似性，并设计了基于RFD的分层标签分配模块（HLA）以实现对微型目标的平衡学习。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在AI-TOD数据集上比最先进的方法高出4.0 AP点。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的RFLA方法有效解决了微型目标检测中的标签分配问题，提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Siddharth Mehrotra,Saurav Das,Sourabh Zanwar
title: Action Bar Adaptations for One-Handed Use of Smartphones
title_zh: 操作栏适应单手使用智能手机
comment: This study was performed by authors when affiliated with RWTH Aachen University as a part of a course "Current Topics in HCI"
comments: This study was performed by authors when affiliated with RWTH Aachen University as a part of a course "Current Topics in HCI"
abstract: One-handed use of smartphones is a common scenario in daily life. However, use of smartphones with thumb gives limited reachability to the complete screen. This problem is more severe when targets are located at corners of the device or far from the thumb's reachable area. Adjusting screen size mitigates this issue by making screen UI to be at the reach of the thumb. However, it does not utilize available screen space. We propose UI adaptation for action bar to address this. With our results, designed adaptations are faster for non-dominant hand and provides significantly better grip stability for holding smartphones. Intriguingly, users perceived our system as faster, more comfortable and providing safer grip when compared with the existing placement of action bar. We conclude our work with video analyses for grip patterns and recommendations for UI designers.
summary: One-handed use of smartphones is a common scenario in daily life. However, use of smartphones with thumb gives limited reachability to the complete screen. This problem is more severe when targets are located at corners of the device or far from the thumb's reachable area. Adjusting screen size mitigates this issue by making screen UI to be at the reach of the thumb. However, it does not utilize available screen space. We propose UI adaptation for action bar to address this. With our results, designed adaptations are faster for non-dominant hand and provides significantly better grip stability for holding smartphones. Intriguingly, users perceived our system as faster, more comfortable and providing safer grip when compared with the existing placement of action bar. We conclude our work with video analyses for grip patterns and recommendations for UI designers.
abstract_zh: 单手使用智能手机是日常生活中的常见场景。然而，用拇指使用智能手机对整个屏幕的访问能力有限。当目标位于设备的角落或远离拇指可触及的区域时，这个问题会更加严重。调整屏幕尺寸可以使屏幕 UI 位于拇指触手可及的范围内，从而缓解此问题。但是，它不利用可用的屏幕空间。我们建议对操作栏进行 UI 调整来解决这个问题。根据我们的结果，设计的适应对于非惯用手来说更快，并且为握持智能手机提供了更好的握持稳定性。有趣的是，与现有的操作杆位置相比，用户认为我们的系统更快、更舒适并且提供更安全的抓地力。我们通过视频分析抓握模式并为 UI 设计师提供建议来结束我们的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对单手操作智能手机的行动栏界面优化方案，以解决拇指触控范围受限的问题。
AI.motivation: 单手使用手机时拇指难以触及屏幕角落或远端区域，传统调整屏幕尺寸的方法未能有效利用可用空间。
AI.method: 通过重新设计行动栏布局，使其更适应单手握持时的拇指操作范围，并结合用户测试与握持模式视频分析进行验证。
AI.result: 优化后的行动栏显著提升非惯用手操作速度与握持稳定性，用户反馈其更舒适且握持更安全。
AI.conclusion: 行动栏适应性设计能有效改善单手操作体验，为UI设计师提供基于人体工学的布局优化建议。

authors_text: Manfred Eppe,Christian Gumbsch,Matthias Kerzel,Phuong D. H. Nguyen,Martin V. Butz,Stefan Wermter
title: Intelligent problem-solving as integrated hierarchical reinforcement learning
title_zh: 作为集成分层强化学习的智能问题解决
comment: Published as accepted article in Nature Machine Intelligence: https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-021-00433-9. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.10147
comments: Published as accepted article in Nature Machine Intelligence: https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-021-00433-9. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.10147
abstract: According to cognitive psychology and related disciplines, the development of complex problem-solving behaviour in biological agents depends on hierarchical cognitive mechanisms. Hierarchical reinforcement learning is a promising computational approach that may eventually yield comparable problem-solving behaviour in artificial agents and robots. However, to date the problem-solving abilities of many human and non-human animals are clearly superior to those of artificial systems. Here, we propose steps to integrate biologically inspired hierarchical mechanisms to enable advanced problem-solving skills in artificial agents. Therefore, we first review the literature in cognitive psychology to highlight the importance of compositional abstraction and predictive processing. Then we relate the gained insights with contemporary hierarchical reinforcement learning methods. Interestingly, our results suggest that all identified cognitive mechanisms have been implemented individually in isolated computational architectures, raising the question of why there exists no single unifying architecture that integrates them. As our final contribution, we address this question by providing an integrative perspective on the computational challenges to develop such a unifying architecture. We expect our results to guide the development of more sophisticated cognitively inspired hierarchical machine learning architectures.
summary: According to cognitive psychology and related disciplines, the development of complex problem-solving behaviour in biological agents depends on hierarchical cognitive mechanisms. Hierarchical reinforcement learning is a promising computational approach that may eventually yield comparable problem-solving behaviour in artificial agents and robots. However, to date the problem-solving abilities of many human and non-human animals are clearly superior to those of artificial systems. Here, we propose steps to integrate biologically inspired hierarchical mechanisms to enable advanced problem-solving skills in artificial agents. Therefore, we first review the literature in cognitive psychology to highlight the importance of compositional abstraction and predictive processing. Then we relate the gained insights with contemporary hierarchical reinforcement learning methods. Interestingly, our results suggest that all identified cognitive mechanisms have been implemented individually in isolated computational architectures, raising the question of why there exists no single unifying architecture that integrates them. As our final contribution, we address this question by providing an integrative perspective on the computational challenges to develop such a unifying architecture. We expect our results to guide the development of more sophisticated cognitively inspired hierarchical machine learning architectures.
abstract_zh: 根据认知心理学和相关学科，生物体复杂问题解决行为的发展取决于分层认知机制。分层强化学习是一种很有前途的计算方法，最终可能会在人工智能体和机器人中产生类似的问题解决行为。然而，迄今为止，许多人类和非人类动物解决问题的能力明显优于人工系统。在这里，我们提出了整合受生物学启发的分层机制的步骤，以实现人工智能体的高级问题解决技能。因此，我们首先回顾认知心理学的文献，以强调成分抽象和预测处理的重要性。然后我们将获得的见解与当代分层强化学习方法联系起来。有趣的是，我们的结果表明，所有已识别的认知机制都是在孤立的计算架构中单独实现的，这就提出了一个问题：为什么不存在集成它们的单一统一架构。作为我们的最终贡献，我们通过提供关于开发这种统一架构的计算挑战的综合视角来解决这个问题。我们期望我们的结果能够指导更复杂的认知启发分层机器学习架构的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过整合生物启发的分层机制，提升人工代理的复杂问题解决能力。
AI.motivation: 当前人工系统的问题解决能力远逊于人类及动物，需借鉴认知心理学机制以开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 综述认知心理学文献，分析组合抽象与预测处理机制，并将其与分层强化学习方法结合。
AI.result: 发现现有认知机制均被独立实现，缺乏统一架构，提出整合视角以解决这一问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可指导开发更复杂、认知启发的分层机器学习架构，推动人工智能进步。

search_text: Intelligent problem-solving as integrated hierarchical reinforcement learning 作为集成分层强化学习的智能问题解决 According to cognitive psychology and related disciplines, the development of complex problem-solving behaviour in biological agents depends on hierarchical cognitive mechanisms. Hierarchical reinforcement learning is a promising computational approach that may eventually yield comparable problem-solving behaviour in artificial agents and robots. However, to date the problem-solving abilities of many human and non-human animals are clearly superior to those of artificial systems. Here, we propose steps to integrate biologically inspired hierarchical mechanisms to enable advanced problem-solving skills in artificial agents. Therefore, we first review the literature in cognitive psychology to highlight the importance of compositional abstraction and predictive processing. Then we relate the gained insights with contemporary hierarchical reinforcement learning methods. Interestingly, our results suggest that all identified cognitive mechanisms have been implemented individually in isolated computational architectures, raising the question of why there exists no single unifying architecture that integrates them. As our final contribution, we address this question by providing an integrative perspective on the computational challenges to develop such a unifying architecture. We expect our results to guide the development of more sophisticated cognitively inspired hierarchical machine learning architectures. 根据认知心理学和相关学科，生物体复杂问题解决行为的发展取决于分层认知机制。分层强化学习是一种很有前途的计算方法，最终可能会在人工智能体和机器人中产生类似的问题解决行为。然而，迄今为止，许多人类和非人类动物解决问题的能力明显优于人工系统。在这里，我们提出了整合受生物学启发的分层机制的步骤，以实现人工智能体的高级问题解决技能。因此，我们首先回顾认知心理学的文献，以强调成分抽象和预测处理的重要性。然后我们将获得的见解与当代分层强化学习方法联系起来。有趣的是，我们的结果表明，所有已识别的认知机制都是在孤立的计算架构中单独实现的，这就提出了一个问题：为什么不存在集成它们的单一统一架构。作为我们的最终贡献，我们通过提供关于开发这种统一架构的计算挑战的综合视角来解决这个问题。我们期望我们的结果能够指导更复杂的认知启发分层机器学习架构的开发。 本文旨在通过整合生物启发的分层机制，提升人工代理的复杂问题解决能力。 Manfred Eppe,Christian Gumbsch,Matthias Kerzel,Phuong D. H. Nguyen,Martin V. Butz,Stefan Wermter cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Gusi Te,Xiu Li,Xiao Li,Jinglu Wang,Wei Hu,Yan Lu
title: Neural Capture of Animatable 3D Human from Monocular Video
title_zh: 从单眼视频中神经捕获可动画 3D 人体
abstract: We present a novel paradigm of building an animatable 3D human representation from a monocular video input, such that it can be rendered in any unseen poses and views. Our method is based on a dynamic Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) rigged by a mesh-based parametric 3D human model serving as a geometry proxy. Previous methods usually rely on multi-view videos or accurate 3D geometry information as additional inputs; besides, most methods suffer from degraded quality when generalized to unseen poses. We identify that the key to generalization is a good input embedding for querying dynamic NeRF: A good input embedding should define an injective mapping in the full volumetric space, guided by surface mesh deformation under pose variation. Based on this observation, we propose to embed the input query with its relationship to local surface regions spanned by a set of geodesic nearest neighbors on mesh vertices. By including both position and relative distance information, our embedding defines a distance-preserved deformation mapping and generalizes well to unseen poses. To reduce the dependency on additional inputs, we first initialize per-frame 3D meshes using off-the-shelf tools and then propose a pipeline to jointly optimize NeRF and refine the initial mesh. Extensive experiments show our method can synthesize plausible human rendering results under unseen poses and views.
summary: We present a novel paradigm of building an animatable 3D human representation from a monocular video input, such that it can be rendered in any unseen poses and views. Our method is based on a dynamic Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) rigged by a mesh-based parametric 3D human model serving as a geometry proxy. Previous methods usually rely on multi-view videos or accurate 3D geometry information as additional inputs; besides, most methods suffer from degraded quality when generalized to unseen poses. We identify that the key to generalization is a good input embedding for querying dynamic NeRF: A good input embedding should define an injective mapping in the full volumetric space, guided by surface mesh deformation under pose variation. Based on this observation, we propose to embed the input query with its relationship to local surface regions spanned by a set of geodesic nearest neighbors on mesh vertices. By including both position and relative distance information, our embedding defines a distance-preserved deformation mapping and generalizes well to unseen poses. To reduce the dependency on additional inputs, we first initialize per-frame 3D meshes using off-the-shelf tools and then propose a pipeline to jointly optimize NeRF and refine the initial mesh. Extensive experiments show our method can synthesize plausible human rendering results under unseen poses and views.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从单眼视频输入构建可动画 3D 人体表示的新颖范例，以便可以以任何看不见的姿势和视图进行渲染。我们的方法基于动态神经辐射场 (NeRF)，该动态神经辐射场由基于网格的参数化 3D 人体模型作为几何代理来操纵。以前的方法通常依赖多视图视频或准确的 3D 几何信息作为额外输入；此外，大多数方法在推广到看不见的姿势时都会出现质量下降的情况。我们发现泛化的关键是用于查询动态 NeRF 的良好输入嵌入：良好的输入嵌入应该在完整体积空间中定义单射映射，并由姿态变化下的表面网格变形引导。基于这一观察，我们建议嵌入输入查询及其与网格顶点上一组测地线最近邻所跨越的局部表面区域的关系。通过包含位置和相对距离信息，我们的嵌入定义了距离保留的变形映射，并很好地推广到了看不见的姿势。为了减少对额外输入的依赖，我们首先使用现成的工具初始化每帧 3D 网格，然后提出一个管道来联合优化 NeRF 并细化初始网格。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以在看不见的姿势和视图下合成合理的人体渲染结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单目视频生成可动画3D人体模型的新方法，通过动态NeRF与网格模型结合实现任意姿态和视角的渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多视角视频或精确3D几何信息，且在未见过的姿态下质量下降，需减少对额外输入的依赖并提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于动态NeRF与网格模型，通过局部表面区域测地最近邻定义距离保持的变形映射，联合优化NeRF与初始网格以减少额外输入依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能在未见过的姿态和视角下生成合理的3D人体渲染结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了现有技术的局限性，实现了单目视频到可动画3D人体的高质量重建与泛化。

authors_text: Jiahao Wu,Wenqi Fan,Jingfan Chen,Shengcai Liu,Qing Li,Ke Tang
title: Disentangled Contrastive Learning for Social Recommendation
title_zh: 用于社会推荐的解开对比学习
abstract: Social recommendations utilize social relations to enhance the representation learning for recommendations. Most social recommendation models unify user representations for the user-item interactions (collaborative domain) and social relations (social domain). However, such an approach may fail to model the users heterogeneous behavior patterns in two domains, impairing the expressiveness of user representations. In this work, to address such limitation, we propose a novel Disentangled contrastive learning framework for social Recommendations DcRec. More specifically, we propose to learn disentangled users representations from the item and social domains. Moreover, disentangled contrastive learning is designed to perform knowledge transfer between disentangled users representations for social recommendations. Comprehensive experiments on various real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model.
summary: Social recommendations utilize social relations to enhance the representation learning for recommendations. Most social recommendation models unify user representations for the user-item interactions (collaborative domain) and social relations (social domain). However, such an approach may fail to model the users heterogeneous behavior patterns in two domains, impairing the expressiveness of user representations. In this work, to address such limitation, we propose a novel Disentangled contrastive learning framework for social Recommendations DcRec. More specifically, we propose to learn disentangled users representations from the item and social domains. Moreover, disentangled contrastive learning is designed to perform knowledge transfer between disentangled users representations for social recommendations. Comprehensive experiments on various real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model.
abstract_zh: 社交推荐利用社交关系来增强推荐的表征学习。大多数社交推荐模型统一了用户-项目交互（协作域）和社交关系（社交域）的用户表示。然而，这种方法可能无法对两个域中的用户异构行为模式进行建模，从而损害了用户表示的表达能力。在这项工作中，为了解决这种限制，我们为社交推荐 DcRec 提出了一种新颖的解开对比学习框架。更具体地说，我们建议从项目和社交领域学习分离的用户表示。此外，分离式对比学习旨在在分离式用户表示之间执行知识转移以进行社交推荐。对各种现实世界数据集的综合实验证明了我们提出的模型的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种解耦对比学习框架DcRec，以提升社交推荐中用户表示的表达能力
AI.motivation: 现有模型统一用户表示，难以捕捉协作域和社会域中的异构行为模式，导致表示表达能力不足
AI.method: 提出DcRec框架，通过解耦对比学习分别学习物品域和社会域的用户表示，并实现跨域知识迁移
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上实验验证，证明了模型在社交推荐任务中的优越性
AI.conclusion: 解耦对比学习能有效提升社交推荐中用户表示的表达能力，从而提高推荐性能

More specifically, we propose to learn disentangled users representations from the item and social domains. Moreover, disentangled contrastive learning is designed to perform knowledge transfer between disentangled users representations for social recommendations. Comprehensive experiments on various real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model. 社交推荐利用社交关系来增强推荐的表征学习。大多数社交推荐模型统一了用户-项目交互（协作域）和社交关系（社交域）的用户表示。然而，这种方法可能无法对两个域中的用户异构行为模式进行建模，从而损害了用户表示的表达能力。在这项工作中，为了解决这种限制，我们为社交推荐 DcRec 提出了一种新颖的解开对比学习框架。更具体地说，我们建议从项目和社交领域学习分离的用户表示。此外，分离式对比学习旨在在分离式用户表示之间执行知识转移以进行社交推荐。对各种现实世界数据集的综合实验证明了我们提出的模型的优越性。 提出一种解耦对比学习框架DcRec，以提升社交推荐中用户表示的表达能力 Jiahao Wu,Wenqi Fan,Jingfan Chen,Shengcai Liu,Qing Li,Ke Tang cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Xijie Xiang,Lin Zhu,Jianing Li,Yonghong Tian,Tiejun Huang
title: Temporal Up-Sampling for Asynchronous Events
title_zh: 异步事件的时间上采样
abstract: The event camera is a novel bio-inspired vision sensor. When the brightness change exceeds the preset threshold, the sensor generates events asynchronously. The number of valid events directly affects the performance of event-based tasks, such as reconstruction, detection, and recognition. However, when in low-brightness or slow-moving scenes, events are often sparse and accompanied by noise, which poses challenges for event-based tasks. To solve these challenges, we propose an event temporal up-sampling algorithm1 to generate more effective and reliable events. The main idea of our algorithm is to generate up-sampling events on the event motion trajectory. First, we estimate the event motion trajectory by contrast maximization algorithm and then up-sampling the events by temporal point processes. Experimental results show that up-sampling events can provide more effective information and improve the performance of downstream tasks, such as improving the quality of reconstructed images and increasing the accuracy of object detection.
summary: The event camera is a novel bio-inspired vision sensor. When the brightness change exceeds the preset threshold, the sensor generates events asynchronously. The number of valid events directly affects the performance of event-based tasks, such as reconstruction, detection, and recognition. However, when in low-brightness or slow-moving scenes, events are often sparse and accompanied by noise, which poses challenges for event-based tasks. To solve these challenges, we propose an event temporal up-sampling algorithm1 to generate more effective and reliable events. The main idea of our algorithm is to generate up-sampling events on the event motion trajectory. First, we estimate the event motion trajectory by contrast maximization algorithm and then up-sampling the events by temporal point processes. Experimental results show that up-sampling events can provide more effective information and improve the performance of downstream tasks, such as improving the quality of reconstructed images and increasing the accuracy of object detection.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是一种新颖的仿生视觉传感器。当亮度变化超过预设阈值时，传感器异步生成事件。有效事件的数量直接影响基于事件的任务的性能，例如重建、检测和识别。然而，在低亮度或缓慢移动的场景中，事件往往稀疏且伴有噪声，这给基于事件的任务带来了挑战。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种事件时间上采样算法1来生成更有效和可靠的事件。我们算法的主要思想是在事件运动轨迹上生成上采样事件。首先，我们通过对比度最大化算法估计事件运动轨迹，然后通过时间点过程对事件进行上采样。实验结果表明，上采样事件可以提供更有效的信息并提高下游任务的性能，例如提高重建图像的质量和提高目标检测的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种事件时间上采样算法，通过生成更多有效事件来提升事件相机在低亮度或缓慢运动场景下的任务性能。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在低亮度或缓慢运动场景中产生的事件稀疏且伴随噪声，导致重建、检测等任务性能下降，需通过算法增强事件数据质量。
AI.method: 基于对比度最大化算法估计事件运动轨迹，再通过时间点过程模型生成上采样事件，补充轨迹上的缺失信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，上采样事件显著提升图像重建质量与目标检测精度，验证了方法在下游任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过时间上采样增强事件数据密度，为事件相机在复杂场景下的应用提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Yuval Emek,Yuval Gil,Shay Kutten
title: Locally Restricted Proof Labeling Schemes (Full Version)
title_zh: 本地限制证明标签计划（完整版）
abstract: Introduced by Korman, Kutten, and Peleg (PODC 2005), a proof labeling scheme (PLS) is a distributed verification system dedicated to evaluating if a given configured graph satisfies a certain property. It involves a centralized prover, whose role is to provide proof that a given configured graph is a yes-instance by means of assigning labels to the nodes, and a distributed verifier, whose role is to verify the validity of the given proof via local access to the assigned labels. In this paper, we introduce the notion of a locally restricted PLS in which the prover's power is restricted to that of a LOCAL algorithm with a polylogarithmic number of rounds. To circumvent inherent impossibilities of PLSs in the locally restricted setting, we turn to models that relax the correctness requirements by allowing the verifier to accept some no-instances as long as they are not "too far" from satisfying the property in question. To this end, we evaluate (1) distributed graph optimization problems (OptDGPs) based on the notion of an approximate proof labeling scheme (APLS) (analogous to the type of relaxation used in sequential approximation algorithms); and (2) configured graph families (CGFs) based on the notion of atesting proof labeling schemes (TPLS) (analogous to the type of relaxation used in property testing algorithms).
summary: Introduced by Korman, Kutten, and Peleg (PODC 2005), a proof labeling scheme (PLS) is a distributed verification system dedicated to evaluating if a given configured graph satisfies a certain property. It involves a centralized prover, whose role is to provide proof that a given configured graph is a yes-instance by means of assigning labels to the nodes, and a distributed verifier, whose role is to verify the validity of the given proof via local access to the assigned labels. In this paper, we introduce the notion of a locally restricted PLS in which the prover's power is restricted to that of a LOCAL algorithm with a polylogarithmic number of rounds. To circumvent inherent impossibilities of PLSs in the locally restricted setting, we turn to models that relax the correctness requirements by allowing the verifier to accept some no-instances as long as they are not "too far" from satisfying the property in question. To this end, we evaluate (1) distributed graph optimization problems (OptDGPs) based on the notion of an approximate proof labeling scheme (APLS) (analogous to the type of relaxation used in sequential approximation algorithms); and (2) configured graph families (CGFs) based on the notion of atesting proof labeling schemes (TPLS) (analogous to the type of relaxation used in property testing algorithms).
abstract_zh: 证明标签方案 (PLS) 由 Korman、Kutten 和 Peleg (PODC 2005) 提出，是一种分布式验证系统，致力于评估给定的配置图是否满足某个属性。它涉及一个集中式证明者，其作用是通过向节点分配标签来证明给定的配置图是一个“是”实例，以及一个分布式验证者，其作用是通过本地访问分配的标签来验证给定证明的有效性。在本文中，我们引入了局部受限 PLS 的概念，其中证明者的能力被限制为具有多对数轮数的 LOCAL 算法。为了规避 PLS 在局部受限环境中固有的不可能性，我们转向放宽正确性要求的模型，允许验证者接受一些非实例，只要它们距离满足相关属性不是“太远”。为此，我们评估（1）基于近似证明标记方案（APLS）概念的分布式图优化问题（OptDGP）（类似于顺序逼近算法中使用的松弛类型）； (2) 基于测试证明标记方案 (TPLS) 概念的配置图族 (CGF)（类似于属性测试算法中使用的松弛类型）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部受限的证明标记方案（PLS），通过限制证明者的计算能力并放松验证条件，解决分布式图属性验证问题。
AI.motivation: 传统PLS在局部限制下存在固有不可行性，需通过放宽正确性要求来实现有效验证，以应对分布式系统中资源受限的现实场景。
AI.method: 引入近似证明标记方案（APLS）处理分布式图优化问题，及测试证明标记方案（TPLS）处理配置图家族，分别对应序列化近似算法和属性测试算法的放松模型。
AI.result: 分析了APLS与TPLS在放松条件下的可行性，证明其能在局部受限框架中有效验证图属性，同时保持近似精度或测试效率。
AI.conclusion: 局部受限PLS通过条件放松可实现分布式验证，为资源受限环境下的图属性检测提供了理论基础与新研究方向。

authors_text: Xiuzhan Guo,Arthur Berrill,Ajinkya Kulkarni,Kostya Belezko,Min Luo
title: Merging Ontologies Algebraically
title_zh: 以代数方式合并本体
abstract: Ontology operations, e.g., aligning and merging, were studied and implemented extensively in different settings, such as, categorical operations, relation algebras, typed graph grammars, with different concerns. However, aligning and merging operations in the settings share some generic properties, e.g., idempotence, commutativity, associativity, and representativity, labeled by (I), (C), (A), and (R), respectively, which are defined on an ontology merging system $(\mathfrak{O},\sim,\merge)$, where $\mathfrak{O}$ is a set of the ontologies concerned, $\sim$ is a binary relation on $\mathfrak{O}$ modeling ontology aligning and $\merge$ is a partial binary operation on $\mathfrak{O}$ modeling ontology merging. Given an ontology repository, a finite set $\mathbb{O}\subseteq \mathfrak{O}$, its merging closure $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ is the smallest set of ontologies, which contains the repository and is closed with respect to merging. If (I), (C), (A), and (R) are satisfied, then both $\mathfrak{O}$ and $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ are partially ordered naturally by merging, $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ is finite and can be computed efficiently, including sorting, selecting, and querying some specific elements, e.g., maximal ontologies and minimal ontologies. We also show that the ontology merging system, given by ontology $V$-alignment pairs and pushouts, satisfies the properties: (I), (C), (A), and (R) so that the merging system is partially ordered and the merging closure of a given repository with respect to pushouts can be computed efficiently.
summary: Ontology operations, e.g., aligning and merging, were studied and implemented extensively in different settings, such as, categorical operations, relation algebras, typed graph grammars, with different concerns. However, aligning and merging operations in the settings share some generic properties, e.g., idempotence, commutativity, associativity, and representativity, labeled by (I), (C), (A), and (R), respectively, which are defined on an ontology merging system $(\mathfrak{O},\sim,\merge)$, where $\mathfrak{O}$ is a set of the ontologies concerned, $\sim$ is a binary relation on $\mathfrak{O}$ modeling ontology aligning and $\merge$ is a partial binary operation on $\mathfrak{O}$ modeling ontology merging. Given an ontology repository, a finite set $\mathbb{O}\subseteq \mathfrak{O}$, its merging closure $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ is the smallest set of ontologies, which contains the repository and is closed with respect to merging. If (I), (C), (A), and (R) are satisfied, then both $\mathfrak{O}$ and $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ are partially ordered naturally by merging, $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ is finite and can be computed efficiently, including sorting, selecting, and querying some specific elements, e.g., maximal ontologies and minimal ontologies. We also show that the ontology merging system, given by ontology $V$-alignment pairs and pushouts, satisfies the properties: (I), (C), (A), and (R) so that the merging system is partially ordered and the merging closure of a given repository with respect to pushouts can be computed efficiently.
abstract_zh: 本体操作，例如对齐和合并，在不同的环境中被广泛研究和实现，例如分类操作、关系代数、类型图语法，具有不同的关注点。然而，设置中的对齐和合并操作共享一些通用属性，例如幂等性、交换性、结合性和表示性，分别用(I)、(C)、(A)和(R)标记，这些属性在本体合并系统$(\mathfrak{O},\sim,\merge)$上定义，其中$\mathfrak{O}$是相关本体的集合， $\sim$是$\mathfrak{O}$建模本体对齐上的二元关系，$\merge$是$\mathfrak{O}$建模本体合并上的部分二元运算。给定一个本体存储库，一个有限集 $\mathbb{O}\subseteq \mathfrak{O}$，其合并闭包 $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ 是本体的最小集合，它包含存储库并且对于合并而言是封闭的。如果满足(I)、(C)、(A)和(R)，则$\mathfrak{O}$和$\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$通过合并自然部分排序，$\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$是有限的并且可以有效地计算，包括排序、选择和查询一些特定元素，例如最大本体和最小本体。我们还表明，由本体 $V$ 对齐对和推出给出的本体合并系统满足属性：(I)、(C)、(A) 和 (R)，以便合并系统是部分有序的，并且可以有效地计算给定存储库相对于推出的合并闭包。

search_text: Merging Ontologies Algebraically 以代数方式合并本体 Ontology operations, e.g., aligning and merging, were studied and implemented extensively in different settings, such as, categorical operations, relation algebras, typed graph grammars, with different concerns. However, aligning and merging operations in the settings share some generic properties, e.g., idempotence, commutativity, associativity, and representativity, labeled by (I), (C), (A), and (R), respectively, which are defined on an ontology merging system $(\mathfrak{O},\sim,\merge)$, where $\mathfrak{O}$ is a set of the ontologies concerned, $\sim$ is a binary relation on $\mathfrak{O}$ modeling ontology aligning and $\merge$ is a partial binary operation on $\mathfrak{O}$ modeling ontology merging. Given an ontology repository, a finite set $\mathbb{O}\subseteq \mathfrak{O}$, its merging closure $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ is the smallest set of ontologies, which contains the repository and is closed with respect to merging. If (I), (C), (A), and (R) are satisfied, then both $\mathfrak{O}$ and $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ are partially ordered naturally by merging, $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ is finite and can be computed efficiently, including sorting, selecting, and querying some specific elements, e.g., maximal ontologies and minimal ontologies. We also show that the ontology merging system, given by ontology $V$-alignment pairs and pushouts, satisfies the properties: (I), (C), (A), and (R) so that the merging system is partially ordered and the merging closure of a given repository with respect to pushouts can be computed efficiently. 本体操作，例如对齐和合并，在不同的环境中被广泛研究和实现，例如分类操作、关系代数、类型图语法，具有不同的关注点。然而，设置中的对齐和合并操作共享一些通用属性，例如幂等性、交换性、结合性和表示性，分别用(I)、(C)、(A)和(R)标记，这些属性在本体合并系统$(\mathfrak{O},\sim,\merge)$上定义，其中$\mathfrak{O}$是相关本体的集合， $\sim$是$\mathfrak{O}$建模本体对齐上的二元关系，$\merge$是$\mathfrak{O}$建模本体合并上的部分二元运算。给定一个本体存储库，一个有限集 $\mathbb{O}\subseteq \mathfrak{O}$，其合并闭包 $\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$ 是本体的最小集合，它包含存储库并且对于合并而言是封闭的。如果满足(I)、(C)、(A)和(R)，则$\mathfrak{O}$和$\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$通过合并自然部分排序，$\widehat{\mathbb{O}}$是有限的并且可以有效地计算，包括排序、选择和查询一些特定元素，例如最大本体和最小本体。我们还表明，由本体 $V$ 对齐对和推出给出的本体合并系统满足属性：(I)、(C)、(A) 和 (R)，以便合并系统是部分有序的，并且可以有效地计算给定存储库相对于推出的合并闭包。 本文提出了一种基于代数结构的本体合并方法，通过定义合并系统中的通用属性（如幂等性、交换性等）来实现本体仓库的高效合并与计算。 Xiuzhan Guo,Arthur Berrill,Ajinkya Kulkarni,Kostya Belezko,Min Luo cs.AI,cs.DB,cs.DM

authors_text: Samuel T. Wauthier,Bram Vanhecke,Tim Verbelen,Bart Dhoedt
title: Learning Generative Models for Active Inference using Tensor Networks
title_zh: 使用张量网络学习主动推理的生成模型
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at IWAI2022 @ ECML/PKDD2022
comments: Accepted as a workshop paper at IWAI2022 @ ECML/PKDD2022
abstract: Active inference provides a general framework for behavior and learning in autonomous agents. It states that an agent will attempt to minimize its variational free energy, defined in terms of beliefs over observations, internal states and policies. Traditionally, every aspect of a discrete active inference model must be specified by hand, i.e. by manually defining the hidden state space structure, as well as the required distributions such as likelihood and transition probabilities. Recently, efforts have been made to learn state space representations automatically from observations using deep neural networks. In this paper, we present a novel approach of learning state spaces using quantum physics-inspired tensor networks. The ability of tensor networks to represent the probabilistic nature of quantum states as well as to reduce large state spaces makes tensor networks a natural candidate for active inference. We show how tensor networks can be used as a generative model for sequential data. Furthermore, we show how one can obtain beliefs from such a generative model and how an active inference agent can use these to compute the expected free energy. Finally, we demonstrate our method on the classic T-maze environment.
summary: Active inference provides a general framework for behavior and learning in autonomous agents. It states that an agent will attempt to minimize its variational free energy, defined in terms of beliefs over observations, internal states and policies. Traditionally, every aspect of a discrete active inference model must be specified by hand, i.e. by manually defining the hidden state space structure, as well as the required distributions such as likelihood and transition probabilities. Recently, efforts have been made to learn state space representations automatically from observations using deep neural networks. In this paper, we present a novel approach of learning state spaces using quantum physics-inspired tensor networks. The ability of tensor networks to represent the probabilistic nature of quantum states as well as to reduce large state spaces makes tensor networks a natural candidate for active inference. We show how tensor networks can be used as a generative model for sequential data. Furthermore, we show how one can obtain beliefs from such a generative model and how an active inference agent can use these to compute the expected free energy. Finally, we demonstrate our method on the classic T-maze environment.
abstract_zh: 主动推理为自主代理的行为和学习提供了通用框架。它指出，智能体将尝试最小化其变分自由能，变分自由能是根据对观察、内部状态和政策的信念来定义的。传统上，离散主动推理模型的每个方面都必须手动指定，即通过手动定义隐藏状态空间结构以及所需的分布（例如似然度和转移概率）。最近，人们努力使用深度神经网络从观察中自动学习状态空间表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用量子物理启发的张量网络来学习状态空间的新方法。张量网络表示量子态的概率性质以及减少大状态空间的能力使张量网络成为主动推理的自然候选者。我们展示了如何将张量网络用作顺序数据的生成模型。此外，我们还展示了如何从这样的生成模型中获得信念，以及主动推理代理如何使用这些信念来计算预期的自由能。最后，我们在经典的 T 迷宫环境中演示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用量子物理启发的张量网络学习主动推理的生成模型，以自动构建状态空间表示，替代传统手动定义的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统主动推理模型需手动定义状态空间结构和概率分布，效率低下；深度学习虽可自动学习但存在局限，需探索更高效的建模方法。
AI.method: 采用张量网络作为生成模型，通过其概率表示能力和降维特性学习状态空间，并基于此计算信念和预期自由能，最终在T-maze环境中验证方法。
AI.result: 成功在经典T-maze环境中演示了张量网络生成模型的有效性，验证了其在主动推理任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络为自动学习状态空间提供了新途径，可有效支持主动推理框架，未来可进一步探索其在复杂场景中的应用。

authors_text: Jonghyun Bae,Woohyeon Baek,Tae Jun Ham,Jae W. Lee
title: L3: Accelerator-Friendly Lossless Image Format for High-Resolution, High-Throughput DNN Training
title_zh: L3：加速器友好的无损图像格式，用于高分辨率、高吞吐量 DNN 训练
comment: To be published in 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)
comments: To be published in 2022 European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)
abstract: The training process of deep neural networks (DNNs) is usually pipelined with stages for data preparation on CPUs followed by gradient computation on accelerators like GPUs. In an ideal pipeline, the end-to-end training throughput is eventually limited by the throughput of the accelerator, not by that of data preparation. In the past, the DNN training pipeline achieved a near-optimal throughput by utilizing datasets encoded with a lightweight, lossy image format like JPEG. However, as high-resolution, losslessly-encoded datasets become more popular for applications requiring high accuracy, a performance problem arises in the data preparation stage due to low-throughput image decoding on the CPU. Thus, we propose L3, a custom lightweight, lossless image format for high-resolution, high-throughput DNN training. The decoding process of L3 is effectively parallelized on the accelerator, thus minimizing CPU intervention for data preparation during DNN training. L3 achieves a 9.29x higher data preparation throughput than PNG, the most popular lossless image format, for the Cityscapes dataset on NVIDIA A100 GPU, which leads to 1.71x higher end-to-end training throughput. Compared to JPEG and WebP, two popular lossy image formats, L3 provides up to 1.77x and 2.87x higher end-to-end training throughput for ImageNet, respectively, at equivalent metric performance.
summary: The training process of deep neural networks (DNNs) is usually pipelined with stages for data preparation on CPUs followed by gradient computation on accelerators like GPUs. In an ideal pipeline, the end-to-end training throughput is eventually limited by the throughput of the accelerator, not by that of data preparation. In the past, the DNN training pipeline achieved a near-optimal throughput by utilizing datasets encoded with a lightweight, lossy image format like JPEG. However, as high-resolution, losslessly-encoded datasets become more popular for applications requiring high accuracy, a performance problem arises in the data preparation stage due to low-throughput image decoding on the CPU. Thus, we propose L3, a custom lightweight, lossless image format for high-resolution, high-throughput DNN training. The decoding process of L3 is effectively parallelized on the accelerator, thus minimizing CPU intervention for data preparation during DNN training. L3 achieves a 9.29x higher data preparation throughput than PNG, the most popular lossless image format, for the Cityscapes dataset on NVIDIA A100 GPU, which leads to 1.71x higher end-to-end training throughput. Compared to JPEG and WebP, two popular lossy image formats, L3 provides up to 1.77x and 2.87x higher end-to-end training throughput for ImageNet, respectively, at equivalent metric performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的训练过程通常采用流水线方式，先在 CPU 上进行数据准备，然后在 GPU 等加速器上进行梯度计算。在理想的管道中，端到端训练吞吐量最终受到加速器吞吐量的限制，而不是数据准备吞吐量的限制。过去，DNN 训练管道通过利用使用 JPEG 等轻量级有损图像格式编码的数据集实现了接近最佳的吞吐量。然而，随着高分辨率、无损编码的数据集在需要高精度的应用中变得越来越流行，由于 CPU 上的低吞吐量图像解码，在数据准备阶段出现了性能问题。因此，我们提出了 L3，一种用于高分辨率、高吞吐量 DNN 训练的定制轻量级无损图像格式。 L3 的解码过程在加速器上有效并行，从而最大限度地减少 DNN 训练期间 CPU 对数据准备的干预。对于 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上的 Cityscapes 数据集，L3 的数据准备吞吐量比最流行的无损图像格式 PNG 高 9.29 倍，从而使端到端训练吞吐量高出 1.71 倍。与 JPEG 和 WebP 这两种流行的有损图像格式相比，在同等指标性能下，L3 为 ImageNet 提供的端到端训练吞吐量分别高出 1.77 倍和 2.87 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出L3，一种专为高分辨率、高吞吐量深度神经网络（DNN）训练优化的轻量无损图像格式。
AI.motivation: 传统有损格式（如JPEG）虽能提升吞吐量，但高分辨率无损数据集的普及导致CPU图像解码成为DNN训练瓶颈，需新型无损格式突破限制。
AI.method: 设计L3格式使其解码过程可在GPU等加速器上并行化，减少CPU干预，从而提升数据准备阶段的吞吐量。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，L3的数据准备吞吐量较PNG提升9.29倍，端到端训练吞吐量较JPEG和WebP分别提升1.71倍和2.87倍。
AI.conclusion: L3通过加速器并行解码有效解决了高分辨率无损图像训练的瓶颈问题，在保持无损精度的同时显著提升训练效率。
