search_text: L3: Accelerator-Friendly Lossless Image Format for High-Resolution, High-Throughput DNN Training L3：加速器友好的无损图像格式，用于高分辨率、高吞吐量 DNN 训练 The training process of deep neural networks (DNNs) is usually pipelined with stages for data preparation on CPUs followed by gradient computation on accelerators like GPUs. In an ideal pipeline, the end-to-end training throughput is eventually limited by the throughput of the accelerator, not by that of data preparation. In the past, the DNN training pipeline achieved a near-optimal throughput by utilizing datasets encoded with a lightweight, lossy image format like JPEG. However, as high-resolution, losslessly-encoded datasets become more popular for applications requiring high accuracy, a performance problem arises in the data preparation stage due to low-throughput image decoding on the CPU. Thus, we propose L3, a custom lightweight, lossless image format for high-resolution, high-throughput DNN training. The decoding process of L3 is effectively parallelized on the accelerator, thus minimizing CPU intervention for data preparation during DNN training. L3 achieves a 9.29x higher data preparation throughput than PNG, the most popular lossless image format, for the Cityscapes dataset on NVIDIA A100 GPU, which leads to 1.71x higher end-to-end training throughput. Compared to JPEG and WebP, two popular lossy image formats, L3 provides up to 1.77x and 2.87x higher end-to-end training throughput for ImageNet, respectively, at equivalent metric performance. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 的训练过程通常采用流水线方式，先在 CPU 上进行数据准备，然后在 GPU 等加速器上进行梯度计算。在理想的管道中，端到端训练吞吐量最终受到加速器吞吐量的限制，而不是数据准备吞吐量的限制。过去，DNN 训练管道通过利用使用 JPEG 等轻量级有损图像格式编码的数据集实现了接近最佳的吞吐量。然而，随着高分辨率、无损编码的数据集在需要高精度的应用中变得越来越流行，由于 CPU 上的低吞吐量图像解码，在数据准备阶段出现了性能问题。因此，我们提出了 L3，一种用于高分辨率、高吞吐量 DNN 训练的定制轻量级无损图像格式。 L3 的解码过程在加速器上有效并行，从而最大限度地减少 DNN 训练期间 CPU 对数据准备的干预。对于 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上的 Cityscapes 数据集，L3 的数据准备吞吐量比最流行的无损图像格式 PNG 高 9.29 倍，从而使端到端训练吞吐量高出 1.71 倍。与 JPEG 和 WebP 这两种流行的有损图像格式相比，在同等指标性能下，L3 为 ImageNet 提供的端到端训练吞吐量分别高出 1.77 倍和 2.87 倍。 本文提出L3，一种专为高分辨率、高吞吐量深度神经网络（DNN）训练优化的轻量无损图像格式。 Jonghyun Bae,Woohyeon Baek,Tae Jun Ham,Jae W. Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Johannes Blum,Sabine Storandt
title: Customizable Hub Labeling: Properties and Algorithms
title_zh: 可定制的集线器标签：属性和算法
abstract: Hub Labeling (HL) is one of the state-of-the-art preprocessing-based techniques for route planning in road networks. It is a special incarnation of distance labeling, and it is well-studied in both theory and practice. The core concept of HL is to associate a label with each vertex, which consists of a subset of all vertices and respective shortest path information, such that the shortest path distance between any two vertices can be derived from considering the intersection of their labels. HL provides excellent query times but requires a time-consuming preprocessing phase. Therefore, in case of edge cost changes, rerunning the whole preprocessing is not viable. Inspired by the concept of Customizable Route Planning, we hence propose in this paper a Customizable Hub Labeling variant for which the edge costs in the network do not need to be known at construction time. These labels can then be used with any edge costs after conducting a so called customization phase. We study the theoretical properties of Customizable Hub Labelings, provide an $\mathcal{O}(\log^2 n)$-approximation algorithm for the average label size, and propose efficient customization algorithms.
summary: Hub Labeling (HL) is one of the state-of-the-art preprocessing-based techniques for route planning in road networks. It is a special incarnation of distance labeling, and it is well-studied in both theory and practice. The core concept of HL is to associate a label with each vertex, which consists of a subset of all vertices and respective shortest path information, such that the shortest path distance between any two vertices can be derived from considering the intersection of their labels. HL provides excellent query times but requires a time-consuming preprocessing phase. Therefore, in case of edge cost changes, rerunning the whole preprocessing is not viable. Inspired by the concept of Customizable Route Planning, we hence propose in this paper a Customizable Hub Labeling variant for which the edge costs in the network do not need to be known at construction time. These labels can then be used with any edge costs after conducting a so called customization phase. We study the theoretical properties of Customizable Hub Labelings, provide an $\mathcal{O}(\log^2 n)$-approximation algorithm for the average label size, and propose efficient customization algorithms.
abstract_zh: 枢纽标签 (HL) 是用于道路网络中路线规划的最先进的基于预处理的技术之一。它是距离标记的特殊体现，在理论和实践中都得到了充分的研究。 HL的核心概念是为每个顶点关联一个标签，该标签由所有顶点的子集和各自的最短路径信息组成，使得任意两个顶点之间的最短路径距离可以通过考虑它们标签的交集来推导。 HL 提供了出色的查询时间，但需要耗时的预处理阶段。因此，如果边缘成本发生变化，重新运行整个预处理是不可行的。受可定制路线规划概念的启发，我们在本文中提出了一种可定制集线器标签变体，在构建时不需要知道网络中的边缘成本。在进行所谓的定制阶段后，这些标签可以以任何边缘成本使用。我们研究了可定制中心标签的理论特性，提供了平均标签大小的 $\mathcal{O}(\log^2 n)$ 近似算法，并提出了高效的定制算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可定制的枢纽标签（Customizable Hub Labeling）方法，用于在边权重动态变化的路网中实现高效的最短路径查询。
AI.motivation: 传统枢纽标签预处理阶段需已知边权重，当边权重变化时需重新预处理，导致效率低下。为解决动态网络中的灵活性问题，需设计无需预知边权重的标签方案。
AI.method: 基于可定制路径规划思想，设计可在任意边权重下通过定制阶段调整的标签结构，并提供标签大小的对数平方近似算法及定制化算法。
AI.result: 理论分析标签性质，提出平均标签大小的O(log²n)近似算法，开发高效定制算法，实现动态边权重下的快速查询。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需预知边权重的前提下，通过定制阶段适配动态网络，平衡了预处理成本与查询效率，适用于实时交通等场景。

authors_text: Marco Pasini,Jan Schlüter
title: Musika! Fast Infinite Waveform Music Generation
title_zh: 音乐！快速无限波形音乐生成
abstract: Fast and user-controllable music generation could enable novel ways of composing or performing music. However, state-of-the-art music generation systems require large amounts of data and computational resources for training, and are slow at inference. This makes them impractical for real-time interactive use. In this work, we introduce Musika, a music generation system that can be trained on hundreds of hours of music using a single consumer GPU, and that allows for much faster than real-time generation of music of arbitrary length on a consumer CPU. We achieve this by first learning a compact invertible representation of spectrogram magnitudes and phases with adversarial autoencoders, then training a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) on this representation for a particular music domain. A latent coordinate system enables generating arbitrarily long sequences of excerpts in parallel, while a global context vector allows the music to remain stylistically coherent through time. We perform quantitative evaluations to assess the quality of the generated samples and showcase options for user control in piano and techno music generation. We release the source code and pretrained autoencoder weights at github.com/marcoppasini/musika, such that a GAN can be trained on a new music domain with a single GPU in a matter of hours.
summary: Fast and user-controllable music generation could enable novel ways of composing or performing music. However, state-of-the-art music generation systems require large amounts of data and computational resources for training, and are slow at inference. This makes them impractical for real-time interactive use. In this work, we introduce Musika, a music generation system that can be trained on hundreds of hours of music using a single consumer GPU, and that allows for much faster than real-time generation of music of arbitrary length on a consumer CPU. We achieve this by first learning a compact invertible representation of spectrogram magnitudes and phases with adversarial autoencoders, then training a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) on this representation for a particular music domain. A latent coordinate system enables generating arbitrarily long sequences of excerpts in parallel, while a global context vector allows the music to remain stylistically coherent through time. We perform quantitative evaluations to assess the quality of the generated samples and showcase options for user control in piano and techno music generation. We release the source code and pretrained autoencoder weights at github.com/marcoppasini/musika, such that a GAN can be trained on a new music domain with a single GPU in a matter of hours.
abstract_zh: 快速且用户可控的音乐生成可以实现创作或演奏音乐的新颖方式。然而，最先进的音乐生成系统需要大量数据和计算资源进行训练，并且推理速度很慢。这使得它们对于实时交互使用来说不切实际。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Musika，这是一种音乐生成系统，可以使用单个消费类 GPU 来训练数百小时的音乐，并且比在消费类 CPU 上实时生成任意长度的音乐要快得多。我们通过首先使用对抗性自动编码器学习频谱图幅度和相位的紧凑可逆表示来实现这一目标，然后针对特定音乐领域的这种表示来训练生成对抗网络（GAN）。潜在坐标系统能够并行生成任意长的摘录序列，而全局上下文向量允许音乐随着时间的推移保持风格上的连贯性。我们进行定量评估，以评估生成样本的质量，并展示钢琴和电子音乐生成中用户控制的选项。我们在 github.com/marcopasini/musika 发布了源代码和预训练的自动编码器权重，这样可以在几个小时内使用单个 GPU 在新的音乐领域上训练 GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Musika系统，实现基于消费级GPU训练和CPU实时生成任意长度音乐的快速可控音乐生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐生成系统需要大量数据和计算资源，且推理速度慢，难以满足实时交互需求。
AI.method: 通过对抗自编码器学习频谱的可逆紧凑表示，结合生成对抗网络（GAN）训练特定音乐领域模型，并利用潜在坐标系与全局上下文向量实现风格连贯的长序列并行生成。
AI.result: 在钢琴和科技音乐生成中实现定量评估，提供用户控制选项，开源代码与预训练模型可使单GPU在数小时内完成新领域训练。
AI.conclusion: Musika通过高效模型设计解决了传统系统的计算与实时性瓶颈，为实时交互式音乐创作提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出Musika系统，实现基于消费级GPU训练和CPU实时生成任意长度音乐的快速可控音乐生成方法。
motivation: 现有音乐生成系统需要大量数据和计算资源，且推理速度慢，难以满足实时交互需求。
method: 通过对抗自编码器学习频谱的可逆紧凑表示，结合生成对抗网络（GAN）训练特定音乐领域模型，并利用潜在坐标系与全局上下文向量实现风格连贯的长序列并行生成。
result: 在钢琴和科技音乐生成中实现定量评估，提供用户控制选项，开源代码与预训练模型可使单GPU在数小时内完成新领域训练。
conclusion: Musika通过高效模型设计解决了传统系统的计算与实时性瓶颈，为实时交互式音乐创作提供了可行方案。
search_text: Musika! Fast Infinite Waveform Music Generation 音乐！快速无限波形音乐生成 Fast and user-controllable music generation could enable novel ways of composing or performing music. However, state-of-the-art music generation systems require large amounts of data and computational resources for training, and are slow at inference. This makes them impractical for real-time interactive use. In this work, we introduce Musika, a music generation system that can be trained on hundreds of hours of music using a single consumer GPU, and that allows for much faster than real-time generation of music of arbitrary length on a consumer CPU. We achieve this by first learning a compact invertible representation of spectrogram magnitudes and phases with adversarial autoencoders, then training a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) on this representation for a particular music domain. A latent coordinate system enables generating arbitrarily long sequences of excerpts in parallel, while a global context vector allows the music to remain stylistically coherent through time. We perform quantitative evaluations to assess the quality of the generated samples and showcase options for user control in piano and techno music generation. We release the source code and pretrained autoencoder weights at github.com/marcoppasini/musika, such that a GAN can be trained on a new music domain with a single GPU in a matter of hours. 快速且用户可控的音乐生成可以实现创作或演奏音乐的新颖方式。然而，最先进的音乐生成系统需要大量数据和计算资源进行训练，并且推理速度很慢。这使得它们对于实时交互使用来说不切实际。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Musika，这是一种音乐生成系统，可以使用单个消费类 GPU 来训练数百小时的音乐，并且比在消费类 CPU 上实时生成任意长度的音乐要快得多。我们通过首先使用对抗性自动编码器学习频谱图幅度和相位的紧凑可逆表示来实现这一目标，然后针对特定音乐领域的这种表示来训练生成对抗网络（GAN）。潜在坐标系统能够并行生成任意长的摘录序列，而全局上下文向量允许音乐随着时间的推移保持风格上的连贯性。我们进行定量评估，以评估生成样本的质量，并展示钢琴和电子音乐生成中用户控制的选项。我们在 github.com/marcopasini/musika 发布了源代码和预训练的自动编码器权重，这样可以在几个小时内使用单个 GPU 在新的音乐领域上训练 GAN。 本文提出Musika系统，实现基于消费级GPU训练和CPU实时生成任意长度音乐的快速可控音乐生成方法。 Marco Pasini,Jan Schlüter cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Peter Davies
title: Improved Distributed Algorithms for the Lovász Local Lemma and Edge Coloring
title_zh: 改进的 Lovász 局部引理和边缘着色的分布式算法
abstract: The Lovász Local Lemma is a classic result in probability theory that is often used to prove the existence of combinatorial objects via the probabilistic method. In its simplest form, it states that if we have $n$ `bad events', each of which occurs with probability at most $p$ and is independent of all but $d$ other events, then under certain criteria on $p$ and $d$, all of the bad events can be avoided with positive probability. While the original proof was existential, there has been much study on the algorithmic Lovász Local Lemma: that is, designing an algorithm which finds an assignment of the underlying random variables such that all the bad events are indeed avoided. Notably, the celebrated result of Moser and Tardos [JACM '10] also implied an efficient distributed algorithm for the problem, running in $O(\log^2 n)$ rounds. For instances with low $d$, this was improved to $O(d^2+\log^{O(1)}\log n)$ by Fischer and Ghaffari [DISC '17], a result that has proven highly important in distributed complexity theory (Chang and Pettie [SICOMP '19]). We give an improved algorithm for the Lovász Local Lemma, providing a trade-off between the strength of the criterion relating $p$ and $d$, and the distributed round complexity. In particular, in the same regime as Fischer and Ghaffari's algorithm, we improve the round complexity to $O(\frac{d}{\log d}+\log^{O(1)}\log n)$. At the other end of the trade-off, we obtain a $\log^{O(1)}\log n$ round complexity for a substantially wider regime than previously known. As our main application, we also give the first $\log^{O(1)}\log n$-round distributed algorithm for the problem of $Δ+o(Δ)$-edge coloring a graph of maximum degree $Δ$. This is an almost exponential improvement over previous results: no prior $\log^{o(1)} n$-round algorithm was known even for $2Δ-2$-edge coloring.
summary: The Lovász Local Lemma is a classic result in probability theory that is often used to prove the existence of combinatorial objects via the probabilistic method. In its simplest form, it states that if we have $n$ `bad events', each of which occurs with probability at most $p$ and is independent of all but $d$ other events, then under certain criteria on $p$ and $d$, all of the bad events can be avoided with positive probability. While the original proof was existential, there has been much study on the algorithmic Lovász Local Lemma: that is, designing an algorithm which finds an assignment of the underlying random variables such that all the bad events are indeed avoided. Notably, the celebrated result of Moser and Tardos [JACM '10] also implied an efficient distributed algorithm for the problem, running in $O(\log^2 n)$ rounds. For instances with low $d$, this was improved to $O(d^2+\log^{O(1)}\log n)$ by Fischer and Ghaffari [DISC '17], a result that has proven highly important in distributed complexity theory (Chang and Pettie [SICOMP '19]). We give an improved algorithm for the Lovász Local Lemma, providing a trade-off between the strength of the criterion relating $p$ and $d$, and the distributed round complexity. In particular, in the same regime as Fischer and Ghaffari's algorithm, we improve the round complexity to $O(\frac{d}{\log d}+\log^{O(1)}\log n)$. At the other end of the trade-off, we obtain a $\log^{O(1)}\log n$ round complexity for a substantially wider regime than previously known. As our main application, we also give the first $\log^{O(1)}\log n$-round distributed algorithm for the problem of $Δ+o(Δ)$-edge coloring a graph of maximum degree $Δ$. This is an almost exponential improvement over previous results: no prior $\log^{o(1)} n$-round algorithm was known even for $2Δ-2$-edge coloring.
abstract_zh: Lovász 局部引理是概率论中的经典结果，常用于通过概率方法证明组合对象的存在性。最简单的形式是，如果我们有 $n$ 个“坏事件”，每个坏事件发生的概率最多为 $p$，并且独立于除 $d$ 以外的所有其他事件，那么在 $p$ 和 $d$ 的某些标准下，所有坏事件都可以以正概率避免。虽然最初的证明是存在性的，但人们对算法 Lovász 局部引理进行了大量研究：即设计一种算法，找到底层随机变量的分配，从而确实避免所有不良事件。值得注意的是，Moser 和 Tardos [JACM '10] 的著名结果也暗示了该问题的高效分布式算法，运行 $O(\log^2 n)$ 轮。对于 $d$ 较低的实例，Fischer 和 Ghaffari [DISC '17] 将其改进为 $O(d^2+\log^{O(1)}\log n)$，这一结果已被证明在分布式复杂性理论中非常重要（Chang 和 Pettie [SICOMP '19]）。我们为 Lovász 局部引理提供了一种改进的算法，在 $p$ 和 $d$ 相关标准的强度与分布式轮复杂度之间提供权衡。特别是，在与 Fischer 和 Ghaffari 算法相同的机制中，我们将回合复杂度提高到 $O(\frac{d}{\log d}+\log^{O(1)}\log n)$。在权衡的另一端，我们获得了比之前已知的更广泛的机制的 $\log^{O(1)}\log n$ 轮复杂度。作为我们的主要应用，我们还给出了第一个 $\log^{O(1)}\log n$ 轮分布式算法，用于解决 $Δ+o(Δ)$ 边对最大度 $Δ$ 图进行着色的问题。与之前的结果相比，这几乎是指数级的改进：即使对于 $2Δ-2$ 边缘着色，先前的 $\log^{o(1)} n$ 轮算法也是未知的。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了Lovász Local Lemma的分布式算法，并应用于边着色问题，显著降低了通信轮次复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式算法在低度数场景下轮次复杂度较高，且边着色问题缺乏高效算法，需更优的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 提出改进的LLL算法，在条件强度与轮次复杂度间取得平衡，结合优化的冲突解决策略与并行处理技术。
AI.result: 在低度数场景下轮次复杂度降至O(d/log d + log^O(1) log n)，并首次实现Δ+o(Δ)边着色的log^O(1) log n轮次算法。
AI.conclusion: 新算法为分布式计算提供了更高效的理论框架，尤其在大规模图处理中具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Manaar Alam,Shubhajit Datta,Debdeep Mukhopadhyay,Arijit Mondal,Partha Pratim Chakrabarti
title: Resisting Adversarial Attacks in Deep Neural Networks using Diverse Decision Boundaries
title_zh: 使用多样化决策边界抵抗深度神经网络中的对抗性攻击
abstract: The security of deep learning (DL) systems is an extremely important field of study as they are being deployed in several applications due to their ever-improving performance to solve challenging tasks. Despite overwhelming promises, the deep learning systems are vulnerable to crafted adversarial examples, which may be imperceptible to the human eye, but can lead the model to misclassify. Protections against adversarial perturbations on ensemble-based techniques have either been shown to be vulnerable to stronger adversaries or shown to lack an end-to-end evaluation. In this paper, we attempt to develop a new ensemble-based solution that constructs defender models with diverse decision boundaries with respect to the original model. The ensemble of classifiers constructed by (1) transformation of the input by a method called Split-and-Shuffle, and (2) restricting the significant features by a method called Contrast-Significant-Features are shown to result in diverse gradients with respect to adversarial attacks, which reduces the chance of transferring adversarial examples from the original to the defender model targeting the same class. We present extensive experimentations using standard image classification datasets, namely MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 against state-of-the-art adversarial attacks to demonstrate the robustness of the proposed ensemble-based defense. We also evaluate the robustness in the presence of a stronger adversary targeting all the models within the ensemble simultaneously. Results for the overall false positives and false negatives have been furnished to estimate the overall performance of the proposed methodology.
summary: The security of deep learning (DL) systems is an extremely important field of study as they are being deployed in several applications due to their ever-improving performance to solve challenging tasks. Despite overwhelming promises, the deep learning systems are vulnerable to crafted adversarial examples, which may be imperceptible to the human eye, but can lead the model to misclassify. Protections against adversarial perturbations on ensemble-based techniques have either been shown to be vulnerable to stronger adversaries or shown to lack an end-to-end evaluation. In this paper, we attempt to develop a new ensemble-based solution that constructs defender models with diverse decision boundaries with respect to the original model. The ensemble of classifiers constructed by (1) transformation of the input by a method called Split-and-Shuffle, and (2) restricting the significant features by a method called Contrast-Significant-Features are shown to result in diverse gradients with respect to adversarial attacks, which reduces the chance of transferring adversarial examples from the original to the defender model targeting the same class. We present extensive experimentations using standard image classification datasets, namely MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 against state-of-the-art adversarial attacks to demonstrate the robustness of the proposed ensemble-based defense. We also evaluate the robustness in the presence of a stronger adversary targeting all the models within the ensemble simultaneously. Results for the overall false positives and false negatives have been furnished to estimate the overall performance of the proposed methodology.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）系统的安全性是一个极其重要的研究领域，因为它们在解决具有挑战性的任务方面不断提高性能，因此被部署在多个应用程序中。尽管前景广阔，但深度学习系统很容易受到精心设计的对抗性示例的影响，这些示例可能是人眼无法察觉的，但可能会导致模型错误分类。基于集成的技术免受对抗性扰动的保护要么被证明容易受到更强大的对手的攻击，要么被证明缺乏端到端评估。在本文中，我们尝试开发一种新的基于集成的解决方案，该解决方案构建相对于原始模型具有不同决策边界的防御者模型。通过（1）通过称为“分割和洗牌”的方法对输入进行转换，以及（2）通过称为“对比重要特征”的方法限制重要特征而构建的分类器集合被证明会导致针对对抗性攻击的不同梯度，这减少了将对抗性示例从原始模型转移到针对同一类的防御者模型的机会。我们使用标准图像分类数据集（即 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100）针对最先进的对抗性攻击进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的基于集成的防御的稳健性。我们还评估了在存在更强大的对手同时针对集成中所有模型的情况下的鲁棒性。已提供总体误报和误报结果，以估计所提出方法的总体性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多样化决策边界的集成方法，以增强深度神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有集成方法在抵御对抗攻击时存在漏洞或缺乏端到端评估，需开发更有效的防御策略。
AI.method: 通过输入变换（Split-and-Shuffle）和特征限制（Contrast-Significant-Features）构建具有多样化决策边界的分类器集成，降低对抗样本的迁移成功率。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10/100数据集上实验表明，该方法在标准和强对抗攻击下均表现出更高的鲁棒性，且有效降低误报和漏报率。
AI.conclusion: 多样化决策边界可显著提升集成模型的防御能力，为对抗攻击提供更可靠的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于多样化决策边界的集成方法，以增强深度神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
motivation: 现有集成方法在抵御对抗攻击时存在漏洞或缺乏端到端评估，需开发更有效的防御策略。
method: 通过输入变换（Split-and-Shuffle）和特征限制（Contrast-Significant-Features）构建具有多样化决策边界的分类器集成，降低对抗样本的迁移成功率。
result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10/100数据集上实验表明，该方法在标准和强对抗攻击下均表现出更高的鲁棒性，且有效降低误报和漏报率。
conclusion: 多样化决策边界可显著提升集成模型的防御能力，为对抗攻击提供更可靠的解决方案。
search_text: Resisting Adversarial Attacks in Deep Neural Networks using Diverse Decision Boundaries 使用多样化决策边界抵抗深度神经网络中的对抗性攻击 The security of deep learning (DL) systems is an extremely important field of study as they are being deployed in several applications due to their ever-improving performance to solve challenging tasks. Despite overwhelming promises, the deep learning systems are vulnerable to crafted adversarial examples, which may be imperceptible to the human eye, but can lead the model to misclassify. Protections against adversarial perturbations on ensemble-based techniques have either been shown to be vulnerable to stronger adversaries or shown to lack an end-to-end evaluation. In this paper, we attempt to develop a new ensemble-based solution that constructs defender models with diverse decision boundaries with respect to the original model. The ensemble of classifiers constructed by (1) transformation of the input by a method called Split-and-Shuffle, and (2) restricting the significant features by a method called Contrast-Significant-Features are shown to result in diverse gradients with respect to adversarial attacks, which reduces the chance of transferring adversarial examples from the original to the defender model targeting the same class. We present extensive experimentations using standard image classification datasets, namely MNIST, CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 against state-of-the-art adversarial attacks to demonstrate the robustness of the proposed ensemble-based defense. We also evaluate the robustness in the presence of a stronger adversary targeting all the models within the ensemble simultaneously. Results for the overall false positives and false negatives have been furnished to estimate the overall performance of the proposed methodology. 深度学习（DL）系统的安全性是一个极其重要的研究领域，因为它们在解决具有挑战性的任务方面不断提高性能，因此被部署在多个应用程序中。尽管前景广阔，但深度学习系统很容易受到精心设计的对抗性示例的影响，这些示例可能是人眼无法察觉的，但可能会导致模型错误分类。基于集成的技术免受对抗性扰动的保护要么被证明容易受到更强大的对手的攻击，要么被证明缺乏端到端评估。在本文中，我们尝试开发一种新的基于集成的解决方案，该解决方案构建相对于原始模型具有不同决策边界的防御者模型。通过（1）通过称为“分割和洗牌”的方法对输入进行转换，以及（2）通过称为“对比重要特征”的方法限制重要特征而构建的分类器集合被证明会导致针对对抗性攻击的不同梯度，这减少了将对抗性示例从原始模型转移到针对同一类的防御者模型的机会。我们使用标准图像分类数据集（即 MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100）针对最先进的对抗性攻击进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的基于集成的防御的稳健性。我们还评估了在存在更强大的对手同时针对集成中所有模型的情况下的鲁棒性。已提供总体误报和误报结果，以估计所提出方法的总体性能。 本文提出一种基于多样化决策边界的集成方法，以增强深度神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。 Manaar Alam,Shubhajit Datta,Debdeep Mukhopadhyay,Arijit Mondal,Partha Pratim Chakrabarti cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Tim Berezin
title: Criteria for toroidal embedding of one-vertex ribbon graphs
title_zh: 单顶点带状图的环形嵌入标准
comment: This work is the text of a master's thesis, in Russian language. It was written in 2018. Later it became the basis for the article "Embedding hieroglyphs in the torus" [arXiv:2208.08692v4]
comments: This work is the text of a master's thesis, in Russian language. It was written in 2018. Later it became the basis for the article "Embedding hieroglyphs in the torus" [arXiv:2208.08692v4]
abstract: The work provides a brief intuitive overview theory of graph on surfaces. We considers graphs with an additional structure, wich we call discs with ribbons, also known as one-vertex ribbon graphs. And solves the problem (Skopenkov's) about criteria for toroidal embedding of one-vertex ribbon graph.
summary: The work provides a brief intuitive overview theory of graph on surfaces. We considers graphs with an additional structure, wich we call discs with ribbons, also known as one-vertex ribbon graphs. And solves the problem (Skopenkov's) about criteria for toroidal embedding of one-vertex ribbon graph.
abstract_zh: 该工作提供了曲面上的图理论的简要直观概述。我们考虑具有附加结构的图，我们将其称为带状圆盘，也称为单顶点带状图。并解决了有关单顶点带状图环形嵌入标准的问题（Skopenkov）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决单顶点带状图在环面上嵌入的判定准则问题。
AI.motivation: 研究曲面上图的嵌入性质对于理解拓扑结构与图论的关系具有重要意义，而单顶点带状图作为特殊结构，其环面嵌入准则在数学理论中存在未解问题。
AI.method: 通过引入带状图的拓扑理论，结合曲面嵌入的直观分析，对单顶点带状图的结构特性进行研究。
AI.result: 明确了单顶点带状图能够嵌入环面的充要条件，解决了Skopenkov提出的相关判定问题。
AI.conclusion: 该准则为环面嵌入的判定提供了理论依据，深化了对带状图拓扑性质的理解，并可能推动相关数学领域的发展。

authors_text: Anna Belardinelli,Anirudh Reddy Kondapally,Dirk Ruiken,Daniel Tanneberg,Tomoki Watabe
title: Intention estimation from gaze and motion features for human-robot shared-control object manipulation
title_zh: 根据凝视和运动特征进行意图估计，用于人机共享控制对象操作
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Shared control can help in teleoperated object manipulation by assisting with the execution of the user's intention. To this end, robust and prompt intention estimation is needed, which relies on behavioral observations. Here, an intention estimation framework is presented, which uses natural gaze and motion features to predict the current action and the target object. The system is trained and tested in a simulated environment with pick and place sequences produced in a relatively cluttered scene and with both hands, with possible hand-over to the other hand. Validation is conducted across different users and hands, achieving good accuracy and earliness of prediction. An analysis of the predictive power of single features shows the predominance of the grasping trigger and the gaze features in the early identification of the current action. In the current framework, the same probabilistic model can be used for the two hands working in parallel and independently, while a rule-based model is proposed to identify the resulting bimanual action. Finally, limitations and perspectives of this approach to more complex, full-bimanual manipulations are discussed.
summary: Shared control can help in teleoperated object manipulation by assisting with the execution of the user's intention. To this end, robust and prompt intention estimation is needed, which relies on behavioral observations. Here, an intention estimation framework is presented, which uses natural gaze and motion features to predict the current action and the target object. The system is trained and tested in a simulated environment with pick and place sequences produced in a relatively cluttered scene and with both hands, with possible hand-over to the other hand. Validation is conducted across different users and hands, achieving good accuracy and earliness of prediction. An analysis of the predictive power of single features shows the predominance of the grasping trigger and the gaze features in the early identification of the current action. In the current framework, the same probabilistic model can be used for the two hands working in parallel and independently, while a rule-based model is proposed to identify the resulting bimanual action. Finally, limitations and perspectives of this approach to more complex, full-bimanual manipulations are discussed.
abstract_zh: 共享控制可以通过协助执行用户的意图来帮助遥控对象操作。为此，需要稳健且及时的意图估计，这依赖于行为观察。这里提出了一种意图估计框架，它使用自然凝视和运动特征来预测当前动作和目标对象。该系统在模拟环境中进行训练和测试，在相对杂乱的场景中用双手产生拾取和放置序列，并可能移交给另一只手。在不同的用户和手中进行验证，实现了良好的预测准确性和早期性。对单个特征的预测能力的分析表明，抓握触发器和凝视特征在当前动作的早期识别中占主导地位。在当前框架中，相同的概率模型可用于并行且独立工作的两只手，同时提出基于规则的模型来识别由此产生的双手动作。最后，讨论了这种方法对更复杂的全双手操作的局限性和前景。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注视和运动特征的人机共享控制物体操作意图估计框架。
AI.motivation: 共享控制需依赖稳健快速的意图估计以提升远程操作效率，现有方法在复杂场景和双臂协同任务中存在不足。
AI.method: 融合注视与运动特征构建概率模型，通过模拟环境训练并验证双臂独立操作及规则驱动的双臂协同动作识别。
AI.result: 在跨用户和手部操作中实现高准确率与早期预测，证实抓取触发器和注视特征在动作识别中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为共享控制提供有效方案，但需进一步优化以应对更复杂的双臂协同操作场景。

authors_text: Andreas Schimpe,Domagoj Majstorovic,Frank Diermeyer
title: Steering Action-aware Adaptive Cruise Control for Teleoperated Driving
title_zh: 用于遥控驾驶的转向动作感知自适应巡航控制
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man and Cybernetics (SMC)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man and Cybernetics (SMC)
abstract: In this paper, a steering action-aware Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) approach for teleoperated road vehicles is proposed. In order to keep the vehicle in a safe state, the ACC approach can override the human operator's velocity control commands. The safe state is defined as a state from which the vehicle can be stopped safely, no matter which steering actions are applied by the operator. This is achieved by first sampling various potential future trajectories. In a second stage, assuming the trajectory with the highest risk, a safe and comfortable velocity profile is optimized. This yields a safe velocity control command for the vehicle. In simulations, the characteristics of the approach are compared to a Model Predictive Control-based approach that is capable of overriding both, the commanded steering angle as well as the velocity. Furthermore, in teleoperation experiments with a 1:10-scale vehicle testbed, it is demonstrated that the proposed ACC approach keeps the vehicle safe, even if the control commands from the operator would have resulted in a collision.
summary: In this paper, a steering action-aware Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) approach for teleoperated road vehicles is proposed. In order to keep the vehicle in a safe state, the ACC approach can override the human operator's velocity control commands. The safe state is defined as a state from which the vehicle can be stopped safely, no matter which steering actions are applied by the operator. This is achieved by first sampling various potential future trajectories. In a second stage, assuming the trajectory with the highest risk, a safe and comfortable velocity profile is optimized. This yields a safe velocity control command for the vehicle. In simulations, the characteristics of the approach are compared to a Model Predictive Control-based approach that is capable of overriding both, the commanded steering angle as well as the velocity. Furthermore, in teleoperation experiments with a 1:10-scale vehicle testbed, it is demonstrated that the proposed ACC approach keeps the vehicle safe, even if the control commands from the operator would have resulted in a collision.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，提出了一种用于遥控道路车辆的转向动作感知自适应巡航控制（ACC）方法。为了使车辆保持在安全状态，ACC 方法可以凌驾于操作员的速度控制命令之上。安全状态被定义为无论操作者施加何种转向动作，车辆都可以安全停止的状态。这是通过首先对各种潜在的未来轨迹进行采样来实现的。在第二阶段，假设风险最高的轨迹，优化安全舒适的速度曲线。这为车辆产生了安全的速度控制命令。在仿真中，该方法的特性与基于模型预测控制的方法进行了比较，该方法能够覆盖命令的转向角和速度。此外，在 1:10 比例车辆测试台的远程操作实验中，结果表明，即使操作员的控制命令会导致碰撞，所提出的 ACC 方法也能保证车辆安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向远程操作驾驶的转向动作感知自适应巡航控制方法，通过覆盖操作员速度指令确保车辆安全。
AI.motivation: 现有远程驾驶系统在操作员指令可能导致碰撞时缺乏有效干预机制，需设计能主动保障安全的巡航控制策略。
AI.method: 分两阶段采样潜在轨迹并优化速度曲线：首先生成多条未来轨迹，其次基于最高风险轨迹计算安全舒适的速度指令。
AI.result: 仿真对比显示该方法优于传统MPC控制，实验验证1:10比例测试平台可有效避免操作员指令导致的碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 所提ACC方法在保证驾驶舒适性的同时实现了远程操作场景下的主动安全防护，具有工程应用价值。

search_text: Steering Action-aware Adaptive Cruise Control for Teleoperated Driving 用于遥控驾驶的转向动作感知自适应巡航控制 In this paper, a steering action-aware Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) approach for teleoperated road vehicles is proposed. In order to keep the vehicle in a safe state, the ACC approach can override the human operator's velocity control commands. The safe state is defined as a state from which the vehicle can be stopped safely, no matter which steering actions are applied by the operator. This is achieved by first sampling various potential future trajectories. In a second stage, assuming the trajectory with the highest risk, a safe and comfortable velocity profile is optimized. This yields a safe velocity control command for the vehicle. In simulations, the characteristics of the approach are compared to a Model Predictive Control-based approach that is capable of overriding both, the commanded steering angle as well as the velocity. Furthermore, in teleoperation experiments with a 1:10-scale vehicle testbed, it is demonstrated that the proposed ACC approach keeps the vehicle safe, even if the control commands from the operator would have resulted in a collision. 在本文中，提出了一种用于遥控道路车辆的转向动作感知自适应巡航控制（ACC）方法。为了使车辆保持在安全状态，ACC 方法可以凌驾于操作员的速度控制命令之上。安全状态被定义为无论操作者施加何种转向动作，车辆都可以安全停止的状态。这是通过首先对各种潜在的未来轨迹进行采样来实现的。在第二阶段，假设风险最高的轨迹，优化安全舒适的速度曲线。这为车辆产生了安全的速度控制命令。在仿真中，该方法的特性与基于模型预测控制的方法进行了比较，该方法能够覆盖命令的转向角和速度。此外，在 1:10 比例车辆测试台的远程操作实验中，结果表明，即使操作员的控制命令会导致碰撞，所提出的 ACC 方法也能保证车辆安全。 本文提出一种面向远程操作驾驶的转向动作感知自适应巡航控制方法，通过覆盖操作员速度指令确保车辆安全。 Andreas Schimpe,Domagoj Majstorovic,Frank Diermeyer cs.RO

authors_text: Yun Luo,Fang Guo,Zihan Liu,Yue Zhang
title: Mere Contrastive Learning for Cross-Domain Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 跨领域情感分析的纯粹对比学习
abstract: Cross-domain sentiment analysis aims to predict the sentiment of texts in the target domain using the model trained on the source domain to cope with the scarcity of labeled data. Previous studies are mostly cross-entropy-based methods for the task, which suffer from instability and poor generalization. In this paper, we explore contrastive learning on the cross-domain sentiment analysis task. We propose a modified contrastive objective with in-batch negative samples so that the sentence representations from the same class will be pushed close while those from the different classes become further apart in the latent space. Experiments on two widely used datasets show that our model can achieve state-of-the-art performance in both cross-domain and multi-domain sentiment analysis tasks. Meanwhile, visualizations demonstrate the effectiveness of transferring knowledge learned in the source domain to the target domain and the adversarial test verifies the robustness of our model.
summary: Cross-domain sentiment analysis aims to predict the sentiment of texts in the target domain using the model trained on the source domain to cope with the scarcity of labeled data. Previous studies are mostly cross-entropy-based methods for the task, which suffer from instability and poor generalization. In this paper, we explore contrastive learning on the cross-domain sentiment analysis task. We propose a modified contrastive objective with in-batch negative samples so that the sentence representations from the same class will be pushed close while those from the different classes become further apart in the latent space. Experiments on two widely used datasets show that our model can achieve state-of-the-art performance in both cross-domain and multi-domain sentiment analysis tasks. Meanwhile, visualizations demonstrate the effectiveness of transferring knowledge learned in the source domain to the target domain and the adversarial test verifies the robustness of our model.
abstract_zh: 跨域情感分析旨在利用在源域上训练的模型来预测目标域中文本的情感，以应对标记数据的稀缺性。先前的研究大多是基于交叉熵的任务方法，其不稳定且泛化性差。在本文中，我们探索跨领域情感分析任务的对比学习。我们提出了一种带有批内负样本的修改对比目标，以便来自同一类的句子表示将被推近，而来自不同类的句子表示在潜在空间中变得更远。对两个广泛使用的数据集的实验表明，我们的模型可以在跨域和多域情感分析任务中实现最先进的性能。同时，可视化展示了将源领域学到的知识转移到目标领域的有效性，对抗性测试验证了我们模型的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的跨领域情感分析方法，通过改进对比目标提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵方法存在不稳定性和泛化能力差的问题，需探索更有效的跨领域情感分析方案。
AI.method: 设计改进的对比学习目标，利用批次内负样本使同类句子表示更接近、异类更远离。
AI.result: 在两个主流数据集上达到SOTA性能，可视化与对抗测试验证了知识迁移有效性及模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习方法有效提升跨领域情感分析性能，证明了表示学习在领域适应中的优势。

authors_text: Hung-Jui Wang,Yu-Yu Wu,Shang-Tse Chen
title: Enhancing Targeted Attack Transferability via Diversified Weight Pruning
title_zh: 通过多样化权重修剪增强针对性攻击可转移性
abstract: Malicious attackers can generate targeted adversarial examples by imposing tiny noises, forcing neural networks to produce specific incorrect outputs. With cross-model transferability, network models remain vulnerable even in black-box settings. Recent studies have shown the effectiveness of ensemble-based methods in generating transferable adversarial examples. To further enhance transferability, model augmentation methods aim to produce more networks participating in the ensemble. However, existing model augmentation methods are only proven effective in untargeted attacks. In this work, we propose Diversified Weight Pruning (DWP), a novel model augmentation technique for generating transferable targeted attacks. DWP leverages the weight pruning method commonly used in model compression. Compared with prior work, DWP protects necessary connections and ensures the diversity of the pruned models simultaneously, which we show are crucial for targeted transferability. Experiments on the ImageNet-compatible dataset under various and more challenging scenarios confirm the effectiveness: transferring to adversarially trained models, Non-CNN architectures, and Google Cloud Vision. The results show that our proposed DWP improves the targeted attack success rates with up to $10.1$%, $6.6$%, and $7.0$% on the combination of state-of-the-art methods, respectively. The source code will be made available after acceptance.
summary: Malicious attackers can generate targeted adversarial examples by imposing tiny noises, forcing neural networks to produce specific incorrect outputs. With cross-model transferability, network models remain vulnerable even in black-box settings. Recent studies have shown the effectiveness of ensemble-based methods in generating transferable adversarial examples. To further enhance transferability, model augmentation methods aim to produce more networks participating in the ensemble. However, existing model augmentation methods are only proven effective in untargeted attacks. In this work, we propose Diversified Weight Pruning (DWP), a novel model augmentation technique for generating transferable targeted attacks. DWP leverages the weight pruning method commonly used in model compression. Compared with prior work, DWP protects necessary connections and ensures the diversity of the pruned models simultaneously, which we show are crucial for targeted transferability. Experiments on the ImageNet-compatible dataset under various and more challenging scenarios confirm the effectiveness: transferring to adversarially trained models, Non-CNN architectures, and Google Cloud Vision. The results show that our proposed DWP improves the targeted attack success rates with up to $10.1$%, $6.6$%, and $7.0$% on the combination of state-of-the-art methods, respectively. The source code will be made available after acceptance.
abstract_zh: 恶意攻击者可以通过施加微小的噪音来生成有针对性的对抗性示例，迫使神经网络产生特定的错误输出。由于跨模型可转移性，即使在黑盒设置中，网络模型仍然容易受到攻击。最近的研究表明基于集成的方法在生成可转移的对抗性示例方面的有效性。为了进一步增强可转移性，模型增强方法旨在产生更多参与集成的网络。然而，现有的模型增强方法仅在非目标攻击中被证明有效。在这项工作中，我们提出了多样化权重修剪（DWP），这是一种用于生成可转移目标攻击的新型模型增强技术。 DWP 利用模型压缩中常用的权重修剪方法。与之前的工作相比，DWP 保护了必要的连接，同时确保了修剪模型的多样性，我们表明这对于有针对性的可迁移性至关重要。在各种更具挑战性的场景下对 ImageNet 兼容数据集进行的实验证实了其有效性：转移到对抗训练模型、非 CNN 架构和 Google Cloud Vision。结果表明，我们提出的 DWP 结合最先进的方法，将目标攻击成功率分别提高了 10.1$%、6.6$% 和 7.0$%。源代码将在接受后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Diversified Weight Pruning (DWP)的新方法，用于增强目标攻击在不同模型间的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有方法在未目标攻击中有效，但针对目标攻击的可迁移性提升方法仍存在不足。因此，本文旨在开发一种增强目标攻击可迁移性的模型增强技术。
AI.method: DWP通过权重剪枝技术进行模型增强，保护关键连接并确保剪枝后模型的多样性，从而提升目标攻击的可迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明，在ImageNet兼容数据集上，DWP在与现有方法结合使用时，分别提升了目标攻击成功率10.1%、6.6%和7.0%。
AI.conclusion: DWP是一种有效提升目标攻击跨模型可迁移性的方法，适用于对抗训练模型、非CNN架构及Google Cloud Vision等场景。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，在ImageNet兼容数据集上，DWP在与现有方法结合使用时，分别提升了目标攻击成功率10.1%、6.6%和7.0%。

authors_text: Debmita Bandyopadhyay,Subhadip Mukherjee,James Ball,Grégoire Vincent,David A. Coomes,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Tree species classification from hyperspectral data using graph-regularized neural networks
title_zh: 使用图正则化神经网络根据高光谱数据进行树种分类
abstract: We propose a novel graph-regularized neural network (GRNN) algorithm for tree species classification. The proposed algorithm encompasses superpixel-based segmentation for graph construction, a pixel-wise neural network classifier, and the label propagation technique to generate an accurate and realistic (emulating tree crowns) classification map on a sparsely annotated data set. GRNN outperforms several state-of-the-art techniques not only for the standard Indian Pines HSI but also achieves a high classification accuracy (approx. 92%) on a new HSI data set collected over the heterogeneous forests of French Guiana (FG) when less than 1% of the pixels are labeled. We further show that GRNN is competitive with the state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods and exhibits a small deviation in accuracy for different numbers of training samples and over repeated trials with randomly sampled labeled pixels for training.
summary: We propose a novel graph-regularized neural network (GRNN) algorithm for tree species classification. The proposed algorithm encompasses superpixel-based segmentation for graph construction, a pixel-wise neural network classifier, and the label propagation technique to generate an accurate and realistic (emulating tree crowns) classification map on a sparsely annotated data set. GRNN outperforms several state-of-the-art techniques not only for the standard Indian Pines HSI but also achieves a high classification accuracy (approx. 92%) on a new HSI data set collected over the heterogeneous forests of French Guiana (FG) when less than 1% of the pixels are labeled. We further show that GRNN is competitive with the state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods and exhibits a small deviation in accuracy for different numbers of training samples and over repeated trials with randomly sampled labeled pixels for training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的图正则化神经网络（GRNN）算法用于树种分类。所提出的算法包括用于图构建的基于超像素的分割、逐像素神经网络分类器以及标签传播技术，以在稀疏注释的数据集上生成准确且真实的（模拟树冠）分类图。 GRNN 不仅在标准印度松 HSI 方面优于多种最先进的技术，而且在法属圭亚那 (FG) 异质森林中收集的新 HSI 数据集上（当标记的像素少于 1% 时）实现了高分类精度（约 92%）。我们进一步表明，GRNN 与最先进的半监督方法相比具有竞争力，并且对于不同数量的训练样本以及使用随机采样的标记像素进行训练的重复试验，在准确性上表现出较小的偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图正则化的神经网络（GRNN）算法，用于利用高光谱数据进行树种分类，尤其在标注数据稀疏的情况下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类中常面临标注数据稀缺的问题，传统方法在稀疏标注下精度不足，需开发更高效的半监督学习方法。
AI.method: 结合超像素分割构建图结构、像素级神经网络分类器及标签传播技术，通过图正则化约束提升分类结果的连贯性与真实性。
AI.result: 在印度松数据集上优于现有方法，在法属圭亚那异质森林数据集上以不足1%标注像素达到约92%分类精度，且对训练样本数量和随机采样具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GRNN在稀疏标注场景下有效提升高光谱树种分类性能，适用于复杂森林环境，且具有良好的半监督学习稳定性。

authors_text: Pongpanut Osathitporn,Guntitat Sawadwuthikul,Punnawish Thuwajit,Kawisara Ueafuea,Thee Mateepithaktham,Narin Kunaseth,Tanut Choksatchawathi,Proadpran Punyabukkana,Emmanuel Mignot,Theerawit Wilaiprasitporn
title: RRWaveNet: A Compact End-to-End Multi-Scale Residual CNN for Robust PPG Respiratory Rate Estimation
title_zh: RRWa​​veNet：用于稳健 PPG 呼吸频率估计的紧凑型端到端多尺度残差 CNN
abstract: Respiratory rate (RR) is an important biomarker as RR changes can reflect severe medical events such as heart disease, lung disease, and sleep disorders. Unfortunately, standard manual RR counting is prone to human error and cannot be performed continuously. This study proposes a method for continuously estimating RR, RRWaveNet. The method is a compact end-to-end deep learning model which does not require feature engineering and can use low-cost raw photoplethysmography (PPG) as input signal. RRWaveNet was tested subject-independently and compared to baseline in four datasets (BIDMC, CapnoBase, WESAD, and SensAI) and using three window sizes (16, 32, and 64 seconds). RRWaveNet outperformed current state-of-the-art methods with mean absolute errors at optimal window size of 1.66 \pm 1.01, 1.59 \pm 1.08, 1.92 \pm 0.96 and 1.23 \pm 0.61 breaths per minute for each dataset. In remote monitoring settings, such as in the WESAD and SensAI datasets, we apply transfer learning to improve the performance using two other ICU datasets as pretraining datasets, reducing the MAE by up to 21$\%$. This shows that this model allows accurate and practical estimation of RR on affordable and wearable devices. Our study also shows feasibility of remote RR monitoring in the context of telemedicine and at home.
summary: Respiratory rate (RR) is an important biomarker as RR changes can reflect severe medical events such as heart disease, lung disease, and sleep disorders. Unfortunately, standard manual RR counting is prone to human error and cannot be performed continuously. This study proposes a method for continuously estimating RR, RRWaveNet. The method is a compact end-to-end deep learning model which does not require feature engineering and can use low-cost raw photoplethysmography (PPG) as input signal. RRWaveNet was tested subject-independently and compared to baseline in four datasets (BIDMC, CapnoBase, WESAD, and SensAI) and using three window sizes (16, 32, and 64 seconds). RRWaveNet outperformed current state-of-the-art methods with mean absolute errors at optimal window size of 1.66 \pm 1.01, 1.59 \pm 1.08, 1.92 \pm 0.96 and 1.23 \pm 0.61 breaths per minute for each dataset. In remote monitoring settings, such as in the WESAD and SensAI datasets, we apply transfer learning to improve the performance using two other ICU datasets as pretraining datasets, reducing the MAE by up to 21$\%$. This shows that this model allows accurate and practical estimation of RR on affordable and wearable devices. Our study also shows feasibility of remote RR monitoring in the context of telemedicine and at home.
abstract_zh: 呼吸频率 (RR) 是一个重要的生物标志物，因为 RR 的变化可以反映严重的医疗事件，例如心脏病、肺病和睡眠障碍。不幸的是，标准手动 RR 计数很容易出现人为错误，并且无法连续执行。本研究提出了一种连续估计RR的方法，RRWaveNet。该方法是一种紧凑的端到端深度学习模型，不需要特征工程，并且可以使用低成本的原始光电体积描记法（PPG）作为输入信号。 RRWa​​veNet 进行了独立测试，并与四个数据集（BIDMC、CapnoBase、WESAD 和 SensAI）中的基线进行了比较，并使用了三种窗口大小（16、32 和 64 秒）。 RRWa​​veNet 的性能优于当前最先进的方法，每个数据集的最佳窗口大小为每分钟 1.66 \pm 1.01、1.59 \pm 1.08、1.92 \pm 0.96 和 1.23 \pm 0.61 次呼吸时的平均绝对误差。在远程监控设置中，例如在 WESAD 和 SensAI 数据集中，我们使用其他两个 ICU 数据集作为预训练数据集，应用迁移学习来提高性能，将 MAE 降低高达 21$\%$。这表明该模型可以在经济实惠的可穿戴设备上准确且实用地估计 RR。我们的研究还表明了在远程医疗和家庭环境中远程 RR 监测的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RRWaveNet的紧凑型端到端多尺度残差卷积神经网络模型，用于从低成本光电容积描记（PPG）信号中持续估计呼吸频率（RR）。
AI.motivation: 传统手动呼吸频率计数易出错且无法持续监测，而现有方法依赖特征工程或复杂设备。本文旨在开发一种无需特征工程、可部署于低成本可穿戴设备的自动化连续RR估计方法，并探索远程医疗场景下的可行性。
AI.method: 设计RRWaveNet模型：采用多尺度残差结构直接处理原始PPG信号，通过端到端训练实现特征提取与RR估计；在WESAD和SensAI等远程监测数据集上应用迁移学习，利用ICU数据集预训练提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在BIDMC、CapnoBase、WESAD和SensAI四个数据集上，RRWaveNet在最优窗口尺寸下的平均绝对误差（MAE）分别为1.66±1.01、1.59±1.08、1.92±0.96和1.23±0.61次/分钟；迁移学习使WESAD和SensAI的MAE降低最高达21%。
AI.conclusion: RRWaveNet实现了低成本设备上准确且实用的RR估计，验证了其在远程医疗和家庭健康监测场景中的可行性。

RRWaveNet outperformed current state-of-the-art methods with mean absolute errors at optimal window size of 1.66 \pm 1.01, 1.59 \pm 1.08, 1.92 \pm 0.96 and 1.23 \pm 0.61 breaths per minute for each dataset. In remote monitoring settings, such as in the WESAD and SensAI datasets, we apply transfer learning to improve the performance using two other ICU datasets as pretraining datasets, reducing the MAE by up to 21$\%$. This shows that this model allows accurate and practical estimation of RR on affordable and wearable devices. Our study also shows feasibility of remote RR monitoring in the context of telemedicine and at home. 呼吸频率 (RR) 是一个重要的生物标志物，因为 RR 的变化可以反映严重的医疗事件，例如心脏病、肺病和睡眠障碍。不幸的是，标准手动 RR 计数很容易出现人为错误，并且无法连续执行。本研究提出了一种连续估计RR的方法，RRWaveNet。该方法是一种紧凑的端到端深度学习模型，不需要特征工程，并且可以使用低成本的原始光电体积描记法（PPG）作为输入信号。 RRWa​​veNet 进行了独立测试，并与四个数据集（BIDMC、CapnoBase、WESAD 和 SensAI）中的基线进行了比较，并使用了三种窗口大小（16、32 和 64 秒）。 RRWa​​veNet 的性能优于当前最先进的方法，每个数据集的最佳窗口大小为每分钟 1.66 \pm 1.01、1.59 \pm 1.08、1.92 \pm 0.96 和 1.23 \pm 0.61 次呼吸时的平均绝对误差。在远程监控设置中，例如在 WESAD 和 SensAI 数据集中，我们使用其他两个 ICU 数据集作为预训练数据集，应用迁移学习来提高性能，将 MAE 降低高达 21$\%$。这表明该模型可以在经济实惠的可穿戴设备上准确且实用地估计 RR。我们的研究还表明了在远程医疗和家庭环境中远程 RR 监测的可行性。 本文提出一种名为RRWaveNet的紧凑型端到端多尺度残差卷积神经网络模型，用于从低成本光电容积描记（PPG）信号中持续估计呼吸频率（RR）。 Pongpanut Osathitporn,Guntitat Sawadwuthikul,Punnawish Thuwajit,Kawisara Ueafuea,Thee Mateepithaktham,Narin Kunaseth,Tanut Choksatchawathi,Proadpran Punyabukkana,Emmanuel Mignot,Theerawit Wilaiprasitporn eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nan Ming,Yi Feng,Rui Fan
title: SDA-SNE: Spatial Discontinuity-Aware Surface Normal Estimation via Multi-Directional Dynamic Programming
title_zh: SDA-SNE：通过多向动态规划进行空间不连续性感知的表面法线估计
abstract: The state-of-the-art (SoTA) surface normal estimators (SNEs) generally translate depth images into surface normal maps in an end-to-end fashion. Although such SNEs have greatly minimized the trade-off between efficiency and accuracy, their performance on spatial discontinuities, e.g., edges and ridges, is still unsatisfactory. To address this issue, this paper first introduces a novel multi-directional dynamic programming strategy to adaptively determine inliers (co-planar 3D points) by minimizing a (path) smoothness energy. The depth gradients can then be refined iteratively using a novel recursive polynomial interpolation algorithm, which helps yield more reasonable surface normals. Our introduced spatial discontinuity-aware (SDA) depth gradient refinement strategy is compatible with any depth-to-normal SNEs. Our proposed SDA-SNE achieves much greater performance than all other SoTA approaches, especially near/on spatial discontinuities. We further evaluate the performance of SDA-SNE with respect to different iterations, and the results suggest that it converges fast after only a few iterations. This ensures its high efficiency in various robotics and computer vision applications requiring real-time performance. Additional experiments on the datasets with different extents of random noise further validate our SDA-SNE's robustness and environmental adaptability. Our source code, demo video, and supplementary material are publicly available at mias.group/SDA-SNE.
summary: The state-of-the-art (SoTA) surface normal estimators (SNEs) generally translate depth images into surface normal maps in an end-to-end fashion. Although such SNEs have greatly minimized the trade-off between efficiency and accuracy, their performance on spatial discontinuities, e.g., edges and ridges, is still unsatisfactory. To address this issue, this paper first introduces a novel multi-directional dynamic programming strategy to adaptively determine inliers (co-planar 3D points) by minimizing a (path) smoothness energy. The depth gradients can then be refined iteratively using a novel recursive polynomial interpolation algorithm, which helps yield more reasonable surface normals. Our introduced spatial discontinuity-aware (SDA) depth gradient refinement strategy is compatible with any depth-to-normal SNEs. Our proposed SDA-SNE achieves much greater performance than all other SoTA approaches, especially near/on spatial discontinuities. We further evaluate the performance of SDA-SNE with respect to different iterations, and the results suggest that it converges fast after only a few iterations. This ensures its high efficiency in various robotics and computer vision applications requiring real-time performance. Additional experiments on the datasets with different extents of random noise further validate our SDA-SNE's robustness and environmental adaptability. Our source code, demo video, and supplementary material are publicly available at mias.group/SDA-SNE.
abstract_zh: 最先进的（SoTA）表面法线估计器（SNE）通常以端到端的方式将深度图像转换为表面法线图。尽管此类 SNE 极大地减少了效率和精度之间的权衡，但它们在空间不连续性（例如边缘和脊）上的性能仍然不能令人满意。为了解决这个问题，本文首先引入了一种新颖的多向动态规划策略，通过最小化（路径）平滑度能量来自适应确定内点（共面 3D 点）。然后可以使用新颖的递归多项式插值算法迭代地细化深度梯度，这有助于产生更合理的表面法线。我们引入的空间不连续性感知 (SDA) 深度梯度细化策略与任何深度到法线的 SNE 兼容。我们提出的 SDA-SNE 比所有其他 SoTA 方法实现了更高的性能，特别是在空间不连续性附近/上。我们进一步评估了 SDA-SNE 在不同迭代中的性能，结果表明它仅在几次迭代后就快速收敛。这确保了其在需要实时性能的各种机器人和计算机视觉应用中的高效率。对具有不同随机噪声程度的数据集进行的额外实验进一步验证了我们的 SDA-SNE 的鲁棒性和环境适应性。我们的源代码、演示视频和补充材料可在 mias.group/SDA-SNE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的表面法线估计方法SDA-SNE，通过多方向动态规划和递归多项式插值优化空间不连续区域的法线估计。
AI.motivation: 现有表面法线估计方法在处理边缘、脊等空间不连续区域时精度不足，需改进此类区域的估计效果。
AI.method: 引入多方向动态规划策略确定共面点，结合递归多项式插值算法优化深度梯度，提出兼容现有方法的SDA深度梯度优化策略。
AI.result: SDA-SNE在空间不连续区域表现优于现有方法，迭代收敛速度快，且在不同噪声数据集上验证了鲁棒性和环境适应性。
AI.conclusion: SDA-SNE有效解决了空间不连续性问题，兼具高效性与鲁棒性，适用于实时性要求的机器人和视觉应用。

authors_text: Bahjat Kawar,Roy Ganz,Michael Elad
title: Enhancing Diffusion-Based Image Synthesis with Robust Classifier Guidance
title_zh: 通过稳健的分类器指导增强基于扩散的图像合成
abstract: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) are a recent family of generative models that achieve state-of-the-art results. In order to obtain class-conditional generation, it was suggested to guide the diffusion process by gradients from a time-dependent classifier. While the idea is theoretically sound, deep learning-based classifiers are infamously susceptible to gradient-based adversarial attacks. Therefore, while traditional classifiers may achieve good accuracy scores, their gradients are possibly unreliable and might hinder the improvement of the generation results. Recent work discovered that adversarially robust classifiers exhibit gradients that are aligned with human perception, and these could better guide a generative process towards semantically meaningful images. We utilize this observation by defining and training a time-dependent adversarially robust classifier and use it as guidance for a generative diffusion model. In experiments on the highly challenging and diverse ImageNet dataset, our scheme introduces significantly more intelligible intermediate gradients, better alignment with theoretical findings, as well as improved generation results under several evaluation metrics. Furthermore, we conduct an opinion survey whose findings indicate that human raters prefer our method's results.
summary: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) are a recent family of generative models that achieve state-of-the-art results. In order to obtain class-conditional generation, it was suggested to guide the diffusion process by gradients from a time-dependent classifier. While the idea is theoretically sound, deep learning-based classifiers are infamously susceptible to gradient-based adversarial attacks. Therefore, while traditional classifiers may achieve good accuracy scores, their gradients are possibly unreliable and might hinder the improvement of the generation results. Recent work discovered that adversarially robust classifiers exhibit gradients that are aligned with human perception, and these could better guide a generative process towards semantically meaningful images. We utilize this observation by defining and training a time-dependent adversarially robust classifier and use it as guidance for a generative diffusion model. In experiments on the highly challenging and diverse ImageNet dataset, our scheme introduces significantly more intelligible intermediate gradients, better alignment with theoretical findings, as well as improved generation results under several evaluation metrics. Furthermore, we conduct an opinion survey whose findings indicate that human raters prefer our method's results.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 是最新的生成模型系列，可实现最先进的结果。为了获得类条件生成，建议通过时间相关分类器的梯度来指导扩散过程。虽然这个想法在理论上是合理的，但基于深度学习的分类器非常容易受到基于梯度的对抗性攻击。因此，虽然传统的分类器可能获得良好的准确度分数，但它们的梯度可能不可靠，并可能阻碍生成结果的改进。最近的工作发现，对抗性鲁棒分类器表现出与人类感知一致的梯度，这些可以更好地指导生成具有语义意义的图像的过程。我们通过定义和训练一个依赖时间的对抗性鲁棒分类器来利用这一观察结果，并将其用作生成扩散模型的指导。在极具挑战性和多样化的 ImageNet 数据集上进行的实验中，我们的方案引入了明显更容易理解的中间梯度，与理论结果更好地吻合，以及在多个评估指标下改进了生成结果。此外，我们进行了一项民意调查，其结果表明人类评估者更喜欢我们方法的结果。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出通过使用鲁棒分类器指导扩散模型，以提升基于扩散的图像合成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统分类器的梯度易受对抗攻击影响，导致生成结果不可靠，而鲁棒分类器的梯度更符合人类感知，能生成语义更明确的图像。
AI.method: 定义并训练一个时间依赖的对抗鲁棒分类器，将其梯度作为扩散模型的引导，优化生成过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上实验表明，该方法生成的中间梯度更清晰，与理论结果更一致，多项评估指标提升，且人类评审更偏好其结果。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒分类器能有效提升扩散模型生成图像的质量与语义合理性，结合客观指标与人类评估验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Yi-Fan Zhang,Jindong Wang,Jian Liang,Zhang Zhang,Baosheng Yu,Liang Wang,Dacheng Tao,Xing Xie
title: Domain-Specific Risk Minimization for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 分布外泛化的特定领域风险最小化
comment: 9 papers for the main paper, 2 pages for the appendix, published in SIGKDD 2023
comments: 9 papers for the main paper, 2 pages for the appendix, published in SIGKDD 2023
abstract: Recent domain generalization (DG) approaches typically use the hypothesis learned on source domains for inference on the unseen target domain. However, such a hypothesis can be arbitrarily far from the optimal one for the target domain, induced by a gap termed ``adaptivity gap''. Without exploiting the domain information from the unseen test samples, adaptivity gap estimation and minimization are intractable, which hinders us to robustify a model to any unknown distribution. In this paper, we first establish a generalization bound that explicitly considers the adaptivity gap. Our bound motivates two strategies to reduce the gap: the first one is ensembling multiple classifiers to enrich the hypothesis space, then we propose effective gap estimation methods for guiding the selection of a better hypothesis for the target. The other method is minimizing the gap directly by adapting model parameters using online target samples. We thus propose \textbf{Domain-specific Risk Minimization (DRM)}. During training, DRM models the distributions of different source domains separately; for inference, DRM performs online model steering using the source hypothesis for each arriving target sample. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed DRM for domain generalization with the following advantages: 1) it significantly outperforms competitive baselines on different distributional shift settings; 2) it achieves either comparable or superior accuracies on all source domains compared to vanilla empirical risk minimization; 3) it remains simple and efficient during training, and 4) it is complementary to invariant learning approaches.

However, such a hypothesis can be arbitrarily far from the optimal one for the target domain, induced by a gap termed ``adaptivity gap''. Without exploiting the domain information from the unseen test samples, adaptivity gap estimation and minimization are intractable, which hinders us to robustify a model to any unknown distribution. Our bound motivates two strategies to reduce the gap: the first one is ensembling multiple classifiers to enrich the hypothesis space, then we propose effective gap estimation methods for guiding the selection of a better hypothesis for the target. The other method is minimizing the gap directly by adapting model parameters using online target samples. We thus propose \textbf{Domain-specific Risk Minimization (DRM)}. During training, DRM models the distributions of different source domains separately; for inference, DRM performs online model steering using the source hypothesis for each arriving target sample. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed DRM for domain generalization with the following advantages: 1) it significantly outperforms competitive baselines on different distributional shift settings; 2) it achieves either comparable or superior accuracies on all source domains compared to vanilla empirical risk minimization; 3) it remains simple and efficient during training, and 4) it is complementary to invariant learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 最近的域泛化（DG）方法通常使用在源域上学习的假设来推断未见过的目标域。然而，这种假设可能与目标域的最佳假设相差任意远，这是由称为“适应性差距”的差距引起的。如果不利用未见过的测试样本中的域信息，自适应间隙估计和最小化就会很棘手，这阻碍了我们针对任何未知分布增强模型。在本文中，我们首先建立一个明确考虑适应性差距的泛化界限。我们的界限激发了两种减少差距的策略：第一个是集成多个分类器以丰富假设空间，然后我们提出有效的差距估计方法来指导为目标选择更好的假设。另一种方法是通过使用在线目标样本调整模型参数来直接最小化差距。因此，我们提出\textbf{特定领域风险最小化（DRM）}。训练时，DRM分别对不同源域的分布进行建模；为了进行推理，DRM 使用每个到达目标样本的源假设执行在线模型引导。大量实验证明了所提出的 DRM 对于域泛化的有效性，具有以下优点：1）它在不同的分布偏移设置上显着优于竞争基线； 2) 与普通的经验风险最小化相比，它在所有源域上实现了相当或更高的精度； 3）它在训练过程中保持简单和高效，4）它是对不变学习方法的补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Domain-specific Risk Minimization (DRM)的方法，旨在通过减少领域适应性差距来提升模型在未知目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法因无法利用未见目标领域的信息，导致难以估计和最小化领域适应性差距，从而限制了模型对未知分布的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过两种策略缩小适应性差距：1) 集成多个分类器以丰富假设空间并提出有效的差距估计方法；2) 直接利用在线目标样本调整模型参数。DRM在训练时分别建模不同源领域分布，在推理时对每个目标样本进行在线模型调整。
AI.result: 实验表明DRM在不同分布偏移场景下显著优于基线方法，在源领域上保持与经验风险最小化相当或更优的准确率，且训练简单高效，可与不变学习方法互补。
AI.conclusion: DRM通过有效缩小领域适应性差距，为领域泛化提供了简单高效的解决方案，同时保持了对源领域的良好性能和与其他方法的兼容性。

authors_text: Johan Engström,Shu-Yuan Liu,Azadeh Dinparastdjadid,Camelia Simoiu
title: Modeling road user response timing in naturalistic settings: a surprise-based framework
title_zh: 在自然环境中模拟道路使用者的响应时间：基于惊喜的框架
abstract: There is currently no established method for evaluating human response timing across a range of naturalistic traffic conflict types. Traditional notions derived from controlled experiments, such as perception-response time, fail to account for the situation-dependency of human responses and offer no clear way to define the stimulus in many common traffic conflict scenarios. As a result, they are not well suited for application in naturalistic settings. Our main contribution is the development of a novel framework for measuring and modeling response times in naturalistic traffic conflicts applicable to automated driving systems as well as other traffic safety domains. The framework suggests that response timing must be understood relative to the subject's current (prior) belief and is always embedded in, and dependent on, the dynamically evolving situation. The response process is modeled as a belief update process driven by perceived violations to this prior belief, that is, by surprising stimuli. The framework resolves two key limitations with traditional notions of response time when applied in naturalistic scenarios: (1) The strong situation-dependence of response timing and (2) how to unambiguously define the stimulus. Resolving these issues is a challenge that must be addressed by any response timing model intended to be applied in naturalistic traffic conflicts. We show how the framework can be implemented by means of a relatively simple heuristic model fit to naturalistic human response data from real crashes and near crashes from the SHRP2 dataset and discuss how it is, in principle, generalizable to any traffic conflict scenario. We also discuss how the response timing framework can be implemented computationally based on evidence accumulation enhanced by machine learning-based generative models and the information-theoretic concept of surprise.
summary: There is currently no established method for evaluating human response timing across a range of naturalistic traffic conflict types. Traditional notions derived from controlled experiments, such as perception-response time, fail to account for the situation-dependency of human responses and offer no clear way to define the stimulus in many common traffic conflict scenarios. As a result, they are not well suited for application in naturalistic settings. Our main contribution is the development of a novel framework for measuring and modeling response times in naturalistic traffic conflicts applicable to automated driving systems as well as other traffic safety domains. The framework suggests that response timing must be understood relative to the subject's current (prior) belief and is always embedded in, and dependent on, the dynamically evolving situation. The response process is modeled as a belief update process driven by perceived violations to this prior belief, that is, by surprising stimuli. The framework resolves two key limitations with traditional notions of response time when applied in naturalistic scenarios: (1) The strong situation-dependence of response timing and (2) how to unambiguously define the stimulus. Resolving these issues is a challenge that must be addressed by any response timing model intended to be applied in naturalistic traffic conflicts. We show how the framework can be implemented by means of a relatively simple heuristic model fit to naturalistic human response data from real crashes and near crashes from the SHRP2 dataset and discuss how it is, in principle, generalizable to any traffic conflict scenario. We also discuss how the response timing framework can be implemented computationally based on evidence accumulation enhanced by machine learning-based generative models and the information-theoretic concept of surprise.
abstract_zh: 目前还没有既定的方法来评估人类在一系列自然交通冲突类型中的反应时间。来自受控实验的传统概念，例如感知响应时间，无法解释人类反应的情况依赖性，并且没有提供明确的方法来定义许多常见交通冲突场景中的刺激。因此，它们不太适合在自然环境中应用。我们的主要贡献是开发了一种新颖的框架，用于测量和建模自然交通冲突中的响应时间，适用于自动驾驶系统以及其他交通安全领域。该框架建议，响应时间必须相对于受试者当前（先前）的信念来理解，并且始终嵌入并依赖于动态变化的情况。响应过程被建模为由感知到的对先前信念的违反（即由令人惊讶的刺激）驱动的信念更新过程。该框架解决了传统响应时间概念在自然场景中应用时的两个关键限制：（1）响应时间的强烈情境依赖性；（2）如何明确定义刺激。解决这些问题是任何旨在应用于自然交通冲突的响应时序模型都必须解决的挑战。我们展示了如何通过相对简单的启发式模型来实现该框架，该模型适合来自 SHRP2 数据集的真实碰撞和接近碰撞的自然人类响应数据，并讨论原则上如何将其推广到任何交通冲突场景。我们还讨论了如何基于基于机器学习的生成模型和惊喜的信息理论概念增强的证据积累来计算实现响应时间框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于意外刺激的框架，用于建模自然交通冲突场景中道路使用者的响应时间。
AI.motivation: 传统反应时间模型无法适应自然交通场景中情境依赖性和刺激定义模糊的问题，亟需新方法解决实际交通冲突中的响应时间评估难题。
AI.method: 通过构建基于先验信念更新的响应模型，利用感知到的意外刺激驱动反应过程，并结合SHRP2真实碰撞数据验证框架可行性，同时提出机器学习增强的计算实现方案。
AI.result: 框架成功解决了传统模型的情境依赖性和刺激定义问题，适用于多种交通冲突场景，并可通过启发式模型和生成模型实现计算化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自然交通场景中的响应时间建模提供了理论基础和计算工具，对自动驾驶和交通安全领域具有重要应用价值。

We also discuss how the response timing framework can be implemented computationally based on evidence accumulation enhanced by machine learning-based generative models and the information-theoretic concept of surprise. 目前还没有既定的方法来评估人类在一系列自然交通冲突类型中的反应时间。来自受控实验的传统概念，例如感知响应时间，无法解释人类反应的情况依赖性，并且没有提供明确的方法来定义许多常见交通冲突场景中的刺激。因此，它们不太适合在自然环境中应用。我们的主要贡献是开发了一种新颖的框架，用于测量和建模自然交通冲突中的响应时间，适用于自动驾驶系统以及其他交通安全领域。该框架建议，响应时间必须相对于受试者当前（先前）的信念来理解，并且始终嵌入并依赖于动态变化的情况。响应过程被建模为由感知到的对先前信念的违反（即由令人惊讶的刺激）驱动的信念更新过程。该框架解决了传统响应时间概念在自然场景中应用时的两个关键限制：（1）响应时间的强烈情境依赖性；（2）如何明确定义刺激。解决这些问题是任何旨在应用于自然交通冲突的响应时序模型都必须解决的挑战。我们展示了如何通过相对简单的启发式模型来实现该框架，该模型适合来自 SHRP2 数据集的真实碰撞和接近碰撞的自然人类响应数据，并讨论原则上如何将其推广到任何交通冲突场景。我们还讨论了如何基于基于机器学习的生成模型和惊喜的信息理论概念增强的证据积累来计算实现响应时间框架。 本文提出一种基于意外刺激的框架，用于建模自然交通冲突场景中道路使用者的响应时间。 Johan Engström,Shu-Yuan Liu,Azadeh Dinparastdjadid,Camelia Simoiu cs.HC

authors_text: Yichen Peng,Chunqi Zhao,Haoran Xie,Tsukasa Fukusato,Kazunori Miyata,Takeo Igarashi
title: DualMotion: Global-to-Local Casual Motion Design for Character Animations
title_zh: DualMotion：角色动画的全局到局部休闲运动设计
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures, under submission, video is here https://youtu.be/-tk8q8LSiL0
comments: 10 pages, 10 figures, under submission, video is here https://youtu.be/-tk8q8LSiL0
abstract: Animating 3D characters using motion capture data requires basic expertise and manual labor. To support the creativity of animation design and make it easier for common users, we present a sketch-based interface DualMotion, with rough sketches as input for designing daily-life animations of characters, such as walking and jumping.Our approach enables to combine global motions of lower limbs and the local motion of the upper limbs in a database by utilizing a two-stage design strategy. Users are allowed to design a motion by starting with drawing a rough trajectory of a body/lower limb movement in the global design stage. The upper limb motions are then designed by drawing several more relative motion trajectories in the local design stage. We conduct a user study and verify the effectiveness and convenience of the proposed system in creative activities.
summary: Animating 3D characters using motion capture data requires basic expertise and manual labor. To support the creativity of animation design and make it easier for common users, we present a sketch-based interface DualMotion, with rough sketches as input for designing daily-life animations of characters, such as walking and jumping.Our approach enables to combine global motions of lower limbs and the local motion of the upper limbs in a database by utilizing a two-stage design strategy. Users are allowed to design a motion by starting with drawing a rough trajectory of a body/lower limb movement in the global design stage. The upper limb motions are then designed by drawing several more relative motion trajectories in the local design stage. We conduct a user study and verify the effectiveness and convenience of the proposed system in creative activities.
abstract_zh: 使用动作捕捉数据制作 3D 角色动画需要基本的专业知识和体力劳动。为了支持动画设计的创造力并方便普通用户，我们提出了一个基于草图的界面 DualMotion，以草图作为输入来设计角色的日常生活动画，例如行走和跳跃。我们的方法能够利用两阶段设计策略将下肢的全局运动和上肢的局部运动结合在数据库中。用户可以在全局设计阶段从绘制身体/下肢运动的粗略轨迹开始设计运动。然后在局部设计阶段通过绘制更多的相对运动轨迹来设计上肢运动。我们进行了用户研究，并验证了所提出的系统在创意活动中的有效性和便利性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于草图的DualMotion系统，通过全局到局部的两阶段设计策略，使用户能够更便捷地创作角色动画。
AI.motivation: 传统动作捕捉技术需要专业知识和大量手动操作，限制了动画创作的普及性和创造性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段设计策略，第一阶段绘制下肢全局运动轨迹，第二阶段通过相对运动轨迹设计上肢局部动作，并结合数据库整合运动数据。
AI.result: 用户研究验证了DualMotion在创意活动中的有效性，证明其能显著提升动画设计的便捷性与创作效率。
AI.conclusion: DualMotion为非专业用户提供了直观的角色动画设计工具，通过分阶段草图输入实现了复杂动作的高效生成。

authors_text: Jiwon Kim,Youngjo Min,Daehwan Kim,Gyuseong Lee,Junyoung Seo,Kwangrok Ryoo,Seungryong Kim
title: ConMatch: Semi-Supervised Learning with Confidence-Guided Consistency Regularization
title_zh: ConMatch：具有置信引导一致性正则化的半监督学习
abstract: We present a novel semi-supervised learning framework that intelligently leverages the consistency regularization between the model's predictions from two strongly-augmented views of an image, weighted by a confidence of pseudo-label, dubbed ConMatch. While the latest semi-supervised learning methods use weakly- and strongly-augmented views of an image to define a directional consistency loss, how to define such direction for the consistency regularization between two strongly-augmented views remains unexplored. To account for this, we present novel confidence measures for pseudo-labels from strongly-augmented views by means of weakly-augmented view as an anchor in non-parametric and parametric approaches. Especially, in parametric approach, we present, for the first time, to learn the confidence of pseudo-label within the networks, which is learned with backbone model in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we also present a stage-wise training to boost the convergence of training. When incorporated in existing semi-supervised learners, ConMatch consistently boosts the performance. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our ConMatch over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies. Code has been made publicly available at https://github.com/JiwonCocoder/ConMatch.
summary: We present a novel semi-supervised learning framework that intelligently leverages the consistency regularization between the model's predictions from two strongly-augmented views of an image, weighted by a confidence of pseudo-label, dubbed ConMatch. While the latest semi-supervised learning methods use weakly- and strongly-augmented views of an image to define a directional consistency loss, how to define such direction for the consistency regularization between two strongly-augmented views remains unexplored. To account for this, we present novel confidence measures for pseudo-labels from strongly-augmented views by means of weakly-augmented view as an anchor in non-parametric and parametric approaches. Especially, in parametric approach, we present, for the first time, to learn the confidence of pseudo-label within the networks, which is learned with backbone model in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we also present a stage-wise training to boost the convergence of training. When incorporated in existing semi-supervised learners, ConMatch consistently boosts the performance. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our ConMatch over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies. Code has been made publicly available at https://github.com/JiwonCocoder/ConMatch.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的半监督学习框架，该框架智能地利用图像的两个强增强视图的模型预测之间的一致性正则化，并通过伪标签的置信度进行加权，称为 ConMatch。虽然最新的半监督学习方法使用图像的弱增强和强增强视图来定义方向一致性损失，但如何定义两个强增强视图之间的一致性正则化的方向仍有待探索。为了解释这一点，我们通过弱增强视图作为非参数和参数方法中的锚点，提出了来自强增强视图的伪标签的新颖置信度度量。特别是，在参数方法中，我们首次提出学习网络内伪标签的置信度，这是通过骨干模型以端到端的方式学习的。此外，我们还提出了分阶段训练，以提高训练的衔接性。当融入现有的半监督学习器时，ConMatch 可以持续提高性能。我们进行实验来证明我们的 ConMatch 相对于最新方法的有效性，并提供广泛的消融研究。代码已在 https://github.com/JiwonCocoder/ConMatch 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督学习框架ConMatch，通过置信度引导的伪标签一致性正则化，利用图像的两个强增强视图进行智能学习。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法在弱增强和强增强视图间定义方向性一致性损失，但如何在两个强增强视图间定义一致性方向尚未被探索。
AI.method: 通过弱增强视图作为锚点，提出非参数和参数化方法计算强增强视图伪标签的置信度，首次在参数化方法中端到端学习伪标签置信度，并采用分阶段训练策略。
AI.result: ConMatch在多个数据集上优于最新方法，消融实验验证了有效性和组件贡献，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ConMatch通过置信度引导的一致性正则化有效解决了强增强视图间一致性方向问题，提升了半监督学习性能。

While the latest semi-supervised learning methods use weakly- and strongly-augmented views of an image to define a directional consistency loss, how to define such direction for the consistency regularization between two strongly-augmented views remains unexplored. To account for this, we present novel confidence measures for pseudo-labels from strongly-augmented views by means of weakly-augmented view as an anchor in non-parametric and parametric approaches. Especially, in parametric approach, we present, for the first time, to learn the confidence of pseudo-label within the networks, which is learned with backbone model in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we also present a stage-wise training to boost the convergence of training. When incorporated in existing semi-supervised learners, ConMatch consistently boosts the performance. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our ConMatch over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies. authors_text: Jianming Liang,Guanglu Song,Biao Leng,Yu Liu
title: Unifying Visual Perception by Dispersible Points Learning
title_zh: 通过分散点学习统一视觉感知
abstract: We present a conceptually simple, flexible, and universal visual perception head for variant visual tasks, e.g., classification, object detection, instance segmentation and pose estimation, and different frameworks, such as one-stage or two-stage pipelines. Our approach effectively identifies an object in an image while simultaneously generating a high-quality bounding box or contour-based segmentation mask or set of keypoints. The method, called UniHead, views different visual perception tasks as the dispersible points learning via the transformer encoder architecture. Given a fixed spatial coordinate, UniHead adaptively scatters it to different spatial points and reasons about their relations by transformer encoder. It directly outputs the final set of predictions in the form of multiple points, allowing us to perform different visual tasks in different frameworks with the same head design. We show extensive evaluations on ImageNet classification and all three tracks of the COCO suite of challenges, including object detection, instance segmentation and pose estimation. Without bells and whistles, UniHead can unify these visual tasks via a single visual head design and achieve comparable performance compared to expert models developed for each task.We hope our simple and universal UniHead will serve as a solid baseline and help promote universal visual perception research. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniHead.
summary: We present a conceptually simple, flexible, and universal visual perception head for variant visual tasks, e.g., classification, object detection, instance segmentation and pose estimation, and different frameworks, such as one-stage or two-stage pipelines. Our approach effectively identifies an object in an image while simultaneously generating a high-quality bounding box or contour-based segmentation mask or set of keypoints. The method, called UniHead, views different visual perception tasks as the dispersible points learning via the transformer encoder architecture. Given a fixed spatial coordinate, UniHead adaptively scatters it to different spatial points and reasons about their relations by transformer encoder. It directly outputs the final set of predictions in the form of multiple points, allowing us to perform different visual tasks in different frameworks with the same head design. We show extensive evaluations on ImageNet classification and all three tracks of the COCO suite of challenges, including object detection, instance segmentation and pose estimation. Without bells and whistles, UniHead can unify these visual tasks via a single visual head design and achieve comparable performance compared to expert models developed for each task.We hope our simple and universal UniHead will serve as a solid baseline and help promote universal visual perception research. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Sense-X/UniHead.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种概念上简单、灵活且通用的视觉感知头，用于各种视觉任务，例如分类、对象检测、实例分割和姿势估计，以及不同的框架，例如一级或两级管道。我们的方法可以有效地识别图像中的对象，同时生成高质量的边界框或基于轮廓的分割掩模或关键点集。该方法称为 UniHead，将不同的视觉感知任务视为通过 Transformer 编码器架构学习的分散点。给定一个固定的空间坐标，UniHead 自适应地将其分散到不同的空间点，并通过 Transformer 编码器推理它们的关系。它直接以多个点的形式输出最终的预测集，使我们能够以相同的头部设计在不同的框架中执行不同的视觉任务。我们展示了对 ImageNet 分类和 COCO 挑战套件的所有三个轨道的广泛评估，包括对象检测、实例分割和姿势估计。没有花里胡哨的东西，UniHead 可以通过单一视觉头设计来统一这些视觉任务，并与为每个任务开发的专家模型相比实现可比的性能。我们希望我们简单且通用的 UniHead 将作为坚实的基线，并有助于促进通用视觉感知研究。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Sense-X/UniHead 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UniHead的统一视觉感知头部，能够通过可分散点学习机制处理多种视觉任务（如分类、目标检测、实例分割和姿态估计）。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉任务通常需要针对不同任务设计独立的模型结构，导致冗余和复杂性。本文旨在通过单一头部设计统一处理多种视觉任务，简化模型架构并提升通用性。
AI.method: UniHead基于Transformer编码器架构，通过固定空间坐标自适应分散到不同空间点，并利用Transformer编码器学习点间关系，直接输出多点形式的预测结果，适配不同任务和框架。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和COCO数据集的检测、分割及姿态估计任务中，UniHead在无需额外优化的情况下达到与任务专用模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: UniHead为通用视觉感知研究提供了简单且有效的基线方案，其代码和模型已开源，有望推动多任务统一模型的发展。
